5.11: “Mbweda hemwe wanhu wowaliga na kuwabocheleza, na kuwasinjizila vinhu vihile, kwa mbuli ya heni.
5.12: Msangalale na kusechelela, kwa vila chonolo chompegwa chowa chikulu kilanga. Avyo ndo wawabocheleze waloli wawele bahano muisi hemwe hamnoya. Mwino na lumuli (Malichi 9:50; Lukasi 14:34-35)
5.13: “Hemwe mwa mwino wa wanhu muisi, wone mwino uwe ulihela unoni, wonojezwa na choni? Haiwa chinhu ng'hatu, ila yotajigwa kunze na kubijigwa na wanhu.
5.14: “Hemwe mwa lumuli lwa wanhu muisi yeng'ha! Muji uzenjigwe kuchidunda, hauchivisa hebu.
5.15: Kuduhu wanhu hawawesaga chenje na kugubika na chidoto, ila wawikaga honhu ha kuwichila chenje uwamulichila wanhu wawele mng'handa.
5.16: Vivila, iwagana wone lumuli lwenu luwe lumulika hali wanhu, leka wagone gala ganojile gomditile, wakamtogole Mhaza wa hemwe yawele kilanga. Malanguso galinguwala malajizo
5.17: “Mleche kijesa kota mbuya kutengula malajizo ga Musa na ulanguso wa waloli. Suyile kutengula, mbuya kugomanjiza.
5.18: Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, mbaka baho isi yeng'ha na kilanga hovikola, kuduhu ne honhu hadodo ng'hatu gandichigwe kuli malajizo hokusigwa, mbaka geng'ha genele.
5.19: Leka, yoneche yobena mzilo uli udodo kwa weng'ha, na kuwalangusa wanhu wanji wakole kota hihyo, ayo kowa mdodo ng'hatu kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi. Ila yula yobatilila na kuwalangusa wanhu wanji, heye kowa mng'hangala kuli undewa wa kilanga.
5.20: Mina vyondiwalonjelani, ganojile ga hemwe wone hagawele gapulute ng'hatu kusinda gala ga Mafalisayo na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, hamkwinjila ng'oo kuli undewa wa kilanga. Malanguso ga kuzudila (Lukasi 12:57-59)
5.21: “Mina muhulika kota wanhu wa katali na walonjelwa. ‘Uleche kukopola. Heye yokopola yomgana yataguswe.’
5.22: Ila heni ndanguwalonjelani, munhu yoneche yomzudila mng'holoze, yomlapa kutaguswa. Yalingumbeza mng'holoze, kohilikwa kwa walingutagusa. Yalingumchema mng'holoze. ‘Hegwe kwa mpoka,’ Kanguganigwa kwinjila kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu.
5.23: Leka, wone uhiliche nhambiko ya hegwe hali honhu ha kulavila nhambiko na baho ukumbuchila kota kwangilewa na mng'holozo,
5.24: ileche nhambiko yowigale hali honhu ha kulavila nhambiko, uhiluche wikale na mng'holozo mihanyise gamale, ndo uhiluche kulavya nhambiko kwa Nguluwi.
5.25: “Mihanyise na munhu yakulonjeleze hegwe himahima muwele mnzila, wone huditile ayo, homluta honhu ha kutagusa, kokuhilika kwa mtagusa na heye kokuwika mmoko wa wamizi na hewo wokuhindila mchinweng'ho.
5.26: Ndangukulonjelani ndikomya, hulawa hebu amo, mbaka ulavye sendi ya mwiso. Malanguso galinguwala ung'hondwa
5.27: “Muhulika kota wanhu na walonjelwa. ‘Mleche kudita ung'hondwa!’
5.28: Ila heni ndanguwalonjela, Yomlola mdala kwa kumgana, kowa yaditile ung'hondwa mnhumbula mwa heye.
5.29: Lelo wone iziho lyako lya kudilo likudite uwifye, ling'ondole na kulitaga kutali. Igana ng'hatu kutaga chitomo chimwe mlukuli, kwa lukuli lweng'ha kwinjila kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu.
5.30: Wone moko wa hegwe wa kudilo, ukudite uwifye, uteme utaje kutali. Yowa goya uwe ulihela moko umwe, leka lukuli lweng'ha lwinjile kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu. Malanguso kuwala kulekana (Matei 19:9; Malichi 10:11-12; Lukasi 16:18)
5.31: “Na ilonjigwa nakatali kahi, ‘Yalingumleka mchewake, imgana yamwandichile kalatasi ya luleko.’
5.32: Leka heni ndanguwalonjelani, wone mlume yamleche mchewake, kwa mbuli yoneche ila haiwele ya ung'hondwa kanguwifya kwa kumdita mdala yawe mng'hondwa, na munhu yoneche yomhola mdala yalechigwe, kangudita ung'hondwa. Malanguso galinguwala kilaha
5.33: “Kahi na muhulika kota wanhu wa katali nawalonjelwa. ‘Uleche kuleka vyowilahe, udite vila vyowilahile kwa Mkulu.’
5.34: Leka heni ndanguwalonjela, mleche kilaha ng'hatu, haiwele kilanga, kwa vila ndo chigoda cha undewa cha Nguluwi.
5.35: Haiwele kwa isi, kwa vila ndo chigoda cha heye cha kuwichila magulu, haiwele kwa Yelusalemu kwa vila ndo honhu ha mndewa mkulu.
5.36: Na uleche kilaha kwa mutwi wa hegwe, kwa vila hujeza hebu kuidita mnvili imwe iwe nzelu, ama iwe nhitu.
5.37: Houlonga, ‘Ena’ iwe ‘Ena,’ Na houlonga, ‘Hebu,’ Leka ng'hatu iwe ‘Hebu.’ Choneche chonjezeche kwa ago kulawa kwa ayula mwihe. Malanguso galinguwala kihilusila (Lukasi 6:29-30)
5.38: “Muhulika kota nailonjigwa. ‘Iziho kwa iziho na izino kwa izino.’
5.39: Ila heni ndanguwalonjelani, uleche kumhilusila munhu mwihe. Munhu yakuzabule izeze lya kudilo, mgalamlile kahi na lya kumoso.
5.40: Munhu yokuhilika kuli chitala yogana kukuholela igwanda lyako, mleche yahole kahi na ikoti lyako.
5.41: Munhu yokukola lupichi kidwika momholo ya heye utali wa chilomita imwe, widwiche chilomita mbili.
5.42: Yokulanda umupe, na uleche kumuhinduchizila chigosi yalingugana umwaziche chinhu. Kuwagana wang'honyo (Lukasi 6:27-28,32-36)
5.43: “Muhulika kota vyoilonjigwe. ‘Migane lomlingikala hamwe habehi, na kumwihilwa nayali kihilwa na hegwe.’
5.44: Leka heni ndanguwalonjela, muwagane na wang'honyo wa hemwe, na kuwalandila walinguwabocheleza hemwe.
5.45: Leka muwe wana wa Mhaza wa hemwe yawele kilanga. Heye kawaga yowamulichila lumuli awala wehile na watanganiche na kuwatowela nhonya awala wehile na watanganiche.
5.46: Hambi mopegwa chinhu chachi, kwa kuwagana walinguwagana hemwe? Kuduhu, na wakongoza sendi za kodi waditaga hiho!
5.47: Wone mlinguwalamusa wang'holozenu yeka, ndaze, mowa mditile vinhu vya hihi hela? Na wanhu hawawele Wayahudi waditaga hiho.
5.48: Leka muwe mtanganiche kota Mhaza wa hemwe yawele kilanga vyoyatanganiche.

6.1: “Mwilolele, mleche kudita madito ganojile hali wanhu leka moneche na hewo. Lomdita hino, Mhaza wa hemwe yawele kilanga howatogola hebu.
6.2: “Lelo loumtanza mnzunwa, uleche kitogola hali wanhu kota wadesi vyowalingudita kuli ng'handa ya kusalila na mnzila, wopala wanhu wawatogole. Ndangulonga ndikomya, wowa wabochele chonolo cha hewo.
6.3: Ila hegwe houmtanza mnzunwa, udite ahyo kota yula yondilingumgana ng'hatu wa habehi na hegwe yaleche kuvizela choudita.
6.4: Ulavye utanzi wa hegwe kwa uviso, Mhaza wa hegwe yalingugona gavisigwe, kokutogola. Malanguso ga kulanda (Lukasi 11:2-4)
6.5: “Lomlanda, mleche kudita kota wahadi. Hewo waganaga kwima na kutambichiza mng'handa ya kusalila na mfungo mwa nzila wogana wanhu wawalole. Ndangulonga ndikomya, awo mina wabochela chonolo cha hewo.
6.6: Ila hegwe houlanda, winjile mchihengo na uhinde lwizi, hamba umlande Mhaza halingoneka. Na heye Mhaza wa hegwe, yalingugona gavisigwe, kokutogola.
6.7: “Lomlanda, uleche kuhabuka gamwe gago kota wanhu hawamzelele Nguluwi. Hewo wangijesa kota Nguluwi kowahulichiza kwa vila wangulonga ulonzi winji.
6.8: Mleche kiwhana na hewo, Mhaza wa hemwe kovizela chomgana hala mng'hali ne kumlanda!
6.9: Lelo ahino ndo mlinguganigwa kulanda. “ ‘Mhaza wa hetwe uwele kilanga, itagwa lya hegwe litogoligwe,
6.10: undewa wa hegwe uye, lyougana likoleche hano mu isi, liwe kota vyoliwele kilanga.
6.11: Utugalile lehano chilyo cha hetwe chotulingugana.
6.12: Utusile gala gotuwifile, kota vila hetwe vyo tuwosele wala watuzudize.
6.13: Uleche kutwinjiza kuli kujezigwa, Ila utulohole na yula mwihe.’ (Kwa vila undewa ndo wa hegwe, na ludali, na ukulu mbaka mazuwa gose. Ena.)
6.14: “Mina lomuwosela wanhu gehile gowaditile, Mhaza wa hemwe yawele kilanga, kowosela hemwe gehile gomditile kahi.
6.15: Ila wone mleche kuwosela wanhu wanji gehile gowaditile, na heye Mhaza, howosela hemwe gehile gomditile. Malanguso ga kwesela kulya
6.16: “Homukwesela kulya, mleche kudita kota wadesi, hewo wakwisukaga kumeho, wogana wanhu wawalole kota wesela kulya. Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, kota hewo, mina wabochela chonolo cha hewo.
6.17: Ila hegwe wone wesele kulya, uhovuje kumeho na ubakalize mafuta kumutwi kwa hegwe.
6.18: Leka wanhu waleche kuvizela kota kwesela kulya, ila uzeleche hela na Mhaza wa hegwe halingoneka. Na heye Mhaza wa hegwe yalingona gavisigwe, kokutogola. Ng'hano kilanga (Lukasi 12:33-34)
6.19: “Mleche kiwichila lufufu hano muisi kuwele na mifukuzi na ng'angaga ili nguwifya, na wahizi wokwinjila na kuhiza.
6.20: Miwichile ng'hano kilanga kuwele kuduhu mifukuzi na ng'angaga wolemwa kuwifya, na wahizi hawokwinjila kuhiza.
6.21: Leka ahala hoiwele ng'hano ya hegwe, ndo na nhumbula ya hegwe hoiwa. Lumuli lwa lukuli (Lukasi 11:34-36)
6.22: “Iziho ndo lumuli lwa lukuli. Wone iziho lyako liwe likomu, lukuli lweng'ha lowa mlumuli.
6.23: Wone iziho lyako liwe litamwa, lelo lukuli lweng'ha lowa lutitile, na wone lumuli luwele mgati mlukuli lwako, luwe kuli jiza, lelo alyo jiza lya kudumbiza ng'hatu! Nguluwi na lufufu (Lukasi 16:13)
6.24: “Haduhu munhu yokola mijito kwa wakulu weli. Mina komzudila yumwe na kumgana yunji, ama kowa yomhulichiza yumwe na kumbeza yunji. Howeza kumfugamila Nguluwi na lufufu. Mleche kuwa na lunhwinhwi (Lukasi 12:22-31)
6.25: “Ndanguwalonjelani hemwe, mleche kijesa kuli ukomu wa hemwe, molya choni ama monwa choni leka muwe na ukomu, ama movala choni. Ndaze, ukomu unoga kusinda chilyo na lukuli lunoga kusinda nguwo.
6.26: Mvilole videje, havilingunyala nyhadikwa, havilingubeta nyhadikwa, kahi vyahela ng'hano. Leka ahyo Mhaza wa hemwe kilanga kanguwahombela. Lelo hemwe mnoga kusinda awo.
6.27: Ndaze, hagati ha hemwe kuna munhu kwa mbuli ya lunhwinhwi yoweza kuhejeza ne saa imwe ya kikala mu isi?
6.28: “Ndaze mwangijesa chomvala? Mlole uluwa wa kisolo vyoulingutitima! Hagalingukola chinhu choneche.
6.29: Ila ndanguwalonjelani, na heye Solomoni, na lufufu lwake lweng'ha, nahavalile goya kota uluwa umwenga kuli uluwa umwenga.
6.30: Nguluwi yalingugana mahamba gawe na mibadu, na misolo lehano jangutitima na mitondo janguvunda na kujisoma mchiluli! Ndaze, howaditilani hemwe mzidi? Hemwe wanhu muwele na makundo mado!
6.31: “Leka mleche kuwa na lunhwinhwi. ‘Tolya choni? Tonwa choni? Na tovala choni?’
6.32: Mina vyeng'ha vyangugailwa na wanhu hawamzelele Nguluwi. Mhaza yawele kilanga, kavizela kota mwangugana vinhu vyeng'ha avyo.
6.33: Ahyo mijeseni tandi undewa wa Nguluwi, na gala goyogana heye na ago geng'ha kowapa hemwe na vinhu viyage.
6.34: Leka, mleche kuwa na lunhwinhwi na ga mitondo. Mitondo yowa na nongwa yake. Nongwa ya zuwa imwe yowatosani kwa zuwa ayo.

7.1: “Mleche kuwatagusa wanhu wanji, mleche namwe kutaguswa na Nguluwi.
7.2: Kwa vila vyomuwatagusa wanji, na hemwe namwe vyomtagusigwa hihyo na Nguluwi, chipimilo chichila cho mpimila kwa wanji, ndo Nguluwi choyopimila kwa hemwe.
7.3: Lekachoni, kwanguchona chibanzi chiwele miziho lya mng'holozo, ila uleka kuchona ching'anzi chiwele miziho lya hegwe?
7.4: Ama, koweza ndaze kumlonjela mng'holozo kota, ‘Mng'holozangu tandi ndikuse chibanzi chiwele miziho lya hegwe,’ Akuno nagwe uwele na ching'anzi chiwele miziho lya hegwe?
7.5: Kwamdesi hegwe! Use tandi chibanzi chiwele miziho lyako ndo koweza kulavya ching'anzi chiwele miziho lya mng'holozo.
7.6: “Mleche kutozela mibwa vinhu vilavigwe kwa Nguluwi, waleche kugaluka na kuwalumaga. Na hihyo mleche kutozela migubi vinhu vyenu vyelile, waleche kuvibiganga. Ulande na upale na udumize lwizi (Lukasi 11:9-13)
7.7: “Mlande namwe mopegwa, na mpale namwe movyona, na mhodize lwizi, namwe mochumulilwa.
7.8: Mina yoneche yolanda kopegwa, na yalingupala kachonaga na yohodiza lwizi, kochumulilwa.
7.9: Hambi kabaho yumwe mwa hemwe, wone mwana wa heye yamlande ibumunda komha iganga?
7.10: Ama, wone yalande somba, komha izoka?
7.11: Kota lelo hemwe, hanga lomwihile, mvizela kuwapa wana wa hemwe vinhu vinojile, ndangukomya Mhaza wa kilanga, kodita vikulu ng'hatu na kowapa ganojile awala weng'ha walingumlanda.
7.12: “Vyeng'ha vyo mlingugana wanhu wawaditileni hemwe, muwaditile hewo hiho. Ahi ndo vyogalingulonga malajizo ga Musa na malanguso ga waloli. Lwizi luzisili (Lukasi 13:24)
7.13: “Mwinjile kukolela lwizi luzisili. Kwa vila nzila ilikulongoza kuli kudumigwa ngazi, na lwizi lwa kwinjilila amo lugazi, walinguluta nzila ayo wenji.
7.14: Ila nzila ilikulongoza kuli ukomu nzisili, na lwizi lwa kwinjilila amo luzisili, wanhu wachefu hela ndo woizela nzila ayo. Igodi na mafuza gake (Lukasi 6:43-44)
7.15: “Mwilole na Waloli wa udesi. Hewo wanguya kwa hemwe wokoneka kota ming'holo kwa kunze, ila kwa mgati mibwa ja kisolo jing'hang'hale.
7.16: Mowazela kwa madito ga hewo. Ndaze, wanhu hubawaga ububu hali migodi ja miwa na misada kuli mbijili? Hebu!
7.17: Leka, igodi linojile lilelaga mafuza ganojile, na igodi lihile lilelaga mafuza gehile.
7.18: Igodi linojile halilelaga mafuza gehile, na igodi lihile halilelaga mafuza ganojile.
7.19: Chila igodi halilingulela mafuza ganojile, wotemigwa na kutozigwa mchiluli.
7.20: Kwa hino, mowazela waloli wa udesi kwa madito ga hewo. Siwazelele hemwe (Lukasi 13:25-27)
7.21: “Haiwele chila munhu yondonjela, ‘Mkulu, Mkulu’ Kokwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi, leka yula yokweneza yaganile Mhaza wa heni yawele kilanga.
7.22: Wenji wondonjela zuwa lila lya utaguso, ‘Mkulu, Mkulu! Kwa itagwa lyako natwali tulangusa usenga wa hegwe na kwa itagwa lyako tulavya vijeni na kukola vinduzanduza vinji.’
7.23: Aho, ndowalonjela, ‘Nasiwazelele hemwe ng'oo, muche kumwando kwa heni, hemwe mlingudita gehile.’ Walinguzenga weli (Lukasi 6:47-49)
7.24: “Chila munhu yohulika gondilonga, na kugawika mnhumbula, kewhana na munhu yawele na nyhala yazenjile ng'handa hali italawe.
7.25: Nhonya itowa na nzanda zimema tendemaa, mbeho iputa, kuigwisa aila ng'handa. Ila ng'handa haigwile kwa vila na izenjigwa mitalawe.
7.26: “Ila yoneche yalinguhulika gondilonga ne kugawika mnhumbula, kewhana na munhu mpoka yazenjile ng'handa hali sangalaza.
7.27: Nhonya itowa na nzanda zimema na mbeho iputa nakuitigasa ng'handa, nayo igwa luu! Kahi kugwa ako kwali kukulu.” Ludali lwa Yesu
7.28: Yesu vyoyasindile kulonga ulonzi awo, wanhu weng'ha na wamemile honhu hala nawabubuwala na ulanguso wa heye.
7.29: Hawele kota walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, ila nakalangusa kwa ludali.

8.1: Yesu vyoyeduliche kuchidunda, na kawona wanhu wenji womuwinza heye.
8.2: Lelo nakoya munhu yumwe yawele na uswema, kafugama kumwando kwa heye na kulonga, “Mkulu, wone ulingugana, kombusila utamwa wondilingugula.”
8.3: Yesu kagolola moko, kamdoliza na kulonga, “Ndangugana wezuligwe,” Bahala du munhu yula, kawa mkomu uswema umlawa.
8.4: Hamba Yesu nakamlonjela ayula munhu kata, “Ulole, uleche kumlonjela munhu yoneche, ila ulute kilajila kwa watambika wakulole kota kuwa mkomu, hamba leka wanji walavye ulolezi na hamba ulavye nhambiko kota vyoyalajize Musa.” Yesu kangumlohola chitumagwa wa jemadali wa Loma (Lukasi 7:1-10)
8.5: Yesu loyaliyokwinjla kuli muji wa Kapanaumu, kating'hana na mkulu wa wamizi mloma kamlutila, kamdedeza,
8.6: yolonga, “Mkulu, chitumagwa wa heni, kawasa kaye, kazilika lukuli na kangutamika lukami.”
8.7: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ndokuya kumlohola.”
8.8: Ayo mkulu wa wamizi Mloma nakamlonjela, “Mkulu, siganigwe winjile mng'handa ya heni. Ila ulonje ulonzi hela na chitumagwa wa heni kowa mkomu.
8.9: Mina, na heni nani, nda munhu mbele hasi ha ludali lwa wanji, ndanawo wamizi hasi ha heni. Ndangumlonjela yumwe, ‘Ulute!’ Na heye kanguluta, na yunji, ‘Uye!’ Na heye kanguya, na chitumagwa wa heni, ‘Udite chinhu chino,’ Na heye kangudita.”
8.10: Yesu vyo yahuliche ago, na kabubuwala, na kuwalonjela wanhu wawele womuwinza heye, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, sinamona munhu yawele na makundo kota aga, kweng'ha Isilaeli.
8.11: Lelo ndanguwalonjela kota wanhu wenji wokuya kulawa kolilawila isanya na kolizinjila, na kikala hanyi hali ndiya hamwe na Abulahamu, na Isaka, na Yakubu kuli undewa wa kilanga.
8.12: Ila hewo wawele kuganigwa kuli undewa awo, wotozigwa kunze kuli kutitu, ako ndo kowolila na kujejeda mizino.”
8.13: Yesu na nakamlonjela ayula ofisa Mloma, “Ulute kaye na go ukundile gowa gakoleche kwa hegwe.” Na ayula chitumagwa wa heye kawa mkomu bahala. Yesu kanguwalohola wanhu wenji (Malichi 1:29-34; Lukasi 4:38-41)
8.14: Yesu nakafika kaye kwa Petili, na kamfika mkweye Petili yotamika yawasile mchinhanda, yapwituche lukami.
8.15: Baho, Yesu kamdoliza yula mamo mmoko na bahala utamwa umleka, kenuka na kwaluka kuwawichila chilyo.
8.16: Vyoifichile matinazo, wanhu wawegala wanhu wenji wawele na vijeni, na heye kwa ulonzi hela, kawinga vijeni avyo. Na kawosela wanhu weng'ha matamwa ga hewo.
8.17: Nakadita hino kukomya gala goyalonjile Mloli Isaya genele. “Heye yuye kauhola unghochele wa hetwe, Nakapika matamwa ga hetwe.” Wawele nguganigwa wawe walanguswa wa Yesu (Lukasi 9:57-62)
8.18: Yesu vyoyawawene chilundo cha wanhu wamkulumbile, nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye walute kumwambu kwa ilamba.
8.19: Mlangusa yumwe wa malajizo ga Musa kamlutila nakumlonjela, “Mlangusa, heni ndokuwinza koneche kouluta.”
8.20: Yesu kamwidichila, “Mibwa ja kisolo jina mhalika, na videje vya kuulanga vina vimvulila, ila mwana wa munhu, kahela honhu ha kuwasiliza mutwi na kwesela.”
8.21: Hamba munhu yunji, yawele mli walanguswa wa heye, nakamlonjela, “Mkulu, ung'hundize tandi ndute ndikamtile mhaza wa heni.”
8.22: Ila Yesu nakamlonjela, “Umbinze heni! Waleche wabagame wawatile wayao wabagame.” Yesu kanguilonjela nhigu inyamalile (Malichi 4:35-41; Lukasi 8:22-25)
8.23: Yesu nakenjila mli itumbwi na wali hamwe na walanguswa.
8.24: Baho du, nhigu nailawila kilamba, nhigu yaluka kugubika itumbwi na itumbwi lyaluka kutigasika na kumema mazi. Yesu nayali yawasile ng'hatu.
8.25: Walanguswa na waluta akula koyawasile, na wamlanda wolonga, “Mkulu yawalohole na aila nhigu.”
8.26: Yesu kawalonjela, “Hemwe wanhu muwele na makundo mado, leka choni mwangudumba?” Hamba kenuka na kuilonjela aila nhigu na mbeho nayali iputa, inyamalile na inyamalila tulu.
8.27: Wanhu weng'ha na wekala wabubuwale, walonga, “Ayu munhu wachi? Nhigu na mbeho vyangumuhulika.” Yesu kanguwalohola wanhu weli wawele na chijeni (Malichi 5:1-20; Lukasi 8:26-39)
8.28: Yesu loyoyile kuli isi ya Wagadala, kumwambu na alila ilamba, kating'hana na walume weli walawile kuli mipalika kuwele na vilaga. Wanhu awa wali na chijeni kumutwi, chiwang'ang'aze heko mbaka wanhu wawele wodumba kukola nzila ayo.
8.29: Na hewo bahala wayowa, “Kwangugana choni na hetwe, hegwe mwana wa Nguluwi?, Ndaze, kuya kutugaza mhela haunoya?”
8.30: Habehi na honhu aho, kwali na migubi minji jidimwa.
8.31: Lelo avyo vijeni vimdedeza, “Wone ulingugana kutuwinga, utuleche twinjile kuli jila migubi.”
8.32: Yesu kajilonjela, “Aya mlute.” Baho vijeni viwalawa wanhu wala, na kwinjila kwa migubi. Chilundo cheng'ha cha migubi jichina mnyenje na kwinjila milamba, na migubi jeng'ha jibagama.
8.33: Wadimi wa ajo migubi nawabilima, waluta kaye. Ako walavya mbuli zeng'ha loziwalawile na mbuli ziwalawile wala wanhu wawele na vijeni vihile
8.34: Leka wanhu weng'ha wa ula muji nawalawa, wamlutila Yesu, na lowamuwene, wamlonjela yoche kuli isi ya hewo.

9.1: Yesu nakenjila mitumbwi nakahiluka kuluga kwa heye koyalingikala, kwa kuloka ilamba.
9.2: Aho wanhu na wamigalila munhu yaziliche lukuli yawasile mchinhanda. Yesu vyoyawene makundo ga hewo, nakamlonjela yula munhu yaziliche, “Mwanangu, wikangaze, kusilwa gehile gouditile.”
9.3: Wamwe wa walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nawaluka kijesa, “Munhu ayu kangumkovula Nguluwi!”
9.4: Yesu nakavizela choni chowochijesa, kawalonjela, “Lekachoni mli na majesa gehile kuli mnhumbula za hemwe?
9.5: Lilikohi liwele ubewe ng'hatu. Kulonga, ‘Kusilwa gehile ga hegwe,’ Ama kulonga, ‘Wime ujende?’
9.6: Lelo ndangugana mvizele kota Mwana wa Munhu kanao ludali muisi lwa kuwosela wanhu gehile ga hewo.” Aho nakamlonjela yula munhu yaziliche, “Winuche, uhole chinhanda cha hegwe, ulute kaye.”
9.7: Ayula munhu nayaziliche nakenuka, kaluta kaye.
9.8: Wanhu weng'ha wamemile hala lowagawene ago, nawabubuwala na kudumba, na wamtogola Nguluwi kwa ludali alo loyawapele wanhu. Matei kanguchemigwa (Malichi 2:13-17; Lukasi 5:27-32)
9.9: Yesu nakoka ahala honhu, navyoyali yoluta kamona munhu yumwe itagwa lyake Matei, yekalise mchituka cha kodi. Yesu nakamlonjela, “Umbinze.” Na heye Matei kenuka, nakumuwinza.
9.10: Yesu loyali mng'handa yolya chilyo, wakongoza kodi na wawele na gehile nawoya kikala hamwe na walanguswa wa heye.
9.11: Mafalisayo wamwe na lowagawene ago, wawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Lekachoni mlangusa wa hemwe kangulya hamwe na wakongoza kodi na wadita gehile?”
9.12: Yesu nakawahulika, nakalonga, “Wanhu wawele wakomu hawalingugana mlaguzi hebu, ila awala wawele watamwa.
9.13: Lelo mkelanguse ulonzi awu, ‘Ndangugana isungu, haiwele nhambiko.’ Heni suyile kuwachema wanhu wala watanganiche, leka wawele na gehile.” Kiwuza mbuli ya kwesela kulya (Malichi 2:18-22; Lukasi 5:33-39)
9.14: Hamba walanguswa wa Yohani Mbatiza wamuuza, “Hetwe twangwesela kulya na Mafalisayo wangwesela kulya mala nyinji, iwa ndaze walanguswa wa hegwe hambe wesele kulya?”
9.15: Yesu nakawedichila, “Ndaze, walalikwe kuli mnvina ya kuhesa wanguganigwa kulila kwa kulombocheza mkasano yawele baho hamwe na hewo? Hebu, Ena! Ila mhela wofika aho mkasano kokusigwa hali hewo, aho ndo wokwesela kulya.
9.16: “Haduhu munhu yahonelezaga nguwo nyale kuli nguwo ya katali. Mina chila chilaka chodeganga aila nguwo ya katali, na ahala hahonelezwe howa hagazi.
9.17: Na kuduhu munhu yowika divai ya lehano, kuli chizombe cha igozi cha katali. Howodita hino, achila chizombe cha igozi na divai yobohoka. Na achila chizombe chowa cha kutaga. Lelo iwaga hino, divai ya lehano, iwikagwa mli chizombe chinyale, na vyeng'ha vili, chizombe na divai vyowichigwa goya.” Mhinza wa ofisa na mdala yumwe wangusigwa utamwa (Malichi 5:21-43; Lukasi 8:40-56)
9.18: Yesu loyali yolonga ago, chilongozi yumwe Myahudi nakoya, kenamiza nakulonga, “Mhinza wa heni kabagama sambi. Ila, ndangukulanda tuche ukamuwichile moko wa hegwe na heye kowa mkomu.”
9.19: Baho Yesu nakoka hamwe na walanguswa wa heye kamuwinza.
9.20: Mdala yumwe, nayali yotamika kulawa danda katali ng'hatu, mihela kumi na mili, nakamuwinza Yesu kumbele, nakadoliza lupembo lwa nguwo ya Yesu.
9.21: Nakadita ahyo kwa vila nakejesa mnhumbula. “Londidoliza hela nguwo ya heye, ndowa mkomu.”
9.22: Yesu kahinduka nakamona, nakamlonjela, “Mhinza wikangaze! Makundo ga hegwe gakulohola.” Mamo ayo kaloholigwa bahala.
9.23: Hamba Yesu na kenjila mng'handa ya yula chilongozi, loyawawene wapemba mluli mchililo na chilundo cha wanhu wolila na kulombocheza,
9.24: Kawalonjela, “Weng'ha mlawe kunze, mhinza ayu hafile, kawasa hela.” Na hewo nawamseka.
9.25: Baho, chilundo cha wanhu lochilawile kunze, Yesu kenjila mng'handa, kamibata ayo mhinza moko, na heye kema.
9.26: Mbuli ayo na yenela kweng'ha mu isi ila yeng'ha. Yesu kanguwalohola wohambe walole weli
9.27: Yesu nakoka ahala honhu, na loyaliyoluta, wohambe walole weli nawamuwinza aku wotowa iyowe, “Mwana wa Daudi utonele isungu!”
9.28: Yesu loyenjile mng'handa awala wohambe walole weli wamlutila, na heye kawauza, “Ndaze, mwangukunda kota ndoweza kuwaditilani mbuli ayo?” Na hewo wamwidichila, “Ena, Mkulu.”
9.29: Aho Yesu kadoliza meho gawo, nakulonga, “Na iwe kota vyomlingukunda.”
9.30: Na bahala meho gawo gagubuka nawaluka kulola kahi. Yesu kawalonjela, “Mleche kumlonjela munhu yoneche mbuli ayi.”
9.31: Ila hewo woka, weneza mbuli ya Yesu kuli isi ila yeng'ha. Yesu kangumlohola yohambe yalonje
9.32: Wanhu lowali wokuka, wanji nawamigalila Yesu munhu yumwe yawele yohambe yalonje kwa vila nayali na chijeni.
9.33: Baho du acho chijeni lochilawile, munhu yula nayawele hambe yalonje kaluka kulonga kahi. Wanhu nawabubuwala na kulonga, “Mbuli kota ino hainalawila koneka kuli isi ino ya Isilaeli!”
9.34: Ila Mafalisayo wawa wolonga, “Kanguwinga vijeni kwa ludali lwa mkulu wa vijeni.” Yesu kanguwonela isungu wanhu
9.35: Yesu nakajendela miji jeng'ha na vijiji, nakalangusa kuli ng'handa za kusalila za hewo yodamla Mbuli Inojile ya Undewa wa Nguluwi, yolohola matamwa geng'ha na vyeng'ha vilingugaza.
9.36: Lelo vyoyawene vilundo vya wanhu, nakawonela isungu kwa vila wali watochile na wawele na lunhwinhwi kota ming'holo jilihela mdimi.
9.37: Aho nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Mbena nyinji, ila wakola mijito wachefu.
9.38: Lelo mumlande Mkulu yalajize wakola mijito wabene mbena ya heye.”

10.1: Yesu nakawachema walanguswa wa heye kumi na weli, hamwe nakuwapa ludali lwa kuwinga vijeni vihile na kuwosela wanhu matamwa.
10.2: Aga hano ndo matagwa ga hewo watumigwa kumi na weli, kwaluka na Simoni yochemigwa Petili na mkulugwe Andeleya na Yakubu na mkulugwe Yohani wana wa Sebedayo.
10.3: Na kahi Filipo na Batolomeo na Tomasi na Matei nayali mkongoza kodi na Yakubu mwana wa Alufayo na Tadei na
10.4: Simoni yalawile Kanaani na Yudasi Isikalioti yambelenhuche Yesu. Yesu kanguwalajiza walangusa kumi na weli (Malichi 6:7-13; Lukasi 9:1-6)
10.5: Awa kumi na weli nawalajizwa na Yesu kota hino, “Mleche kuluta kuli wanhu wa isi, na mleche kwinjila kuli muji wa Wasamaliya.
10.6: Hemwe mlute kwa wanhu wa Isilaeli wajilile kota ming'holo.
10.7: Mlute mkawalonjele kota ‘Undewa wa kilanga wa habehi.’
10.8: Muwosele matamwa wanhu walingutamika, na muwahilusile ukomu wafile, muwalohole awala walingutamika kizada, na mlavye jimazoga. Mpegwa ne kulavya sendi, namwe mlavye ne kuhola sendi.
10.9: Mleche kuhola zahabu na sendi zeng'ha zila mmihako jenu.
10.10: Mleche kuhola mhako komluta, na igwanda linji na makwamba na ne ng'hweku ila. Wakola mijito wopegwa chowogana.
10.11: “Na wone mfiche muji woneche ama chijiji, na wone munhu yowabochela, mikale baho mbaka zuwa homkuka.
10.12: Homkwinjila mng'handa muwalamse wenyeng'haye.
10.13: Wone wenyeng'haye wa ng'handa wanguganigwa ulamso awo, kikala goya kopona hamwe na hewo. Ila wone hawalinguganigwa, lelo kikala goya kwa hemwe kowahiluchila hemwe.
10.14: Na wone munhu yoneche yolema kuwabochela na kuwahulika, muche kuli ng'handa ayo na mkung'hune nhimbwisi iwele mmagulu ga hemwe.
10.15: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, zuwa lya utaguso, heye kolajila isungu ng'hatu kwa wanhu wa Sodoma na Gomola kusinda awo wanhu wa honhu aho! Wihe woukuya (Malichi 13:9-13; Lukasi 21:12-17)
10.16: “Mlole ndanguwalajiza hemwe kota ming'holo hali mibwa ja kisolo. Muwe wasugu kota izoka, na muwe mholile kota ng'hunda.
10.17: Milolele, wokuya wowebata, na kuwahilika kuli ng'handa za kutagusa na wowasubulani na ng'hobwa kuli ng'handa za kusalila.
10.18: Mohilikwa kwa vilingozi na wandewa kwa chiwalo cha heni, leka mlavye ulolezi kwa hewo na wanhu wa isi.
10.19: Lelo wone wawebate, mleche kuwa na lunhwinhwi kota molonga choni, na molonga ndaze, baho mopegwa choni cha kulonga.
10.20: Ulonzi womlonga, haulawa kwa hemwe, wolawa kwa ludali lwa heye Muhe wa Mhaza yowa yolonga mgati mwa hemwe.
10.21: “Walume wowahilika wang'holozawo wakopoligwe, na wahaza wodita hihyo kwa wana wawo. Na wana wowagaluchila wawalelile wakopoligwe.
10.22: Wanhu weng'ha wawazudilani hemwe kwa chiwalo cha itagwa lya heni. Leka heye yokwimilila, mbaka mwiso, koloholigwa.
10.23: Wanhu one wawabuze wala walingikala luga lumwe, mbilimile kuli luga lunji. Ndangukomya kota hamsinda hebu kulangusa miji jeng'ha ja Isilaeli loyanghali Mwana wa Muhu hanoya.
10.24: “Mlanguswa hawaga mkulu kwa mlangusa, na kuduhu chitumagwa kawaga mkulu kwa mkulu wa heye.
10.25: Lelo mlanguswa yafande kota mlangusa na chitumagwa yafande kota mkulu wa heye. Wone nawamchema mkulu wa ivyazi Belisebuli, ndaze, hawowachema wanhu wanji wa ivyazi alyo matagwa gehile lukami? Yalikohi wa kumdumba (Lukasi 12:2-7)
10.26: “Mleche kudumba wanhu, cheng'ha chigubikwe, chowa chigubuligwe, na mbuli ya uviso, yowichigwa hazelu.
10.27: Londiwalonjelani hemwe kung'hali kutitu, mhiluchile kulonga kuli kuzelu, na mbuli lomhuliche ilonjigwa kuuviso, muilonje hazelu.
10.28: Mleche kuwadumba hewo wawele kukopola lukuli, ila walingulemwela kukopola muhe. Leka hemwe iwagana ng'hatu kumdumba yula yawele kukopola lukuli hamwe na nhumbula kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu.
10.29: Kwa silinje imwe yougula semembe, na semembe ne imwe yogwa hasi ne kugana Mhaza wa hemwe.
10.30: Ila kwa hemwe, na mnvili zeng'ha za kumutwi mwa hemwe ziwazigwa.
10.31: Lelo uleche kudumba, hemwe mhega kusinda semembe wenji. Kumkunda na kumbela Kilistu (Lukasi 12:8-9)
10.32: “Chila munhu yalingulonga kwa mlomo wa heye hazelu kota heye wa heni, heni kahi ndomkunda hali Mhaza wa heni yawele kilanga.
10.33: Ila yoneche yula yombela heni hali wanhu, na heni ndombela hali Mhaza wa heni yawele kilanga. Kuduhuli ukomu (Lukasi 12:51-53; 14:26-27)
10.34: “Mleche kijesa kota mbuya kuwegalilani kikala goya muisi, suyile kigala kikala goya, ila ipanga.
10.35: Mina mbuya kuwatowaniza hagati ha munhu na mhaza wa heye, mhinza na mayake, mkasano na mkweye.
10.36: Na wang'honyo wa munhu ndo wanhu wa haluga hake.
10.37: “Yawele ngumgana mhaza ama mayake kusinda yalikungana heni, silingumgana. Yalingumgana mwana ama mhinza kusinda heni, silingumgana.
10.38: Munhu wone hapichile msalaba wa heye na kumbinza, silingumgana.
10.39: Yawele ngibatilila ukomu wa heye, kouwajiliza, ila yawele nguwajiliza ukomu wa heye kwa mbuli ya heni, kowanawo. Chonolo (Malichi 9:41)
10.40: “Yalinguwabochelani, kangumbochela heni, na yalingumbochela heni, kangumbochela yula yanhumile.
10.41: Heye yombochela Mloli kwa vila ka Mloli kangwajiliza Uloli. Na yawele ngumbochela munhu yatanganiche kwa vila kanoga, kokwajiliza kunoga kwa heye.
10.42: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, yoneche yompa yumwe wa wadodo awa chizombe cha mazi gazizime kwa vila mlanguswa wa heni, kopegwa chonolo cha heye.”

11.1: Yesu loyasindile kuwalajiza walanguswa kumi na weli, nakalawa aho, kaluta kulangusa na kudamla kuli miji ja hewo.
11.2: Yohani Mbatiza yawele mchinhweng'ho nakahulika mbuli ya madito ga Kilistu. Baho, nakawalajiza walanguswa wa heye,
11.3: wamuuze, “Ndaze, hegwe ndo yula yalinguya ama tumbeteze yunji?”
11.4: Yesu kedichila, “Mlute mkamlonjele Yohani mbuli zomlinguhulika na kuzona.
11.5: Wawele hambe walole, wangulola, na wali chete, wangujenda, na walingugula chipata wahovujigwa, na hawalinguhulika, wanguhulika, na wabagame wanguzilipuka kuwa wakomu. Na Mbuli Inojile yangudamligwa kwa wawele wazunwa.
11.6: Kobweda munhu yula yawelehela majesa kwa heni.”
11.7: Walanguswa wa Yohani lowali wokuka, Yesu kadamla ga Yohani kuli wanhu na kulonga, “Lomwali mluta kwa Yohani akula kugunuche, mwali kijesa momona munhu wachi? Ndaze, namgana mlyone idete litigaswa na mbeho? Hebu!
11.8: Lelo namluta kulola munhu yalindaze, ndaze, namwali ngijesa momona munhu yavalile goya utabuli? Hebu! Wanhu walinguvala goya wekalaga mli ng'handa za wandewa.
11.9: Ila mndonjele na mluta kulola choni? Mloli? Ena, gahega kwa mloli.
11.10: “Ayu ndo yalingulonjigwa kuli Maandiko Matakatifu, “ ‘Ulole, heni ndomigala msenga wa heni yakulongole, heye yokugololela nzila ya kukola hegwe.’
11.11: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, wamwe mwa wana weng'ha wa wanhu, hanalawila yawele mkulu kusinda Yohani Mbatiza. Leka hino, yula yawele mdodo ng'hatu kuli undewa wa kilanga, ndo mkulu kusinda heye.
11.12: Kulawa mhela wa Yohani Mbatiza mbaka lehano, undewa wa kilanga wangugazigwa lukami, na wanhu wang'hanuche wangujeza kuusukula kwa lupichi.
11.13: Malanguso geng'ha ga waloli na malajizo mbaka mhela wa Yohani, wali ulonga mbuli mhela uno.
11.14: Wone moweza kukunda lelo, Yohani ndo Eliya, yawele nguya.
11.15: Yawele na makutu na yahuliche.
11.16: “Lelo ndouwhaniza na choni lulelo alu? Ndo kota wasongolo wekale mluga, wawa wochilonjela chilundo chimwe kwa chiyage,
11.17: “ ‘Tuwatowela ngoma ila hamvinile! Twimba lwimbo lwa kulombocheza ila hamlomboleze!’
11.18: Mina Yohani nakoya, hadile na hanwele divai, na hewo nawalonga, ‘Chijeni chimwaluka.’
11.19: Mwana wa munhu, loyezile, nayali yolya na kunwa, na wanhu na walonga, ‘Mlole munhu ayu, kangulya lukami na kugala, yeganile na wakongoza kodi na wehile,’ Leka luhala lwa Nguluwi na lutanganika kwa madito ga heye.” Miji ilemwele kukunda (Lukasi 10:13-15)
11.20: Hamba Yesu nakaluka kujikalalila miji jila jikolile vinduzanduza vinji, wanhu hawamgalamchile Nguluwi kwa kugaleka gehile gowaditile.
11.21: “Mane gwegwe Kolasini! Mane gwegwe Betisaida! Mina, na iwe vinduzanduza vyo mlajilwe na vikoleche Tilo na Sidoni, wanhu weng'ha na wahawele wavalile migunila na kubakala mivu kumeho, kulajila kota wagaleka gehile na kumgalamchila Nguluwi.
11.22: Ndangukomya, kwa hemwe, kota zuwa lya utaguso, Nguluwi kowonela isungu wanhu wa Tilo na Sidoni kusinda hemwe.
11.23: Na kwa hegwe Kapanaumu, kwangugana uguluche uliyeka kilanga? Koduliswa hasi kuli isi ya wabagame, mina kota vinduzanduza vikoleche kwa hegwe vyahakoleche kula Sodoma, muji awo wahawele ukomu mbaka lehano.
11.24: Ila ndangukulonjelani ndikomya, zuwa lya utaguso, hegwe kogazigwa ng'hatu kusinda Sodoma.” Muye kwa heni mkesele (Lukasi 10:21-22)
11.25: Mhela awo Yesu nakalonga, “Ndangukutogola hegwe Mhaza, Mkulu wa kilanga na wa isi, mina kuwavisa wawele na luhala na nyhala mbuli zino, kuwagubulilila wana wadodo.
11.27: “Mhaza wa heni kamha vinhu vyeng'ha. Kuduhu ne yumwe yamzelele mwana ila Mhaza, kuduhu yamzelele Mhaza ila Mwana, na yoneche yula Mwana yogana kumgubulila.
11.28: Muye kwa heni hemwe mweng'ha muwele kugaya na kupapa itunyo, na ndowapa honhu ha kwesela.
11.29: Miwohe nila ya heni na milanguse kwa heni, mina heni ndina isungu na nhumbula iholile na nhumbula za hemwe zosindamala.
11.30: Kwa vila nila ya heni ya lobwalobwa na itunyo lya heni lya ubewe.”

12.1: Mhela awo, Yesu loyali yokola mmigunda Zuwa lya Kwesela, walanguswa wali na nzala na waluka kubenanga miso ja uhemba wolya.
12.2: Mafalisayo vyowagawene ago, na wamlonjela Yesu, “Ulole walanguswa wa hegwe, wangudita mbuli zohambe zikundigwe kudita Zuwa lya Kwesela.”
12.3: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndaze, hamsomile vyoyakolile Daudi loyali na nzala heye na wayage.
12.4: Heye nakenjila mng'handa ya Nguluwi na kulya jila mibumuda ja nhambiko jiwichigwe helile ha Nguluwi. Heye ne awo wayage hambe wakundigwe kulya mibumunda ajo ila watambika waliyeng'ha.
12.5: Ama ndaze, hamsomile kuli chitabu cha malajizo ga Musa kota, Zuwa lya Kwesela, watambika wawifyaga kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, na hawalingijesa kota wawifya?
12.6: Lelo ndanguwalonjelani kuta hano hana chikulu kusinda Ng'handa ya Nguluwi.
12.7: Wone na muwe mvizelele ulonzi uno, ‘Ndangugana isungu haiwele nhambiko,’ Na mwahawataguse kwa wihe wanhu walihela nongwa.
12.8: Mina Mwana wa Munhu ndo Mkulu kana ludali na Zuwa lya Kwesela”. Munhu yawele na moko ung'ong'onale (Malichi 3:1-6; Lukasi 6:6-11)
12.9: Yesu na koka aho, nakenjila mng'handa ya kusalila ya hewo.
12.10: Kwali na munhu yawele na moko ung'ong'onale. Lelo wanhu nawamuuza Yesu, “Ndaze, yowa goya kulohola wanhu Zuwa lya Kwesela?” Na wamuuza hino wagana wamibate ha kumtagusila.
12.11: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela, “Yalikohi hali hemwe, yawele na ing'holo lila linjile mlikulubila. Ndaze, homibata na kumlavya amo Zuwa lya Kwesela?
12.12: Ila, munhu kahega kusinda ing'holo! Lelo iwa goya kudita ganojile Zuwa lya Kwesela?”
12.13: Hamba nakamlojela ayula munhu, “Ugolole moko wa hegwe.” Nakaugolola, nawo uwa mkomu ng'hatu kota ula uyage.
12.14: Lelo Mafalisayo na walawa kunze, waluka kupwepwa ndaze vyowomkopola Yesu. Chitumagwa yahaguligwe na Nguluwi
12.15: Ila Yesu loyavizelele mbuli ayo, nakalawa honhu hala. Wanhu wenji nawamuwinza, nakawalohola watamwa weng'ha,
12.16: nakawalemeza waleche kuwalonjela wanhu mbuli za heye,
12.17: leka gala goyalonjile mloli Isaya genele.
12.18: “Mlole chitumagwa wa heni yondimhagule, ndimganile heni yawele ngunojeza mnhumbula. Ndowika muhe wa heni kwa heye, na heye kodamla utaguso wa heni kuli isi zeng'ha.
12.19: Holema hebu, na hotowa iyowe, na lizi lya heye haluhulikwa kuli nzila.
12.20: Hobena hebu idenje lifinangwe, na hoputa hebu utambi ulingufung'ha iyosi, mbaka youdita utaguso unojile ulongoze.
12.21: Kwa heye isi zeng'ha zochitumbila.” Yesu na mkulu wa limazoga Belisebuli (Malichi 3:20-30; Lukasi 11:14-23)
12.22: Aho wanhu wamigala munhu yawele yohambe yalole na yawele yolemwela kulonga kwa vila nayali na chijeni. Yesu kamlohola ayula munhu na baho kaluka kulonga na kulola.
12.23: Wanhu weng'ha wamemile ahala nawabubuwala na kulonga, “Ndaze, yowa ayu ndo Mwana wa Daudi?”
12.24: Ila Mafalisayo lowahuliche ago, walonga, “Munhu ayu kangulavya vijeni kwa ludali lwa Belisebuli mkulu wa vijeni.”
12.25: Yesu, yawele yavizelele majesa ga hewo, kawalonjela, “Undewa woneche ugawanuche vilundo vilingitwanza, haulingikala hebu, na mji woneche ama nhanzi yoneche igawanuche vilundo vilingilewa, vyosumigwa.
12.26: Wone Limazoga limuwinga Limazoga, lyangilemela liliyeka. Lelo undewa wa heye wokwimaze?
12.27: Wone heni ndilingulavya vijeni kwa ludali lwa Belisebuli, lelo wala vitumagwa wa hemwe walavyaga vijeni kwa ludali lwani, lwa Limazoga? Hebu! Ahyo, vitumagwa wa hemwe wokunda kuwatagusa hemwe kota mwiha.
12.28: Ila wone heni ndanguwinga vijeni kwa ludali lwa Muhe wa Nguluwi, lelo mvizele kota Undewa wa Nguluwi mina ukuyilani hemwe.
12.29: “Ama, koweza ndaze munhu kwinjila mng'handa ya munhu yawele na mong'ho na kumsukula lufufu lwa heye, ne kwaluka kumuwoha ayo munhu yawele na mong'ho? Aho ndo koweza kumsukula lufufu lwa heye.
12.30: “Yoneche hambe yebande na heni, kangundema, na yoneche hambe yekungajize hamwe na heni, kangusambalula.
12.31: Kwa mbuli ayo, ndanguwalonjelani, wanhu wokusilwa gehile na ukovuzi wa hewo weng'ha, ila hawokusilwa wihe wa kumkovula Muhe Yelile.
12.32: Kahi, yawele ngulonga ulonzi wa kumkovula Mwana wa Munhu kolechigwa, ila yula yawele ngulonga ulonzi wa kumlemela Muhe Yelile, hokusilwa hebu, iwe kuli isi ino, ama kuli isi ikuya. Igodi na mafuza gake (Lukasi 6:43-45)
12.33: “Mdite igodi liwe linojile na mafuza gake gowa ganojile, mdite uwe wihile na mafuza gake gowa gehile. Igodi lizelekaga kwa mafuza gake.
12.34: Hemwe ulelo wa izoka! Molonga ndaze mbuli zinojile hanga hemwe mli na wihe? Mina munhu hulongaga kwa gala gamemile mnhumbula.
12.35: Munhu yalinaisungu hulavyaga mbuli zinojile kuli ng'hano za heye zinojile, na munhu yehile hulavyaga mbuli zihile kuli ng'hano ya heye yihile.
12.36: “Lelo ndanguwalonjelani, zuwa lya utaguso wanhu woganigwa kwidichila mbuli ya chila ulonzi wihile walingulonga.
12.37: Mina kwa ulonzi wa hegwe kokundigwa kuwa kutanganika, na kwa ulonzi wa hegwe kotagusigwa kuna nongwa.” Kugana ulajilo (Malichi 8:11-12; Lukasi 11:29-32)
12.38: Hamba wamwe wa walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo nawamlonjela Yesu, “Mlangusa, twangugana kuwona ulajilo kulawa kwa hegwe.”
12.39: Na heye kawedichila, “Lulelo lwihile lulingulema kumkunda Nguluwi!” Mwangugana ulajilo, hampegwa ulajilo ila ulajilo wa mloli Yona.
12.40: Kota vila Yona loyekale mazuwa gadatu kubunguzuka mbaka kuswa mmunda mwa Nyangumi, ndo vyoiwa kwa Mwana wa Munhu yochikala hasi mazuwa gadatu kubunguzuka mbaka liswa.
12.41: Wanhu wa Ninawi wolawila mhela wa kutagusigwa kwa wihe, na hewo wochitagusa chilelo achi kota china wihe. Mina Waninawi nawamgalamchila Nguluwi kwa mbuli ya kudamla kwa Yona, na hano hana chikulu kusinda Yona!
12.42: Malikiya wa kusini kulawila mhela lulelo awu houtagusigwa kwa wihe, na heye kochitagusa kota china wihe. Mina heye nakajenda kulawa isi ya kutali, nakuya kuhulichiza ulonzi wa luhala wa Solomoni, na hanga hano kuwele na chikulu kusinda Solomoni. Kuhiluka kwa chijeni chihile (Lukasi 11:24-26)
12.43: “Chijeni chihile lochiwinjigwa kwa munhu, chibemelaga kugunuche chipala honhu ha kwesela, chilemwela.
12.44: Ahi chochilonjelela, ‘Ndohiluka kaye kondawile.’ Ila lochihiluka na kuhafika hazelu halihela chinhu na kunoligwa,
12.45: vilutaga kuvihola vijeni viyage saba, vihile kusinda heye, na weng'ha huyaga kumwinjila ayo munhu. Na munhu ayu huwaga yagaziche lukami kusinda aho hamwande. Ndo vyoiwa kwa lulelo alu lwihile.” Ivyazi ng'hatu lya Yesu (Malichi 3:31-35; Lukasi 8:19-21)
12.46: Yesu nayali yang'hali yolonga na chilundo cha wanhu mhela mayake na wang'holoze lowoyile na kwima hanze, nawagana kulonga na heye.
12.47: Lelo munhu yumwe nakamlonjela, “Mayako na wang'holozo wa kunze, wangugana kulonga na hegwe.”
12.48: Ila Yesu kamwidichila munhu ayo, “Mayangu yalikohi? Na wang'holozangu ndo walikohi?”
12.49: Hamba kaugolola moko wa heye kwa walanguswa wa heye, nakulonga, “Awa ndo mayangu na wang'holozangu!
12.50: Mina yoneche yalingudita vyoyogana Mhaza wa heni nayali kilanga, ayo ndo mng'holozangu, na lumbulyangu, na mayangu.”

13.1: Zuwa lilila, Yesu nakalawa ila ng'handa, kaluta na kikalisa hafungo mwa ilamba na kulangusa.
13.2: Chilundo chikulu cha wanhu nachimzunguluta mbaka Yesu kakwina mli itumbwi, kekalisa. Wanhu weng'ha nawema mnyhenje ya ilamba,
13.3: na heye Yesu nakawalonjela mbuli nyinji kwa nhelo. “Mhulichize! Mnyalaji nakaluta kunyala nyhadikwa.
13.4: Loyali yonyala nyhadikwa, zinji nazigwa mnzila, videje vyuya nakulya.
13.5: Zinji nazigwa hali maganga hawele hela misanga minji. Zota himahima kwa vila misanga jali michefu.
13.6: Isanya lolulawile, zikala kwa vila nzabi zalihela mong'ho, zikoboka.
13.7: Zinji nazigwa hali migodi ja miwa, miwa jikula nakuzipilinjila.
13.8: Nyhadikwa zinji nazigwa hali misanga jinojile, zota, nazilela lukami, nyhadikwa zinji mala miya, nyhadikwa zinji mala makumi sita, na nyhadikwa zinji mala makumi gadatu.”
13.9: Yesu nakasindila kwa kulonga, “Yawele na makutu ga kuhulika na yahuliche!” Liwalile Yesu kulonga kwa nhelo (Malichi 4:10-12; Lukasi 8:9-10)
13.10: Walanguswa wa heye wamlutila, wamuuza, “Lekachoni kwangulonga na wanhu kwa nhelo?”
13.11: Yesu kawedichila, “Hemwe mpegwa kuvizela uviso wa undewa wa kilanga, ila hewo hebu.
13.12: Mina, munhu yawele na chinhu kopegwa nakonjezelwa, ila munhu yalihela chinhu, na chila choyawele nacho choholigwa.
13.13: Ndo mina ndangulonga na hewo kwa nhelo, kwa vila wangulola ila hawalingona, wanguhulichiza ila hawalinguhulika, ne kuvizela.
13.14: Kwa hewo genela gala yalonjile mloli Isaya, “ ‘Kuhulika mohulika, ila homvizela. Kulola molola, ila hamkona hebu.
13.15: Mina nyhala za wanhu awa zibowala, wagadinya makutu gawo, wadinya meho gawo. Hanga, wahalolile kwa meho gawo, wahahuliche kwa makutu gawo, wahavizelele kwa nyhala zawo, na kungaluchila, kangulonga Mkulu, na heni ndahawalohole.’ ”
13.16: Yesu nakalonga kahi, “Mobweda hemwe, mina meho genu gangulola na makutu genu ganguhulika.
13.17: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, waloli na wanhu wanji watanganiche nawagana kugona gala gomlingugona, hawagawene, na kuhulika gala gomhuliche hemwe, hawagahuliche. Malanguso gawhanile na mnyalaji (Malichi 4:13-20; Lukasi 8:11-15)
13.18: “Lelo hemwe milanguse nhelo ayi ya mnyalaji.
13.19: Yoneche yalinguhulika ulonzi wa mbuli ya Undewa wa Nguluwi kahulika ila havizelele, ndo kota zila nyhadikwa zigwile mnzila, Mwihe huyaga na kusukula chila chinyaligwe mnhumbula ya heye.
13.20: Ayila nyhadikwa ilagale hali italawe ndo kiwhana na munhu yahuliche usenga awo na baho kanguubochela kwa usangalalo.
13.21: Ila halilingwinjila mgati mwa hewo, hulutilila kibatilila usenga awo hado hela, na mhela wa kugaya ama nongwa hovilawila kwa mbuli ya usenga awo, kangugozola baho.
13.22: Ayila nyhadikwa ilagale hagati ha migodi ja miwa, ndo kiwhana na munhu yalinguhulika awo usenga, ila lunhwinhwi wa isi ino na uvedelo wa lufufu hubananga usenga awo, na heye halingulela mafuza.
13.23: Aila nyhadikwa ilagale hali misanga jinojile ndo kiwhana na munhu yalinguhulika ulonzi awo na kuuzela, nayo hulela, imwe mala miya, yinji mala makumi sita na yinji mala makumi gadatu.” Kiwhana na misolo
13.24: Yesu kawalonjela wanhu nhelo yinji, “Undewa wa kilanga uwhana kota hino. Munhu yanyalile nyhadikwa inojile kuli mgunda wa heye.
13.25: Ila hamihe imwe wanhu lowali wawasile, mwihe wa heye nakoya, kanyala misolo hagati ha uhemba, koka.
13.26: Lelo nyhadikwa loyotile na kwaluka kubahula, misolo najo najaluka koneka.
13.27: Vitumagwa wa yula yawele na mgunda wamlutila, wamlonjela, ‘Mkulu, nahaunyalile nyhadikwa inojile kuli mgunda wa hegwe. Lelo misolo jilawa kohi?’
13.28: Heye nakawedichila, ‘Mwihe ndo yaditile ahyo.’ Lelo vitumagwa wa heye wamuuza, ‘Ndaze, kwangugana tuche tukajing'umbule?’
13.29: Na heye kawedichila, ‘Hebu, mleche baho homkungajiza misolo, mong'umbula na uhemba kahi.
13.30: Mleche vikule hamwe mbaka mhela wa mbena. Mhela awo ndowalonjela walingubeta, mkungajize tandi misolo mjiwohe chilundochilundo cha kugasoma. Ila uhemba mukungajize mkauwiche kung'hano ya heni.’ ” Chiwhanile na nyhadikwa ndodo (Malichi 4:30-32; Lukasi 13:18-19)
13.31: Yesu nakawalonjela nhelo yinji, “Undewa wa kilanga wangiwhana na munhu yanyalile nyhadikwa ndodo ng'hatu kuli mgunda wa heye.
13.32: Yiyo nyhadikwa ndodo ng'hatu, ila wone yote, iwaga igodi likulu kusinda migodi jeng'ha. Na videje vya kuulanga vyuyaga kuzenga vimvulila mli mitagala jake.” Chiwhanile na nhungo (Lukasi 13:20-21)
13.33: Yesu na kalutilila kuwalonjele nhelo yinji, kalonga, “Undewa wa kilanga ufanda kota hino. Mdala yumwe nakahola nungo kahanza na utimbo vijemo vili, mbaka utimbo weng'ha ufuluma.” Yesu kangulangusa kwa kiwhaniza (Malichi 4:33-34)
13.34: Yesu nayali yolangusa wanhu weng'ha na kuwalonjela vinhu vyeng'ha kwa nhelo. Na nayali hambe yalonje chinhu kwa hewo ne kulonga kwa nhelo.
13.35: Na kadita hino, leka kweneza agala gowalonjile waloli. “Ndolonga na hewo kwa nhelo, ndogawika hazelu gavisigwe kulawa kulumbigwa kwa isi.” Yesu kangugubula kiwhana kwa misolo
13.36: Hamba Yesu nakawalaga wala wanhu, nakwinjila mng'handa. Walanguswa wa heye wamhejelela, wamlonjela, “Tutang'hulile nhelo ayi ya misolo yangutulangusa choni?”
13.37: Yesu kawalonjela, “Yanyalile zila nyhadikwa zinojile ndo Mwana wa Munhu.
13.38: Mgunda ndo isi, na nyhadikwa inojile ndo wanhu woyile kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi, na misolo ndo wanhu walutile kwa Limazoga.
13.39: Na mwihe yanyalile misolo ndo Limazoga na mbena ndo kuduma kwa ukulu na wabetaji ndo wahilisi wa kilanga.
13.40: Kota vila misolo vyojilingukungajizwa hamwe na kusomigwa mchiluli, ndo vyoiwa kuduma kwa mhela.
13.41: Mwana wa Munhu kowalajiza wahilisi wa kilanga wa heye wawawiche hamwe kuli undewa wa heye wala weng'ha wali ngwambuza gehile, na weng'ha walingudita gehile.
13.42: Wahilisi wowatoza kuli ivuche lya chiluli, na ako wolila na kujejeda mizino.
13.43: Hamba, wala watanganiche wong'ala kota isanya kuli undewa wa Mhaza wa hewo. Yawele na makutu nayahuliche! Kiwhana na ng'hano ivisigwe kumgunda
13.44: “Undewa wa kilanga uwhana na chinhu chivisigwe kuli mgunda. Munhu yumwe kachivibula, kachivisa kahi. Nakasangalala ng'hatu leka kaluta kuguza geng'ha goyawele nago, nakuzagula mgunda ula. Kiwhana na Lulu
13.45: “Kahi, undewa wa kilanga uwhana na mguzavinhu yumwe nayali yopala lulu inojile,
13.46: loyapatile lulu imwe ya sendi nyinji ng'hulu, nakaluta, nakaguza geng'ha goyawele nago, nakagombola lulu ila. Kiwhana na utandawala wa somba
13.47: “Kahi, undewa wa kilanga uwhana na utandawala utozigwe kuli bahali, wibata somba za nhanzi nyinji ng'hatu.
13.48: Loumemile, wanhu nawaukwega hafungo, wekala, wahagula somba zinojile wawika mgati mli vidoto vyawo, na wehile wawataga.
13.49: Ndo vyoiwa kuduma kwa mhela, wahilisi wa kilanga wolawila, wowabagula wanhu wehile na wanhu watanganiche,
13.50: na kuwataga awo wehile kuli ivuche lya chiluli. Ako wolila na kujejeda mizino.” Malanguso gasambi na gakatali
13.51: Yesu kawauza, “Ndaze, mvizela mbuli azi zeng'ha?” Nawamwidichila, “Ena.”
13.52: Heye nakawalonjela, “Leka ahyo, chila mlangusa wa malajizo ga Musa yalinguwa mlanguswa wa undewa wa kilanga kangiwhana na nayali na ng'handa yalingulavya kuli ng'hano ya heye vinhu vinyale na vya katali.” Yesu kangulemigwa ako Nasaleti (Malichi 6:1-6; Lukasi 4:16-30)
13.53: Yesu loyasindile kulonga nhelo azo, nakoka honhu aho,
13.54: kaluta kuli chijiji cha hakaye hake. Ako kawa yowalangusa wanhu kuli ng'handa za kusalila za hewo mbaka wabubuwala, walonga, “Ayu kaupata kohi luhala alu na kohi koyapeligwe ludali lwa kudita vinduzanduza avi?
13.55: Ndaze, ayu hawele yula mwana wa selemala? Ndaze, mayake hawele nguchemigwa Maliya? Na wakulugwe achina Yakubu na Yusufu na Simoni na Yudasi?
13.56: Na walumbuze ndaze, hawawele hamwe na hetwe? Lelo kagapata kohi aga geng'ha?”
13.57: Lelo wawa namajesa na heye. Ila Yesu kawalonjela, “Mloli halekaga kutogoligwa, ila kuli isi ya heye na hakaye hake!”
13.58: Leka ahyo, haditile vinduzanduza vinji hala kwa vila lowalemile kukunda ga heye.

14.1: Mhela awo Helodi mndewa wa Galilaya nakahulika lutogo lwa Yesu.
14.2: Lelo kawalonjela vitumagwa wa heye, “Munhu ayu ndo Yohani Mbatiza, kazilipuka kulawa kowabagame, ndo mina ludali lwa vinduzanduza lwangukola mijito mgati mwake.”
14.3: Helodi ndo heye yakundize Yohani yebatigwe na kuwohigwa na ng'weso na kumuwika mchinweng'ho kwa mbuli ya Helodiya, mdala wa Filipo, mng'holoze.
14.4: Chambuzo ndo kota vila Yohani loyali yamlonjele Helodi, “Haiwa goya hebu hegwe kumhola Helodiya!”
14.5: Helodi nakagana yamkopole Yohani, ila nakadumba Wayahudi kwa vila nawamona Yohani ndo mloli.
14.6: Kuli mnvina ya kukumbuchila kuvumbuka kwa heye Helodi, mhinza wa Helodiya nakavina hali wajenzi. Helodi nakanojezwa,
14.7: mbaka kelaha kompha ayo mhinza choneche choyolanda.
14.8: Na heye, aku yohajizwa na mayake, nakalanda, “Umhe sambi baha mchisaye mutwi wa Yohani Mbatiza.”
14.9: Mndewa nakesinza, ila kwa mbuli ya kula kilaha koyelahile na kwa mbuli ya wala wajenzi walalikwe, kalajiza yapegwe chila choyalandile.
14.10: Lelo Helodi nakamlajiza munhu kuchinweng'ho yamdumule mutwi Yohani.
14.11: Mutwi wa heye wigaligwa kuli chisaye, nawamha yula mhinza, na heye kamhilichila mayake.
14.12: Walanguswa wa Yohani nawoya, wauhola mtufi wa heye, wautila. Hamba wamhilichila nguto Yesu. Yesu kanguwapa chilyo wanhu wenji (Malichi 6:30-44; Lukasi 9:10-17; Yohana 6:1-14)
14.13: Yesu loyahuliche mbuli ayo, nakoka honhu hala kwa itumbwi, nakaluta honhu hanji hawele hela wanhu. Ila wanhu nawahulika mbuli, wamuwinza kwa magulu kulawa mujini.
14.14: Lelo loyeduliche kumwani, nakona lung'hongola lwa wanhu, nakawonela isungu, kawosela matamwa watamwa wa hewo.
14.15: Loifichile matinazo, walanguswa wa heye wamlutila wamlonjela, “Honhu aha twa kisolo, na saa za nemisi zipuluta. Lelo uwalaje wanhu walute kuli vijiji wakagombole chilyo.”
14.16: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Haiwaganile kuluta, muwape hemwe chilyo.”
14.17: Ila hewo nawamlonjela, “Twanajo mibumunda jihano na somba mbili hela.”
14.18: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndigalileni hano.”
14.19: Nakawalonjela wanhu wekalise hali misolo. Hamba Yesu kaihola jila mibumunda na somba mbili, kalola kuchanya kilanga, katambichiza. Kahi kamogola ajo mibumunda, kawapa walanguswa wa heye, na hewo wawapa wanhu.
14.20: Wanhu weng'ha nawalya, weguta. Hamba walanguswa wakungajiza upumunizo, wamemeza vidoto kumi na vili.
14.21: Weng'ha wadile wali walume wafichile elufu zihano, ne kuwaza wadala na wana. Yesu kangujenda mchanya mmazi (Malichi 6:45-52; Yohana 6:15-21)
14.22: Baho, Yesu nakawalajiza walanguswa wa heye wakwine mli itumbwi, wamlongole kumwambu mwa ilamba mhela heye yowalaga wanhu.
14.23: Loyewelajile wanhu, kakwina kuchidunda nayali yeka kulanda. Loiwele nemisi, heye nayali ako yaliyeng'ha,
14.24: na mhela awo lila itumbwi nalyali kutali na misanga nalifika habehi na hagati mwa ilamba, ila nalyali ligaya kwa vila mbeho nayali iuhilusa.
14.25: Nechilo, behi na kubwemwenzuka, Yesu nakawawinza walanguswa yojenda mchanya mmazi.
14.26: Walanguswa wa heye lowamuwene yojenda mchanya mmazi nawadumba ng'hatu, nawalonga, “Idimu!” Nawatowa iyowe kwa kudumba.
14.27: Baho, Yesu nakalonga na hewo, “Msindamale, nda heni. Mleche kudumba!”
14.28: Petili nakamlonjela, “Mkulu, wone uli hegwe, undajize njende mchanya mmazi mbuye kwa hegwe.”
14.29: Yesu nakalonga, “Ena uye.” Lelo Petili nakadulika kulawa kuli lila itumbwi, nakajenda mchanya mmazi, nakamlutila Yesu.
14.30: Ila loyawene ila mbeho, nakadumba, nakaluka kudidimila, nakalila kwa lizi lya kuchanya, “Mkulu, undohole.”
14.31: Aho, Yesu nakagolola moko wa heye, kamibata na kumlonjela, “Hegwe uli na makundo mado! Lekachoni waliudumba?”
14.32: Hamba nawakwina mli itumbwi, na mbeho inyamalila.
14.33: Weng'ha nawawele mgati mwa itumbwi nawamfugamila, walonga, “Tukomya hegwe ndo Mwana wa Nguluwi.” Yesu kanguwalohola watamwa Genesaleti (Malichi 6:53-56)
14.34: Nawaloka ilamba, nawafika isi ya Genesaleti.
14.35: Wanhu wa ako lowamzelele, weneza mbuli heng'ha kuli honhu hala. Baho, nawamigalila Yesu watamwa weng'ha,
14.36: nawamlanda wawakundile wadolize hela lupembo lwa nguwo ya heye. Na hewo weng'ha wadolize waloholigwa.

15.1: Hamba Mafalisayo na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa woya kulawa Yelusalemu, wamlutila Yesu, wamuuza,
15.2: “Lekachoni walanguswa wa hegwe hawalingudumba malanguso tubochele kwa wasekulu wa hetwe? Hawalinguhovuga moko goya kota vila vyoilinguganigwa!”
15.3: Yesu nakawedichila, “Lekachoni namwe hamlingudumba malajizo ga Nguluwi ila mwanguganilila gombochele hemwe?
15.4: Nguluwi nakalonga, ‘Wahulichize mhaza na mayako,’ kahi ‘Nayalingumliga mhaza wa heye ama mayake, imgana yakopoligwe.’
15.5: Ila hemwe mwangulangusa kota wone munhu yawe na chinhu choyaganile kumtanza mhaza wa heye ama mayake, ila nakulonga, ‘Nhambiko ayi ndimlavila Nguluwi,’
15.6: Lelo halinguganigwa kahi kumfugamila mhaza wa heye! Ndo vyomlingubeza ulonzi wa Nguluwi kwa kuwinza malanguso ga hemwe.
15.7: Hemwe wahadi! Isaya nakalagula vinojile ng'hatu kwa hemwe.
15.8: “Nguluwi nakalonga, ‘Wanhu awa wangufugamila kwa ulonzi hela, ila mnhumbula mwao wa kutali na heni.
15.9: Kufugamila kwa hewo kwiha, mina wangulangusa mbuli za wanhu kota malajizo ga Nguluwi.’ ” Mbuli zilingumdita munhu wavu (Malichi 7:14-23)
15.10: Yesu nakauchema lula lung'hongola lwa wanhu, nakawalonjela, “Mhulichize, mvizele!
15.11: Chinhu chilingumdita munhu wavu hachiwele chila chilingwinjila mgati, ila chila chilingulawa mgati. Acho ndo chilingumdita munhu wavu.”
15.12: Hamba walanguswa wamlutila, wamlonjela, “Ndaze, kuvizela kota Mafalisayo nawazudizwa lowahuliche ulonzi wa hegwe?”
15.13: Ila heye nakawedichila, “Chila chotile chohachinyaligwe na mhaza wa heni yawele kilanga, wong'humbuligwa.”
15.14: Muwaleche hewo wawo! Hewo hawalingulola, vilongozi wa hawalingulola, na wone halingulola yamlongoze halingulola, weng'ha weli wokwinjila mli ikulubila.
15.17: Ndaze, hamvizelele kota chila chilingwinjila hamlomo changuluta kumunda na hamba kulawa kunze kucholo?
15.18: Ila mbuli zilingulawa kumlomo hulawaga mnhumbula, na ago ndo galingumdita munhu yawe mwavu.
15.19: Mina mnhumbula mlawaga majesa ga kukopola na ung'hondwa na uhonzolomo na uhizi na ulonzi wa uhadi na kukovula.
15.20: Ago ndo galingumdita munhu wavu. Ila kulya ndiya ne kuhovuga moko hamditile munhu yawe mwavu.” Makundo ga mdala yumwe (Malichi 7:24-30)
15.21: Yesu nakoka honhu hala nakaluta kikala kuli honhu ha Tilo na Sidoni.
15.22: Lelo mdala yumwe yawele Mkanaani wa isi ayo kamuyila, kakwiniza lizi kalonga, “Mkulu, Mwana wa Daudi, umbonele isungu. Mhinza wa heni kangugazigwa na chijeni chihile.”
15.23: Ila Yesu nahamwidichile. Lelo walanguswa wa heye wamlutila, wamlonjela, “Mlonjele yoche kwa vila kangutuwinzawinza yotowa iyowe.”
15.24: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Situmigwe ila kwa wanhu wa Isilaeli wajilile kota ming'holo.”
15.25: Ahyo yula mdala nakoya, kamfugamila, nakulonga, “Mkulu unhanze.”
15.26: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Hainojile kuhola chilyo cha wana na kutozela mibwa.”
15.27: Ahyo mdala nakamwidichila, “Ndangukomya, Mkulu, ila na mibwa najo jilyaga usanyangwa ulingulagala kuchisaga.”
15.28: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Mdala, makundo ga hegwe makulu, lelo uditilwe kota vyoulingulanda.” Yula mhinza wa heye kawa mkomu bahala. Yesu kanguwalohola wanhu wenji
15.29: Yesu nakalawa aho kaluta hafungo mwa ilamba lya Galilaya, nakakwina mchidunda, kekalisa.
15.30: Wanhu wenji lukami nawamuyila womigalila waziliche lukuli, wohambe walole, wali chete, wohambe walonje, na wanji wenji wowawele watamwa, nawawawika hamwando hali magulu, na heye nakawosela matamwa ga hewo.
15.31: Lung'hongola lwa wanhu naububuwala ng'hatu louwene wala hanawalingulonga, wangulonga na wala nawaziliche lukuli wawa wakomu na wala walichete wangujenda na wohambe walole, wangulola na wanhu nawamtogola Nguluwi wa Isilaeli. Yesu kanguwapa chilyo wanhu elufu zine (Malichi 8:1-10)
15.32: Lelo Yesu kawachema walanguswa wa heye, nakalonga, “Ndanguwonela isungu wanhu awa kwa vila wali baha na heni kwa mazuwa gadatu, na sambi wahela chilyo. Siviganile walute ne kulya, waleche kuzilika mnzila.”
15.33: Walanguswa nawamlonjela, “Hano twa kisolo, topata kohi chilyo cha kuhega kwa wanhu weng'ha awa?”
15.34: Yesu nakawauza, “Mwanajo mibumunda jilinga?” Nawamwidichila, saba na tusomba tuchefu.
15.35: Lelo Yesu nakawalonjela wanhu wekalise hanyi.
15.36: Kahola jila mibumunda saba na tula tusomba, kamtogola Nguluwi, kavimogola, kawapa walanguswa, na hewo wawagawila wanhu.
15.37: Weng'ha walya, weguta. Hamba walokoteza upumunizwa, wamemeza vidoto saba.
15.38: Awo wadile wali walume elufu zine, ne kuwaza wadala na wana.
15.39: Lelo Yesu nakawalaga wanhu, nakakwina mli itumbwi, nakaluta honhu kulinguchemigwa Magadani.

16.1: Mafalisayo na Masadukayo nawamlutila Yesu, na kwa kumjeza, wamlanda yawalajile ulajilo kulawa kilanga.
16.2: Ila Yesu nakawedichila, “Hoifika matinazo hemwe mlongaga, ‘Luhela lowa lunojile kwa vila kilanga kudung'uwala.’
16.3: Na lufuku mwangulonga, ‘Lehano nhonya yotowa, kwa vila kuulanga kudung'uwala na ng'hungugu igubika.’ Lelo hemwe mvizela ng'hatu kuwaza luhela kwa kulola kilanga vyokuli, ila kuvizela ulajilo wa luhela loza kuwa ndaze hamvizelele.
16.4: Lulelo lwihile lulingulema kumkunda Nguluwi! Lwangugana ulajilo, hachipegwa ulajilo woneche ula, ila ulajilo wa Yona.” Lelo kawaleka, kaluta. Usaso wa Mafalisayo na Masadukayo (Malichi 8:14-21)
16.5: Walanguswa wa heye lowalochile kumwambu mwa ilamba, wefika wasemwa kuhola mibumunda.
16.6: Yesu kawalonjela, “Milole na muwe meho na usaso wa Mafalisayo na Masadukayo.”
16.7: Ila hewo wawa wochilonjelela, “Kangulonga hino kwa vila hatuholile mibumunda.”
16.8: Yesu nakagazela majesa gawo, kawalonjela, “Hemwe wanhu muli na makundo mado! Ndaze mwangilonjelela kwa mbuli ya vyomlihela mibumunda?
16.9: Ndaze, mng'hali kuvizela? Ndaze, hamlingukumbuka londimogole ajila mibumunda jihano kwa chiwalo cha wanhu elufu zihano? Ndaze, na mmemeza vidoto vilinga vya upumunizo?
16.10: Ama, ajila mibumunda saba jowapegwe wala wanhu elufu zine, ndaze, nammemeza vidoto vilinga vya upumunizo.
16.11: Hambi hamlinguvizela kota sali ndilonga kwa mbuli ya mibumunda? Mwilole na usaso wa Mafalisayo na Masadukayo!”
16.12: Ahyo walanguswa na wavizela kota nakawalonjela welole haiwele usaso wa mibumunda, ila na malanguso ga Mafalisayo na Masadukayo. Petili kangukunda kota Yesu ka mwana wa Nguluwi (Malichi 8:27-30; Lukasi 9:18-21)
16.13: Yesu loyafichile nzingo ya Kaisalia Filipo, nakawauza walanguswa wa heye, “Wanhu wangulonga Mwana wa Munhu ka whaani?”
16.14: Nawamwidichila, “Wanji wangulonga hegwe ndo Yohani Mbatiza, wanji wangulonga hegwe ndo Eliya, na wanji wangulonga hegwe ndo Yelemiya ama yumwe wa waloli.”
16.15: Yesu nakawauza, “Na hemwe ndaze, mwangulonga heni nda whaani?”
16.16: Simoni Petili nakedichila, “Hegwe ndo Kilistu Mlohozi, Mwana wa Nguluwi yawele mkomu.”
16.17: Yesu nakalonga, “Kubweda hegwe Simoni mwana wa Yona,” “Kwa vila hawele munhu yakugubulile mbuli ino, ila Mhaza wa heni yawele kilanga.
16.18: Na heni ndangukulonjela, hegwe ndo Petili, na hali italawe alino ndokwimiza chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu cha heni, na mong'ho wa kubagama hauweza kuusumya.
16.19: Ndokupa chichumulilo cha undewa wa kilanga, chila chouhinda muisi, chohindigwa kilanga na chila chouchumula muisi, chochumuligwa kilanga.”
16.20: Hamba nakawalemeza walanguswa waleche kumlonjela munhu yoneche kota heye ndo Kilistu Mlohozi. Yesu kangulonga mbuli ya kugaya na kubagama kwa heye (Malichi 8:31-9:1; Lukasi 9:22-27)
16.21: Kulawa mhela awo Yesu nakaluka kuwalonjela walanguswa wa heye ne kuvisa, “Ndanguluta Yelusalemu, na ako wakulu, watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, wongaza ng'hatu. Wong'hopola ila zuwa lya kadatu, ndozilipuka.”
16.22: Aho Petili kamhola Yesu hafungo, nakaluka kumng'hanuchila, “Uleche kulonga hino Mkulu! Mbuli ayi haikufika hebu!”
16.23: Ila Yesu kahinduka, nakamlonjela Petili, “Uche kumwando kwa heni, Limazoga! Hegwe ndo ngwamo kwa heni. Majesa ga hegwe hagawele ga chinguluwi ila ga chiwunhu.”
16.24: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Munhu yoneche yogana kumbinza heni, imgana yeleme yuye, yahole msalaba wa heye, yambinze.
16.25: Mina, munhu yogana kuulohola ukomu wa heye yuye, kouwajiliza.
16.26: Ila munhu yokwajiliza ukomu wa heye kwa mbuli ya heni, kogapata. Ndaze, munhu kowa na choni chinojile wone koihaliza isi yeng'ha hanga youkwajiliza ukomu wa heye?
16.27: Mana, Mwana wa Munhu kokuya kuli ukulu wa Mhaza wa heye hamwe na wahilisi wa kilanga wa heye, na ahyo ndo chila munhu kopegwa kota vyoyaditile.
16.28: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, wowa wanji bahano hawobagama wang'hali kumona Mwana wa Munhu yokuya kuli undewa wa heye.”

17.1: Logakwete mazuwa sita, Yesu nakawahola Petili na Yakubu na Yohani mng'holoze, nakaluta nawo waliyeka kuchaya kuchidunda chikulu.
17.2: Ako, Yesu nakagaluka kumeho hali hewo, kumeho kwa heye nakung'hala kota isanya na nguwo zoyavalile ziwa nzelu kota lumuli.
17.3: Musa na Eliya nawawalawila, wali wolongasa na heye.
17.4: Aho Petili nakamlonjela Yesu, “Mkulu, inoga kwa hetwe kuwa hano! Hougana ndozenga vibumuli vidatu. Chimwe cha hegwe na chimwe cha Musa na chimwe cha Eliya.”
17.5: Loyali yang'hali yolonga ahyo, ng'hungugu nzelu iwagubika, na lizi ihulikwa kulawa kuli ayo ng'hungugu, “Ayu ndo Mwana wa heni ndimganile, ndilingunojezwa na heye. Mhulichizeni.”
17.6: Walanguswa vyowahuliche ahyo wagwa chifugama, nawadumba ng'hatu.
17.7: Yesu nakawalutila, kawadoliza, nakalonga, “Mwime mleche kudumba!”
17.8: Lowalolile kuchanya hawamuwene munhu, ila Yesu nayaliyeka.
17.9: Lelo lowali wodulika kulawa kuchidunda, Yesu nakawadeuza, “Mleche kumlonjela munhu mbuli yomuwene mbaka Mwana wa Munhu loyozilipuka kulawa kowabagame.”
17.10: Hamba walanguswa nawamuuza, “Lekachoni walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa wangulonga igana tandi Eliya yoye?”
17.11: Yesu nakawedichila, “Mkomya, Eliya kokuya tandi kuwika goya mbuli zeng'ha.
17.12: Ila ndanguwalonjelani, Eliya mina koya na hewo nahawamzelele, ila nawamditila vila vyowaganile. Hihyo du, Mwana wa Munhu kogazigwa mmoko mwawo.”
17.13: Aho wala walanguswa nawavizela kota yaliyowalonjela mbuli ya Yohani Mbatiza. Yesu kangumlohola mwana yawele na chijeni (Malichi 9:14-29; Lukasi 9:37-43)
17.14: Lowaufichile kahi lula lung'hongola lwa wanhu, munhu yumwe nakamlutila Yesu, kafugama,
17.15: nakalonga, “Mkulu, monele isungu mwana wa heni kwa vila kana chinzilisa, kahi kangugazigwa lukami, mala nyinji heye kagugwa mchiluli na mmazi.
17.16: Nandimigala kwa walanguswa wa hegwe ila walemwela kumlohola.”
17.17: Yesu nakedichila, “Hemwe lulelo lulihela makundo, lwajilile! Ndochikala na hemwe mbaka hanili? Ndowemilila hemwe mbaka hanili? Mmigale hano ayo mwana.”
17.18: Lelo Yesu nakaching'hanuchila chila chijeni, na heye chimlawa, na yula mwana kawa mkomu mhela wuwo.
17.19: Hamba walanguswa nawamlutila Yesu chinyele, nawamuuza, “Lekachoni hetwe tulemwela kulavya chila chijeni?”
17.20: Yesu nakawedichila, “Kwa vila makundo ga hemwe mado. Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, wone hela muwe na makundo mado kota nyhule ndodo ya haladali, moweza kuchilonjela chidunda achi, ‘Ulawe hano ulute hala,’ Nawo woluta. Kuduhu ne chinhu chilemwelwa kwa hemwe.”
17.21: Vijeni vya nhanzi ino havilavyagwa hihi hela, ila kwa kulanda na kwesela kulya. Yesu kangulonga kahi mbuli ya kubagama na kuzilipuka kwa heye (Malichi 9:30-32; Lukasi 9:43-45)
17.22: Lowali hamwe ako Galilaya, Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mwana wa Munhu kanguzawichigwa mmoko mwa wanhu.
17.23: Womkopola, ila zuwa lya kadatu kulawa kubagama, kozilipuligwa.” Walanguswa nawesinza ng'hatu. Kulavya nhambiko kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi
17.24: Lowafichile Kapanaumu wanhu wali wokongoza kodi ya ng'handa ya Nguluwi nawamlutila Petili, wamuuza, “Ndaze, mlangusa wa hemwe kalavyaga kodi ya Ng'handa ya Nguluwi?”
17.25: Petili nakedichila, “Ena, nakalavyaga.” Lelo Petili loyenjile mgati mwa ng'handa, yang'hali longa luzi, Yesu nakamuuza, “Simoni, hegwe kwangona ndaze? Wandewa wa isi hukongozaga kodi kulawa kwa whaani? Kulawa kwa wanhu wa isi, ama kulawa kwa wajenzi?”
17.26: Petili nakedichila, “Kulawa kwa wajenzi.” Yesu nakamlonjela, “Hino lelo, hailinguwalapa wanhu wa isi.
17.27: Ila kwa vila tuleche kuwazudizani, mlute kuli ilamba mkatoze ndoano, ulowe somba ya mwaluko kugwila, ugubule kumlomo, na mgati kozifika sendi za zaka. Uhole ukamhe kwa chiwalo cha heni na ya hegwe.”

18.1: Mhela wula walanguswa nawamlutila Yesu, nawamuuza, “Yalikohi yawele mkulu ng'hatu kuli undewa wa kilanga?”
18.2: Yesu nakamchema mwana yumwe, kamwimiza hagati hawo,
18.3: hamba nakalonga, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, wone hamgaluche na kuwa kota wana wadodo, hamkwinjila hebu kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi kilanga.”
18.4: Yoneche yochihanyisa kota mwana ayu, ayo ndo yawele mkulu kuli undewa wa kilanga.
18.5: Yoneche yombochela mwana yumwe kota ayu kwa itagwa lyangu, kangumbochela heni. Chambuzo cha gehile (Malichi 9:42-48; Lukasi 17:1-2)
18.6: “Yoneche yomwambuza kuwifya yumwe wa awa wana wadodo walingung'hunda, yowa inoga yafunjigwe iganga likulu lya lwala na kukabajizwa kuli lwene lwa bahali.
18.7: Yochona isi yeng'ha kwa mbuli ya majezo ga kudita gehile. Majezo ago igana galawile, ila kochona yula munhu yula yovyambuza.
18.8: “Wone moko ama mgulu wa hegwe ukwambuze kikwang'hwala, udumule na kuutaga kutali na hegwe. Chiba kwa hegwe kwinjila kuli ukomu kuno ulihela moko ama magulu kuwala kutagwa kuli chiluli cha mazuwa gose ne kuduma uwele na moko meli na magulu meli.
18.9: Na iziho lyako wone likwambuze kikwang'hwala, wuse na kulitaga kutali na hegwe. Inoga kwa hegwe kwinjila kuli ukomu kuno uwele na iziho limwe, uleka kutajigwa kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu uwele na meho ga hegwe geng'ha meli. Malanguso ga ing'holo lyajilile (Lukasi 15:3-7)
18.10: “Milole! Mleche kumbeza yumwe wa wadodo wano. Ndanguwalonjelani, wahilisi wa kilanga wabaho mazuwa gose kumwando ha Mhaza wa heni yawele kilanga.
18.11: Mina mwana wa munhu nakoya kuwalohola wala wajilile.
18.12: Mwangona ndaze? Munhu nayali na ming'holo miya, wone yajilize limwe, kodita ndaze? Kowaleka wala makumi tisa na tisa kuchidunda, nakuluta kumpala yula yajilile.
18.13: Hoyompata, ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, kosangalala kwa chiwalo cha ayo kusinda vyoyosangalala kwa chiwalo cha wala makumi tisa na tisa hawajilile.
18.14: Hihyo du, Mhaza wa hemwe wa kilanga halingugana ne yumwe wa awa wadodo yajilile. Kumkanya lumbu ama kalumbu yalingudita gehile
18.15: “Mng'holozo wone yakuditile vibi, ulute ukamlonjele muwele hemwe mliyeka. Wone yakuhuliche kowa umpatile mng'holozo.
18.16: Wone halingukuhulika, mhole munhu yumwe ama weli hamwe na hegwe, leka kwa udedezi wa walolezi weli ama wadatu, chila nongwa yoditikwa.
18.17: Wone hambe yawahuliche awo, chilonjele chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu. Na wone hambe yahuliche chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu, na yawe kwa hegwe kota wanhu wohawamzelele Nguluwi na wakongoza sendi. Kulemeza na kukundiza
18.18: “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, chila chomuhinda muisi chohindigwa kilanga, na chila chomchumula muisi chochumuligwa kilanga.
18.19: Kahi ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, weli wa hemwe wakundile kuwa hamwe hano muisi kwa mbuli yoneche ya kulanda, Mhaza wa heni wa kilanga kowaditila mbuli yiyo.
18.20: Kwa vila heng'ha hala walingiting'hana weli ama wadatu kwa itagwa lya heni, heni ndabaho hali hewo.” Malanguso ga chitumagwa yalemwelile kumlechela miyage
18.21: Hamba Petili kamlutila Yesu, kamuuza, “Mkulu, ndaze, mng'holozangu wone yanditile vibi, ndimleche lwa kalinga? Mala saba?”
18.22: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Silingulonga mala saba hela,” Ila makumi saba mala saba.
18.23: Ndo mina undewa wa kilanga ufanda kota mndewa yumwe yaganile kukagula uwazo wa vitumagwa wa heye.
18.24: Kukagula lokwaluche, kegalilwa munhu yumwe yawele daigwa sendi elufu kumi.
18.25: Munhu ayo yalihela chinhu cha kuhilusa, ahyo mkulu wa heye nakagana yaguzigwe heye na mchewake na wanage na vinhu vyeng'ha vyoyalinavyo, kulipila lila deni.
18.26: Lelo ayo chitumagwa kafugama kumwando ha heye, nakalonga, “Umbeteze na heni ndolipa deni lyeng'ha.”
18.27: Yula mkulu na kamonela isungu, kamlechela lila deni, kamlechela yalute.
18.28: “Ila ayo chitumagwa nakoka, kamfika yumwe wa vitumagwa wayage yawele na deni lya heye sendi denali miya imwe. Kamibata, kamdinga lumelo yolonga, ‘Ulipe deni lyako!’
18.29: Ayo chitumagwa miyage kamfugamila, kamlanda, ‘Umbeteze nani ndokulipa!’
18.30: Ila heye haviganile, leka kamuwika mchinweng'ho mbaka hoyolipa deni.
18.31: “Lelo vitumagwa wayage vyowawene mbuli ayo wawa na masinzo ng'hatu, nawaluta kumlonjela mkulu wa hewo mbuli ilawile.
18.32: Aho yula mkulu kamchema ayo chitumagwa, nakumlonjela, ‘Hegwe kwa chitumagwa wihile ng'hatu! Nakundanda nani ndikulechela ideni lya hegwe lyeng'ha.
18.33: Ndaze, haikuganile nagwe kumonela isungu chitumagwa muyago kota heni vyondikonele isungu?’
18.34: Lelo ayo mkulu nakazudila lukami, nakamlavya ayo chitumagwa yagazigwe mbaka baho hoyolipa deni lyeng'ha.”
18.35: Yesu nakasindila kwa kulonga, “Na Mhaza wa heni yawele kilanga kowaditilani hihyo wone chila yumwe wa hemwe yolema kumlechela mng'holoze kwa nhumbula ya heye yeng'ha.”

19.1: Yesu loyasindile kulonga mbuli azo, nakalawa Galilaya, kaluta Yudeya, kumwambu mwa lwanda lwa Yolodani.
19.2: Wanhu wenji na wamuwinza ako, na wawele watamwa nakawosela matamwa gawo.
19.3: Mafalisayo wamwenga nawamuyila, wamuuza wojeza kumgwiliza, “Ndaze, yowa goya mlume kumha luleko mchewake kwa mbuli yoneche yeng'ha ila?”
19.4: Yesu nakawedichila, “Ndaze, hamsomile kuli Maandiko Matakatifu kota Nguluwi yamlumbile munhu kulawila mwaluko nakalumba mlume na mdala?
19.5: Baho nakalonga, ‘Ndo mina mlume kangumlekaga mhaza na mayake, na kilumba hamwe na mdala wa heye, nawo weli wowa lukuli lumwe.’
19.6: Leka ahyo, hewo hawele weli kahi ila yumwe. Lelo choyalumbanize Nguluwi, munhu yaleche kulekaniza.”
19.7: Ila Mafalisayo nawamuuza, “Lekachoni lelo Musa nakatulajiza mdala yapegwe kalatasi ya luleko na kulechigwa?”
19.8: Yesu nakawedichila, “Musa nakawakundila kuwaleka wadala wa hemwe kwa vila mwali na nhumbula zigagadale. Ila haiwele hino kulawa mhela Nguluwi loyalumbile.
19.9: Lelo ndanguwalonjelani, yoneche yomleka mchewake ila kwa mbuli ya ung'hondwa, nakuhola mdala yunji, kangudita ung'hondwa.”
19.10: Walanguswa wa heye nawamlonjela, “Wone mbuli za mlume na mdala ndo azo, inoga tuleche ng'hatu kuhola.”
19.11: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Haiwele weng'ha walinguweza kuibochela mbuli ayi, ila wala hela wowatambichizwe na Nguluwi.
19.12: Mina hana mbuli zinji za kuleka kuhola, wanji kwa vila waleleka hiho, wanji kwa vila waditigwa hino na wanhu, na wanji nawagana waleche kuhola kwa mbuli ya undewa wa kilanga. Yoneche yoweza kubochela ilanguso ali nayabochele.” Yesu kanguwatambichiza wana wadodo (Malichi 10:13-16; Lukasi 18:15-17)
19.13: Hamba wanhu nawamigalila Yesu wana wadodo leka yawawichile moko na kuwalandila na kuwakumbatiza, ila walanguswa nawawang'hanuchila.
19.14: Yesu nakalonga, “Muwaleche awo wana wadodo woye kwa heni, mleche kuwalemeza, mina undewa wa kilanga ndo wa wanhu wafandile kota wana awa.”
19.15: Lelo kawawichila moko na kuwakumbatiza, hamba koka honhu aho. Msongolo yawele na lufufu (Malichi 10:17-31; Lukasi 18:18-30)
19.16: Munhu yumwe nakamuyila Yesu, nakumuuza, “Mlangusa, ndite choni chinojile leka ndiuhalile ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma?”
19.17: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Lekachoni kwangumbuza kuli Mbuli Inojile? Kabaho yumwe hela yanojile. Wone ugana kwinjila kuli ukomu wa mazuwa gose, ibate malajizo ga Nguluwi.”
19.18: Yula munhu nakamuuza, “Malajizo galikohi?” Yesu nakalonga, “Uleche kukopola, uleche kudita ung'hondwa, uleche kuhiza, na uleche kulavya ulolezi wa udesi,
19.19: Wahulichize mhaza na mayako, na migane na mlingikalasa halibehi kota vyoulingigana gwegwe.”
19.20: Ayo msongolo nakamlonjela, “Ago geng'ha ndagudita, ndite choni kahi?”
19.21: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Wone ulingugana ukangaliche, ulute ukaguze vinhu vya hegwe, uwape wazunwa sendi azo, na hegwe kowa na ng'hano kilanga, hamba uye umbinze.”
19.22: Ayo msongolo loyahuliche ago, nakaluta yawele na masinzo, mina nayali na lufufu lwinji.
19.23: Aho Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya haiwa ubewe kwa yawele na lufufu kwinjila kuli undewa wa kilanga.
19.24: Kahi ndanguwalonjelani, yowa ubewe kwa ngamiya kukola kuli itubuli lya chihomo, kuleka kwa yawele na lufufu kwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi.”
19.25: Wala walanguswa lowahuliche ahyo wabubuwala ng'hatu, nawamuuza, “Lelo yalikohi yoloholigwa?”
19.26: Yesu kawalola, kalonga, “Kwa munhu mbuli ayi haiditikwa ne hado, ila kwa Nguluwi mbuli zeng'ha zoditikwa.”
19.27: Hamba Petili nakalonga, “Na hetwe ndaze? Tuleka geng'ha natukuwinza hegwe, lelo tokwambulila choni?”
19.28: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, Mwana wa Munhu lohochikala hali chigoda cha undewa cha ukulu wa heye kuli isi inyale, hemwe mumuwinzile mochikala hali vigoda vya undewa muwatagusa nhanzi kumi na mbili za Isilaeli.
19.29: Na chila munhu yalechile ng'handa ama wang'holoze ama lumbu ama mhaza ama mayake ama wana ama migunda, kwa mbuli ya heni, kobochela mala miya mzidi, na wowa na ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.
19.30: Ila wawele wa mwaluko wowa wa mwiso, na wawele wa mwiso wowa wa mwaluko.

20.1: “Undewa wa kilanga ufanda kota ahi. Munhu yawele na mgunda wa zabibu, yedawile kuza pala wanhu wa kukola mijito kuli mgunda wa heye.
20.2: Kalongasa na hewo kowapa sendi denali imwe ya mijito ya zuwa imwe, hamba kawahilika kuli mgunda wa heye wa mizabibu.
20.3: Nakalawa kuli saa zidatu mitondo, kawona wanhu wanji wemile hali soko, walihela mijito ya kukola.
20.4: Kawalonjela, ‘Mlute na hemwe mkakole mijito kuli mgunda wa zabibu, nani ndowapa sendi ya mijito ya zuwa imwe kota wayenu.’
20.5: Baho waluta. Ayo yawele na mgunda kalawa kahi kuli saa sita na saa tisa, kadita hihyo.
20.6: Naloifichile kuli saa kumi na imwe matinazo, kalawa kahi, kawafika wanji wemile hahala hali soko. Baho, kawauza, ‘Ndaze mwimile hano nemisi yeng'ha mlihela mijito?’
20.7: Wamwidichila, ‘Kwa vila kuduhu munhu yatupele mijito.’ Na heye nakawalonjela, ‘Mlute namwe mkakole mijito kuli mgunda wa heni wa mizabibu.’
20.8: “Lokutitile, ayo yawele na mgunda wa zabibu nakamlonjela mlolela ng'hano wa heye, ‘Wacheme wakola mijito uwape sendi zawo, ukwaluchila wala woyile wa mwiso, na kusindila kwa wala watomile kuya.’
20.9: Lelo nawoya wala waluche mijito saa kumi na imwe, wabochela chila yumwe sendi denali imwe ya mijito ya zuwa imwe.
20.10: Wala waluche lowoyile, wali wochijesa wopegwa nyinji ng'hatu, ila na hewo wapegwa chila yumwe sendi denali imwe ya mijito ya zuwa imwe.
20.11: Wabochela sendi zawo, nakwaluka kumng'ung'utila yula mkulu.
20.12: Walonga, ‘Wanhu awa woya mwiso wakola mijito kwa saa imwe hela, ndaze kuwaditila twiwhana na hewo hanga hetwe twimilila mijito ng'hangala zuwa yeng'ha na isanya ling'ang'ale?’
20.13: “Aho yula mkulu kamwidichila yumwe wa hewo, ‘Wang'holozangu siwabunzile chinhu! Ndaze, hatulongane ndokupani sendi denali imwe ya mijito ya zuwa imwe?
20.14: Uhole chotulongane ulute. Ndangugana ndimpe na ayu wa mwiso iwhanile na hegwe.
20.15: Ndaze, haiwa goya heni kudita ndiviganile na sendi za heni? Ndaze, kwangona maya kwa vila vyondili na nhumbula inojile?’ ”
20.16: Yesu nakasinda kwa kulonga, “Ahyo, wawele wa mwiso wowa wa mwaluko na wa mwaluko sambi wowa wa mwiso.” Yesu kangulonga lwa kadatu kubagama na kuzilipuka kwa heye (Malichi 10:32-34; Lukasi 18:31-34)
20.17: Yesu loyali yoluta Yelusalemu, nakawahola wala walanguswa kumi na weli honhu ha uyeka, na mnzila kawalonjela,
20.18: “Mhulichize!” “Twanguluta Yelusalemu, na ako Mwana wa Munhu kowichigwa mmoko mwa watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, na hewo womtagusa kwa wihe yabagame.
20.19: Womuwika kwa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi leka wambeze, yasubuligwe ng'hobwa na kugazigwa na kumkopola kwa kumuwamba mumsalaba, ila zuwa lya kadatu kulawa yabagame kozilipuligwa.” Kulanda kwa mayao Yakubu na Yohani (Malichi 10:35-45)
20.20: Aho mayawo wana wa Sebedayo nakamuyila Yesu hamwe na wanage, kafugama kumwando koyali na kumlanda chinhu.
20.21: Yesu kamuuza, “Kwangugana choni?” Ayo mamo nakamlonjela, “Ulonje kota kuli undewa wa hegwe, awa wana wa heni weli wochikala yumwe kudilo kwa hegwe na yumwe kumoso.”
20.22: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Hamvizelele mwangulanda choni! Ndaze, moweza kunwela chizombe cha kugazigwa chondinwela heni?” Wamwidichila, “Toweza.”
20.23: Yesu kawalonjela, “Mwangukomya monwela chizombe cha kugazigwa chondinwela heni, ila kikala kudilo ama kumoso kwa heni haiwele mbuli ya heni kudita, mbuli ayo Mhaza wa heni nakawahagula walinguganigwa kikala honhu hala na kahi nakawagongomanyila honhu kwa chiwalo cha hewo.”
20.24: Wala walanguswa wanji kumi lowahuliche ago, wawazudila awo wang'holozawo weli.
20.25: Ahyo Yesu nakawachema, kawalonjela, “Mvizela vilongozi wa isi zinji walongozaga wanhu wawo kwa lupichi, na wakulu awo wawemililaga wanhu wawo.
20.26: Ila kwa hemwe ileche kuwa ahyo, leka yalingugana yawe mkulu hali hemwe, yawe chitumagwa wa weng'ha,
20.27: na yalingugana yawe wa mwaluko hali hemwe, igana yawe chitumagwa wa hemwe.
20.28: Hihyo vyoiwele, Mwana wa Munhu hoyile kukolelwa mijito, ila kuwakolela mijito na kuulavya ukomu wa heni kwa ulohozi wa wanhu wenji.” Yesu kanguwalohola hambe walole weli (Malichi 10:46-52; Lukasi 18:35-43)
20.29: Yesu loyali yokuka kuli muji wa Yeliko, lung'hongola lwa wanhu nalumuwinza.
20.30: Lelo kwali na wohambe walole weli wekale hafungo mwa nzila, na lowahuliche kota Yesu yaliyokola aho, nawachemeleza, “Mkulu, Mwana wa Daudi, utonele isungu!”
20.31: Lula lung'hongola lwa wanhu luwang'anuchila na kuwalonjela wanyamalile. Ila hewo walutilila kuchemelela, “Mkulu, Mwana wa Daudi, utonele isungu!”
20.32: Yesu nakema, kawachema na kuwauza, “Mwangugana ndiwaditile choni?”
20.33: Nawamwidichila, “Mkulu, twangulanda meho ga hetwe gagubuligwe.”
20.34: Lelo Yesu kawonela isungu, kawadoliza meho gawo, na bahala waluka kulola goya, wamuwinza.

21.1: Yesu na walanguswa wa heye lowafichile behi na Yelusalemu wafichile Betifage kuli chidunda cha Mizeituni, nakawalajiza walanguswa wa heye weli,
21.2: nakawalonjela, “Mlute mbaka hali chijiji chiwele kumwando kwa hemwe molifika idogowi na mwana idogowi liwohigwe. Jichumuleni mujigale kwa heni.
21.3: Wone munhu yawauze chiwalo, mumlonjele ‘Mkulu kangujigana,’ Na heye kowalechelani baho.”
21.4: Mbuli ino na ikoleka leka gala galonjigwe na mloli wa Nguluwi genele,
21.5: “Muulonjele muji wa Siyoni, ulole, Mndewa wa hegwe kanguya! Kaliholile na kakwina idogowi, mwana wa idogowi.”
21.6: Ahyo, wala walanguswa nawadita kota Yesu vyoyawalajize.
21.7: Waligala lila idogowi na mwanage, watambalika nguwo za hewo mchanya hao na Yesu kekalisa mchanya mwake.
21.8: Lung'hongola lwa wanhu nawazanza nguwo zawo mbalabala, na wanji watema miputi ja migodi wanzanza mbalabala.
21.9: Lung'hongola lwa wanhu walongole na wala walingumuwinza wakwiniza lizi. “Lutogo kwa Mwana wa Daudi! Nguluwi yamtogole heye yalinguya kwa itagwa lya Mkulu! Lutogo kwa Nguluwi kuchanya!”
21.10: Yesu loyaliyokwinjila Yelusalemu, muji weng'ha naumema luchenze. Wanhu wali wouza, “Ayu ka whaani?”
21.11: Wanhu kuli lula lung'hongola lwa wanhu walonga, “Ayu ndo Yesu mloli wa Nguluwi, kangulawa Nasaleti isi ya Galilaya.” Yesu kangwinjila kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi (Malichi 11:15-19; Lukasi 19:45-48; Yohana 2:13-22)
21.12: Lelo Yesu nakenjila mli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kawawinga wanhu kunze wali woguza na kugula vinhu mgati mwa ng'handa ya Nguluwi. Kagudula visaga vya wala wali wovunza sendi, kagudula vigoda vya wala wali woguza ng'hunda.
21.13: Kawalonjela, “Yandichigwa kuli Maandiko Matakatifu, ‘Ng'handa ya heni yochemigwa ng'handa ya kulandila.’ Ila hemwe muigalula iwa mhalika ya wabokaji!”
21.14: Wawele hambe walole na waziliche ng'huli nawamlutila kuko kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, na heye kawalohola.
21.15: Lelo watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nawazudila lowawene vinduzanduza vyoyaditile Yesu, na kahi wana lowali wochemelela kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi wolonga, “Lutogo kwa Mwana wa Daudi.”
21.16: Ahyo wamlonjela, “Ndaze, hulinguhulika chowolonga?” Yesu nakawedichile, “Ena, ndanguhulika! Ndaze, hamnasoma Maandiko aga? “ ‘Kuwalangusa wana wadodo na wali chali wanguwa na lutogo ng'hatu.’ ”
