21.17: Leka, kawaleka, kalawa kunze ya muji wa Betaniya, nakuwasa kuko. Yesu kanguupanjila msada wohambe ulele (Malichi 11:12-14,20-24)
21.18: Yesu loyali yohiluka kuli muji lokuwele kung'hali lufuku, nakona nzala.
21.19: Nakalyona igodi limwe lya misada hafungo mwa nzila, kalilutila, ila kalifika lilihela mafuza goneche leka mahamba yeka. Lelo kalilonjela, “Uleche kulela kahi mafuza mazuwa gose!” Baho alyo igodi lya misada naliswina.
21.20: Walanguswa lowawene wabubuwala wolonga, “Lekachoni igodi ali lya misada liswina baho du?”
21.21: Yesu nakawedichila, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, wone muwe na makundo ne kuwa na majesa, moweza kudita vyonditile kuli lila igodi lya misada, leka nawone mchilonjele chidunda chino, ‘Ung'humbuche ukagwe kuli bahali,’ Yokoleka hihyo.
21.22: Na muwe na makundo, choneche chomumlanda Nguluwi mopegwa.” Ludali lwa Yesu lwanguuzigwa (Malichi 11:27-33; Lukasi 20:1-8)
21.23: Yesu nakenjila mli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kawa yolangusa. Loyali yolangusa, watambika wakulu na wasekelu wa wanhu wamuuza, “Kwangudita mbuli zino kwa ludali lwachi? Yalikohi yakupele ludali luno?”
21.24: Yesu kawedichila, “Na heni ndowauzani chinhu chimwe, lomkwidichila, leka nani ndowalonjelani ndangudita mbuli azi kwa ludali lwachi.
21.25: Ndanguwauza mndonjele, ndaze, ludali lwa Yohani lwa kubatiza nalulawa kwa whaani? Ndaze, nalulawa kwa Nguluwi ama kwa wanhu?” Ila naweuza hewo kwa hewo hino, “Hotulonga, ‘Naulawa kilanga, kotuuza, Lelo lekachoni hamumkundile?’
21.26: Ila hotulonga, ‘Nalulawa kwa wanhu,’ Twangudumba wanhu wamemile mina hewo weng'ha wangukunda kota Yohani ndo mloli wa Nguluwi.”
21.27: Lelo nawamwidichila, “Hatuvizelele!” Na heye Yesu nakawalonjela, “Na heni kahi siwalonjela ndangudita mbuli zino kwa ludali lwachi. Malanguso ga wana weli
21.28: “Hemwe mwangijesa ndaze kwa mbuli ayi, kwali na munhu yumwe nayali na wana weli. Nakamlonjela yula wa mwaluko, ‘Mwanangu, lehano ulute ukadite mijito kuli mgunda wa zabibu.’
21.29: Yula msongolo nakamlonjela, ‘Ndema!’ Hamba kagalusa kaluta kumgunda.
21.30: Yula mhaza nakamlonjela mwana wa keli hiho, na heye kedichila, ‘Ena mhaza ndoluta!’ Ila halutile kukola mijito.
21.31: Ndaze, yalikohi kuli awa weli yaditile kota vyoyaganile mhaza wa heye?” Wamwidichila, “Ayula wa mwaluko.” Lelo Yesu kawalonjela, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, wakongoza sendi na wahonzolomo wokwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi kusinda hemwe.
21.32: Yohani na koya kwa hemwe kawalajila nzila inojile ya ukomu, na hemwe hamumkundile, ila wakongoza sendi na wahonzolomo nawamkunda. Nahomuwene ago geng'ha hemwe mlema ne kumfugamila na kumkunda.” Chiwalo cha walimi na mgunda wa zabibu (Malichi 12:1-12; Lukasi 20:9-19)
21.33: Yesu kalonga, “Hulichizeni nhelo yinji. Munhu yumwe yawele na ng'handa nakalima mgunda wa zabibu, nakazungulusila lugagala, kabawa ideho lya kukamila divai, kazenga mumo mnala kahi. Hamba nakawabasila walimi, heye koka nakaheluka isi ya kutali.
21.34: Mhela wa kubeta loufichile, nakawalajiza vitumagwa kwa wala wanhu wakahole chasi cha mbena ya heye.
21.35: Wala wanhu wawebata awo vitumagwa, yumwe wamsubula, yunji wamkopola na yunji wamtowa na maganga.
21.36: Ayo munhu nakawalajiza vitumagwa wanji, wenji kupuluta wala wa mwaluko. Wala wanhu wawaditila hihila.
21.37: Vyokudumile kamlajiza mwanagme aku yochijesa, ‘Womhulichiza mwana wa heni.’
21.38: Ila wala wanhu lowamuwene mwanage walonga hewo kwa hewo, ‘Ayu ndo yohalila, tumkopole leka tuhole uhalizi wa heye!’
21.39: Leka, wamibata, wamlavya kunze ya ula mgunda wa zabibu, wamkopola.
21.40: “Yesu nakawauza lelo, ayo yawele na mgunda wa zabibu loyokuya, kowadita ndaze awo wanhu?”
21.41: Hewo wamwidichila, “Kowabagamiza vibi awo wehile,” “Na ula mgunda wa zabibu kowapa walimi wanji wowa wompa chasi cha mbena mhela wake.”
21.42: Aho Yesu kawalonjela, “Ndaze, hamsomile mbuli ino kuli Maandiko Matakatifu? “ ‘Iganga lya kuzenjela walilemile walinguzenga, sambi liwa iganga likulu lya msisi. Mkulu ndo yaditile mbuli ayi, nayo ndo ya kububuwaza ng'hatu kwa hetwe!’
21.43: “Yesu nakonjezela kulonga,” Ahyo ndanguwalonjelani, “Undewa wa Nguluwi wokusigwa kwa hemwe na kupegwa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi walingulavya mafuza ganojile.
21.44: Yoneche yogwa mchanya mwa iganga alyo kobeneka pasapasa, na wone iganga limgwile munhu yoneche, lyomhondanga.”
21.45: Watambika wakulu na Mafalisayo lowahuliche azo nhelo za heye kanguwalonga hewo.
21.46: Lelo wali wopala chinhu cha kumibata, ila nawaliwodumba wanhu kwa vila hewo nawavizela heye Yesu nayali mloli wa Nguluwi.

22.1: Yesu nakalonga nawo kahi kwa nhelo,
22.2: “Undewa wa kilanga wiwhana kota hino, kwali na mndewa yamditichile mwanage mnvina ya kuhesa.
22.3: Lelo kawalajiza vitumagwa wawacheme walalikwe woye kuli mnvina, ila wala walalikwe walema kuya.
22.4: Kawalajiza kahi vitumagwa wanji, yolonga, ‘Muwalonjele wala walalikwe, ndiya ya heni ya goya sambi, isenga lya heni na ilogota lihatile wachinjigwa, chila chinhu cha goya, muye kuli izenjele.’
22.5: Ila hewo hawang'ulile, waluta, yumwe kumgunda kwa heye, yunji kuli mbuli za heye,
22.6: na wanji wawebata awala vitumagwa wawaliga na kuwakopola.
22.7: Yula mndewa nakazudila, kawalajiza wamizi wa heye wakawabagamize awo wakopolaji na kuwasomela luga lwao.
22.8: Hamba kawalonjela vitumagwa wa heye, ‘Ndiya ya izenjele ya goya ng'hatu, ila walalikwe wachakachaka.
22.9: Lelo mlute kuli nzila mhanda na woneche wala womuwafika wachemeni woye kuli izenjele.’
22.10: Wala vitumagwa walawa, waluta kunzila wawegala wanhu weng'ha, wehile na wanojile. Ng'handa ya izenjele na imema wajenzi.
22.11: “Mndewa loyenjile kawona wajenzi, kamona munhu yumwe yawele havalile nguo za mnvina.
22.12: Mndewa kamuuza, ‘Mng'holozangu, kwinjila ndaze hano houvalile ivalo lya mnvina?’ Ila heye nakanyamalila tulu.
22.13: Aho mndewa kawalonjela vitumagwa, ‘Muwopeni magulu na moko mkamtaje kunze kuli kutitu, ako kolila na kujejeda mizino.’ ”
22.14: Yesu nakasinda kwa kulonga, “Walalikwa wenji, ila wahaguligwe wachefu.” Kulavya kodi kwa Kaizali (Malichi 12:13-17; Lukasi 20:20-26)
22.15: Hamba, Mafalisayo waluta, welonjelela nzila ya kumgwiliza Yesu kwa ulonzi wa heye.
22.16: Lelo wawalajiza vitumagwa wa hewo hamwe na walanguswa wa chilundo cha Helodi. Nawamuuza, “Mlangusa, tuvizela kota hegwe kwa munhu wakitumbila, na kota kwa kulangusa nzila ya Nguluwi kwa kukomya ng'hatu, hulingumdumba munhu yoneche, mina ukulu wa munhu hauwele chinhu kwa hegwe.
22.17: Lelo tulonjele majesa ga hegwe. Ndaze, iwa goya ama hebu kulavya kodi kwa mndewa wa Loma?”
22.18: Ila Yesu nakavizela wihe wa hewo wowalingijesa nakuwalonjela, “Hemwe wahadi lekachoni mwangunjeza?
22.19: Mndajile sendi yomlingulavila kodi.” Na hewo wamlavila igwala lya sendi.
22.20: Lelo Yesu nakawauza, “Mutwi na itagwa ali ndo lya whaani?”
22.21: Nawamwidichila, “Ndo cha mndewa wa Loma.” Aho Yesu kawalonjela, “Lelo ga mndewa wa Loma mmigalile mndewa wa Loma na ga Nguluwi mmigalile Nguluwi.”
22.22: Lowahuliche ahyo nawabubuwala wamleka, woka. Ulanguso wa mbuli ya kuzilipuka (Malichi 12:18-27; Lukasi 20:27-40)
22.23: Zuwa alyo, wamwe wa Masadukayo nawawele wolonga wabagame hawozilipuka nawamlutila Yesu.
22.24: Lelo nawamlonjela, “Mlangusa, Musa nakalonga munhu yaholile mdala wone yabagame ne kulela mwana, imgana mng'holoze, yamhole yula mdala mlekwa, leka yamlelele wana mng'holoze.
22.25: Lelo aha hetu kwali na wanhu saba wa lulelo lumwe. Wa mwaluko nakabagama ne kulela mwana, ayula mdala mlekwa nakaholeka kahi na mng'holoze.
22.26: Iwa hihyo kwa wakeli na wakadatu, mbaka weng'ha saba.
22.27: Awo weng'ha lowabagame, na yula mdala nakabagama.
22.28: Lelo zuwa lya wabagame kuzilipuka mdala ayo kowa mdala wa yalikohi kwa wala walume saba? Mina weng'ha saba namhola yuye.”
22.29: Yesu nakawedichila, “Hemwe muwifya kwa vila hamgazelele Maandiko Matakatifu ne mong'ho wa Nguluwi.
22.30: Mina wabagame howozilipuka hawohesa ne kuhesigwa hebu, wowa kota wahilisi wa kilanga.
22.31: Ila kwa mbuli ya kuzilipuka kwa wabagame, ndaze, hamsomile gala goyawalonjele Nguluwi? Nakawalonjela,
22.32: ‘Heni nda Nguluwi wa Abulahamu na wa Isaka na wa Yakubu!’ Lelo heye hawele Nguluwi wa wabagame ila ndo Nguluwi wa wawele wakomu.”
22.33: Lula lung'hongola lwa wanhu loluhuliche ahyo, lububuwala kwa ulanguso wa heye. Mzilo ukulu (Malichi 12:28-34; Lukasi 10:25-28)
22.34: Masadukayo lowahuliche kota Mafalisayo wahela chinhu chinji cha kumuuza kahi Yesu, nawating'hana hamwe.
22.35: Yumwe wa hewo, mtagusa, nakamuuza Yesu kwa kumjeza,
22.36: “Mlangusa, malajizo galikohi ndo gawele makulu kuli utaguso?”
22.37: Yesu nakamwidichila, “ ‘Umgane Mkulu Nguluwi wa hegwe kwa nhumbula ya hegwe yeng'ha na kwa muhe wa hegwe weng'ha na kwa luhala lwa hegwe lweng'ha.’
22.38: Ali ndo ilajizo liwele likulu na lya mwaluko.
22.39: Lya keli iwhana na lilyo, ‘Umgane youlingikalasa habehi kota vyoulingigana gwegwe baho.’
22.40: Malajizo ga Musa gandichigwe na waloli wa Nguluwi gangitumbila mizilo aji mili.” Mbuli ya mlohozi yalingubetezwa kuya (Malichi 12:35-37; Lukasi 20:41-44)
22.42: “Hemwe mwangona ndaze mbuli ya Kilistu Mlohozi? Ka mwana wa whaani?” Wamwidichila, “Mwana Daudi.”
22.43: Yesu kawalojela, “Lelo iwa ndaze,” “Kota kwa ludali lwa Muhe Yelile Daudi kangumchema heye ‘Mkulu’? Mina nakalonga,
22.44: “ ‘Mkulu nakamlonjela Mkulu wa heni, wikale nzingo ya kudilo kwa heni, mbaka ndiwawiche wang'honyo wa hegwe hasi ha magulu ga hegwe.’
22.45: Lelo wone Daudi kangumchema Kilistu ‘Mkulu,’ iwa ndaze yawe mwana wa heye?”
22.46: Kuduhu munhu yoneche yajezile kumwidichila chinhu. Na kulawa zuwa lila kuduhu ne munhu kahi yajezile kumuuza chinhu.

23.1: Hamba Yesu kawalonjela wanhu wamemile hamwe na walanguswa wa heye, Nakalonga.
23.2: Nakawalonjela, Walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo wana ludali lwa kutang'hula malajizo.
23.3: Lelo mibatilile na kudita choneche chowowalonjelani. Ila mleche kuwinza chowodita, mina hawalingudita gala gowalingudamla kwa wanhu.
23.4: Wawohaga mifulusi na kuwapapiza wayawo mmayega, ila hewo wawo wangulema kugolola ne chidole wapape.
23.5: Hewo huditaga madito gawo leka wanhu wawone. Mlole ukulu wa vibende vilingulajila Malajizo mchihanga na mmoko na mlole kugonzoka kwa lupembo lwa utabuli wa mikoti jawo.
23.6: Huganaga kikala honhu hatanganiche kuli mnvina na vigoda vitanganiche kuli ng'handa za kusalila.
23.7: Waganaga kulamsigwa kwa kutogoligwa kuli masoko na wogana kuchemigwa na wanhu, “Mlangusa.”
23.8: Ila hemwe mleche chemigwa ng'oo “Mlangusa,” mina mlangusa wa hemwe ndo yumwe hela, hemwe mweng'ha mwa lukolo lumwe.
23.9: Namleche kumchema munhu yoneche “Mhaza,” Hano hali isi, mina Mhaza wa hemwe ndo yumwe hela, yawele kilanga.
23.10: Namleche kuchemigwa, “Vilongozi,” Mina mlongozi wa hemwe ndo yumwe hela, yuye Kilistu Mlohozi.
23.11: Yawele mng'hangala hali hemwe yawe chitumagwa wa hemwe.
23.12: Yochikwiniza koduliswa, na yoneche yawele liholile kokwinizwa. Yesu kangulonga mbuli ya udesi (Malichi 12:40; Lukasi 11:39-42,44,52; 20:47)
23.13: “Mochona mwemwe walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo, mwawahadi! Mwanguhinda lwizi lwa undewa wa kilanga hali meho ga wanhu. Hemwe mwemwe hamlingwinjila mng'handa, na mwanguwalemeza wanji walingugana kwinjila wenjile.
23.14: Mochona mwemwe walangusa wa malajizo na Mafalisayo, mwawahadi! Mwanguwabunza na kwa usugu mwanguwasukula walekwa ng'handa za hewo na kisinjizila kota mwa wanhu wanojile kwa kulanda kwa kulutilila. Lelo kwa mbuli ahyo mogazigwa lukami.
23.15: “Mochona mwemwe walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo, mwawahadi! Mwanguheluka kuli bahali na isi zinji leka muwe munhu yumwe yawinze dini ya hemwe. Homuwa na heye, mwangumdita yalute kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu kusinda hila vyoyawele.
23.16: “Mochona mwemwe vilongozi hambe mlole! Hemwe mwangulangusa, ‘Wone munhu yochilaha kwa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kilaha ako hakuwele chinhu, ila one yelahe kwa zahabu ya Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kilaha ako kwangumibata.’
23.17: Hemwe hambe mlole wapoka! Chakohi chitanganiche ng'hatu? Dhahabu ama Ng'handa ya Nguluwi lilinguidita ayo dhahabu iwe yelile?
23.18: Kahi mwangulonga kuta one munhu yelahe kwa honhu ha kulavila nhambiko haiwele chinhu, ila one yelahe kuli nhambiko iwichigwe hachanya ha alitale, kilaha ako humbataga.
23.19: Hemwe mohambe mlole! Chakohi chiwele chitanganiche ng'hatu, aila nhambiko, ama hala hali honhu ha kulavila nhambiko ndo halinguidita ayo nhambiko iwe yelile?
23.20: Munhu yalingilaha kwa hala honhu helile kelaha kwa hala kuli honhu ha kulavila nhambiko, na choneche chiwichigwe hachanya hake.
23.21: Na yalingilaha kwa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi kelaha kwa ayo Ng'handa ya Nguluwi na kahi kwa yula Nguluwi yekale mgati.
23.22: Na yalingilaha kwa kilanga kelaha kwa chigoda cha undewa cha Nguluwi, na kwa heye Nguluwi yalingikala mchigoda acho.
23.23: Mochona mwemwe walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo, wahadi! Mwangulavya kwa Nguluwi chinhu chimwe kulawa kuli vinhu kumi na tangawizi kota vila mahamba galingununyilila, binzali na jila na aku mleka vinhu vitanganiche kuli Malajizo ga Musa kota vila mbuli zilingutagusa goya na isungu na makundo. Ahi ndo vyomlinguganigwa kudita ne kusemwa zila zinji.
23.24: Vilongozi wohambe mlole! Mwangusa chinhu chidodo kota ng'honzi kuli vyakunwa, ila mwangumela chinhu chikulu kota isenga.
23.25: “Mochona mwemwe walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo, wahadi! Mwanguhovuga chizombe na chisaye kwa kunze, ila mgati mwanguleka chimemile ubuhu vinhu vihile vya ubochelezi.
23.26: Mfalisayo yohambe ulole! Uhovuje chizombe mgati tandi na kunze kowa kuzelu hihyo.
23.27: “Mochona mwemwe walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo, wahadi! Mfanda kota vilaga. Mwangubakaliza lung'halilo luzelu kwa kunze gangoneka gangung'ala, ila kwa mgati gamemile mizeje ja wabagame na chila chinhu chihile.
23.28: Vivila kahi na hemwe mwangoneka na wanhu kwa kunze kota mtanganika, ila kwa mgati mmemile uhadi na wihe. Yesu kangulagula kugazigwa kwa hewo (Lukasi 11:47-51)
23.29: “Mochona mwemwe walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo, wahadi! Mwanguzenga vilaga vya waloli na kung'haliza vilaga vya wanhu watanganiche.
23.30: Mwangulonga, ‘Kota hetwe natwalingikala mhela wa wasekulu wa hetwe twangihanza na hewo kuli mbuli ya kuwakopola waloli.’
23.31: Hambi mwangulavya ulolezi mwemwe baho kota hemwe mwa wana wa wanhu wawakopole waloli.
23.32: Ena, mgongomanye jila mijito jowaluche wasekulu wa hemwe.
23.33: Hemwe lulelo lwa mizoka jiwele na dunga! Mouhusa ndaze utaguso wa chiluli cha Jehanamu.
23.34: Ndo mina heni ndanguwahilichila hemwe waloli, wanhu wawele na luhala na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, mowakopola na kuwagaza wamwe wa hewo, na wanji mowasubula ng'hobwa kuli ng'handa za kusalila na kuwapala kuli chila honhu.
23.35: Hino nongwa yeng'ha yokuyilani kwa mbuli ya danda yeng'ha ya wanhu watanganiche iboholigwe mchanya mwa isi. Ena, kulawa kukopoligwa kwa Abeli nayali hela nongwa mbaka kukopoligwa kwa Sakaliya, mwana wa Balakia, yula mumkopole kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi hala honhu helile na honhu ha kulavila nhambiko.
23.36: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, lulelo alu logazigwa kwa mbuli ino ya kukopola. Yesu vyoyawaganile wanhu wa Yelusalemu (Lukasi 13:34-35)
23.37: “Yelusalemu! Gwa Yelusalemu! Kwanguwakopola waloli na kuwatowa kwa maganga wala watumigwe kwa hegwe. Lwa kalinga njeza kuwakungajiza wana wa hegwe kwa heni kota vila ng'huku vyoilingukungajiza vinziya vya heye hasi hali mbawa za heye, ila hegwe nahuviganile!
23.38: Hambi lelo, ng'handa ya hegwe yolekwa chihame.
23.39: Ndanguwalonjelani, humbona kahi mbaka mhela houlonga, ‘Yatambichizwe ayo yalinguya kwa itagwa lya Mkulu.’ ”

24.1: Yesu nakalawa kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, naloyali yoluta, walanguswa wa heye nawamlutila, wamlajila vyoizenjigwe goya Ng'handa ya Nguluwi.
24.2: Yesu kawalonjela, “Ena, moweza kugalola aga geng'ha! Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, kuduhu ne iganga limwe lipona aho mchanya mwa liyage, chila chinhu chowifigwa.” Kugaya na kugazika (Malichi 13:3-13; Lukasi 21:7-19)
24.3: Yesu loyali yekale mchanya mwa chidunda cha Mzeituni, walanguswa nawamlutila chinyele hafungo, nawamuuza, “Utulonjele mbuli azi zolawila hanili? Chilajilo chachi chitulajila kuya kwa hegwe na kuduma kwa mhela?”
24.4: Yesu kawedichila, “Milolele mleche kuhadigwa na munhu.
24.5: Mina wenji wolawila wolonga chila yumwe kota, ‘Heni ndo Kilistu Mlohozi’ Na hewo wowajiliza wanhu wenji.
24.6: Mohulika mbuli ya ngondo na uhesi wa ngondo, ila mleche kisinza, mina ago gokuya kulawila, ila kuduma kung'hali.
24.7: Isi imwe yochitowa na isi iyage, undewa umwe wochitowa na undewa uyage. Ahano na ahala howa na nzala na jimachinyina.
24.8: Geng'ha ago ndo kota mwaluko wa usungu wa kulela mwana.
24.9: “Hamba wowalavya leka mgazigwe na kukopoligwa. Isi zeng'ha zowazudilani kwa mbuli ya itagwa lya heni.
24.10: Kahi, wenji woleka makundo ga hewo, wochibagula na kizudila.
24.11: Wolawila waloli wenji wa udesi wowajiliza wanhu wenji.
24.12: Kwa mbuli ya konjezeka kwa wehile, igano lya munhu lyotita.
24.13: Ila munhu yula yokwimilila mbaka kuduma ndo heye yoloholigwa.
24.14: Leka, kuduma hakunafika, Mbuli Inojile ya Undewa wa Nguluwi yodamligwa kota ulolezi kwa isi zeng'ha. Kugaya ng'hatu (Malichi 13:14-23; Lukasi 21:20-24)
24.15: “Lelo lomkona ‘Izudizo lilinguwifya Ng'handa ya Nguluwi,’ Lilonjigwe na mloli wa Nguluwi Danyeli lima honhu Helile, yalingusoma yavizele vyoili.”
24.16: Aho, wawele Yudeya na wabilimile kuchidunda.
24.17: Yawele kuchanya mwa chinduwiko cha ng'handa ya heye, yaleche kidulika kuhola chinhu mng'handa.
24.18: Yawele kumgunda yaleche kuhiluka kumbele kuhola nguwo ya heye.
24.19: Wochona wawo wamama wawele na himila na walingonyeza zuwa azo!
24.20: Mumlande Nguluwi leka kubilima kwa hemwe kuleche kuwa mhela wa mbeho ama Zuwa lya Kwesela!
24.21: Mina mhela awo kowa na kugaya ng'hatu kohakunalawila kuli mwaluko wa isi mbaka lehano, na hailawila kahi.
24.22: Wone zuwa azo naziwe hazipunguzigwe, kuduhu munhu ne yumwe yahawele yoloholigwa, ila zuwa azo zipunguzigwa na Nguluwi kwa mbuli ya wala wahaguligwe.
24.23: “Lelo munhu yowalonjelani mazuwa ago, ‘Mlole Kilistu Mlohozi kahano’ Ama ‘Ka ahala,’ mleche kukunda.
24.24: Mina wokuya Kilistu wa udesi na waloli wa udesi. Wodita ulajilo ukulu na vinduzanduza leka wojeza kuwajiliza wala wahaguligwe na Nguluwi.
24.26: Lelo howowalonjelani, ‘Mlole, ka kugunuche,’ Mleche kuluta ako, ama, ‘Mlole, kevisa mng'handa,’ Mleche kunda.
24.27: Mina kota vila lumwemwesa lwa limlungu kulawa kolilawilaga isanya mbaka kolizibilaga isanya, ahyo ndo vyoiwa kuya kwa Mwana wa Munhu.
24.28: Ahala hohawele mtufi, ndo hojimema mikungule. Kuya kwa Mwana wa Munhu (Malichi 13:24-27; Lukasi 21:25-28)
24.29: “Hala hokumala kugaya ako, isanya lowichigwa jiza na nyelezi halibunguzuka. Nhondwe zolagala kulawa kilanga na mong'ho ubatilile vinhu avyo vyeng'ha wotigaswa.
24.30: Hamba, ulajilo wa Mwana wa Munhu wokoneka kilanga, na aho nhanzi zeng'ha muisi zodama, womona Mwana wa Munhu yokuya ha ng'hungugu ya kilanga yawele na ludali na ukulu lwinji.
24.31: Na heye kowalajiza wahilisi wa kilanga wa heye wawele na mhalamhanda ilinguyowa ng'hatu, na hewo wowakungajiza wahaguligwe wa heye kuli nzingo zeng'ha zine, kulawila kilanga kweng'ha. Milanguse kwa kulola ikuyu (Malichi 13:28-31; Lukasi 21:29-33)
24.32: “Kwa ikuyu milanguse nhelo ayi, hala nhagala lozikwaluka kutitima na kubahula, mwanguvizela kota mhela wa nhonya wa habehi.
24.33: Hihyo du hemwe homkona mbuli zino zeng'ha ziditikwa, mvizele kota Mwana wa Munhu kahabehi kuya.
24.34: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, lulelo alu halubagama vinhu avi vyeng'ha havinalawila.
24.35: Ulanga na isi zopuluta, ila ulonzi wa heni haupuluta hebu. Kuduhu yavizelele zuwa na saa (Malichi 13:32-37; Lukasi 17:26-30,34-36)
24.36: “Ila, kwa mbuli ya zuwa ama saa ayo, kuduhu munhu yavizelele yokuya hanili, ne wahilisi wa kilanga, ne Mwana. Mhaza yaliyeng'ha ndo yavizelele.
24.37: Kota hila vyonaiwele mhela wa Nuhu, ndo vyoiwa kuya kwa Mwana wa Munhu.
24.38: Mina mhela awo, mazi tendema nalogang'hali lawila, wanhu wali wolya na kunwa, wohola na kuholeka, mbaka Nuhu loyenjile mgati mwa itumbwi ling'hangala.
24.39: Nahawavizelele kwali na choni mbaka gala mazi tendema logalawile, gawabagamiza weng'ha. Ndo vyoiwa mhela Mwana wa Munhu hoyokuya.
24.40: Mhela awo wanhu weli wowa kumgunda, yumwe koholigwa na yumwe kolechigwa.
24.41: Wadala weli wowa wobalasa sokolo, yumwe koholigwa na yumwe kulechigwa.
24.42: “Lelo mikale meho, kwa vila hamvizelele zuwa hoyokuya Mkulu wa hemwe.
24.43: Mvizele hino, wone yawele na ng'handa nayavizele mhizi hoyokuya yahawele meho, nahalileka ng'handa ya heye ibenigwe.
24.44: Leka ahyo, mwime goya, kwa vila Mwana wa Munhu kokuya saa yohamuizelele.” Chitumagwa yanojile na yehile (Lukasi 12:41-48)
24.45: Yesu kalutilila kulonga, “Yalikohi lelo chitumagwa wa kitumbila na yawele na luhala, wone mkulu wa heye yamuwiche hachanya ha wanhu weng'ha, yawape chilyo kwa mhela wuwula?
24.46: Kobweda yula chitumagwa wone mkulu wa heye loyohiluka komfika yodita ahyo.
24.47: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, komuwika chitumagwa ayo yalolelaje lufufu lwa heye lweng'ha.
24.48: Ila wone chitumagwa yehile yelonjele mnhumbula, ‘Mkulu wa heni kakawa kuhiluka,’
24.49: Hamba nakwaluka kuwatowa vitumagwa wayage, nakwaluka kulya na kunwa hamwe na walingugala,
24.50: mkulu wa heye mpogozi kokuya zuwa lohalizelele na saa yohaizelele.
24.51: Komgaza vibi na kumuwika mchilundo chimwe na wadesi. Ako kowa na chililo na kujejeda mizino.

25.1: “Mhela awo, undewa wa kilanga ufanda kota wahinza kumi waholile vyenje vya hewo, waluta kumbochela mkasano.
25.2: Wahano wa hewo wali wapoka na wahano wanji wali na luhala.
25.3: Wala wapoka nawahola chenje za hewo, ila hawaholile na mafuta ga kuwesela.
25.4: Ila wala wawele na luhala nawahola mibuli ja mafuta gawo hamwe na chenje za hewo.
25.5: Kwa vila mkasano na kakawila kuya, wala wahinza weng'ha nawasinzila, wawasa.
25.6: Hagati ha nechilo kwali na iyowe, ‘Mwela yoo, Mkasano kanguya mlute kumbochela.’
25.7: Aho wala wahinza weng'ha walilimka, waviwika goya vyenje vya hewo.
25.8: Wala wapoka wawalonjela wala wawele na luhala, ‘Mtujidile mafuta mado ga hemwe mina vyenje vya hetwe vyanguzima.’
25.9: Ila wala nawawele na luhala wawalonjela, ‘Hogotukwila hebu hetwe na hemwe! Igana mlute kowalinguguza mkegulile mwemwe!’
25.10: Lelo wala wahinza wapoka lowalutile kugula mafuta, mkasano nakafika. Wala wahinza nawawele goya wenjila hamwe na heye mli ng'handa ya mkasano, hamba lwizi luhindigwa.
25.11: Hamba wala wahinza wanji nawoya, wachema, ‘Mkulu, mkulu, tuchumulile!’
25.12: Ila heye kawedichila, ‘Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, siwazelele hemwe.’ ”
25.13: Hamba Yesu nakasinda kwa kulonga, “Lelo mikale meho, kwa vila hamzelele zuwa ne saa. Chiwalo cha vitumagwa wadatu (Lukasi 19:11-27)
25.14: “Mhela awo Undewa wa Nguluwi wowa kota munhu yumwe yalingwinula majendo kuluta honhu hamwambu, nakawachema vitumagwa wa heye, walolele lufufu lwake.
25.15: Nakampa chila yumwe kota mong'ho wa heye vyouwele, yumwe kampa sendi mihako jihano, yunji mihako mili ja sendi na miyage mhako umwe wa sendi, hamba koka.
25.16: Lelo yula yapegwe sendi mihako jihano kakola mijito najo kawa na chonjezeche mihako jihano jiyage.
25.17: Vivyo na yula yapegwe mihako mili, kazidita zonjezeka mihako mili jiyage.
25.18: Ila yula yapegwe mhako umwe, kaluta kabawa hasi, kaivisa ula mhako wa sendi za mkulu wa heye.
25.19: “Mhela loupulute, yula mkulu nakahiluka, nakaluka kukagula hisabu ya zowapatile na kutumiya sendi za heye.
25.20: Chitumagwa yapegwe migwala jihano nakoya yaholile migwala jihano jonjezeche, nakamlonjela, ‘Mkulu, nakunipa migwala jihano, hano hana migwala jihano jiyage jonjezeche jomhatile.’
25.21: Mkulu wa heye nakamlonjela, ‘Goya, chitumagwa unojile na wakitumbila. Kunoga kuli mbuli ndodo, ndokudita uwe mlolezi wa mbuli zitanganiche. Uye usangalale hamwe na mkulu wa hegwe.’
25.22: “Chitumagwa yapegwe migwala mili ja sendi nakoya, kalonga, ‘Mkulu, nakunipa migwala mili. Uhole migwala mili jiyage zonjezeche zomhatile.’
25.23: Mkulu wa heye nakamlonjela, ‘Goya, chitumagwa unojile na wakitumbila. Kuwa wakitumbila kwa mbuli ndodo, ndokudita uwe utanganiche mbuli zitanganiche. Uye usangalale hamwe na mkulu wa hegwe.’
25.24: “Ila yula yapegwe sendi igwala limwe nakoya, kalonga, ‘Mkulu, ndivizela hegwe kwa munhu yang'ang'ale, hegwe kubetaga hala hounyalile, na kukungajiza hala hosanzanze.
25.25: Nandumba, nandilivisa igwala lya hegwe hasi. Uhole lelo igwala lya hegwe.’
25.26: “Mkulu wa heye nakamlonjela, ‘Hegwe kwa chitumagwa wihile na mgata! Kuvizela kota heni sibetaga hala hosinyalile, na kukungajiza hawele hosanzanze.
25.27: Naikugana lelo, kuuwika mhako wa sendi ya heni hali hazina, na heni ndaholile mhako wa sendi wa heni na zila zonjezeche!
25.28: Lelo msukuleni ayo mhako wa sendi namkampe yula yawele na mihako kumi.
25.29: Mina, yawele na chinhu kopegwa na konjezelwa. Ila yula yawele hela chinhu, na chila chidodo choyawele nacho choholigwa.
25.30: Na kwa mbuli ya ayu chitumagwa yawele hatanganiche, mlavyeni kunze kuli jiza! Ako kowa na chililo na kujejeda mizino.’ Utaguso wa kuduma
25.31: “Mhela Mwana wa munhu yawele Mndewa loyokuya kuli ukulu wa heye na wahilisi wa kilanga weng'ha hamwe na heye, aho kochikala mchanya mwa chigoda cha heye cha undewa chiukulu.
25.32: Isi zeng'ha zoting'hanika kumwando kwa heye, na heye kowabagula kota vila mdimi yalingubagula ming'holo na mhene.
25.33: Kowawika wanhu walingudita yaviganile Nguluwi nzingo ya kudilo kwa heye na wanhu wehile kowawika nzingo ya kumoso kwa heye.
25.34: “Hamba Mndewa kowalonjela wala wawele nzingo ya heye kudilo, ‘Muye hemwe mtambichizwe na Mhaza wa heni, bocheleni undewa muwichilwe kulawila kulumbigwa kwa isi.
25.35: Mina ndali na nzala, hemwe mingalila chilyo, ndali na ng'halu, hemwe mingalila mazi, ndali mjenzi hemwe mmbochela,
25.36: ndali mwazi, mnvaliza, ndali mtamwa, hemwe muya kundola, ndali mchinweng'ho hemwe muya kunjendela.’
25.37: Aho, awo wanhu watanganiche womwidichila mndewa ‘Mkulu, hanili natukona uwele na nzala na hetwe tukigalila chilyo, ama uwele na ng'halu na hetwe tukigalila mazi?
25.38: Hanili natukona uwele mjenzi na hetwe tukubochela hakaye hetu, ama ulihela nguwo na hetwe tukuvaliza?
25.39: Hanili natukona uwele mtamwa ama uwele mchinweng'ho na hetwe tuya kukujendela?’
25.40: Mndewa kowedichila, ‘Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, chila chinhu chomumditile yumwe wa awa wang'holozangu wadodo, mnditila heni.’
25.41: “Hamba kowalonjela wala wehile wawele nzingo ya kumoso kwa heye, ‘Ucheni kumwando kwa heni hemwe mpanjilwe! Mlute kuli chiluli cha mazuwa gose ne kuduma yawichilwe Limazoga na wahilisi wa kilanga wa heye.
25.42: Ndali na nzala hemwe hamhele chilyo, ndali na ng'halu hemwe hamhele mazi.
25.43: Ndali mjenzi hemwe hammbochele, ndali mtamwa na mchinweng'ho hemwe hamuyile kundola.’
25.44: “Aho na hewo womwidichila, ‘Mkulu, hanili natukona uwele na nzala ama ng'halu, uwele mjenzi ama ulihela nguwo, na uwele mtamwa ama ulimchinweng'ho, hetwe hatukuditile chinhu?’
25.45: Na heye kowedichila, ‘Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, chila lomlemile kumditila mbuli azi yumwe wa wanhu awa wadodo, namlema kunditila heni.’
25.46: Lelo awa woluta kuli kugazigwa kwa mazuwa gose, ila wala watanganiche woluta kuli ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.”

26.1: Yesu loyasindile kulonga ago geng'ha, kawalonjela walanguswa wa heye,
26.2: “Mvizela kota mazuwa meli galinguya kowa na mnvina ya Pasaka, na Mwana wa Munhu kolavigwa leka yawambigwe.”
26.3: Mhela awo watambika wakulu na wasekulu wa wanhu nawating'hana kuli chipepela cha Kayafa, mtambika mkulu.
26.4: Walongasa vyowomibata Yesu kwa chinyele hamba wamkopole.
26.5: Ila walonga, “Mbuli ayo ileche kukoleka mhela wa mnvina ya Pasaka, kuleche kulawila kilewa na kibagula hali wanhu.” Yesu kangubakalizwa unhunyhililo Betaniya (Malichi 14:3-9; Yohana 12:1-8)
26.6: Yesu loyali Betaniya, hakaye kwa Simoni, yawele nguchemigwa Mkoma,
26.7: mdala yumwe yawele na libuli lya alabasta iwele na unhunyhililo wa sendi nyinji, kamuyila hala mchisaga hoyekale kulya chilyo, kamgudulila awo unhunyhililo kumutwi.
26.8: Walanguswa wa heye lowawene ago nawazudila walonga, “Ya choni kuwifya aku?”
26.9: Unhunyhililo awu wahaguzigwe kwa sendi nyinji na wahapegwe wazunwa.
26.10: Yesu nakagazela majesa gawo, kawalonjela, “Ndaze lekachoni mwangumgaza ayu mdala? Heye kanditila mbuli inojile.
26.11: Wazunwa mwanawo mazuwa geng'ha, ila heni siwa na hemwe mazuwa gose.
26.12: Ayu mdala loyali yonjidila unhunyhililo nayali yombika goya kwa kutiligwa kwa heni mchilaga.
26.13: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, koneche kweng'ha muisi Mbuli Inojile yodamligwa, chinhu chino choyaditile ayu mdala chodamligwa kwa kumkumbuchila heye.” Yuda Isikalioti kangumbelenhuka Yesu (Malichi 14:10-11; Lukasi 22:3-6)
26.14: Hamba, Yudasi Isikalioti, yumwe wa wala kumi na weli, nakaluta kwa watambika wakulu,
26.15: kawalonjela, “Mondigalila choni wone ndimlavye Yesu kwa hemwe?” Wamuwazila migwala makumi gadatu ga sendi,
26.16: na baho Yudasi nayali yopala ndaze vyoyombelenhuka Yesu. Yesu kangulya ndiya ya Pasaka (Malichi 14:12-21; Lukasi 22:7-13,21-23; Yohana 13:21-30)
26.17: Zuwa lya mwaluko lya mnvina ya mibumunda johajiwichigwe usaso, walanguswa nawamlutila Yesu wamuuza, “Kwangugana kohi tukuwichile goya ndiya ya Pasaka?”
26.18: Heye nakawedichila, “Luteni kuli muji kwa munhu yumwe, mumlonjele, ‘Mlangusa kangulonga, mhela wa heni ufika, kwa hegwe ndolya Pasaka hamwe na walanguswa wa heni.’ ”
26.19: Walanguswa wadita kota Yesu vyoyawalajize, nawawika goya ndiya ya Pasaka.
26.20: Lokuwele matinazo, Yesu kekalisa mchisaga hamwe na walanguswa wa heye kumi na weli.
26.21: Lowali wolya, Yesu kalonga, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, yumwe wa hemwe kombelenhuka.”
26.22: Walanguswa nawesinza ng'hatu, waluka kiuza yumweyumwe, “Mkulu, ndaze nda heni?”
26.23: Yesu kedichila, “Heye yodiliza ibumunda hamwe na heni kuli chisaye ndo heye yombelenhuka. Kulya hamwe nayali ndo ulajilo wa kigana.
26.24: Ena, Ndangukomya Mwana wa Munhu kobagama kota Maandiko Matakatifu vyogawele longa mbuli ya heye, ila mane yuye munhu ayo yalingumgalamka Mwana wa Munhu! Nayahawele goya munhu ayo wone nahaleleche.”
26.25: Yudasi, ndo yula yaganile kumbelenhuka, kamuuza, “Mlangusa, ndaze nda heni?” Yesu kamwidichila, “Ena hegwe kulonga.” Ndiya ya Mkulu (Malichi 14:22-26; Lukasi 22:14-20; 1 Kolinto 11:23-25)
26.26: Nalowali wolya, Yesu kahola ibumunda, kamtogola Nguluwi, kaumogola, kawagawila walanguswa yolonga, “Mhole mulye, alu ndo lukuli lwa heni.”
26.27: Hamba kahola chizombe, katambichiza, kawapa yolonga, “Munwe weng'ha,
26.28: mina ayi ndo danda ya heni ilingweneza ilagano lya Nguluwi na wanhu wa heye, danda ilingubohoka kwa chiwalo cha wanhu weng'ha kuwosela gehile ga hewo.
26.29: Ndanguwalonjelani, sinwa kahi divai ya zabibu mbaka zuwa lila ndinwa divai inyale hamwe na hemwe kuli undewa wa Mhaza wa heni.”
26.30: Lowasindile kwimba lwimbo, woka, nawaluta kuli chidunda cha Mizeituni. Yesu kangulonga kota Petili kombela (Malichi 14:27-31; Lukasi 22:31-34; Yohana 13:36-38)
26.31: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela, “Nechilo ayi ya lehano, hemwe mweng'ha mombilima na kundeka ndiliyeka, mina Maandiko Matakatifu gangulonga, “ ‘Ndomtowa mdimi, na chilundo cha ming'holo chosambaluka.’
26.33: Petili nakamlonjela Yesu, “Wone hewo wawe na majesa na hegwe nakukuleka, heni sikuleka hebu.”
26.34: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ndangukulonjela ndikomya, nechilo yiyino izogolo halineka, kombela kadatu.”
26.35: Petili nakamlonjela, “Wone iwe inganile kubagama, sikubela ng'oo.” Na wala walanguswa wanji weng'ha nawalonga hihyo. Yesu kangulanda kuli kagunda ka Gesemane (Malichi 14:32-42; Lukasi 22:39-46)
26.36: Hamba Yesu kaluta nawo kuli kamgunda ka migodi Getisemane, kawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Mikale hano na heni ndute hala hamwando ndikalande.”
26.37: Nakawahola Petili na wana weli wa Sebedayo, nakaluka kuwa na masinzo na kugaya.
26.38: Aho nakawalonjela, “Ndina masinzo lukami mnhumbula habehi kubagama. Mikale baha meho hamwe na heni.”
26.39: Lelo nakaluta hamwando hado, kagwa chifunama, kalanda, “Mhaza wa heni, wone vyoiwa, chizombe achi chikole hafungo, ila haiwele vyondilingugana heni, leka kota vyoulingugana hegwe.”
26.40: Nakawalutila wala walanguswa kawafika wawasile. Nakamlonjela Petili, “Ndo kulonga mlemwela kikala meho hamwe na heni ne saa imwe?
26.41: Mikale meho na kulanda mleche kwinjila kuli kujezigwa. Muhe wa munhu wangugana kudita ganojile ila lukuli lwa ng'hochele.”
26.42: Nakaluta kahi lwa keli kulanda, “Mhaza wa heni, wone hailinguganigwa chizombe cha magazo chikole heni ne kuchinwa, leka igano lya hegwe lyenele.”
26.43: Nakawalutila kahi, nakawafika wawasile, mina meho gawo nagali gebatigwe na usinjizi.
26.44: Baho, kawaleka, nakaluta kulanda lwa kadatu kwa luzi lulula.
26.45: Hamba kawalutila wala walanguswa, kawalonjela, “Ndaze, mng'hali muwasile na kwesela? Mlole! Mhela wuya, Mwana wa Munhu kanguwichigwa mmoko mwa wanhu wawele na gehile.
26.46: Mwinuche tucheni. Mlole! Kanguya yula munhu yalingunhyinduka.” Yesu kangibatika (Malichi 14:43-50; Lukasi 22:47-53; Yohana 18:3-12)
26.47: Lelo Yesu naloyang'hali yolonga na hewo, baho nakoya Yudasi, yumwe wa wala kumi na weli. Hamwe na heye woya na wanhu wenji wawele na mipanga na nyimbati kulawa kwa watambika wakulu na wasekulu wa wanhu.
26.48: Ayo yaganile kumbelenhuka Yesu, nayali yawapele ulajilo yolonga, “Yula munhu yondimnonela mizeze ndo heye, mibateni.”
26.49: Baho, Yuda kamhejelela Yesu, nakamlonjela, “Ulamche, mlangusa!” Hamba kamnonela.
26.50: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mng'holozangu, udite chouwinzile kudita.!” Aho wala wanhu woya, wamibata Yesu, wamuwika mmoko.
26.51: Yumwe wa wala wawele hamwe na Yesu nakagolola moko, nakasomola ipanga, kamtowa chitumagwa wa Mtambika Mkulu, nakamdumula ikutu.
26.52: Aho Yesu nakamlonjela, “Hiluse ipanga lyako muyala, mina yoneche yalingutowa kwa ipanga, kobagama kwa ipanga.
26.53: Ndaze, hamvizelele kota ndahawezile kumlanda Mhaza wa heni na heye yahangalile wamizi vilundo kumi na vili vya wahilisi wa kilanga?
26.54: Ila gokwenela ndaze Maandiko Matakatifu galingulonga kota vyoilinguganigwa ilawile?”
26.55: Mhela wuwo Yesu kalulonjela alo lung'hongola lwa wanhu woyile kumibata, “Ndaze, muya kundibata kwa nyimbati na mipanga kota vila heni nda mbokaji? Chila zuwa ndali mng'handa ya Nguluwi ndilangusa, na hamndibate!
26.56: Ila aga geng'ha gakoleka leka Maandiko Matakatifu ga waloli genele.” Hamba walanguswa weng'ha nawamleka, nawabilima. Yesu hamwando ha balaza lya wayahudi (Malichi 14:53-65; Lukasi 22:54-55,63-71; Yohana 18:13-14,19-24)
26.57: Lelo awo wanhu wamibate Yesu nawamhilika hakaye kwa Kayafa, mtambika mkulu, kowekungajize walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na wasekulu.
26.58: Petili nakamuwinza Yesu kwa kutali mbaka kuchipepela cha mtambika mkulu, kenjila mng'handa hamwe na wamizi leka yalole mbuli zizangulawila.
26.59: Lelo watambika wakulu na balaza lyeng'ha nawapala ulolezi wa udesi kwa Yesu wogana wamkopole,
26.60: ila hawawene chinhu choneche chila, hanga nawoya walolezi wenji wa udesi. Mwiso nawoya walolezi weli,
26.61: nawalonga, “Munhu ayu nakalonga, ‘Ndoweza kugwisa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi na kuizenga kahi kwa mazuwa gadatu.’ ”
26.62: Mtambika mkulu nakema kamuuza Yesu, “Ndaze, hulingwidichila ne chinhu? Wanhu awa wangulavya ulolezi wachi kwa hegwe?”
26.63: Ila Yesu nakanyamalila tulu. Kahi mtambika mkulu nakamlonjela, “Wilahe kwa itagwa lya Nguluwi yawele mkomu, tulonjele kota hegwe ndo Kilistu Mlohozi, mwana wa Nguluwi!”
26.64: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ena, hegwe kwangulonga! Ila ndanguwalonjelani, kulawa sambi momona Mwana wa Munhu yekale kudilo kwa yula Mkulu yawele na ludali yokuya kuchanya kuli ng'hungugu kilanga.”
26.65: Baho mtambika mkulu kadega nguwo za heye, kalonga, “Kamkovula Nguluwi! Twangugana choni kahi? Sambi muhulika yomkovula Nguluwi kwa heye.
26.66: Hemwe mwangona ndaze?” Hewo wamwidichila, “Imgana yabagame!”
26.67: Hamba wamtemela mite kumeho, wamzabula kwa viganza. Wanji lowali womzabula kwa viganza,
26.68: nawalonga, “Hegwe Kilistu Mlohozi, tulagulile lelo, yalikohi yakutowile?” Petili kangumbela Yesu (Malichi 14:66-72; Lukasi 22:56-62; Yohana 18:15-18,25-27)
26.69: Petili yaliyekale kunze kunzingo. Lelo chitumagwa yumwe mdala kamlutila, nakalonga, “Hegwe wali hamwe na Yesu wa Galilaya.”
26.70: Petili nakabela kwa weng'ha wala, nakalonga, “Sivizelele choni choulonga.”
26.71: Loyali yolawa mlwizi, chitumagwa yunji mdala nakamona, nakawalonjela wala wawele hala, “Munhu ayu nayali hamwe na Yesu wa Nasaleti.”
26.72: Petili nakabela kahi aku yochilaha, “Simzelele munhu ayo.”
26.73: Hamba hado hela, wanhu wawele hala wamlutila Petili, wamlonjela, “Twangukomya, hegwe nagwe kwa yumwe wa hewo, mina kuzeleka kwa aila ndonga hela kota hegwe kulawila Galilaya.”
26.74: Aho Petili nakaluka kipanjila na kilaaha yolonga, “Heni simzelele munhu ayo!” Baho du izogolo nalika.
26.75: Petili nakakumbuchila ulonzi woyalonjelwe na Yesu, “Izogolo halineka, kombela kadatu kota hunzelele heni.” Lelo Petili kalawa kunze, nakalila lukami.

27.1: Lokubwemwenzuche, watambika wakulu weng'ha na wasekulu wa wanhu nawaheha mbuli ya Yesu wogana wamkopole.
27.2: Wamuwoha luzabi, wamuhola, wamuhilika kwa Pilato mkulu wa mkowa yahaguligwe na mndewa wa Loma. Kubagama kwa Yuda (Madito 1:18-19)
27.3: Aho, Yudasi, yula yambelenhuche Yesu, loyawene kota mina wamtagusa kwa wihe Yesu, nakawa na masinzo lukami, nakawahilusila watambika wakulu vila vihande makumi gadatu vya sendi.
27.4: Nakawalonjela, “Ndita gehile kwa kumlavya munhu yawele hela nongwa yakopoligwe.” Ila hewo walonga, “Yangutuwala choni hetwe? Ayo mbuli ya hegwe.”
27.5: Na heye nakataga zila sendi mng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakalawa kunze, kaza kinhweng'ha.
27.6: Watambika wakulu nawazihola zila sendi, walonga, “Haiwa goya kuziwika kuli ng'hano ya ng'handa ya Nguluwi, mina ndo sendi za danda.”
27.7: Baho naweuza, nawahola zila sendi wazagula mgunda wa ilongo, hawe honhu ha kutilila wajenzi.
27.8: Ndo mina mbaka lehano mgunda awo wanguchemigwa, “Mgunda wa Danda.”
27.9: Ahyo ulonzi wa mloli Yelemiya wenela, “Nawahola vihande makumi gadatu vya sendi, kwa kihwana na yula munhu, yawele wanhu wa Isilaeli wamguzile,
27.10: nawagula mgunda wa ilongo kwa sendi zizo, kota vila mkulu vyoyandajize.” Pilato kangumuuza Yesu (Malichi 15:2-5; Lukasi 23:3-5; Yohana 18:33-38)
27.11: Yesu nawamwimiza kumwando kwa mkulu wa mkowa. Lelo mkulu wa mkowa nakamuuza, “Ndaze, hambi hegwe ndo mndewa wa Wayahudi?” Yesu nakamwidichila, “Ena, hegwe nakulonga.”
27.12: Ila watambika wakulu na wasekulu nalowali womuuza, nayali hambe yawedichile.
27.13: Ahyo Pilato nakamuuza, “Ndaze, hulinguhulika ulonjelezi awo weng'ha walingulavya kwa hegwe?”
27.14: Ila Yesu hedichile ne chinhu, ahyo mkulu wa mkowa nakabubuwala ng'hatu. Yesu kangutagusigwa kubagama (Malichi 15:6-15; Lukasi 23:13-25; Yohana 18:39-19:16)
27.15: Nayali izoweleche mhela wa mnvina ya Pasaka mkulu wa mkowa kuwachumulila Wayahudi munhu yumwe wamganile yawele mchinweng'ho.
27.16: Mhela awo nakwali na munhu yumwe yawele mchinweng'ho yazeleche lukami, itagwa lyake Balaba.
27.17: Ahyo, wanhu loweting'hane hamwe, Pilato nakawauza, “Mwangugana ndimchumulile yalikohi kuli awa weli, Balaba ama Yesu yalinguchemigwa Kilistu Mlohozi?”
27.18: Nakalonga hino kwa vila nakavizela kota nawamigala kwa heye kwa mbuli ya kumonela fihi hela.
27.19: Pilato naloyawele yekale hali chigoda cha heye cha utaguso, mdala wa heye nakamhilichila usenga awu, “Uleche kiyinjiza kuli utaguso wa munhu yuno yatanganiche, mina lehano ngazika lukami londali ndilota kwa mbuli ya heye.”
27.20: Ila watambika wakulu na wasekulu nawawakola lupichi wanhu walande Balaba yachumulilwe na Yesu yabagame.
27.21: Mkulu wa mkowa nakawauza, “Yalikohi kuli awa weli yomlingugana ndimchumulile?” Wamwidichila, “Balaba!”
27.22: Pilato nakawauza, “Lelo ndite choni na Yesu yalinguchemigwa Kilistu Mlohozi?” Weng'ha nawalonga, “Yawambigwe mumsalaba!”
27.23: Pilato nakauza, “Lekachoni? Nakadita wihe wachi?” Hewo nawalutilila kutowa iyowe, “Yawambigwe mumsalaba!”
27.24: Baho, Pilato loyawene kota hawalingukunda chila choyaliyolonga, na ivuche nalyali lyaluche, nakahola mazi, nakahovuga moko hali wala wanhu wamemile, nakalonga, “Heni ndamduhu kwa mbuli ya kubagama kwa munhu ayu, mane mwemwe baho!”
27.25: Wanhu weng'ha nawalonga, “Danda ya heye na iwe kwa hetwe na wana wa hetwe!”
27.26: Aho Pilato nakawachumulila Balaba kulawa mchinweng'ho, na Yesu yazapigwe ng'hobwa hamba nakamlavya yawambigwe mumsalaba. Wamizi wangumbeza Yesu (Malichi 15:16-20; Yohana 19:2-3)
27.27: Hamba wamizi wa Pilato nawamwinjiza Yesu mng'handa ya mkulu wa Loma, wekungajiza chilundo cheng'ha.
27.28: Wamvula nguwo, wamvalisa ikanzu lya chiundewa.
27.29: Hamba watowa itaji lya miwa ifandile kota chipembelo, wamvalisa kumutwi, wamuwichila kahi idenje kuli moko wa heye wa kudilo. Wamfugamila kumwando kwa heye, wambeza wolonga, “Ulamche Mndewa wa Wayahudi!”
27.30: Wamtemela mite, walihola lila idenje, wamsubulila kumutwi.
27.31: Lowasindile kumbeza, wamvula lila ikanzu, wamvalisa nguwo za heye, hamba wamhilika kumuwamba mumsalaba. Yesu kanguwambigwa (Malichi 15:21-32; Lukasi 23:26-43; Yohana 19:17-27)
27.32: Lowali woluta, nawamfika munhu yumwe itagwa lyake Simoni, mwenyeng'haye wa Kilene, wamizi wamkola lupichi yapiche msalaba wa Yesu.
27.33: Lowafichile honhu halihochemigwa Goligota, hazeleche honhu ha “Izeje lya Mutwi”.
27.34: Wamnweza mhanzanyo wa divai na chinhu chiliusungu. Ila Yesu loyajezile nakalema kunwa.
27.35: Wamuwamba Yesu mumsalaba, hamba wegawila nguwo za heye kwa kuzitowela simbi.
27.37: Hachanya ha mutwi wa heye nawawika utaguso wa heye wandichigwe, “Ayu ndo Yesu, Mndewa wa Wayahudi.”
27.38: Wabokaji weli nawawambigwa mumsalaba hamwe na heye, yumwe kudilo na yumwe kumoso.
27.39: Wanhu wawele wokola honhu hala wali womliga na wotigasa mitwi jawo na kulonga,
27.40: “Hegwe! Ndo nakivuna kota kogwisa ng'handa ya Nguluwi na kuizenga kuli mazuwa gadatu? Lelo ilohole gwegwe. Wone hegwe uli Mwana wa Nguluwi, uduliche mumsalaba!”
27.41: Vivyo du na watambika wakulu hamwe na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na wasekulu nawambeza wolonga,
27.42: “Nakawalohola wanji, ila kilohola yuye kangulemwa! Hambi, heye ndo Mndewa wa Isilaeli! Hambi, lelo yeduliche hasi kulawa mumsalaba, na hetwe tomkunda.
27.43: Naketumbila Nguluwi na kulonga eti heye ndo Mwana wa Nguluwi, lelo Nguluwi yamlohole one yalingumgana.”
27.44: Hihyo na wala wabokaji wawambigwe hamwe na Yesu mumsalaba nawaliwomliga. Yesu kangubagama mumsalaba (Malichi 15:33-41; Lukasi 23:44-49; Yohana 19:28-30)
27.45: Kulawila saa tisa matinazo, jiza naigubika isi yeng'ha.
27.46: Loifichile saa tisa matinazo, Yesu nakalila kwa lizi likulu, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakitani?” Ilinguzeleka, “Nguluwi wa heni, Nguluwi wa heni, lekachoni kundeka?”
27.47: Ila wala nawemile hala lowahuliche ahyo walonga, “Kangumchema Eliya.”
27.48: Yumwe wa hewo nakabilima, nakahola sichi, kadiliza kuli divai izazame, kawika mli idenje, kamha yanwe.
27.49: Wanji nawalonga, “Tandi tulole wone Eliya kanguya kumlohola.”
27.50: Baho, Yesu nakalila kahi kwa lizi likulu, hamba muhe nauleka lukuli.
27.51: Baho ipaziya ligazi lya kudinya honhu helile ng'hatu ha ng'handa ya Nguluwi lidejeka vihande vili kulawa kuchanya mbaka hasi, isi naitigasika, mitalawe najitulika,
27.52: vilaga navigubuka na wanhu wenji wa Nguluwi welile nawabagame, wazilipuligwa,
27.53: na hewo, loyazilipuche heye Yesu, walawa mvilaga, wenjila Yelusalemu muji welile, woneka na wanhu wenji.
27.54: Lelo mkulu wa wamizi na wamizi wa Yesu lowawene limachinyina na gala galawile, nawadumba heko, nawalonga, “Ena, kwa kukomya munhu ayu nayali Mwana wa Nguluwi.”
27.55: Honhu aho hali na wadala wenji wolola kwa kutali. Awo wadala ndo wala wamuwinzile Yesu kulawila Galilaya womtanza.
27.56: Mumo wali Maliya Madelena, Maliya mayao Yakubu na Yusufu, hamwe na mayao wana wa Sebedayo. Kutiligwa kwa Yesu (Malichi 15:42-47; Lukasi 23:50-56; Yohana 19:38-42)
27.57: Loifichile matinazo, mina nakoya munhu yawele na lufufu mwenyeng'haye wa Alimataya, itagwa lyake Yusufu. Na heye kahi nayali mlanguswa wa Yesu.
27.58: Nakamlutila Pilato, nakalanda yapegwe lukuli lwa Yesu. Baho, Pilato nakakunda yapegwe.
27.59: Yusufu nakaluhola lula lukuli, kaubumbiliza sanda nzelu ng'hatu,
27.60: nakuwika mgati mwa chilaga chinyale choyali yahongole kuli italawe. Hamba kabidusa iganga ikulu kadinya hali lwizi lwa chilaga, koka.
27.61: Maliya Madelena na yula Maliya yunji wali wekale wolola chilaga. Wamizi wangulolela chilaga
27.62: Hamitondo, zuwa iyage ila ya kwesela, watambika wakulu na Mafalisayo nawamlutila Pilato,
27.63: nawalonga, “Mkulu, tukumbuchila kota yula mhadi loyali mkomu nakalonga ‘Zuwa lya kadatu ndozilipuka.’
27.64: Lelo twangugana chilaga chilolelwe na wamizi mbaka zuwa lya kadatu, leka walanguswa wa heye waleche kuya nakumuhiza na kuwalonjela wanhu kota kazilipuka. Udesi awu wa kuduma wowa wihile lukami kusinda ula wa mwaluko.”
27.65: Pilato nakawalonjela, “goya, mwanawo wamizi, mlute mkalolele kota vyomvizelele.”
27.66: Lelo waluta walolela chilaga, nawazenjelela mchanya mwa iganga na wawaleka baho wamizi wololela.

28.1: Loimalile Zuwa lya Kwesela, behi na kubwemwenzuka zuwa ila ya Jumapili, Maliya Madelena na yula Maliya yunji, nawaluta kulola chila chilaga.
28.2: Baho du nakulawila limachinyina, mhilisi wa kilanga wa Mkulu nakadulika kulawa kilanga, kalibidusa lila iganga hafungo, nakulikalila.
28.3: Nakoneka kota lumwemwesa na nguwo zoyavalile zali nzelu chweya!
28.4: Wamizi wa chila chilaga nawakakama aku wodumba heko, nawazilika kota wanhu wabagame.
28.5: Ila yula mhilisi wa kilanga nakawalonjela wala wadala, “Hemwe mleche kudumba! Ndivizela kota mwangumpala Yesu yawambigwe mumsalaba.
28.6: Haduhu hano mina kazilipuka kota vyonayalonjile. Muye mlole honhu howamuwichile.
28.7: Lelo mlute himahima mkawalonjele walanguswa wa heye kuta kazilipuka kulawa kowabagame, na sambi kanguwalongola Galilaya, ako momona heye. Mkumbuche ulonzi awu wondiwalonjele.”
28.8: Wawele wodumba na kusangalala kukulu, awo wadala nawoka himahima hali chilaga, nawabilima kuluta kuwalonjela walanguswa wa heye.
28.9: Baho, Yesu nakating'hana na hewo, nakalonga, “Mlamche hemwe.” Hewo wadala wamlutila, webata magulu ga heye na kumfugamila.
28.10: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mleche kudumba! Luteni mkawalonjele wang'holozangu walute Galilaya, na ako wombona.” Nguto ya wamizi wa chilaga
28.11: Wala wadala lowaliwoluta, wamwe wa wamizi wa chilaga nawaluta kuli muji kulonga kwa wakulu wa watambika kwa zila mbuli zeng'ha lozilawile.
28.12: Lelo nawating'hana hamwe na wasekulu, lowasindile kudogola, wawapa wala wamizi sendi nyinji
28.13: wolonga, “Hemwe molonga ahi, ‘Walanguswa wa heye nawoya nechilo, wahiza lukuli lwa heye hetwe lotwali tuwasile.’
28.14: Na one mkulu wa mkowa yaizele mbuli ayi, hetwe tolonga na heye leka hemwe mleche kugazigwa.”
28.15: Wala wamizi nawazihola zila sendi, nawadita kota vyowalanguswe. Mbuli ayo yenela hali Wayahudi weng'ha mbaka lehano. Yesu kanguwalawila walanguswa wa heye (Malichi 16:14-18; Lukasi 24:36-49; Yohana 20:19-23; Madito 1:6-8)
28.16: Wala walanguswa kumi na yumwe nawaluta Galilaya kuli chila chidunda choyawalajize Yesu.
28.17: Lowamuwene, wamfugamila, hanga wanji wali na majesa.
28.18: Yesu nakoya habehi, kawalonjela, “Mpegwa ludali lweng'ha kilanga na muisi.
28.19: Luteni lelo, mkawadite wanhu wa isi zeng'ha wawe walanguswa wa heni, muwabatize kwa itagwa lya Mhaza na lya Mwana na lya Muhe Yelile.
28.20: Muwalanguse kibatilila malajizo geng'ha gondiwapele. Na heni nda hamwe na hemwe mazuwa geng'ha, mbaka kuduma kwa isi.”

1.1: Ayi ndo Mbuli Inojile ya Yesu Kilistu Mlohozi, Mwana wa Nguluwi.
1.2: Nayaluka kota vyoyandichigwe mli chitabu cha mloli Isaya, “Nguluwi nakalonga, ndomigala msenga wa heni yakulongole, yula yokugongomanyila nzila ya hegwe.
1.3: Munhu kanguyoweleza kugunuche, Mgongomanyileni Mkulu nzila ya heye, mgolole nzila ya heye ya kukola!”
1.4: Yohani Mbatiza nakalawila kugunuche, yodamla kota, wanhu weng'ha mumgalamchile Nguluwi na kubatizigwa leka Nguluwi yawosele gehile ga hewo.
1.5: Wanhu kulawa nzingo zeng'ha za Yudeya na wenyeng'haye weng'ha wa Yelusalemu nawamlutila, nawalonga gehile gowaditile, na heye nakawabatiza kuli lwanda lwa Yolodani.
1.6: Yohani nakavala nguwo ihonigwe kwa milaika ja ngamiya, yakowele isali lya igozi mchuno. Nayali yolya nzije na hanombwa.
1.7: Nakadamla yolonga, “Munhu yalinguya kumbele kwa heni, kowa mkulu kwa heni, heni sijeza kinamiza na kudohola ng'weso za makwamba ga heye.
1.8: Heni ndanguwabatiza kwa mazi, ila heye kowabatiza kwa Muhe Yelile.” Kubatizigwa na kujezigwa kwa Yesu (Matei 3:13-4:11; Lukasi 3:21-22; 4:1-13)
1.9: Mhela wuwo Yesu nakafika kulawa Nasaleti muisi ya Galilaya, na Yohani nakambatiza kuli lwanda lwa Yolodani.
1.10: Baho du naloyalawile mmazi, nakona ulanga ugubuche, na Muhe Yelile yomdulichila kota ng'hunda.
1.11: Lizi Iihulikwa kulawa kilanga, “Hegwe ndo mwanangu ndikuganile, nojezwa na hegwe.”
1.12: Baho du Muhe Yelile nakamdita yalute kugunuche,
1.13: ako nakekala mazuwa makumi gane yojezigwa na Limazoga. Migongolo ja kisolo najali kuko, na wahilisi wa kilanga waza kumtanza. Yesu kanguwachema walowa somba wane (Matei 4:12-22; Lukasi 4:14-15; 5:1-11)
1.14: Yohani loyawohigwe mchinweng'ho, Yesu nakaluta isi ya Galilaya, yodamla Mbuli Inojile ya Nguluwi.
1.15: Nakalonga, “Mhela naufika. Undewa wa Nguluwi wa habehi! Mwesa mumgalamchile Nguluwi, muikunde Mbuli Inojile na muibochele.”
1.16: Yesu loyali yojenda mfungo mwa ilamba lya Galilaya, nakawona wavula somba weli, Simoni na Andeleya mdodowe Simoni, wovula somba na utandawala.
1.17: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mmbinze nani ndowaditani hemwe muwe wavula wanhu.”
1.18: Baho waleka utandawala wa hewo wamuwinza.
1.19: Loyalutile hamwando nakawona wanage Sebedayo Yakubu na Yohani. Nawali mgati mwa itumbwi wowika goya utandawala wawo.
1.20: Baho du Yesu nakawachema, na hewo wamleka mhaza wa hewo Sebedayo muli itumbwi hamwe na wakolamijito, nawamuwinza. Munhu yawele na chijeni chihile (Lukasi 4:31-37)
1.21: Nawafika kuli muji wa Kapanaumu, naloifichile Zuwa lya Kwesela, Yesu nakenjila mung'handa ya kusalila, nakaluka kulangusa.
1.22: Wanhu weng'ha wekala wabubuwale na gala goyali yolangusa, mina nahali yolangusa kota walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, ila nayali yolangusa kwa ludali.
1.23: Baho nakenjila munhu mula kuli ng'handa ya kusalila yawele na chijeni chihile,
1.24: nakachemeleza lizi, “Kuna choni na hetwe, hegwe Yesu wa Nasaleti? Nakuya kutudumya? Tuvizela hegwe kwa whaani, hegwe kwa msenga Yelile yatumigwe na Nguluwi.”
1.25: Yesu nakaching'hanuchila acho chijeni chihile yolonga, Nyamalile! “Mlawe munhu ayu.”
1.26: Hamba chila chijeni chihile chimtigisatigisa ayo munhu, nakalila kwa lizi likulu, hamba chimlawa munhu yula.
1.27: Wanhu wesa wawele ahala honhu, nawali wabubuwale, naweuza, “Mbuli zachi azi? Aga ndo malanguso majenzi, munhu ayu kana ludali mbaka lwa kuvilonjela vijeni vihile, navyo vyangumhulichiza.”
1.28: Mbuli azi za Yesu nazenela kweng'ha kuli isi ya Galilaya. Yesu kanguwalohola wenji (Matei 8:14-17; Lukasi 4:38-41)
1.29: Yesu na walanguswa wa heye, hamwe na Yakubu na Yohani, nawalawa kuli ng'handa ya kusalila, nawaluta mbaka kuli ng'handa ya Simoni na Andeleya.
1.30: Mamo wa mdala wa Simoni nayali yotamika yawasile muchinhanda. Yesu loyafichile nawamlonjela mbuli ya ayo mtamwa.
1.31: Yesu nakamlutila ayo mamo, nakamibata moko nakamwinula. Baho utamwa umleka nakaluka kuwawichila chilyo.
1.32: Matinazo, isanya lolizinjile, nawamigalila Yesu watamwa weng'ha na munhu yawele na chijeni.
1.33: Wanhu weng'ha wa muji ula nawekungajiza kunze kwa lwizi.
1.34: Na heye Yesu nakawosela wanhu wenji wawele na matamwa menji, na nakawinga vijeni vinji, ila havikundize vijeni kulonga chinhu mina vyali vimzelele kota heye ka whaani. Yesu kangudamla kula Galilaya (Lukasi 4:42-44)
1.35: Hamitondo, kung'hali lufuku, Yesu nakalawa, nakaluta honhu ha uyeng'ha kumlanda Nguluwi.
1.36: Hamba Simoni na wayage nawaluta kumpala koyali.
1.38: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Tucheni tulute honhu hanji hali habehi ndikadamle Mbuli Inojile ako kahi, mina acho ndo chingale.”
1.39: Hamba nakoka kaluta yojenda isi yeng'ha ya Galilaya, yodamla mng'handa za kusalila Mbuli Inojile kuno yolavya vijeni vihile. Yesu kangumlohola munhu yawele na uswema (Matei 8:1-4; Lukasi 5:12-16)
1.40: Munhu yumwe yawele na uswema nakamlutila Yesu, kafugama, nakamlanda na kumlonjela, “Wone ulingugana kombusila utamwa wondilingugula.”
1.41: Yesu kamonela isungu, nakagolola moko wa heye, kamdoliza na kumlonjela, “Ndangugana uhovujigwe!”
1.42: Baho du utamwa wa chipata umleka munhu ayo, nakahovujigwa.
1.43: Hamba Yesu nakamlonjela yula munhu yoche, kuno yomlajiza,
1.44: nakalonga, “Ulole uleche kumlonjela munhu yoneche mbuli ayi, ila ulute ukelajile kwa mtambika mkulu kota vyoyalajize Musa, wakukagule na walavye ulolezi kota nakuhovugwa. Hamba ulavye nhambiko kwa kulajila kota uwa mkomu.”
1.45: Ila yula munhu kaluta, kweneza mbuli ayo kweng'ha na kulonga mbuli nyinji. Yesu nakalemwela kwinjila muji woneche yokoneka, imgana kikala kunze, honhu ha uyeng'ha. Ahyo, wanhu nawamlutila kulawila kweng'ha.

2.1: Logakolile mazuwa mado, Yesu nakahiluka Kapanaumu wanhu nawahulika kota nakahiluka hakaye.
2.2: Wanhu wenji nawoya wamema mluga nakwali hela honhu ha kukola kuluta hali lwizi. Yesu nayali yodamla usenga wa heye,
2.3: mhela awo wanhu wane nawoya, wamigale munhu kwa Yesu, yumwe yaziliche.
2.4: Ila kwa vila wanhu nawali wenji, nawalemwela kumgala habehi na Yesu. Ahyo, nawatubula kuchanya kuchinduwiko honhu hoyawele Yesu. Lowatubule honhu, wamdulisa ayo munhu yawele yawasile mumcheka.
2.5: Yesu loyawene vyowawele na makundo, nakamlonjela ayo munhu yaziliche. “Mwanangu, kusilwa gehile gouditile.”
2.6: Wamwenga wa walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, nawawele ahala honhu, nawenjilwa na majesa mnhumbula mwawo,
2.7: Munhu ayu “Lekachoni ayu kangulonga hino? Kangumkovula Nguluwi! Kuduhu munhu yawele na ludali lwa kumusila munhu gehile, ila Nguluwi yaliyeka.”
2.8: Yesu nakavizela gala gowali wochijesa, nakawalonjela, “Lekachoni mwangijesa ahyo mnhumbula za hemwe?
2.9: Lilikohi liwele ubewe, kumlonjela ayu munhu yaziliche, ‘Kusilwa gehile ga hegwe,’ Ama kumlonjela, ‘Winuche! Uhole mcheka ujende?’
2.10: Lelo ndangugana mvizele kota heni Mwana wa Munhu ndina ludali lwa kuwosela wanhu gehile muisi.” Aho nakamlonjela yula munhu yaziliche,
2.11: “Ndangukulonjela wime, uhole mcheka wako ulute kaye.”
2.12: Wanhu weng'ha nawali womlola ayo munhu. Ayo mtamwa kenuka, nakahola mcheka wa heye kaluta kaye. Wanhu weng'ha nawabubuwala na kumtogola Nguluwi kuno wolonga, “Hatunayona mbuli kota ayi.” Yesu kangumchema Lawi (Matei 9:9-13; Lukasi 5:27-32)
2.13: Yesu nakahiluka kahi hafungo mwa ilamba lya Galilaya. Lung'hongola lwa wanhu nalumlutila, na heye kaluka kuwalangusa.
2.14: Loyali yokola, kamona Lawi mwanage Alufayo, yekalise mchituka cha kodi, Yesu nakamlonjela, “Umbinze!” Lawi kenuka, kamuwinza.
2.15: Hamba, Yesu nayali yolya chilyo mng'handa ya Lawi, wakongoza kodi weng'ha na awala wawele na gehile, waliwolya hamwe na Yesu na walanguswa wa heye, nawali wenji wamuwinzile Yesu.
2.16: Walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa wala nawawele Mafalisayo, lowamuwene Yesu yolya na wanhu wawele na gehile na wakongoza kodi, wawauza walanguswa wa heye, walonga, “Lekachoni kangulya na wadita gehile?”
2.17: Yesu vyoyawahuliche nakawalonjela, “Wanhu wawele wakomu hawalingumlapa mteleka mikwandi, ila wawele watamwa. Suyile kuwachema wanhu wala watanganiche, ila mbuya kwa wanhu wawele na gehile.” Mbuli ya kwesela kulya (Matei 9:14-17; Lukasi 5:33-39)
2.18: Mhela umwe walanguswa wa Yohani na walanguswa wa Mafalisayo nawali wokwesela kulya. Wanhu nawoya, nawamuuza Yesu, “Lekachoni walanguswa wa Yohani na wa Mafalisayo nawali wokwesela kulya, ila walanguswa wa hegwe hambe wesele kulya?”
2.19: Yesu nakawedichila, “Yalalikwe kuli mnvina ya kuhesa, kokwesela ndaze kulya wone yawe hamwe na mkasano? Hebu! Mhela weng'ha hoyowa hamwe na mkasano hokwesela kulya hebu.
2.20: Mhela wokwiza hala mkasano hoyokusigwa kuli hewo, mhela awo ndo wokwesela kulya.
2.21: “Haduhu munhu yoweza kuhona chibende chinyale kuli nguwo ya katali. Wone yadite ahyo, achila chibende chinyale choswina kulawa kuli yila nguwo ya katali, ileka ugazi ukulu.
2.22: Munhu hambe yajele divai ya lehano kuli chizombe cha igozi cha katali, wone udite ahyo divai aila yotula achila chizombe cha igozi cha katali, divai na chizombe cha igozi chila vyotajigwa. Iwaga hino, uwiche divai mli chizombe cha igozi chinyale.” Mkulu wa Zuwa lya Kwesela (Matei 12:1-8; Lukasi 6:1-5)
2.23: Nalyali Zuwa lya Kwesela Yesu nayali yokola na walanguswa wa heye kuli migunda ja wanhu jiwele na ngano, wopulula miso wolya.
2.24: Mafalisayo nawalonga, “Ulole, walanguswa wa hegwe wanguwifya wangudita chohachikundigwe kudita Zuwa lya Kwesela?”
2.25: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Hambi hamsomile Daudi na wayage navyowaditile mhela lowali na nzala?
2.26: Heye nakenjila mng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakalya jila mibumunda jiwichigwe kumwando kwa Nguluwi. Mbuli ayi naikoleka mhela Abiatali naloyali mtambika mkulu. Na ndo watambika waliyeng'ha nawakundizwe kulya mibumunda ajo. Ila Daudi nakajilya na nakawapa wayage kahi.”
2.27: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela, “Zuwa lya Kwesela naliwichigwa kwa chiwalo cha wanhu, haiwele wanhu kwa chiwalo cha Zuwa lya Kwesela.
2.28: Ahyo Mwana wa Munhu ndo Mkulu wa Zuwa lya Kwesela na kana ludali lwa alyo Zuwa lya Kwesela.”

3.1: Yesu nakenjila kahi mng'handa ya kusalila nakwali na munhu yawele na moko uziliche.
3.2: Wanhu wamwe nawali wopala chinhu cha kumvilizila Yesu, nawali womlola kodita choni kwa ayula munhu yawele na moko uziliche, komlohola ama hebu vyoiwele Zuwa lya Kwesela.
3.3: Yesu nakamlonjela ayula munhu yawele na moko uziliche, “Uye hano hamwando.”
3.4: Hamba Yesu nakawauza wanhu wala, “Malajizo ga hetwe gangutukundiza ndaze kudita Zuwa lya Kwesela? Kudita mbuli inojile ama kudita mbuli yihile? Kulohola ukomu wa munhu ama kukopola?” Ila hewo nahawalonjile chinhu.
3.5: Aho nakawalola weng'ha kuno yazudile, nakawa na masinzo kwa vila navyowawele na nhumbula zihile. Hamba nakamlonjela ayula munhu yawele na moko uziliche, “Ugolole moko wa hegwe!” Na heye nakagolola moko na baho uwa mkomu kahi.
3.6: Baho Mafalisayo nawalawa kunze, nawalongasa hamwe na wanhu wa chilundo cha Helodi ndaze vyowomdumya Yesu. Ikugusi lya wanhu hafungo mwa ilamba
3.7: Yesu nakoka aho hamwe na walanguswa wa heye, nakaluta hafungo mwa ilamba, na lung'hongola lwa wanhu lumuwinza. Wanhu awo nawali walawile kuli isi za Galilaya na Yudeya,
3.8: na miji ja Yelusalemu na Idumea, kumwambu mwa lwanda lwa Yolodani na Tilo na Sidoni. Lung'hongola alo lwa wanhu nalumlutila Yesu kwa vila naluhulika mbuli nyinji nazoyali yaditile.
3.9: Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye wamuwichile goya itumbwi limwe, leka lung'hongola lwa wanhu waleche kummemelela.
3.10: Nayali yawosile matamwa wanhu wenji, na watamwa weng'ha nawali wofyela wogana wamdolize.
3.11: Wanhu wawele na vijeni vihile lowamuwene, nawetoza kumwando kwa heye na kuchemeleza kwa lizi, “Hegwe kwa Mwana wa Nguluwi!”
3.12: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela kwa kuwang'hanuchila waleche kuwalonjela wanhu kota heye kawhaani. Yesu kanguhagula walanguswa kumi na weli (Matei 10:1-4; Lukasi 6:12-16)
3.13: Yesu nakoka nakakwina kuchidunda nakawachema wala yawaganile. Na hewo nawamlutila,
3.14: nakawahagula kumi na weli, nakawachema watumigwa. Nakawalonjela, “Ndiwahagulani hemwe muwe hamwe na heni, hamba ndowalajiza mlute kuwadamlila wanhu Mbuli Inojile.
3.15: Mowa na ludali lwa kuwinga vijeni.”
3.16: Awa ndo kumi na weli yawahagule, Simoni yula Yesu yampele itagwa lya Petili,
3.17: na kahi Yakubu na Yohani wanage Sebedayo. Yesu nakawapa awa wana weli itagwa Boanelige, izeleche “Wanalubumo.”
3.18: Na kahi Andeleya na Filipo na Batolomeo na Matei na Tomasi na Yakubu mwanage Alufayo na Simoni yalawile Kanaani na Tadayo
3.19: na Yudasi Isikalioti yambelenhuche Yesu. Yesu na mkulu wa Limazoga (Matei 12:22-32; Lukasi 11:14-23; 12:10)
3.20: Hamba Yesu nakaluta hakaye hake, kahi wanhu nawamema mbaka Yesu na walanguswa wa heye, nawalemwela kuwa mhela wa kulya.
3.21: Wang'holoze vyowahuliche ago, nawaluta kumhola kwa vila wanhu nawalonga kota kapunganika.
3.22: Walangusa wa hewo wa malajizo ga Musa walawile Yelusalemu nawalonga, “Kana chijeni chihile chilinguchemigwa Belisebuli! Ayo ndo mkulu wa vijeni, na heye ndo yalingumpa ludali lwa kusa vijeni vihile.”
3.23: Yesu nakawachema na kwaluka kuwalonjela kwa nhelo, kalonga, “Yowa ndaze Limazoga limuwinje Limazoga miyage?
3.24: Wone undewa umwenga wogawanuka vilundo vilingitwanza, undewa awo hauweza kikala.
3.25: Kahi, wone ivyazi ligawanuche keli, lilingitowa, ivyazi alyo halichikala lyosumigwa.
3.26: Wone undewa wa Limazoga ugawanuche chilundo, hauchikala, lelo wokwaga ng'hatu.
3.27: “Kuduhu munhu yokwinjila mng'handa ya munhu yawele na mong'ho kumsukula vinhu vyeng'ha ne kumuwopa ayo yawele na mong'ho na ng'weso hafungo, aho ndo koweza kumsukula vinhu vya heye.
3.28: “Ena ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, Nguluwi kowosela gehile gawo geng'ha na kukovula kwa hewo kweng'ha,
3.29: ila yalingumkovula Muhe Yelile, ayu hokusilwa gehile ga heye ng'oo, kwa vila kawifya, kana wihe wa mazuwa gose.”
3.30: Yesu nakalonga ago, kwa vila nawali womlonga “Kana vijeni vihile.” Mamo na wang'holoze Yesu (Matei 12:46-50; Lukasi 8:19-21)
3.31: Hamba mayake Yesu na wang'holoze nawoya ahala honhu, hoyali yolangusa Yesu, nawema kunze, nawamlajiza munhu yenjile mng'handa yakamcheme.
3.32: Wanhu nawali wamemile kwa heye. Lelo wanhu nawamlonjela, “Mayako na wang'holozo wa kunze wangukupala hegwe.”
3.33: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Mayangu na wang'holozangu ndo whaani?”
3.34: Aho nakawalola awala wekale ahala honhu, nakalonga, “Mlole! Awa ndo mayangu na wang'holozangu.
3.35: Munhu yoneche yawelingudita goyalingugana Nguluwi ayo ndo mng'holozangu na lumbulyangu na mayangu.”

4.1: Yesu nakaluka kuwalangusa wanhu hafungo mwa ilamba. Wanhu wenji nawammemelela mbaka naimgana yenjile mitumbwi na kikalisa. Wanhu weng'ha nawali wekale musangalaza hafungo mwa ilamba.
4.2: Nayali yowalangusa menji kwa nhelo, na kuli malanguso ga heye nakawalonjela,
4.3: “Mhulichize, mnyalaji nakaluta kunyala nyhadikwa.
4.4: Loyali yonyala nyhadikwa, zinji nazigwa mnzila, videje vyuya vidobola vilya.
4.5: Zinji nazigwa honhu hawele na italawe, hawele hela misanga minji. Nazota himahima kwa vila misanga najali michefu.
4.6: Isanya lolilawile, zilakala na kwa vila mizabi najali mchanya mchanya hela, zikala.
4.7: Zinji nazigwa hali migodi ja miwa, na jila miwa jikula zipilinjila zila nyhadikwa nazo hazilelile nyhule.
4.8: Ila zinji nazigwa hali misanga jinojile, zota zikula zilela imwe mala makumi gadatu, na imwe mala makumi sita na imwe mala miya.”
4.9: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Yawele na makutu ga kuhulika na yahuliche.” Malanguso ga mnyalaji (Matei 13:10-17; Lukasi 8:9-10)
4.10: Yesu vyoyaponile yeka, wamwe wa wala wamhuliche nawamlutila hamwe na wala kumi na weli, nawamuuza mbuli ya ayo nhelo.
4.11: Na heye nakawalonjela, “Hemwe mpegwa kuuzela uviso wa undewa wa Nguluwi, ila wanji wala wawele kunze wolonjelwa chila chinhu kwa nhelo,
4.12: leka, “ ‘Walole ng'hatu, ila waleche kona. Wahuliche ng'hatu, ila waleche kuvizela. Nawahadite ahyo, wahamhiluchile Nguluwi, na heye yahawosele gehile ga hewo.’ ” Yesu kangutang'hula nhelo wa mnyalaji (Matei 13:18-23; Lukasi 8:11-15)
4.13: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndaze, hemwe hamuizelele nhelo ayi? Modita ndaze lelo, kuizela nhelo yoneche yila?
4.14: Mnyalaji kangunyala ulonzi wa Nguluwi.
4.15: Wanhu wanji ndo kota zila nyhadikwa zinyaligwe mnzila hawele ulonzi hounyaligwe. Ila bahala du lowohulika, Limazoga lyuyaga na kusa ulonzi awo unyaligwe mgati mwa hewo.
4.16: Wanhu wanji ifanda kota nyhadikwa inyaligwe hali italawe. Baho du lowouhulika awo ulonzi, hubochela kwa kusangalala ng'hatu.
4.17: Ila hambe uwenjile na kuwa na mizabi mgati mwa hewo, hulutilila kibatilila hado hela, na mhela wa ugayo ama wihe houlawila kwa mbuli ya ulonzi awo, baho wangugozola.
4.18: Wanhu wanji ndo kota zila nyhadikwa zigwile hali migodi jiwele na miwa. Ahyo ndo kiwhana na wanhu wala walinguhulika awo ulonzi,
4.19: ila lunhwinhwi lwa isi ino na kunojezwa na lufufu na maya kuwenjila na kuwifyanga ulonzi awo, nawo haulela mafuza.
4.20: Ila wanji ifanda kota zila nyhadikwa zinyaligwe kuli misanga jinojile. Awa wohulika ulonzi awo, woubochela, wolela mafuza, wanji mala makumi gadatu, na wanji mala makumi sita, na wanji mala miya imwe.” Chenje chigubikwe (Lukasi 8:16-18)
4.21: Yesu nakalonga kahi, “Ndaze, wanhu nawawesaga chenje na kigala mng'handa na kugubika na chidoto ama kuwika mlukweme? Hebu! Nawawikaga honhu ha kuwichila chenje.
4.22: Chila chinhu chivisigwe chowichigwa hazelu na chila chinhu chigubikwe chogubuligwa.
4.23: Ahyo, yawele na makutu ga kuhulika yahuliche.”
4.24: Nakawalonjela kahi, “Mhulichize goya chomhulika! Chipimilo chichila chomlinguwapimila wanhu wanji ndo chicho Nguluwi kowapimila namwe, kahi mokonjezelwa ng'hatu.
4.25: Yawele na chinhu kopegwa na chinji. Heye yawele hela chinhu, na chila choyojesa kanacho choholigwa.” Nhelo ya nyhadikwa ilingota
4.26: Yesu nakalonga, “Undewa wa Nguluwi ufanda kota hino, munhu nakanyala nyhadikwa kumgunda.
4.27: Nechilo kanguwasa na nemisi kangulola na nyhadikwa zangulutilila kukula, ila heye havizelele chilingukoleka.
4.28: Misanga jangudita mizuchila kukula na kulela mafuza, mwaluko kuzuka mahamba madeche, hamba liso na mwiso nyhule mgati mwa liso.
4.29: Aho wone nyhule ipye, munhu ayo kokwaluka kuhola chimaje cha kebenela kwa vila mhela wa mbena ufika.” Nyhadikwa iwele ndodo lukami (Matei 13:31-32,34; Lukasi 13:18-19)
4.30: Yesu nakawauza, “Tuuwhanize Undewa wa Nguluwi na chinhu chachi? Tudamle kwa nhelo yachi?
4.31: Ufanda kota hino, munhu nakahola nyhadikwa ya haladali iwele ndodo ng'hatu kusinda zeng'ha na kuinyala mmisanga.
4.32: Mhela udo hela, yokota na kuwa igodi likulu kusinda migodi jeng'ha kumgunda. Nhagala ziwaga ng'hulu videje vya kuulanga vyuyaga kuzenga vimvulila vyawo mlubehelo lwa nhagala za alyo igodi.”
4.33: Yesu nakawadamlila usenga wa heye kwa nhelo nyinji, nakadamla na hewo kota vila vyowawezile kuhulika.
4.34: Heye Yesu nahayali yolangusa chinhu ne kuwika nhelo, ila wone yawe hamwe na walanguswa wa heye, nayali yowatang'hulila goyalonjile. Yesu kanguilonjela nhigu inyamalile (Matei 8:23-27; Lukasi 8:22-25)
4.35: Isanya vyoliswele, Yesu nakawalonjela awala walanguswa wa heye, “Tuloche kumwambu mwa ilamba.”
4.36: Lelo nawawaleka wanhu wamemile, walanguswa nawenjila amo kuli itumbwi, nakwali na mitumbwi jinji aho.
4.37: Baho du nakwali na mbeho, na kutiguka kwa mazi kuli ilamba, itumbwi nalyaluka kumema mazi.
4.38: Heye Yesu nakawasa yawichile mutwi mchegamo, awala walanguswa wamwinula wamlonjela, “Mlangusa, ndaze hulingona kota hetwe tobagama kwa mazi?”
4.39: Lelo nakenuka kailonjela yila mbeho, “Nyamalile!” Vivila nakailonjela nhigu ya ilamba, “Tulu! Nyamalile!” Baho mbeho nainyamalila na nakwali tulu.
4.40: Yesu nakawalonjela awala walanguswa wa heye, “Lekachoni mwangudumba? Ndaze, mng'hali hela makundo?”
4.41: Na hewo nawadumba heko walonga, “Ayu munhu wachi lelo, mbaka nhigu na mbeho vyangumuhulichiza?”

5.1: Yesu na walanguswa wa heye nawafika kuli isi ya Wagelasi, kumwambu mwa ilamba lya Galilaya.
5.2: Baho du Yesu vyoyalawile kuli itumbwi nakating'hana na munhu yawele yochikala kuwele na vilaga. Ayo munhu nayali na chijeni chihile.
5.3: Nayali yochikala kuli vilaga, nakwali kuduhu munhu yajezile kumhejelela yamibate yojeza kumkoweleza na minyololo.
5.4: Mala nyinji nawajeza kumkoweleza minyololo moko na magulu, nakadumulaga na kusa chuma chowamkoweleze nalyo. Ayu munhu nayali na mong'ho ng'hatu nakwali kuduhu munhu wa kumibata.
5.5: Nemisi na nechilo nayali yochikala kuli vilaga mchidunda yotowa iyowe na kitemangatemanga kwa maganga.
5.6: Loyamuwene Yesu kwa kutali, nakambilimila, kenamiza.
5.7: Nakalonga kwa lizi ng'hulu, “Kuna choni na heni, hegwe Yesu Mwana wa Nguluwi yawele kuchanya? Kwa itagwa lya Nguluwi ndangukulanda uleche kungaza!”
5.8: Nakalonga ahyo kwa vila Yesu nayali yamlonjele, “Chijeni chihile yamlawe munhu ayo.”
5.9: Yesu nakamuuza, “Itagwa lyako whaani?” Na heye nakedichila, “Itagwa lyangu chilundo cha wamizi, mina hetwe twa wenji.”
5.10: Vijeni vimdedeza Yesu yaleche kuviwinga avyo vijeni mli isi yila.
5.11: Nakwali na lung'hongola lukulu lwa migubi jidimigwa kuli chidunda.
5.12: Ahyo, vila vijeni vimlanda, “Utugale kuli ajo migubi, tujinjile.”
5.13: Yesu nakavikundiza, avyo vijeni vihile, navijinjila jila migubi. Lung'hongola lweng'ha lwa migubi jifichile elufu mbili najifiduka mnyenje mwa chidunda na kwinjila milamba, najibagama.
5.14: Wadimi wa ajo migubi nawabilima, nawadamla mbuli azo kuli miji na kumigunda. Wanhu nawoya kulola galawile.
5.15: Wala wanhu navyowamlutile Yesu, nawamona yula munhu yawele na chijeni yekale hanyi, yawele na luhala lwake na yavalile nguwo, na wala wanhu nawadumba.
5.16: Awala wanhu vyowagawene gala gogalawile kwa munhu yawele na chijeni na ajila migubi,
5.17: nawamlonjela Yesu yoche kuli isi ya hewo.
5.18: Yesu navyoyali yokwinjila kuli itumbwi, yula munhu yosigwe vijeni nakamlanda yamkundize kulutasa.
5.19: Yesu nakalema, nakamlonjela, “Ulute kaye kwako, kawalonjele wang'holozo mbuli zeng'ha ziwele Mkulu zoyakuditile na vyoyakonele isungu.”
5.20: Ayula munhu nakaluta, nakaluka kudamla kuli muji wa Dekapoli mbuli zeng'ha Yesu zoyamditile, wanhu nawekala webubuwale. Mhinza wa Jailo na mdala yebate ivalo lya Yesu (Matei 9:18-26; Lukasi 8:40-56)
5.21: Yesu nakaloka kahi mwambu iyage ya ilamba kwa itumbwi. Lung'hongola lwa wanhu nalwikungajiza kumwando hake, na heye nayali yemile hafungo mwa ilamba.
5.22: Aho Jailo yawele chilongozi wa sinagogi nakoya, loyamuwene Yesu nakafugama hali magulu ga Yesu.
5.23: Nayali yolonga yolanda, “Mhinza wa heni mdodo kangutamika behi kubagama. Dedede ndangulanda tuche kaye ukamuwichile moko yaloholigwe yawe mkomu.”
5.24: Yesu nakoka hamwe na Jailo. Wanhu wenji nawamuwinza na kumema chila ubanzi.
5.25: Nakwali na mdala, nayali na utamwa kwa kulawa danda miyaka kumi na mili.
5.26: Mdala ayu nakagazika lukami, nakawalutila wateleka mikwandi wenji ne kuloholigwa hebu. Nakataga sendi nyinji ne ulohozi, ila nakalutilila kugazika.
5.27: Na vyoyahuliche goyalingudita Yesu, ndo nakaluta na ahyo nakafyela kuli lung'hongola lwa wanhu wawele hamwe na Yesu na kudoliza nguwo ya heye.
5.28: Nakadita ahyo, mina nayali yolonga yaliyeka, “Wone ndibate nguwo ya heye, ndowa mkomu.”
5.29: Nakebata nguwo ya Yesu, na danda yoyali ilawa bahala du nakona naileka kulawa. Na heye nakehulika mlukuli lwake kawa mkomu.
5.30: Yesu nakavizela, nakona mong'ho wa heye uwa udo, nakahinduka nakauza, nakalonga, “Whaani yebate nguwo ya heni?”
5.31: Walanguswa nawamwidichila, nawalonga, “Ulole wanhu vyowamemile, lekachoni kwanguuza whaani yakibate?”
5.32: Ila Yesu nakalutilila kulola yamone ayo yaditile hino.
5.33: Aho yula mdala yavizelele choni nachimlawile, nakaluta yokakama kuno yodumba, nakafugamila mmagulu ga Yesu, nakamlonjela yokomya gose galawile.
5.34: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Mhinza, makundo ga hegwe gakulohola. Ulute goya, uwe mkomu ulawe ng'hatu utamwa wa hegwe.”
5.35: Yesu navyoyali yang'hali yolonga, wanhu nawoya kulawa hakaye kwa Jailo chilongozi wa ng'handa ya kusalila, nawamlonjela, “Mina mhinza wa hegwe nakabagama. Uleche kumtunya mlangusa.”
5.36: Ila Yesu ne kulola chowalonjile nakamlonjela Jailo chilongozi wa sinagogi, “Uleche kudumba, ukunde hela.”
5.37: Yesu hamkundize munhu yoneche kulutasa, ila Petili na Yakubu na Yohani mng'holoze Yakobo.
5.38: Nawafika kaye kwa Jailo chilongozi wa sinagogi, Yesu nakawona wanhu wapunganiche nakahulika kuyowa na chililo na kulombocheza kwinji.
5.39: Yesu nakenjila mng'handa nakawalonjela wanhu, “Lekachoni mwangupunganika? Lekachoni mwangulila? Mwana habagame kawasa hela.”
5.40: Wanhu nawamseka Yesu, ahyo nakawalavya wose kunze, nakawahola mhaza na mayake mhinza yula, na wala walanguswa wa heye wadatu, nawenjila kuchihengo kowawichile lukuli lwa mhinza.
5.41: Yesu nakamibata moko, nakamlonjela ayula mhinza yabagame nakalonga, “Talita, kumi,” Mina, “Muhinza ndangukulonjela, ulilimche!”
5.42: Baho mhinza nakalilimka, nakaluka kujendajenda, nayali na miyaka kumi na mili, aga logalawile, wanhu weng'ha nawekala wabubuwale lukami.
5.43: Yesu nakawalemeza wanhu waleche kumlonjela munhu. Hamba nakawalonjela wamgalile chilyo ayula mhinza yalilimche yalye.

6.1: Yesu nakalawa koyali, nakaluta hakaye hake Nasaleti koyalawile, yelongoze na walanguswa wa heye.
6.2: Lolifichile Zuwa lya Kwesela, nakaluka kuwalangusa mng'handa ya kusalila. Nakwali na wanhu wenji na nawali wohulichiza na wekala wabubuwale, weuza walonga, “Nakagalavya kohi aga gose? Kahi luhala lwachi loyapegwe ayu? Kahi, kangudita ndaze vinduzanduza avi vyoyalingudita?
6.3: Hambi ayu hawele selemala, mwana wa Maliya mng'holoze na Yakubu na Yose na Yudasi na Simoni? Ndaze walumbuze hawalingikala baha na hetwe?” Hamba nawambeza!
6.4: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Waloli wa Nguluwi watogolagwa kweng'ha kula, ila hawatogolagwa hakaye hawo na kwa wang'holozawo.”
6.5: Yesu nahaditile vinduzanduza hala honhu, ila nakawawichila moko watamwa wachefu, na kuwalohola.
6.6: Yesu nakabubuwala kwa vila wanhu awa nawalema kukunda. Yesu kanguwalajiza walanguswa kumi na weli (Matei 10:5-15; Lukasi 9:1-6) Hamba Yesu nakavijendela vila vijiji vya habehi yowalangusa wanhu.
6.7: Yesu nakawachema awala walanguswa kumi na weli, nakawalajiza weliweli, nakawapa ludali lwa kuwinga vijeni vihile.
6.8: Kawalajiza kalonga, “Mleche kuhola chinhu komluta, mleche kuhola chilyo ne sendi ne mhako, mhole ng'hweku yeka.
6.9: Mvale makwamba, ila mleche kuhola igwanda lya keli.”
6.10: Kahi nakawalonjela, “Honeche hombocheligwa, mikale hali ng'handa yiyo mbaka homkuka honhu aho.
6.11: Honhu honeche, wone wanhu wolema kuwabochela ne kuhulika gomlangusa, muche mkung'hune nhimbwisi mmagulu genu iwe ulolezi wa kuwapanjila hewo.”
6.12: Awala walangusa nawoka na kuwadamlila wanhu Mbuli Inojile na kuwalonjela wamgalamchile Nguluwi.
6.13: Nawalavya vijeni vinji na wawabakaliza mafuta watamwa waloholigwa. Kubagama kwa Yohani Mbatiza (Matei 14:1-12; Lukasi 9:7-9)
6.14: Helodi mndewa wa Galilaya nakahulika goyalingudita Yesu, mina lutogo lwake nalwenela honhu heng'ha. Wanhu wamwe nawali wolonga, “Yohani Mbatiza kazilipuka, ndo mina mong'ho uno wangukola mijito mgati mwake.”
6.15: Wanhu wanji nawali wolonga, “Munhu ayu ndo Eliya,” na wanji nawali wolonga, “Ayu ndo mloli wa Nguluwi, kota awala waloli wa katali.”
6.16: Mndewa Helodi vyoyahuliche, nakalonga, “Ayo ndo Yohani mbatiza yondimdumule mutwi, nakazilipuka!”
6.17: Aho hamwande heye Helodi nakalajiza Yohani yebatigwe, yahindilwe mchinweng'ho, nakadita hino kwa vila nakamhesa Helodiya, nayawele mdala wa Filipo. Filipo nayali mng'holoze Helodi.
6.18: Yohani Mbatiza nayali yomlonjela Helodi, “Haiwa goya kuhesa mdala wa mng'holozo Filipo.”
6.19: Helodiya nakawika ching'honi mnhumbula, mbaka yamkopole Yohani, lelo nayali yolemwela kokwaluka ndaze!
6.20: Helodi nayaliyomdumba Yohani, kwa vila nakavizela Yohani nayali Yelile na yatanganiche, ahyo nayali yomwamila, waleche kumdita vibi. Helodi nakagana kumhulichiza Yohani, hanga loyamhuliche, nakawa na masinzo.
6.21: Zuwa limwe Helodiya nakapata mhumu. Zuwa lya kudita kukumbuchila kwa zuwa lyoyapondigwe Helodi, naloyawaditile mnvina wawele wakulu kwa heye na wakulu wa wamizi na wakulu weng'ha wawele wochikala kuli isi ya Galilaya.
6.22: Mhinza wa Helodiya nakenjila mng'handa na kuvina goya, awala wakulu na Helodi na wajenzi wanji nawanojezwa. Mndewa Helodi nakamlonjela ayula mhinza, “Undande chinhu choneche choulingugana na heni ndokupa.”
6.23: Kahi na kwa ulonzi winji wa kilaha, nakamlonjela, “Ndangilaha kota choneche choundanda, ndokupa, mbaka nusu ya undewa wa heni.”
6.24: Aho yula mhinza nakalawa kunze kumuuza mayake, “Ndande choni?” Na heye nakamwidichila, “Ulande mutwi wa Yohani Mbatiza.”
6.25: Mhinza yula nakamhiluchila mndewa yobilima na kumlonjela, “Ndangulanda ndigalile sambi baha mchisaye mutwi wa Yohani Mbatiza.”
6.26: Mndewa Helodi nakesinza ng'hatu, ila kwa vila nakelaha, hali wala wajenzi wezile mchilyo, nahamlemele hebu.
6.27: Lelo mndewa Helodi nakawalajiza mwamizi yakegale mutwi wa Yohani. Mwamizi nakaluta, nakumdumula mutwi Yohani mla mchinweng'ho,
6.28: nakegala mutwi wa Yohani Mbatiza uwichigwe mchisaye, nakamha mhinza na mhinza nakamigalila mayake.
6.29: Walanguswa wa Yohani lowahuliche mbuli ayo, nawaluta kuuhola mtufi wa Yohani, wazakuutila mchilaga. Yesu kangulisa wanhu wenji (Matei 14:13-21; Lukasi 9:10-17; Yohana 6:1-14)
6.30: Watumigwa nawahiluka, nawekungajiza hamwe hali Yesu, nawamlonjela geng'ha gowaditile na kulangusa.
6.31: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Tulute tuliyeka honhu ha uviso tukesele tandi.” Nakalonga ahyo kwa vila nakwali na wanhu wenji lukami wawele wofika aho na kuka mbaka Yesu na walanguswa wa heye nahawawele na mhumu wa kulya chilyo.
6.32: Lelo nawoka waliyeka kwa itumbwi, nawaluta honhu hawele hela wanhu.
6.33: Ila wanhu wenji nawawona woluta, nawawazela. Lelo wenji nawalawa chila muji na kubilimila kuko kowalutile Yesu na walanguswa wa heye, nawawalongola kufika.
6.34: Lowaduliche kumwani, Yesu nakona lung'hongola lwa wanhu, nakawonela isungu, kwa vila nawali kota ming'holo jilihela mdimi. Nakaluka kuwalangusa mbuli nyinji.
6.35: Nemisi naipuluta, walanguswa wamlutila Yesu, nawamlonjela, “Honhu aha twa kisolo, na sambi lyangutita.
6.36: Igana uwalaje wanhu walute kumigunda na kuli vijiji vili habehi, wakagule vilyo.”
6.37: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela, “Muwape hemwe ndiya.” Na hewo nawamuuza, “Lelo tulute tukagule mibumunda kwa sendi denali miya mbili zihejile sendi za kuhega myezi nane, na kuwegalila chilyo?”
6.38: Yesu nakawauza, “Mwanajo mibumunda jilinga? Mlute mkalole.” Navyowalolile, nawamlonjela, “Jabaha mibumunda jihano na somba mbili.”
6.39: Yesu nakawalajiza walanguswa wawalonjele wanhu weng'ha wekalise vilundo honhu hawele na misolo midodi.
6.40: Na hewo nawekalisa kuli vilundo vya wanhu miya imwe miya imwe na vya wanhu makumi gahano makumi gahano.
6.41: Hamba Yesu nakahola ajila mibumunda jihano na somba mbili, nakalola kilanga, nakatambichiza. Nakamogola nakawapa walanguswa wa heye wawagawile wanhu. Na zila somba mbili nazo nakawapa weng'ha.
6.43: Walanguswa nawakungajiza chilyo chisigale, mibumunda na somba, navimema vidoto kumi na vili.
6.44: Walume nawadile ajo mibumunda nawali wafichile elufu zihano. Yesu kangujenda hali mazi (Matei 14:22-33; Yohana 6:15-21)
6.45: Baho Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa wenjile mli itumbwi wamlongole walute Betisaida, kumwambu mwa ilamba, mhela heye yolulaga lung'hongola lwa wanhu.
6.46: Yesu vyoyawalajile wala wanhu, nakaluta kuchidunda kumlanda Nguluwi.
6.47: Loifichile matinazo, itumbwi nalyali hagati ha ilamba, na heye Yesu nayali yaliyeka hafungo mwa ilamba.
6.48: Lelo nakawona walanguswa wa heye wochitunya kutowa mitela ja itumbwi, kwa vila mbeho nayali iputa. Behi na kubwemwenzuka, Yesu nakawawinza akuno yojenda mchanya mmazi, nakagana kuwapuluta.
6.49: Ila lowamuwene yojenda hali mazi, nawejesa idimu, nawatowa iyowe.
6.50: Mina weng'ha lowamuwene nawadumba lukami. Baho Yesu nakalonga na hewo, “Msindamale, nda heni. Mleche kudumba!”
6.51: Hamba nakakwina mitumbwi mowawele, na mbeho inyamalila. Walanguswa nawabubuwala ng'hatu,
6.52: kwa vila nawali wang'hali kuvizela ulanguso wa jila mibumunda. Luhala lwa hewo nalung'hali lububuwale. Yesu kanguwalohola watamwa kula Genesaleti (Matei 14:34-36)
6.53: Nawaloka ilamba, nawafika isi ya Genesaleti, nawemiza itumbwi.
6.54: Lowalawile mli itumbwi wanhu nawamzela Yesu baho.
6.55: Lelo himahima nawazunguluta isi yila yeng'ha, nawaluka kuwahola watamwa wawasile mmicheka jawo, nawawegala chila honhu kowahuliche Yesu ka kuko.
6.56: Chila honhu Yesu koyalutile, ku vijiji ama kuli miji ama kuli migunda, wanhu nawawawika watamwa mluga, nawamlanda wadolize lupembo lwa nguwo ya heye. Na weng'ha wadolize nawaloholigwa.

7.1: Mafalisayo wamwe na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, nawalawile Yelusalemu, nawating'hana kumwando kwa Yesu.
7.2: Nawawona kota wamwe wa walanguswa wa heye wowawele wolya chilyo na moko gakokomoche, mina ne kuhovuga moko.
