7.3: Mina Mafalisayo na Wayahudi wanji weng'ha, nawebatililaga gowalangusigwe na wasekulu wawo, hawalyaga chinhu ne kuhovuga moko gawo goya.
7.4: Kahi, hawalyaga chinhu choneche kulawa kuli soko, mbaka wachihovuje tandi. Kahi nawalangusigwa kulawa katali kota vila mbuli ya kuhovuga nego na vizombe na vinhu vya shaba.
7.5: Lelo Mafalisayo na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, nawamuuza Yesu, “Lekachoni, walanguswa wa hegwe hawalinguwinza kota ulanguso wotubochele kwa wasekulu, wangulya na moko gakokomoche?”
7.6: Yesu nakedichila, “Wahadi hemwe! Mloli wa Nguluwi Isaya nakalagula goya mbuli za hemwe vyoyandiche, “Nguluwi nakangulonga, ‘Wanhu awa, wangufugamila kwa ulonzi hela, Ila mnhumbula mwao, wa kutali na heni.’ ”
7.7: Kufugamila kwa hewo kwiha, mina wangulangusa mbuli za wanhu, kota Malajizo ga Nguluwi!
7.8: “Hemwe mwanguleka ilajizo lya Nguluwi, na mwangibatilila gomlanguswe na wanhu.”
7.9: Yesu nakalutilila kulonga, “Hemwe mna nzila ya usugu kwa kuleka malajizo ga Nguluwi, kwa chiwalo cha kuwinza mabochelo ga hemwe!
7.10: Mina Musa nakalajiza, wahulichize mhaza na mayako za hemwe, na yalingumliga mhaza ama mayake, imgana yabagame.
7.11: Ila hemwe, mwangulangusa, ‘Wone munhu yawe na chinhu cha kumtanza mhaza wa heye ama mayake, ila yolonga kota chinhu acho ndo Kolibani’ izeleche, ndolendole kwa Nguluwi,
7.12: lelo hailinguganigwa kahi kumtanza mhaza wa heye ama mayake.
7.13: Ahi ndo vyomlingubeza ulonzi wa Nguluwi kwa chiwalo cha ulanguso womlingibochelela. Kahi mwangudita mbuli nyinji kota zino.” Vinhu vilingumdita munhu yawe mwavu (Matei 15:10-20)
7.14: Hamba Yesu nakaluchema lula lung'hongola lwa wanhu, nakawalonjela, “Mnyhulichize mweng'ha, na mvizele.
7.15: Kuduhu chinhu chilingwinjila mgati mwa munhu kulawa kunze chilingumdita munhu mwavu. Ila chilingulawa mgati mwa munhu ndo chilingumdita munhu yawe mwavu.”
7.16: Nayawele na makutu ga kuhulika, nayahuliche!
7.17: Loyalulechile lula lung'hongola lwa wanhu na kwinjila mng'handa, walanguswa wa heye nawamlanda yawagubulile nhelo yila.
7.18: Yesu, nakawalonjela, “Ndaze, na hemwe hamvizelele? Ndaze, hamvizelele kota chinhu chilingumwinjila munhu kulawa kunze, hachimdita munhu yawe mwavu,
7.19: kwa vila hachilingumwinjila munhu mnhumbula, ila kumunda, na hamba cholavigwa kunze kucholo?” Kwa kulonga hino Yesu nakavikundiza vilyo vyeng'ha.
7.20: Nakalutilila kulonga, “Chilingulawa mgati mwa munhu ndo vilingumdita munhu yawe mwavu.
7.21: Mina kulawa mgati, mnhumbula ya munhu mwangulawa majesa gehile, ung'hondwa na uhizi, na kuboka,
7.22: ubuhu na wihe na udesi na upoka na maya na kidaya na uhesi na maligo.
7.23: Aga gesa, gangulawa mgati mwa munhu, ndo galingumdita munhu yawe mwavu.” Makundo ga mdala yumwe (Matei 15:21-28)
7.24: Hamba Yesu nakoka aho, nakaluta wilaya ya Tilo. Ako nakenjila hali ng'handa imwe na haganile munhu yavizele, ila nahawezile kivisa.
7.25: Mdala yumwe nayali na mwana mhinza yawele na chijeni chihile, nakahulika mbuli za Yesu. Lelo nakoya kamfugamila na kitoza kumwando kwa magulu ga Yesu.
7.26: Mdala nayali Mgilichi yapondigwe Silofoinike kuli isi ya Siliya, nakamlanda Yesu yamlavye mwanage chijeni chihile.
7.27: Yesu nakalonga, “Tandi wana wegute, kwa vila hainojile kuhola chilyo cha wana na kutozela mibwa.”
7.28: Ila ayula mdala nakedichila, nakalonga, “Kukomya, Mkulu, ila na mibwa wone jikale hasi ha chisaga jiwaga jilya usanyangwa wa wana.”
7.29: Yesu nakamlonjela ayula mdala, “Kwa chiwalo cha ulonzi awo, ulute kaye. Chijeni nachimlawa mhinza wa hegwe!”
7.30: Lelo nakaluta kaye, nakamfika mwanage yawasile mchinhanda mkomu, chijeni chimlawile. Yesu kangumlohola munhu yohambe yalonje na kuhulika
7.31: Yesu nakoka wilaya ya Tilo, nakakolela Sidoni, nakafika kuli ilamba lya Galilaya, nakakolela muji wa Dekapoli.
7.32: Wanhu nawamigala munhu yohambe yalonje na kuhulika, nawamlanda Yesu yamuwichile moko gake mtamwa.
7.33: Yesu nakamhola nakaluta naye kutali na wanhu, nakahola chidole nakenjiza kuli makutu, nakatema mite nakamibata umiyango.
7.34: Hamba Yesu nakalola kilanga, yolanda kwa Nguluwi aku yogugumila, nakamlonjela ayula munhu “Efata,” Mina “Ugubuche.”
7.35: Baho du makutu ga heye nagagubuka na umiyango wa heye ugonzoka nakaluka kulonga goya hela.
7.36: Yesu nakawalonjela wanhu waleche kumlonjela munhu. Ila vyoyawalemeze kuwalonjela wanhu hewo ndo kota kawalajiza kuwalonjela wanhu goyodita.
7.37: Wanhu weng'ha nawahuliche nawali wabubuwale, wolonga, “Kangudita geng'ha goya, kanguwagubula meho wohambe walole, na wohambe walonje, wangulonga!”

8.1: Mhela awo, ikugusi lya wanhu wenji naliting'hana kahi, chilyo nachowawele nacho nachimala. Lelo Yesu nakawachema walanguswa wa heye, na kuwalonjela,
8.2: “Ndanguwonela isungu wanhu awa, kwa vila natikala hamwe mazuwa gadatu, na chilyo chowawelenacho nachimala.
8.3: Wone ndiwalonjele walute kaye ne kulya, wanji wozilika mnzila. Mina wanji nawalawa kutali ng'hatu.”
8.4: Walanguswa nawamuuza, “Hano twa kisolo, topata kohi chilyo cha kuhega kwa wanhu weng'ha awa?”
8.5: Yesu nakawauza, “Mwanajo mibumunda jilinga?” Hewo nawamwidichila, “Saba.”
8.6: Yesu nakawalonjela wanhu wekalise hanyi, nakahola ajila mibumunda saba, kata malumbo Nguluwi, nakamogola, nakawapa walanguswa wawape wanhu, na walanguswa wadita hiho.
8.7: Nakwali na tusomba tuchefu, Yesu nakahola, kata malumbo Nguluwi, nakawapa walanguswa wawamogolele wanhu walye.
8.8: Wanhu weng'ha nawalya, weguta, nawali wanhu wafichile elufu zine. Walokoteza usanyangwa, navimema vidoto saba.
8.9: Na hewo wadile nawali wanhu elufu zine. Yesu nakawalaga,
8.10: na baho nakakwina mli itumbwi hamwe na walanguswa wa heye, nakaluta kuli wilaya ya Dalimanuta. Mafalisayo wangugana ulajilo (Matei 12:38-42; 16:1-4)
8.11: Mafalisayo nawoya kwa Yesu, nawaluka kilewa na heye. Nawagana kumjeza Yesu, yawalajile ulajilo kulawa kilanga.
8.12: Yesu nakesinza mnhumbula, nakalonga, “Lekachoni lulelo alu lwangugana ulajilo? Hebu! Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya! Lulelo alu halupegwa ulajilo woneche wula.”
8.13: Nakawaleka, nakenjila kahi mitumbwi, nakaluka majendo kuluta kumwambu mwa ilamba. Nhungo ya Mafalisayo na Helodi (Matei 16:5-12)
8.14: Walanguswa nawasemwa kigala mibumunda minji mitumbwi lyawo, nawahola limwe hela.
8.15: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Milolele na usaso wa Mafalisayo na usaso wa Helodi.”
8.16: Walanguswa naweuza waliyeka walonga, “Kangulonga hino kwa vila nahatuholile mibumunda?”
8.17: Yesu nakagazela majesa gawo, nakawalonjela, “Lekachoni mwangijesa vyomlihela mibumunda? Ndaze, mng'hali kuvizela? Ndaze, nhumbula za hemwe zilemwela kuvizela?
8.18: Ndaze, mna meho na hamlingulola? Mna makutu na hamlinguhulika? Hambe mkumbuche
8.19: mhela hondiwamogolele mibumunda jihano, kwa wanhu elufu zihano, na mlokoteza vidoto vilinga vya upumunizo?” Nawedichila, “Kumi na vili.”
8.20: Yesu nakawauza, “Na ahala londiwamogole mibumunda saba, nalowadile wanhu elufu zine, namlokoteza vidoto vilinga vya upumunizo?” Wedichila, “Saba.”
8.21: Lelo nakawauza hewo, “Mng'hali hamvizelele?” Yesu kangumlohola munhu yohambe yalole ako Betisaida
8.22: Nawoya Betisaida, ako wanhu nawamigala munhu yohambe yalole kwa Yesu na kumlanda yamibate.
8.23: Yesu kamibata moko ayula munhu, nakaluta naye kutali na ahala honhu, nakamtemela mite kumeho, hamba Yesu nakawika moko kumeho kwa heye kamuuza, “Ndaze, kwangona choni?”
8.24: Yula munhu nakalola kuchanya na kulonga, “Ena, ndanguwona wanhu wokoneka kota migodi jijenda.”
8.25: Yesu nakahiluchila kuwika moko kumeho kwa munhu yula. Sambi nakagubula ng'hatu meho, meho gake gahiluka kulola kota katali. Chila chinhu nayali yochona goya.
8.26: Yesu nakamhilusa kaye akuno yomlonjela, “Uleche kuhiluka kuli chijiji.” Petili kangukunda Yesu ndo Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi (Matei 16:13-20; Lukasi 9:18-21)
8.27: Yesu na walanguswa wa heye nawaluta kuli vijiji habehi na Kaisalia Filipo. Nalowawele mnzila, Yesu nakawauza walanguswa wa heye, “Mndonjele, wanhu wangulonga heni nda whaani?”
8.28: Nawamwidichila, “Wanji wangulonga hegwe kwa, Yohani Mbatiza, wanji wangulonga kwa Eliya na wanji kahi wangulonga hegwe kwa yumwe wa waloli wa Nguluwi.”
8.29: Yesu nakawauza!, “Na hemwe ndaze, mwangulonga heni nda whaani?” Petili nakedichila, “Hegwe ndo Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi.”
8.30: Hamba Yesu nakawalemeza, “Mleche kumlonjela munhu kota, heni nda whaani.” Yesu kangulonga kugazika na kubagama na kuzilipuka kwa heye (Matei 16:21-28; Lukasi 9:22-27)
8.31: Hamba Yesu nakaluka kuwalangusa walanguswa wa heye, “Mwana wa Munhu koganigwa kugazigwa na kulemigwa na wakulu na watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa. Kota kokopoligwa na logopuluta mazuwa gadatu kulawa hoyabagame, kozilipuka.”
8.32: Yesu nakawalonjela mbuli ayi hazelu. Aho, Petili nakamhola hafungo, nakaluka kumng'hanuchila.
8.33: Ila Yesu nakahinduka, nakawalola walanguswa wa heye, nakamng'hanuchila Petili yolonga, “Uche kwa heni Limazoga! Majesa ga hegwe hagawele ga Chinguluwi ila ndo ga chiwunhu hela.”
8.34: Hamba nakachema ikugusi lya wanhu hamwe na walanguswa wa heye, na kuwalonjela, “Wone munhu yoneche yogana kumbinza heni, imgana yeleme yuye, yahole msalaba wa heye, yambinze.
8.35: Wone munhu yogana kulohola ukomu wa heye, kowajiliza, ila munhu yalingwajiliza ukomu wa heye, kwa chiwalo cha Mbuli Inojile, koulohola.
8.36: Ndaze, munhu kowa na choni chinojile wone koihalila isi yeng'ha na kwajiliza ukomu wa heye? Ndita hebu!
8.37: Kuduhu ne chinhu munhu choyodita leka yauhiluse ukomu wa heye kahi.
8.38: Wone munhu yoneche kuli lulelo alu lwihile na hambe lumdumbe Nguluwi, yalingumbonela soni heni na malanguso ga heni, na heni Mwana wa Munhu ndomonela soni munhu ayo, mhela hoyokuya muli ukulu wa Mhaza wa heye hamwe na wahilisi wa kilanga welile wa Nguluwi.”

9.1: Yesu nakalutilila kuwalonjela, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, wabaha wanji bahano hotuli hawobagama ne kuwona Undewa wa Nguluwi ukuya kwa ukulu.” Yesu kangugaluka kumeho (Matei 17:1-13; Lukasi 9:28-36)
9.2: Mazuwa sita logapulute, Yesu nakawahola Petili na Yakubu na Yohani, kuchanya kuchidunda chikulu waliyeka. Ako, Yesu nakagaluka kumeho hali hewo,
9.3: nguwo yoyavalile naigaluka iwa nzelu chweya, nakwali kuduhu munhu yoneche muisi aha yojeza kuidita nzelu vila.
9.4: Eliya na Musa nawawalawila, wolongasa na Yesu.
9.5: Petili nakamlonjela Yesu, “Mlangusa, inoga heko hetwe twa hano. Lelo tuzenje vibumuli vidatu, chimwe cha hegwe na chimwe cha Musa na chimwe cha Eliya.”
9.6: Heye na wayage nawadumba heko nahawavizelele cha kulonga.
9.7: Hamba nailawila ng'hungugu iwagubika, na lizi ihulikwa kulawa kuli aila ng'hungugu ilonga, “Ayu ndo Mwanangu ndimganile, mumhulichize heye.”
9.8: Baho walanguswa awo nawalola nzingo zeng'ha, ila hawamuwene ne munhu, ila Yesu yaliyeka hamwe na hewo.
9.9: Lelo nalowali wodulika kulawa kuchidunda, Yesu nakawalemeza waleche kumlonjela munhu yoneche mbuli yowaiwene, mbaka Mwana wa Munhu loyozilipuka kulawa kowabagame.
9.10: Lelo nawebata ilajizo alyo, ila hewo nawali wochilonjela ndo choni kuzilipuka kulawa kuli wabagame.
9.11: Nawamuuza Yesu, “Lekachoni walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa wangulonga igana tandi Eliya yoye?”
9.12: Heye nakawedichila, “Ena, Eliya kanguya tandi kuwika goya geng'ha. Ahyo, lekachoni lelo yandichigwa kuli Maandiko Matakatifu kota Mwana wa Munhu kogazigwa lukami na kubezigwa?
9.13: Ila ndanguwalonjelani, Eliya mina koya, na wanhu nawamditila vyowaganile, kota vyoyandichigwe kuli Maandiko Matakatifu.” Yesu kangumlohola mwana yawele na chijeni (Matei 17:14-21; Lukasi 9:37-43a)
9.14: Lowawafichile wala walanguswa wanji, nawona lung'hongola lwa wanhu aho. Na wamwe wa walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nawali wochilewa na hewo.
9.15: Bahala wanhu lowamuwene Yesu, weng'ha nawabubuwala ng'hatu, nawambilimila wakamlamse.
9.16: Yesu nakawauza walanguswa wa heye, “Mwangilewa choni na hewo?”
9.17: Aho munhu yumwe kulawa mumula mowali wanhu nakamwidichila, “Mlangusa ndimigala mwana wa heni kwa hegwe, kana chijeni chimditile yalemwele kulonga.
9.18: Wone chijeni chimwaluche, chomgwisa na kumdita yalavye ifulo kumlomo, kochijejeda mizino na kukala bee. Ndiwalonjela awa walanguswa wamlavye chijeni ila walemwela.”
9.19: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Hemwe lulelo lulihela makundo! Ndochikala na hemwe mbaka nili? Ndowemilila mbaka nili? Ndigalileni heni ayo mwana.”
9.20: Nawamigala heye kwa Yesu. Baho du, acho chijeni lochimuwene Yesu, nachimdita yawe na chinzilisa, na heye mwana nakagwa hasi, yogalawata na kulawa ifulo kumlomo.
9.21: Yesu nakamuuza mhaza wa ayo mwana, “Nakawa hino kulawila nili?” Na heye nakamwidichila, “Kulawila kuli uwana wa heye.”
9.22: “Mala nyinji chijeni nachiwaga chimgwisa mchiluli na mmazi, leka chimbagamize ng'hatu. Lelo wone ulinguweza, utonele isungu na ututanze!”
9.23: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Lekachoni kwangulonga wone ulinguweza? Mbuli yeng'ha yowa goya kwa munhu yawele na makundo.”
9.24: Aho, yula mhaza nakayowa kwa lizi, “Ndangukunda! Unhanze kwa mbuli ya kulema kukunda.”
9.25: Yesu loyawene lung'hongola lwa wanhu lukonjezeka himahima kumwando kwa heye, nakaching'hanuchila chila chijeni chihile, “Chijeni ulingumdita ayu mwana yawe yolemwela kulonga na kuhulika, ndangukulajiza, mlawe mwana ayu na uleche kumwinjila kahi.”
9.26: Aho chila chijeni nachikwiniza lizi, nachimgwisa yula mwana hasi, hamba nachimlawa. Mwana nakoneka kota mtufi, wanhu wenji nawalonga, “Nakabagama!”
9.27: Ila Yesu nakamibata moko na kumwinula, na heye nakema.
9.28: Lelo Yesu loyenjile mng'handa, walanguswa wa heye nawamuuza kwa chinyele, “Lekachoni hetwe tulemwela kulavya chila chijeni?”
9.29: Na heye nakawalonjela, “Chijeni kota achi hachilawa mbaka kwa kumlanda Nguluwi hela.” Yesu kanguhiluchila kulonga kota kobagama (Matei 17:22-23; Lukasi 9:43b-45)
9.30: Yesu na walanguswa nawoka nawaluta kunji kukolela Galilaya. Yesu nahaganile wanhu wavizele kota nakoya.
9.31: Kwa vila nayali yowalangusa walanguswa wa heye yolonga, “Mwana wa munhu kanguzawichigwa mmoko womkopola, kochikala mchilaga na zuwa lya kadatu kozilipuka.”
9.32: Walanguswa nahawavizelele mbuli ayo, ila nawadumba kumuuza. Whaani yawele mkulu? (Matei 18:1-5; Lukasi 9:46-48)
9.33: Walanguswa nawoya Kapanaumu. Naloyawele mng'handa, Yesu nakawauza, “Namwali miwuza choni kula mnzila?”
9.34: Ila hewo nawanyamalila nahawamwidichile, mina mnzila nawali wochilewa kota whaani yawele mkulu ng'hatu kwa hewo.
9.35: Yesu nakekalisa hanyi, nakawachema walanguswa kumi na weli, nakawalonjela, “Yalingugana yawe wa mwaluko, igana yawe wa mwiso na yawe chitumagwa wa weng'ha.”
9.36: Hamba nakamhola mwana mdodo, nakamwimiza hagati ha hewo, nakamkumbatiza, hamba nakawalonjela,
9.37: “Munhu yoneche yombochela mwana kota ayu kwa itagwa lya heni, kangumbochela heni, na yalingumbochela heni, halingumbochela heni ndiliyeka, ila kangumbochela heye yanhumile.” Yohatulemile ka hamwe na hetwe (Lukasi 9:49-50)
9.38: Yohani nakamlonjela, “Mlangusa, natumona munhu yumwe yolavya chijeni kwa itagwa lyako, natwe natujeza kumlemeza kwa vila heye nahawele hamwe na hetwe.”
9.39: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mleche kumlemeza,” Mina kuduhu munhu yalingudita vinduzanduza kwa itagwa lyangu, na baho koweza kulonga gehile kwa heni.
9.40: Munhu yoneche yohambe yatulemele twa hamwe.
9.41: Munhu yoneche yowapani chizombe cha mazi ga kunwa, kwa vila hemwe ndo wanhu wa Kilistu, ndangukomya holemwela hebu kupegwa ndolendole ya heye. Vilingwambuza kudita gehile (Matei 18:6-9; Lukasi 17:1-2)
9.42: Yoneche yomwambuza yumwe wa awa wadodo walingung'hunda, kuwifya, igana munhu ayo kumkoweleza iganga likulu lya lwala msingo na kutozigwa kuli bahali.
9.43: Wone moko wa hegwe ukwambuze kuwifya, udumule. Inoga kwinjila kuli ukomu kuno uwele na moko umwe, kusinda uwe na moko meli na kwinjila kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu.
9.44: Amo mhiko hazifaga na chiluli chilinguwalakaza hambe chizime.
9.45: Na wone mgulu wa hegwe ukwambuze kikwang'hwala, udumule. Inoga kwinjila kuli ukomu ulihela mgulu umwe, kusinda kuwa na migulu jeng'ha mili na kwinjila kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu.
9.46: Amo mhiko zilingudakula hambe zife na chiluli chilungulakaza hambe chizime.
9.47: Na wone iziho lyako likwambuze kuwifya, ulyuse na ulitaje. Inoga kwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi kuno uwele na iziho limwe hela, kusinda kuwa na meho geng'ha meli na kwinjila kuli chiluli cha Jehanamu.
9.48: Amo kuwele na mhiko zilingudakula hambe zife, na chiluli chohambe chizime.
9.49: “Mina chila munhu kowichigwa mwino kwa chiluli.
9.50: Mwino unona, ila wone wajilize unoni wake wononezwa na choni? Muwe na mwino mgati mwenu na kikala goya hali hemwe.”

10.1: Yesu nakoka ahala nakaluta kuli mkowa wa Yudeya, mbaka kumwambu mwa lwanda lwa Yolodani. Wanhu wenji nawamlutila kahi, na heye nakawalangusa kota vyoyoditaga.
10.2: Lelo Mafalisayo nawamlutila, na kwa kumjeza nawamuuza, “Ndaze, yowa goya kwa munhu kumha luleko mchewake?”
10.3: Yesu nakawedichila, “Musa nakawapa Malajizo gachi?”
10.4: Hewo nawedichila walonga, “Musa nakakundiza munhu yamwandichile kalatasi ya luleko mchewake na kumleka.”
10.5: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Musa nakawandichila ilajizo alyo, kwa vila loyawene vyomuwele na nhumbula zigagadale.
10.6: Ila kulawila mwaluko vila Nguluwi loyalumbile isi, nakalumba mlume na mdala, kota vila Maandiko Matakatifu vyogalonjile.
10.7: Ndo mina mlume kangumlekaga mhaza na mayake, na kilumba hamwe na mdala wa heye,
10.8: nawo weli wowa lukuli lumwe. Hawowa weli, ila lukuli lumwe.
10.9: Lelo choyalumbanize Nguluwi, munhu yaleche kulekaniza.”
10.10: Lowahiluche kahi mng'handa, walanguswa wa heye nawamuuza mbuli ayo.
10.11: Na heye nakawalonjela, “Wone mlume yomleka mchewake, na kuhola mdala yunji, kangudita ung'hondwa kwa mchewake.
10.12: Hihyo du, wone mdala yomleka mlume wa heye, kwa kuholigwa kwa mlume yunji, na heye kangudita ung'hondwa.” Yesu kanguwapagata wana wadodo (Matei 19:13-15; Lukasi 18:15-17)
10.13: Wanhu nawamigalila Yesu wana wadodo, yawawichile moko, ila wala walanguswa nawawang'hanuchila.
10.14: Yesu vyoyawene ahyo, nakazudila, nakawalonjela, “Muwaleche awo wana wadodo woye kwa heni, mleche kuwalemeza, kwa vila Undewa wa Nguluwi ndo kwa wanhu wafandile kota wana wano.
10.15: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, munhu yoneche yohambe yabochele Undewa wa Nguluwi kota mwana mdodo, hokwinjila hebu amo.”
10.16: Hamba nakawapagata wana awo, nakawawichila moko, nakawatambichiza. Munhu yawele na lufufu (Matei 19:16-30; Lukasi 18:18-30)
10.17: Yesu loyaluche kahi majendo ga heye, munhu yumwe nakamuyila yobilima, nakafugama kumwando kwa heye, nakamuuza, “Mlangusa unojile, ndite choni ndiuhalile ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma?”
10.18: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Lekachoni kwangundonjela noga? Haduhu munhu yanojile ila yumwe, Nguluwi yaliyeng'ha.
10.19: Kugazela Malajizo, ‘Uleche ung'hondwa, uleche kukopola, uleche kuhiza, uleche kulavya ulolezi wa udesi, uleche kuhada, uwahulichize mhaza na mayako.’ ”
10.20: Heye nakamwidichila, “Mlangusa, ago geng'ha ndigabata kulawila londali msongolo.”
10.21: Yesu nakamlola, nakanojezwa na heye, nakamlonjela, “Nakwisilwa na chinhu chimwe, ulute ukaguze vinhu vyeng'ha vyouwele navyo, sendi azo ukawegalile awala wawele wazunwa, nagwe kowa na ng'hano kilanga, hamba umbinze.”
10.22: Loyahuliche ago, nakesinza, nakaluta yawele na masinzo, kwa vila nayali na lufufu lwinji.
10.23: Yesu nakawalola walanguswa wa heye, nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Mlole vyoiwa ngondo kwa wawele na lufufu kwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi.”
10.24: Walanguswa nawabubuwala kwa ulonzi wa heye. Yesu nakawalonjela kahi, “Wanangu, yowa ngondo ng'hatu kwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi!
10.25: Yowa ubewe kwa ngamiya kufyela kuli itubuli lya chihomo, kusinda yawele na lufufu kwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi.”
10.26: Walanguswa nawabubuwala ng'hatu naweuza, “Lelo yalikohi yoloholigwa?”
10.27: Yesu nakawalola na kulonga, “Kwa munhu hela haiditikwa ne hado, ila kwa Nguluwi mbuli zeng'ha zoditikwa.”
10.28: Petili nakamlonjela, “Na hetwe ndaze? Natuleka geng'ha, natukuwinza!”
10.29: Yesu nakalonga, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, chila munhu yalechile ng'handa ama wang'holoze ama lumbu ama mayake ama mhaza ama wanage ama migunda kwa chiwalo cha heni na kwa Mbuli Inojile,
10.30: kobochela mala miya mzidi mhela awu wa sambi, ng'handa ama lumbu ama wang'holoze ama mayake ama wana ama migunda hamwe na kugazigwa, na kuli mhela ukuya kobochela ukomu wa mazuwa gose.
10.31: Ila wenji wawele wa mwaluko wowa wa mwiso, na wawele wa mwiso, wowa wa mwaluko.” Yesu kangulonga lwa kadatu mbuli ya kubagama kwa heye (Matei 20:17-19; Lukasi 18:31-34)
10.32: Yesu na walanguswa wa heye, nalowali mnzila kuluta Yelusalemu na Yesu yawele yawalongole, walanguswa nawali wodumba, na wanhu wamuwinzile nawadumba. Yesu nakawahola kahi hafungo wala walanguswa kumi na weli, nakaluka kuwalonjela gala gozakumlawila,
10.33: “Mnyhulichize! Twanguluta Yelusalemu, na ako Mwana wa Munhu kowichigwa mmoko mwa watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, na hewo womtagusa kwa wihe yabagame na kumuwika mmoko mwa wanhu wohawawele Wayahudi,
10.34: na hewo womseka na womtemela mite na kumtowa kwa himbati na kumkopola. Ila zuwa lya kadatu kulawa nahoyabagame kozilipuka.” Kulanda kwa Yakubu na Yohani (Matei 20:20-28)
10.35: Yakubu na Yohani wana wa Sebedayo, nawamlutila Yesu nawamlonjela, “Mlangusa, twangugana utuditile chinhu chotukulanda.”
10.37: Nawamwidichila, “Utukundize kikala chigoda cha hegwe cha Undewa, yumwe kudilo kwa hegwe na yumwe kumoso kuli ukulu wa hegwe.”
10.38: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Hamvizelele mwangulanda choni. Ndaze, moweza kunwela chizombe cha magazo chondinwela na kubatizigwa kota vyondibatizwa?”
10.39: Nawamwidichila, “Toweza.” Yesu nakawalonjela, “Chizombe chondinwela, monwela na mobatizigwa kwa nzila yila yondibatizigwa.
10.40: Ila yalikohi yochikala kudilo ama kumoso kwa heni, haiwele mbuli ya heni kuwalonjela, ila honhu hala nahagongomanyigwa kwa wala wahaguligwe.”
10.41: Awala walanguswa wanji kumi lowahuliche ago, nawaluka kuzudizwa na Yakubu na Yohani.
10.42: Ahyo, Yesu nakawachema, nakawalonjela, “Mvizela kota wala walingujesigwa kota vilongozi wa isi, nawawalongozaga wanhu wa hewo kwa lupichi, na wakulu awo nawawemililaga wanhu wawo.
10.43: Ila kwa hemwe ileche kuwa hino, leka yalingugana yawe mkulu hali hemwe, imgana yawe chitumagwa wa hemwe.
10.44: Yalingugana yawe wa mwaluko, igana yawe chitumagwa wa weng'ha.
10.45: Mina Mwana wa Munhu hoyile kukolelwa mijito, ila kuwakolelamijito na kuulavya ukomu wa heye, kwa chiwalo cha ulohozi wa wanhu wenji.” Yesu kangumlohola yohambe yalole Balitimayo (Matei 20:29-34; Lukasi 18:35-43)
10.46: Lelo nawafika Yeliko, Yesu na walanguswa wa heye, nawali wolawa na lung'hongola lwa wanhu. Yumwe nayawele yohambe yalole yalinguchemigwa Balitimayo mwana wa Timayo nayali yekalise hafungo mwa nzila.
10.47: Loyahuliche Yesu yalawile Nasaleti kangukola ahala honhu, nakaluka kukwiniza lizi, “Yesu Mwanage Daudi umbonele isungu!”
10.48: Wanhu wenji nawamng'hanuchila leka yanyamalile, ila heye nakalutilila kukwiniza lizi, “Mwana wa Daudi, umbonele isungu.”
10.49: Yesu nakema nakalonga, “Mumcheme.” Baho, nawamchema ayo yohambe yalole, nawamlonjela, “Wikangaze, wime, kangukuchema.”
10.50: Na heye nakatozela hafungo ivalo lyake, nakazumilila na kumlutila Yesu.
10.51: Yesu nakamuuza, “Kwangugana ndikuditile choni?” Ayula yohambe yalole nakamlonjela, “Mlangusa ndangulanda kulola kahi.”
10.52: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ulute. Makundo ga hegwe gakulohola.” Baho yula yohambe yalole kawa yolola, nakamuwinza Yesu mnzila.

11.1: Yesu naloyali habehi kwinjila Yelusalemu, nawafika Betifage na Betaniya, habehi na chidunda cha Mizeituni. Yesu nakawalajiza walanguswa wa heye weli,
11.2: nakawalonjela, “Mlute hali chijiji chiwele kumwando kwa hemwe. Lomkwinjila amo, molifika idogowi lyana liwohigwe, ling'hali kolamijito joneche. Mlichumulile mligale.
11.3: Wone munhu yawauze, lekachoni mwangudita ahyo? Mumlonjele, Mkulu kanguligana kolihilusa hamba.”
11.4: Baho, nawaluta, nawalifika idogowi lyana limwe likoweligwe hali lwizi. Nalowali wolidohola,
11.5: wanhu wamwenga wawele hala nawawauza, “Lekachoni mwangulidohola alyo idogowi lyana?”
11.6: Walanguswa nawawedichila kota vyowalonjelwe na Yesu, nawo nawawaleka waluta nalyo.
11.7: Nawamhilichila Yesu alyo idogowi lyana, nawamtandichila nguwo za hewo kuli idogowi na Yesu kakwina kekalisa.
11.8: Wanhu wenji nawazanza nguwo za hewo mbalabala, wanji nawalambalika miputi ja migodi jowatemile kumigunda.
11.9: Wanhu weng'ha walongole na wawele kumbele nawakwiniza lizi wolonga, “Lutogo! Yamtambichizwe ayo yalinguya kwa itagwa lya Mkulu!
11.10: Utambichizwe Undewa ulinguya wa mhaza wa hetwe Daudi. Yatogoligwe Nguluwi kuchanya kilanga.”
11.11: Yesu nakenjila Yelusalemu nakaluta mbaka kuli luga lwa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakalolalola, nakona chila chinhu cha goya. Na kwa vila nayali matinazo, nakaluta Betaniya hamwe na wala kumi na weli. Yesu kangulipanjila isada (Matei 21:18-19)
11.12: Hamitondo, nalowali wolawa Betaniya, Yesu nakona nzala.
11.13: Lelo nakalyona kwa kutali igodi lya misada liwele na mahamba menji, nakalihejelela habehi leka yalole kota lina mafuza goneche. Loyaufichile, nakalyona lilihela mafuza, ila mahamba yeka, kwa vila hawali mhela wa kulela mafuza.
11.14: Baho nakalilonjela lila igodi, “Kwaluchila lehano na mazuwa gose munhu yoneche yaleche kulya mafuza ga hegwe.” Walanguswa wa heye nawahulika ulonzi awo. Yesu kanguluta kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi (Matei 21:12-17; Lukasi 19:45-48; Yohana 2:13-22)
11.15: Lelo nawafika Yelusalemu. Yesu nakenjila kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi nakaluka kuwawinga wanhu wawele woguza na kugula vinhu amo. Nakagudula visaga vya wala wawele wovunza sendi, na wala wawele woguza ng'hunda.
11.16: Nahamkundile munhu yoneche kukolela mijito kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi yaholile chinhu.
11.17: Hamba nakawalangusa, “Yandichigwa kuli Maandiko Matakatifu, Nguluwi nakalonga, ‘Ng'handa ya heni yochemigwa ng'handa ya kulandila kwa chiwalo cha nhanzi zeng'ha.’ Ila hemwe muigalula iwa mhalika ya wabokaji!”
11.18: Watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa lowahuliche ago, nawaluka kupala nzila ya kumkopola, ila nawamdumba kwa vila wanhu wenji nawabubuwala na malanguso ga heye.
11.19: Loliswele, Yesu na walanguswa wa heye nawoka honhu hala. Malanguso ga mgodi wa mafuza ukalile (Matei 21:20-22)
11.20: Mitondo kung'hali lufuku, nalowali wokola, nawalyona lila igodi lya mafuza nalikala ng'ong'ona lyeng'ha, mbaka mizabi.
11.21: Petili nakakumbuchila gala nagakoleche, nakamlonjela Yesu, “Mlangusa, ulole lila igodi lya misada lyoulipanjile, vyolikalile.”
11.22: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Muwe na makundo kwa Nguluwi.
11.23: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, munhu yochilonjela chidunda achi, ‘Ung'humbuche ukagwe kuli bahali,’ ne kona majesa mnhumbula ya heye, ila yokunda kota mbuli zeng'ha zoyolonga zokoleka, koditilwa mbuli ayo.
11.24: Lelo ndanguwalonjelani, homumlanda chinhu Nguluwi, mkunde kota mchibochela, na hemwe mopegwa.
11.25: Homumlanda Nguluwi, mumlechele chila munhu yawaditileni vibi, leka Mhaza wa hemwe yawele kilanga yawosele hemwe gehile gomditile.”
11.26: “Ila wone hamlinguwalechela wanji, na Mhaza wa hemwe yawele kilanga howowosela hebu hemwe gehile genu gomditile.” Mbuli ya ludali lwa Yesu (Matei 21:23-27; Lukasi 20:1-8)
11.27: Lelo nawafika kahi Yelusalemu. Yesu naloyali yojenda kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na wasekulu wamlutila,
11.28: nawamuuza, “Kwangudita mbuli zino kwa ludali lwachi? Yalikohi yakupele ludali lwa kukola mbuli azi?”
11.29: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndowauzani chinhu chimwe, lomkwidichila, nani kahi ndowalonjelani ndangudita mbuli azi kwa ludali lwachi.
11.30: Ndaze, ludali lwa Yohani lwa kubatiza nalulawa kilanga ama kwa wanhu? Mnyidichile.”
11.31: Nawaluka kiwuza hewo wawo, “Tolongaze? Hotulonga, nalulawa kilanga kotuuza, lelo lekachoni hamumkundile Yohani?
11.32: Ila hotulonga, nalulawa kwa wanhu.” Nawadumba lung'hongola lwa wanhu wamemile kwa vila weng'ha nawakunda kota Yohani nayali mloli wa Nguluwi.
11.33: Lelo nawamwidichila Yesu, “Hetwe hatuvizelele.” Na heye Yesu nakawalonjela, “Na heni siwalonjela ndangudita mbuli zino kwa ludali lwachi.”

12.1: Yesu nakaluka kulonga na hewo kwa nhelo, “Nakwali na munhu yumwe nakalima mgunda wa zabibu. Nakazungulusila lugagala, na hagati nakabawa izimbo lya kukamila divai, nakazenga chidandalo kahi. Nakawabasila mgunda awo walimi, na kaheluka isi ya kutali.
12.2: Mhela wa kubeta, nakamlajiza chitumagwa wa heye kwa wala walimi, yakamigalile chasi cha mbena cha mgunda wa heye wa zabibu.
12.3: Wala walimi, nawamibata, wamsubula, nawamhilusa ne chinhu.
12.4: Nakamlajiza kahi chitumagwa yunji, ayu kahi nawamlumiza mutwi na kumditila mbuli za kumbasa soni.
12.5: Yula yawele na mgunda nakamlajiza chitumagwa yunji, na heye nawamhola nawamkopola. Na wamwenga wenji walajizwe nawatowigwa na wanji nawakopoligwa.
12.6: Yoyaponile kulajizwa nayali mwanage mlume yamganile. Hamba nakamlajiza kwa yawabasile mgunda, nakejesa kata, ‘Hanji womhulichiza mwana wa heni.’
12.7: Ila wala walimi nawelonjela hewo wawo walonga, ‘Ayu ndo yohalila, lelo tumkopole na mgunda wa zabibu tohalila hetwe!’
12.8: Baho wamibata ayula yatumigwe, nawamkopola wamtaga kutali na hawele mgunda wa zabibu.”
12.9: Yesu nakawauza, “Yowa ndaze kwa ayula yawele na mgunda wa zabibu? Ndanguwalonjela, kokuya kuwabagamiza wanhu weng'ha na kuwabasila wanhu wanji aula mgunda.
12.10: Ndaze, hamsomile Maandiko aga? “Alila iganga lyowalilemile walinguzenga, liwa iganga likulu lya msisi.
12.11: Mkulu ndo yaditile mbuli ayi, nayo ndo ya kububuwaza ng'hatu kwa hetwe.”
12.12: Watambika wakulu na walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa na wasekulu, nawavizela kota nhelo ayi nayali kwa chiwalo cha hewo. Lelo nawajeza kumibata, ila nawalidumba ikugusi lya wanhu. Lelo nawamleka, nawaluta. Kulavya kodi kwa Mndewa wa Loma (Matei 22:15-22; Lukasi 20:20-26)
12.13: Lelo Mafalisayo wamwenga na vitumagwa wa chilundo cha Helodi, nawatumigwa leka wamgwilize Yesu kwa ulonzi wa heye.
12.14: Nawamlutila, na kumlonjela, “Mlangusa, tuvizela kota hegwe ndo munhu utanganiche ulingulonga kwa kukomya na hulingumdumba munhu yoneche. Na ukulu wa munhu hauwele chinhu kwa hegwe, ila kwangulangusa kukomya kweng'ha kuwala Nguluwi. Ndaze, yowa goya kulavya kodi kwa mndewa wa Loma, ama hebu? Tulavye ama tuleche kulavya?”
12.15: Ila Yesu nakavizela uhadi wa hewo, nakawalonjela, “Lekachoni mwangunjeza? Mndajile alyo igwala ndililole.”
12.16: Nawamlajila. Na heye nakawauza, “Mutwi na itagwa ali ndo lya whaani?” Nawamwidichila, “Ndo wa mndewa wa Loma.”
12.17: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ga Kaizali mmigalile Kaizali, na ga Nguluwi mmigalile Nguluwi. Nawabubuwala ng'hatu na heye.” Mbuli ya uzilipuko (Matei 22:23-33; Lukasi 20:27-40)
12.18: Masadukayo, nawawele wolonga kota kuduhu uzilipuko kwa wabagame, nawamlutila Yesu na kumuuza,
12.19: “Mlangusa, Musa nakatulajiza hino, wone munhu yabagame na kuleka mchewake ne kuwa na mwana, mng'holoze imgana yamhalile ayo mdala yafililwe na mlume wa heye, leka yampondele wana mng'holoze.
12.20: Lelo nakwali na wanhu saba wa lukolo lumwe. Wa mwaluko nakahola, nakabagama ne kuwa na mwana.
12.21: Na mng'holoze wa keli nakamhola yula mdala yafililwe na mlume wa heye, na heye kahi nakabagama ne kuleka mwana, na mng'holoze wa kadatu iwa hihyo.
12.22: Weng'ha saba nawabagama ne kuleka mwana. Hamba na yula mdala yafililwe na mlume wa heye nakabagama.
12.23: Lelo zuwa lya wabagame kuzilipuka, mdala ayo kowa mdala wa yalikohi? Weng'ha saba nawali wamhesile.”
12.24: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Hemwe muwifya kwa vila hamgazelele Maandiko Matakatifu ne mong'ho wa Nguluwi.
12.25: Mina wabagame howozilipuka hawohesa ne kuhesigwa hebu, wowa kota wahilisi wa kilanga.
12.26: Ila mbuli ya kuzilipuka kwa wabagame, ndaze, hamsomile chitabu cha Musa kuli honhu ha chila chisosolo lochali chikwaka chiluli? Nguluwi nakamlonjela Musa, heni ndo Nguluwi wa Abulahamu na Nguluwi wa Isaka na Nguluwi wa Yakubu.
12.27: Lelo heye hawele Nguluwi wa wabagame, ila heye ka Nguluwi wa wawele wakomu. Hemwe muwifya ng'hatu.” Ilajizo liwele likulu (Matei 22:34-40; Lukasi 10:25-28)
12.28: Mlangusa yumwenga wa malajizo ga Musa nakoya, nakahulika kilewa kwa hewo. Loyawene Yesu nakawedichila goya Masadukayo, nakalawila na kumuuza, “Kuli Malajizo geng'ha ga Nguluwi, lilikohi liwele likulu kupuluta geng'ha?”
12.29: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Lya mwaluko ndo ali, ‘Hulichize Isilaeli! Mkulu Nguluwi wa hetwe ndo yaliyeka Mkulu.
12.30: Umgane Mkulu Nguluwi wa hegwe kwa nhumbula ya hegwe yeng'ha na kwa muhe wa hegwe weng'ha na kwa luhala lwako lweng'ha na kwa mong'ho wa hegwe weng'ha.’
12.31: Na lya keli ndo ali, umgane youlingikalasa habehi, kota vyoulingigana gwegwe baho. Kuduhu ilajizo linji liwele likulu kupuluta gano.”
12.32: Lelo yula mlangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nakamlonjela, “Goya Mlangusa! Kulonga kukomya kota Nguluwi ndo yumwe hela na kuduhu yunji ila heye.
12.33: Na igana munhu kumgana Nguluwi kwa nhumbula yeng'ha na kwa luhala lweng'ha na kwa mong'ho weng'ha na kumgana youlingikalasa habehi kota vyoulingigana gwegwe baho. Mbuli ayi ndo itanganiche ng'hatu kupuluta kulavya nhambiko ya miwunde na nhambiko za kulakazwa.”
12.34: Yesu navyoyawene kota ayu munhu nakamwidichila goya, nakamlonjela, “Hegwe huwele kutali na Undewa wa Nguluwi.” Kulawila aho, kuduhu ne munhu yajezile kumuuza chinhu. Mbuli ya Kilistu Mlohozi (Matei 22:41-46; Lukasi 20:41-44)
12.35: Yesu naloyali yolangusa mng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakauza, “Lekachoni walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa wangulonga kota Kilistu Mlohozi ndo mwana wa Daudi?
12.36: Heye Daudi yolongozwa na Muhe Yelile nakalonga, “ ‘Mkulu Nguluwi nakamlonjela mkulu wa heni, wikale hano kudilo kwa heni, mbaka ndiwawiche wang'honyo wa hegwe hasi ha magulu ga hegwe.’
12.37: “Heye Daudi nakamchema Kilistu Mkulu. Lelo Kilistu Mlohozi kowa ndaze mwana wa Daudi?” Yesu kanguwalonjela wanhu mbuli ya walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa (Matei 23:1-36; Lukasi 20:45-47) Lung'hongola lwa wanhu nalwali lumuhulichiza kwa usangalalo.
12.38: Kuli malanguso ga heye, Yesu nakalonga, “Milolele na walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa, walingugana walingukolakola wavalile mikanzu milefu na kulamsigwa na wanhu chiukulu kuli masoko, na kugana kikalisa honhu hatanganiche kuli ng'handa za kusalila,
12.39: na kuhagula honhu hatanganiche mng'handa za kusalila na honhu hatanganiche hali mnvina.
12.40: Na kuwabunza ng'handa kwa usugu wawo, wadala wafililwe na walume wawo, aku wochisinjizila kumlanda Nguluwi kwa kulutilila! Wogazigwa lukami kwa wihe wa hewo.” Ndolendole ya mdala yafililwe na mlume wa heye (Lukasi 21:1-4)
12.41: Yesu nakekala habehi na honhu nahowali wolavya ndolendole. Nakawa yolola wanhu wenji lowali wolavya sendi na kujela mli isanduku lya ndolendole kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi. Wawele na lufufu wenji nawalavya sendi nyinji.
12.42: Aho nakoya mamo yumwe yafililwe na mlume wa heye, mzunwa, nakalavya migwala mili midodo ja sendi.
12.43: Aho Yesu nakawachema walanguswa wa heye, nakuwalonjela, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, mamo ayu yafililwe na mlume wa heye, mzunwa, nakalavya chasi chinji mli isanduku lya ndolendole kusinda chowalavile wanji weng'ha.
12.44: Mina wanhu wawele na lufufu nawalavyaga ndolendole kulawa kuli lufufu nalowawele nawo. Ila ayu mamo kwa uzunwa wa heye, nakalavya chila chinhu choyawele nacho.”

13.1: Yesu navyoyali yolawa kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, yumwe wa walanguswa wa heye nakamlonjela, “Mlangusa, ulole ng'handa vyoizenjigwe goya na maganga aga vyoganojile mlukanzi.”
13.2: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ndaze, kwanguzona ng'handa azi ng'hulu? Kuduhu iganga ne limwe liwele lyopona mchanya mwa liyage, chila chinhu chobomoligwa.” Kugaya na kugazigwa (Matei 24:3-14; Lukasi 21:7-19)
13.3: Yesu loyali yekale mchanya mwa chidunda cha Mzeituni yolola kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, Petili na Yakubu na Yohani na Andeleya nawamuuza kwa uviso.
13.4: Nawamlonjela, “Utulonjele mbuli azi zolawila nili? Ulajilo wachi wotulajila kota mbuli zabehi kulawila?”
13.5: Yesu nakawalonjela, milolele, mleche kuhadigwa na munhu.
13.6: Mina wenji wokuya kwa itagwa lya heni, chila yumwe yolonga heye ndo heni. Na hewo wowajiliza wanhu wenji.
13.7: Lomhulika mbuli ya ngondo na uhesi wa ngondo, mleche kisinza. Mbuli azo zolawila, ila kuduma kung'hali.
13.8: Nhanzi imwe yochitowa na iyage, undewa umwe wochitowa na undewa uyage, ahyo kowa na limachinyina na nzala. Mbuli azi ndo kota vila usungu wa mwaluko wa mamo kuponda mwana.
13.9: Ila hemwe milolele. Mina wanhu wowahilika hemwe kuli vitala na kuwatowa kuli ng'handa za kusalila. Mohilikwa kwa vilingozi na wandewa kwa chiwalo cha heni, leka mlavye ulolezi kwa hewo.
13.10: Ila lokung'hali kufika mwiso, Mbuli Inojile yodamligwa tandi kwa wanhu weng'ha.
13.11: Na hewo howowawika hemwe mmoko na kuwahilika kuli chitala, mleche kuwa na lunhwinhwi kwa gala gomlonga, mhela ula houfika, mlonje choneche chompegwa, mina ulonzi womlonga haulawa kwa hemwe, ila wolawa kwa Muhe Yelile.
13.12: Wanhu wowahilika wang'holozawo wakopoligwe, na wahaza wodita hihyo kwa wana wawo. Na wana wowabelenhuka wawapondile leka wakopoligwe.
13.13: Wowazudilani kwa chiwalo cha heni, ila munhu yula yokwimilila mbaka kuduma ndo heye yoloholigwa. Chinhu chihile chilinguwifya (Matei 24:15-28; Lukasi 21:20-24)
13.14: “Lomkona ‘Izudizo lilinguwifya’ likwima honhu hohawele hake. Yalingusoma yavizele vyoilinguzeleka, aho wawele Yudeya wabilimile kuchidunda.
13.15: Yawele kuli chinduwiko cha ng'handa, yaleche kidulika kwinjila mng'handa ya heye kuhola chinhu.
13.16: Yawele kumgunda yaleche kuhiluka kaye kuhola igwanda lyake.
13.17: Yowa ngondo kwa wachimai wawele na himila na walingonyeza mazuwa ago!
13.18: Mumlande Nguluwi leka mbuli azo zileche kulawila mhela wa mbeho.
13.19: Mina mhela awo kowa na kugaya kohakunalawila kulawila Nguluwi loyalumbile isi mbaka lehano, na hailawila kahi.
13.20: Wone Mkulu nahawapunguzile mazuwa ago, haduhu munhu yahawele yoloholigwa. Ila kwa chiwalo cha wahaguligwe na Nguluwi, nakapunguza mazuwa ago.
13.21: “Lelo munhu hoyowalonjela hemwe, ‘Mlole, Kilistu Mlohozi ka hano,’ ama ‘Mlole ka ahala,’ mleche kukunda.
13.22: Mina wokuya Kilistu wa udesi na waloli wa udesi. Wodita ulajilo na vinduzanduza wojeza kuwajiliza wala wahaguligwe na Nguluwi.
13.23: Ila hemwe milolele, heni nandiwalonjela mbuli yeng'ha loing'hali kulawila. Kuya kwa Mwana wa Munhu (Matei 24:29-31; Lukasi 21:25-28)
13.24: “Lelo mazuwa ago, kugaya ako hokumala, isanya lyowichigwa jiza na nyelezi halibunguzuka.
13.25: Nhondwe zolagala kulawa kilanga na mong'ho ubatilile vinhu avyo vyeng'ha wotigaswa!
13.26: Aho wanhu womona Mwana wa Munhu yokuya kuli ng'hungugu kwa ludali lwinji na ukulu.
13.27: Hamba kowalajiza wahilisi wa heye wa kilanga wawakungajize wahaguligwe na Nguluwi kulawa nzingo zeng'ha zine, kulawila kuli isi yeng'ha na kilanga kweng'ha. Mbuli ya ulanguso wa igodi lya mafuza (Matei 24:32-35; Lukasi 21:29-33)
13.28: “Kwa ikuyu milanguse nhelo ayi, hala nhagala lozikwaluka kubahula, mwanguvizela kota mhela wa nhonya wa habehi.
13.29: Hihyo namwe homkona mbuli azo zilawila, mvizele kota ka habehi kuya.
13.30: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, mbuli azi zeng'ha zolawila kung'hali lulelo alu kubagama.
13.31: Ulanga na isi zopuluta, ila ulonzi wa heni haupuluta hebu. Kuduhu ne yumwe yovizela zuwa ne saa (Matei 24:36-44)
13.32: “Ila, kwa mbuli ya zuwa ama saa ayo kuduhu ne yumwe yavizelele kokuya nili, ne wahilisi wa kilanga ne Mwana, ila Mhaza yaliyeng'ha ndo yavizelele.
13.33: Milolele na kikala meho, mina hamvizelele mhela awo wokuya nili.
13.34: Yowa kota munhu yalinguka hakaye na kwinula majendo kuwalechela vitumagwa wa heye ludali, chila yumwe na mijito ya heye, nakamlonjela mwamizi wa lwizi yawe meho.
13.35: Lelo mikale meho, mina hamvizelele mkulu wa ng'handa kohiluka nili, hanji yowa matinazo ama nechilo ama lufuku ama mitondo.
13.36: Milolele leka hoyokuya ne hemwe kuvizela, yaleche kuwafika muwasile.
13.37: Gondilinguwalonjela hemwe, ndanguwalonjela weng'ha, mikale meho!”

14.1: Nagapona mazuwa meli ifiche mnvina ya Pasaka na Mibumunda johajiwichigwe usaso. Watambika wakulu na walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa wali wopala nzila ya kumibata Yesu kwa chinyele wamkopole.
14.2: Ila nawalonga, “Tuleche kumibata mhela wa mnvina ya Pasaka, wanhu wotulemela.” Yesu kangubakalizwa mafuta ga kunhunyhilila ako Betaniya (Matei 26:6-13; Yohana 12:1-8)
14.3: Yesu nayali Betaniya hakaye ha Simoni nayawele na uswema. Naloyali mchisaga yolya chilyo, mdala yumwe yawele na libuli lya alabasta lilinguguzigwa kwa sendi nyinji na mafuta galingunhunyhilila ga nado inojile ilinguguzigwa kwa sendi nyinji nakoya, nakachumula alyo libuli, nakumjidila Yesu mafuta ago kumutwi.
14.4: Wanhu wamwe nawawele aho nawazudila, nawelonjela, “Lekachoni kanguwifya mafuta aga?
14.5: Gahaguzigwe kwa sendi denali miya zidatu zilinguhega kwa mwezi umwe ng'hatu, na kupegwa wazunwa.” Nawamng'hanuchila ayo mamo.
14.6: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mumleche, lekachoni mwangumgaza? Nakanditila mbuli inojile.
14.7: Wazunwa wa hamwe na hemwe mazuwa gose, ila heni siwa na hemwe mazuwa gose.
14.8: Heye nakadita vyoyawezile, nakalujidila lukuli lwangu mafuta galingunhunyhilila kuuwika goya kutiligwa mchilaga.
14.9: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, koneche muisi Mbuli Inojile hoidamligwa, chinhu chino choyaditile ayu mdala chodamligwa chiwalo cha kumkumbuchila heye.” Yuda Isikalioti kangukunda kumbelenhuka Yesu (Matei 26:14-16; Lukasi 2:3-6)
14.10: Hamba Yudasi Isikalioti, yumwe wa awala kumi na weli, nakaluta kwa watambika wakulu, leka yambelenhuche Yesu.
14.11: Watambika wakulu lowahuliche mbuli ayo, nawasangalala, nawalagana na heye wompa sendi. Lelo Yuda nakaluka kupala ndaze vyoyombelenhuka. Yesu kangulya ndiya ya Pasaka na walanguswa wa heye (Matei 26:17-25; Lukasi 22:7-14,21-23; Yohana 13:21-30)
14.12: Zuwa lya mwaluko lya mnvina ya mibumunda johajiwichigwe usaso, mhela ula ing'holo lyana lya Pasaka hukopoligwa, walanguswa wa heye nawamuuza, “Kwangugana kohi tukuwichile goya ndiya ya Pasaka?”
14.13: Lelo Yesu nakawalajiza walanguswa wa heye weli yowalonjela, “Mlute kuli muji, na amo moting'hana na munhu yumwe yedwichile chiya cha mazi. Mumuwinze,
14.14: mbaka kuli ng'handa yoyokwinjila, mkamlonjele yawele na ng'handa kota, mlangusa kangulonga, chakohi chihengo cha heye choyodila ndiya ya Pasaka hamwe na walanguswa wa heye?
14.15: Na heye kowalajila chihengo chikulu chizenjigwe mchanya mwa chiyage chiwichigwe goya na kunoligwa. Mtuwichile goya mumo ndiya ya Pasaka.”
14.16: Walanguswa nawoka, nawaluta kuli muji, nawafika chila chinhu cha goya kota Yesu vyoyawalonjele. Nawawika goya ndiya ya Pasaka.
14.17: Loifichile matinazo, Yesu nakoya hamwe na walanguswa wa heye kumi na weli.
14.18: Lowawele wekale mchisaga wolya, Yesu nakalonga, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, yumwe wa hemwe yalingulya hamwe na heni kombelenhuka.”
14.19: Aho walanguswa wa heye nawaluka kisinza, nawamuuza yumweyumwe, “Ndaze, nda heni?”
14.20: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Yumwe wa hemwe kumi na weli, yalingudiliza ibumunda hamwe na heni mchisaye.
14.21: Ndangukomya Mwana wa Munhu kobagama kota Maandiko Matakatifu vyogalingulonga mbuli ya heye, ila mane yuye munhu ayo yalingumbelenhuka Mwana wa Munhu. Nayahawele goya munhu ayo wone nahapondigwe.” Ndiya ya Mkulu (Matei 26:26-30; Lukasi 22:14-20; 1 Kolinto 11:23-25)
14.22: Nalowali wolya, Yesu nakahola ibumunda, nakota malumbo, nakaumogola, kawapa walanguswa wa heye yolonga, “Mhole, alu ndo lukuli lwangu.”
14.23: Hamba kahola chizombe, nakalonga malumbo kwa Nguluwi, nakawapa, weng'ha nawanwa mli chizombe acho.
14.24: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ayi ndo danda ya heni ilingulajila ilagano lya Nguluwi, danda ilingubohoka kwa chiwalo cha wanhu wenji.
14.25: Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, siwila kunwa divai kahi na hemwe, mbaka zuwa honwa divai inji kuli undewa wa Nguluwi.”
14.26: Lowasindile kwimba lwimbo, nawoka, nawaluta kuli chidunda cha Mizeituni. Yesu kangulonga Petili kombela (Matei 26:31-35; Lukasi 22:31-34; Yohana 13:36-38)
14.27: Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Hemwe mweng'ha mobilima mondeka ndiliyeka, mina Maandiko Matakatifu gangulonga, “ ‘Ndomtowa mdimi, na ming'holo jeng'ha josambaluka.’
14.29: Petili nakamlonjela, “Wone hewo weng'ha wawe na majesa na hegwe na kukuleka, heni sikuleka hebu!”
14.30: Yesu nakamlonjela Petili, “Ndangukulonjela ndikomya, nechilo yiyino, izogolo halineka lwa keli, kombela kadatu.”
14.31: Ila Petili nakamwidichila yekangaze nakalonga, “Wone ingane kubagama hamwe na hegwe, sikubela ng'oo.” Walanguswa weng'ha nawalonga hihyo. Yesu kangumlanda Nguluwi kuli kagunda ka Getisemane (Matei 26:36-46; Lukasi 22:39-46)
14.32: Lelo nawafika kuli kagunda kalinguchemigwa Getisemane. Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Mikale baha, mhela heni ndimlanda Nguluwi.”
14.33: Hamba nakawahola Petili na Yakubu na Yohani, nakaluka kuwa na masinzo na kugaya.
14.34: Nakawalonjela, “Ndina masinzo lukami mnhumbula behi na kubagama. Mikale hano na muwe meho.”
14.35: Nakaluta hamwando, naketoza hasi, nakalanda kwa Nguluwi, wone ilinguganigwa, yaleche kukolela saa ayo ya kugazigwa.
14.36: Nakalonga, “Mhaza wa heni, hegwe kuna ludali lwa vinhu vyeng'ha. Umbusile achi chizombe, ila ileche kuwa kota vyondilingugana heni, leka kota vyougana hegwe.”
14.37: Hamba nakahiluka kwa walanguswa wala wadatu, nakawafika wawasile. Lelo nakamuuza Petili, “Simoni, lekachoni nakuwasa? Nakulemwela kikala meho ne saa imwe?”
14.38: Hamba nakawalonjela, “Mikale meho na kulanda leka mleche kwinjila kuli kujezigwa. Muhe wa munhu wangugana kudita ganojile, ila lukuli lwa ng'hochele.”
14.39: Nakaluta kahi kumlanda Nguluwi yohiluchila ulonzi wuwula.
14.40: Hamba nakahiluka kahi kwa walanguswa, nakawafika wawasile. Meho gawo nagali gebatigwe na usinjizi. Nahawalizelele lya kumwidichila.
14.41: Loyoyile lwa kadatu nakawalonjela, “Mng'hali muwasile na kwesela? Lelo ihega! Saa ifika. Mwana wa Munhu kanguwichigwa mmoko mwa wanhu wawele na gehile.
14.42: Mlilimche, tucheni. Mlole, yula munhu yalingumbelenhuka ka habehi.” Yesu kangibatika (Matei 26:47-56; Lukasi 22:47-53; Yohana 18:3-12)
14.43: Yesu naloyawele yang'hali yolonga, Yudasi yumwe wa wala kumi na weli, nakafika hamwe na chilundo cha wanhu wawele na mipanga na nyimbati. Wanhu awo nawalajizwe na watambika wakulu, na walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa na wasekulu.
14.44: Yuda yambelenhuche nakawapa ulajilo, “Yula munhu yondimnonela ndo heye, mibateni na kumuhilika hali wamizi.”
14.45: Yuda loyafichile du, nakamlutila Yesu nakumlonjela, “Mlangusa!” Hamba kamnonela.
14.46: Lelo awo wanhu nawamibata Yesu, nawamuwika mmoko.
14.47: Yumwe wa wala wawele wemile aho hamwe na Yesu, nakasomola ipanga, nakamtowa nalyo chitumagwa wa mtambika mkulu, nakamdumula ikutu.
14.48: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndaze, muya na mipanga na nyimbati kota heni nda mbokaji?
14.49: Chila zuwa nandali hamwe na hemwe ndilangusa kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, lekachoni hamundibate? Ila sambi igana Maandiko Matakatifu genele.”
14.51: Nakwali na msongolo yumwe nayawele yomuwinza Yesu yawele, msongolo ayo nayali yavalile igolole. Nawo nawajeza kumibata.
14.52: Ila heye nakasulupuka, nakauleka lila igolole, nakubilima kuno yawele mwazi. Yesu kuli chitala cha utaguso cha wasekulu (Matei 26:57-68; Lukasi 22:54-55,63-71; Yohana 18:13-14,19-24)
14.53: Lelo nawamhilika Yesu kwa mtambika mkulu kuwele na watambika wakulu weng'ha na wasekulu na walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa nakowali woting'hana.
14.54: Petili nakamuwinza Yesu kwa kutali, nakenjila mgati mwa lugagala lwa mtambika mkulu, nakekala hamwe na wamizi yokota chiwambilo.
14.55: Watambika wakulu na chitala cheng'ha nawaliwopala ulolezi wa kumtagusa Yesu leka wamkopole, ila hawauwene.
14.56: Wanhu wenji nawalavya ulolezi wa udesi kwa Yesu, ila ulolezi wa hewo hawiwhanile.
14.57: Hamba wanji nawema, na kulavya ulolezi wa udesi wolonga,
14.58: “Natumhulika munhu ayu yolonga, ‘Ndogwisanga Ng'handa ayi ya Nguluwi izenjigwe kwa moko ga wanhu, na kwa mazuwa gadatu ndoizenga yinji yohaizenjigwe kwa moko ga wanhu.’ ”
14.60: Mtambika mkulu nakema hagati hawo, nakamuuza Yesu, “Ndaze, hulingwidichila ne chinhu? Wanhu awa wangulavya ulolezi wachi kwa hegwe?”
14.61: Ila heye nakanyamalila tulu! Nahalonjile ne chinhu. Mtambika mkulu nakamuuza kahi Yesu, “Ndaze, hegwe ndo Kilistu Mlohozi yatambichizwe na Nguluwi, Mwana Nguluwi mkulu?”
14.62: Yesu nakedichila, “Ena, nda heni. Kahi, momona Mwana wa Munhu yekale kudilo kwa Nguluwi Yawele na Mong'ho, yalinguya kuli ng'hungugu kulawa kilanga.”
14.63: Aho mtambika mkulu nakadadula ivalo lyake kulajila kota nakazudila ng'hatu, na kulonga, “Twangugana ulolezi wachi kahi?
14.64: Mumhulika vyoyalingumkovula Nguluwi! Hemwe mwangona ndaze?” Weng'ha nawamula kota imgana yabagame.
14.65: Lelo wamwe wa hewo nawaluka kumtemela mite, nawamgubika kumeho na kumtowa na kumlonjela, “Tulagulile lelo, yalikohi yakutowile!” Na vitumagwa nawamhola na kumtowa mizeze. Petili kangumbelenhuka Yesu (Matei 26:69-75; Lukasi 22:56-62; Yohana 18:15-18,25-27)
14.66: Petili naloyawele yang'hali hasi kuli lugagala, yumwe wa vitumagwa wadala wa mtambika mkulu nakoya.
14.67: Naloyamuwene Petili yokota chiwambilo, nakamlola na kumlonjela, “Nagwe nawali hamwe na Yesu Mnasaleti.”
14.68: Ila Petili nakabela, “Mane, sigazelele goulonga!” Hamba Petili nakoka, nakaluta kunze kuluga. Aho izogolo nalika.
14.69: Yula chitumagwa naloyamuwene kahi Petili, nakaluka kahi kuwalonjela wanhu nawawele wemile aho, “Munhu ayu ka yumwe wa hewo.”
14.70: Petili nakabela kahi. Hado hela, wanhu nawawele wemile aho nawamlojela Petili, “Twangukomya hegwe kwa yumwe wa hewo, mina hegwe kwa Mgalilaya.”
14.71: Ila Petili nakaluka kipanjila na kilaha yolonga, “Heni simzelele munhu ayu yomlingulonga mbuli za heye.”
14.72: Baho du, izogolo nalika lwa keli. Lelo Petili nakakumbuchila vila Yesu navyoyamlonjele, “Izogolo halineka lwa keli, kombela kadatu.” Petili nakagwa chifunama nakalila lukami.

15.1: Vyoifichile lufuku, watambika wakulu nawawika chitala na wasekulu na walangusa wa Malajizo ga Musa, nawamkowela Yesu wamhilichila Pilato.
15.2: Pilato nakamuuza Yesu yolonga, “Hegwe kwa mndewa wa Wayahudi?” Yesu nakedichila, nakalonga, “Ena, hegwe nakulonga.”
15.3: Watambika wakulu nawamvilizila Yesu mbuli nyinji.
15.4: Pilato nakamuuza kahi Yesu lwa keli, “Hambe ulonje chinhu? Ulole vyowokulonjeleza menji.”
15.5: Ila Yesu halonjile ne luzi, mbaka Pilato kabubuwala. Yesu kangutagusigwa kubagama (Matei 27:15-26; Lukasi 23:13-25; Yohana 18:39-19:16)
15.6: Chila mhela wa mnvina ya Pasaka, Pilato nakamchumulilaga munhu yumwe yawele mchinweng'ho yaganigwe na wanhu.
15.7: Lelo nakwali na munhu yawele yochemigwa Balaba, nayali yawichigwe mchinweng'ho hamwe na wanhu wanji kwa chiwalo cha kukopola.
15.8: Wanhu wenji nawamlutila Pilato womlanda yawaditile kota navyoyali yoditaga.
15.9: Pilato nakawauza yolonga, “Mwangugana ndimchumulile mndewa wa hemwe wa Wayahudi?”
15.10: Nakalonga ahyo kwa vila nakavizela kota watambika wakulu, nawamigala Yesu kwa heye kwa kumonela fihi hela.
15.11: Ila watambika wakulu nawawasonjeleza wanhu wamlande Pilato yawachumulile Balaba.
15.12: Pilato nakedichila kwa kuuza yolonga, “Ndimchumulile ayu mlingumchema mndewa wa Wayahudi?”
15.13: Wanhu weng'ha nawatowa iyowe kahi wolonga, “Mumuwambe ayo mumsalaba.”
15.14: Ila Pilato nakawauza, “Lekachoni? Nakadita choni chihile?” Ila hewo nawalutilila kutowa iyowe, “Muwambeni mumsalaba!”
15.15: Pilato nakagana kulinojeza alila likugusi lya wanhu, nakamchumulila Balaba kulawa mchinweng'ho. Nakalajiza Yesu yazapigwe ng'hobwa, hamba nakamlavya yawambigwe mumsalaba. Wamizi wangumbeza Yesu (Matei 27:27-31; Yohana 19:2-3)
15.16: Hamba wamizi nawamhilika Yesu kuli chitala, mng'handa ya mkulu wa Loma, nawakungajiza chilundo cheng'ha cha wamizi.
15.17: Nawamvaliza ikanzu lya chiundewa liwele na lanji ya zambalau, nawatowa ng'hata ya miwa ifandile kota chipembelo, nawamuwichila kumutwi.
15.18: Nawaluka kumlamsa wata, “Ulamche Mndewa wa Wayahudi!”
15.19: Nawamtowa na idenje kumutwi, nawamtemela mite, nawamfugamila na kumwinamila.
15.20: Lowasindile kumbeza, nawamvula lila ikanzu, nawamvalisa nguwo ya heye wamhilika kuza kumuwamba mumsalaba. Yesu kanguwambigwa mumsalaba (Matei 27:32-44; Lukasi 23:26-43; Yohana 19:17-27)
15.21: Nalowali mnzila, nawating'hana na munhu yumwe yalinguchemigwa Simoni, mwenyeng'haye wa Kilene. Heye nayali mhaza wa Alekizanda na Lufo, mhela awo nayali yolawa kumgunda kuza kuli muji. Lelo nawamlonjela yapiche msalaba wa Yesu kwa lupichi.
15.22: Hamba nawamhilika Yesu mbaka honhu hawele hochemigwa Goligota, hazeleche kota Izeje lya Mutwi.
15.23: Nawamha divai wahanzile na mikwandi ja kuhoza usungu, ila Yesu nakalema kunwa.
15.24: Nawamuwamba mumsalaba, nawegawila nguwo za heye kwa kuzitowela simbi leka wamhagule yalikohi yohola choni.
15.25: Nayali saa tatu mitondo howamuwambile Yesu mumsalaba.
15.26: Na nongwa ya Yesu nayandichigwa mchibao chiwichigwe mchanya mwa msalaba, “Mndewa wa Wayahudi.”
15.27: Hamwe na Yesu nawawawamba wabokaji weli, yumwe kumoso na yumwe kudilo kwa Yesu.
15.28: Aho nagenela Maandiko Matakatifu galingulonga, “Nakawichigwa hamwe na wehile.”
15.29: Wanhu nawowali wokola honhu aho, nawali wotigasa mitwi jawo na kulonga, “Nawali ulonga koigwisa ng'handa ya Nguluwi na kuizenga kwa mazuwa gadatu.”
15.31: Na hewo watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nawambeza walonga, “Heye nakawalohola wanji, ila kangulemwela kilohola yuye.
15.32: Hambi hegwe ndo Kilistu Mlohozi, Mndewa wa Isilaeli! Yeduliche kulawa mumsalaba leka tone na kukunda.” Na wanhu wala weli wawambigwe mumsalaba hamwe na heye nawamliga. Yesu kangubagama mumsalaba (Matei 27:45-56; Lukasi 23:44-49; Yohana 19:28-30)
15.33: Kulawa saa sita nemisi, mbaka saa tisa matinazo, isi yeng'ha nayali na jiza.
15.34: Loifichile saa tisa matinazo, Yesu nakalila kwa lizi likulu, nakalonga, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakitani?” Ilinguzeleka, “Nguluwi wa heni, Nguluwi wa heni, lekachoni nakundeka?”
15.35: Wanhu wenji nawamemile ahala, lowahuliche ahyo, nawalonga, “Mhulichize. Kangumchema Eliya.”
15.36: Munhu yumwe nakahola libofyabofya, nakadilizila mli divai na chinhu chiliusungu, nakawika kuli idenje nakamha Yesu yanwe aku yolonga, “Tulole kota Eliya kokuya kukulohola.”
15.38: Lelo ipaziya liwele mli ng'handa ya Nguluwi naligawanize honhu helile ng'hatu nalidejeka hagati kulawa kuchanya mbaka hanyi.
15.39: Mkulu wa wamizi nayawele ahala, vyoyawene Yesu vyoyabagame, nakalonga, “Kakomya ayu nayali Mwana wa Nguluwi.”
15.40: Nawali baho wadala wamwe wolola kwa kutali, yumwe wa awo yali, Maliya Madelena na Salome na Maliya mamo wa Yakubu mdodo na Yose.
15.41: Awa nawamuwinza Yesu naloyawele Galilaya na kumkolela mijito, nakwali na wadala wanji wenji woyile Yelusalemu hamwe na heye! Yesu kanguwichigwa mchilaga (Matei 27:57-61; Lukasi 23:50-56; Yohana 19:38-42)
15.42: Mhela wa matinazo nawali ufichile. Alyo nalyali zuwa lya kiwika goya, zuwa lilingulongola Zuwa lya Kwesela.
15.43: Aho nakoya Yusufu mwenyeng'haye wa Alimataya. Nayali munhu yumwe wa wanhu wakulu kuli chitala, nayali yobeteza kuya kwa Undewa wa Nguluwi. Lelo nakamlutila Pilato ne kudumba, nakalanda yapegwe lukuli lwa Yesu.
15.44: Pilato nakabubuwala heko vyoyahuliche kota Yesu kabagama. Lelo nakamchema mkulu wa wamizi, nakamuuza kota Yesu nakabagama hamuwa.
15.45: Pilato nakalonjelwa na mkulu yula wa wamizi kota Yesu nayali yabagame katali, nakamkundila Yusufu yahole lukuli lwa Yesu.
15.46: Aho Yusufu nakagula sanda iwele na utabuli uzelu, nakaudulisa hasi lukuli, nakahola sanda inojile ng'hatu na kufunjiliza lukuli na kaluta kuwika kuli chilaga chihongoligwe kuli italawe liwele kota mhalika. Nakalihejeza iganga hali lwizi.
15.47: Nawo Maliya Madelena na Maliya mayake Yose na nawahona aho honhu hoyatiligwe.

16.1: Zuwa lya Kwesela lolimalile, Maliya Madelena na Salome na Maliya mayake Yakubu, nawagula mafuta ga kunhunyhilila wakaubakalize lukuli lwa Yesu.
16.2: Lufuku zuwa lya Jumapili, nawafika kuli chilaga, isanya lyolwaluche kulawila.
16.3: Na hewo nawali wochilonjela, “Yalikohi yotuhejezela alila iganga hala hali lwizi lwa chilaga?” Nalyo nalyali ling'hangala lukami.
16.4: Nalyo nalyali ling'hangala lukami ila lowalolile, nawalyona iganga mina lihejezigwe hafungo.
16.5: Nalowenjile mchilaga, nawamona msongolo yumwe yavalile ikanzu izelu, yekale nzingo ya kudilo, nawabubuwala aku wodumba ng'hatu.
16.6: Ila ayo msongolo nakawalonjela, “Mleche kububuwala na kudumba. Mwangumpala Yesu yalawile Nasaleti yawambigwe mumsalaba. Kazilipuka, haduhu hano. Mlole honhu howamuwichile.
16.7: Lelo mlute mkawalonjele walanguswa wa heye hamwe na Petili. Nakawalongolani kula Galilaya. Ako momona kota vyoyawalonjele.”
16.8: Lelo nawalawa hala mchilaga wobilima, ena nawakakama kwa kudumba na kububuwala ng'hatu, nahawamlonjele munhu yoneche chinhu, kwa vila nawadumba lukami. Yesu kangumlawila Maliya Madelena (Matei 28:9-10; Yohana 20:11-18)
16.9: Yesu loyazilipuche kung'hali lufuku Jumapili, nakelajila tandi kwa Maliya Madelena, yula yalavigwe vijeni vihile saba.
16.10: Maliya Madelena nakaluta, nakuwalonjela wala wawele hamwe na Yesu na mhela awo nawali wolombocheza na kulila.
16.11: Ila nalowahuliche kota Yesu ka mkomu na kota Maliya Madelena nakamona, hawamkundile. Yesu kanguwalawila walanguswa weli (Lukasi 24:13-35)
16.12: Hamba Yesu nakawalawila walanguswa weli yawele vinji. Awo walanguswa nawali woluta kumgunda.
16.13: Na hewo kahi nawaluta kuwalonjela wayawo. Na hewo kahi hawakundile. Yesu kanguwalajiza walanguswa (Matei 28:16-20; Lukasi 24:36-49; Yohana 20:19-23; Madito 1:6-8)
16.14: Hamba Yesu nakawalawila awala walanguswa kumi na yumwe nalowawele wolya hamwe mchisaga. Nakawang'hanuchila lukami kwa chiwalo cha kuleka kukunda na ibamba lyawo, mina nahawawakundile wala wamuwene hala loyazilipuche.
16.15: Lelo nakawalonjela, “Mlute kuli isi zeng'ha mkadamle Mbuli Inojile kwa wanhu weng'ha.
16.16: Yalingukunda na kubatizigwa koloholigwa. Yohambe yakunde kotagusigwa kwa wihe.
16.17: Na ulajilo awu, wochibanda na wula wa wala walingukunda. Kwa itagwa lyangu wolavya vijeni na wolonga kwa ulonzi unyale.
16.18: Wone webate izoka ama wone wanwe chinhu choneche chiwele na dunga, haiwadita chinhu chihile hebu. Wowawichila moko watamwa, nawo wowa wakomu.” Yesu kaguholigwa kuchanya kuka kilanga (Lukasi 24:50-53)
16.19: Mkulu Yesu loyasindile kulonga nawo, nakaholigwa kuka kilanga, nakekala nzingo ya kudilo kwa Nguluwi.
16.20: Walanguswa wa Yesu nawaluta wodamla chila honhu. Mkulu nakadita mijito hamwe nawo na kwimiza nzinzili usenga awo kwa ulajilo uwele hamwe na hewo.

1.1: Mkulu Teofili, Wanhu wenji wadita kota vila vyowadahile kwandika vinhu vila vilawile hagati hahetwe.
1.2: Nawandika vinhu vyotulonjelwe na awala waviwene avyo kwa meho ga hewo kulawa kwaluche na kudamla Mbuli Inojile.
1.3: Ahyo mkulu Teofili, lekachoni na heni ndola goya vinhu avyo vyeng'ha kulawa kwaluche, nambona hata heni ndikwandichile goya vila vilawile.
1.4: Ndangudita hino leka hegwe nagwe uvizele kukomya kweng'ha kuli vinhu vyoulanguswe. Kuleligwa kwa Yohani kwangudamuligwa
1.5: Mihela Helodi loyali mndewa wa Yudeya, kwali na mtambika yumwe itagwa lyake Sakaliya, heye nayali mchilundo cha watambika cha Abiya. Mdala wa heye nakachemigwa Elisabeti, heye nayali wa lukolo lwa mtambika Aluni.
1.6: Weng'ha weli watanganiche hali meho ga Nguluwi, wochikala kwa kuwinza vyoyolonga na kulajiza Mkulu Nguluwi.
1.7: Nawalihela mwana, lekachoni Elisabeti nayali mhende, na weng'ha weli wali walalile lukami.
1.8: Zuwa limwe Sakaliya nayali yodita mijito ja kutambika kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, lekachoni nayali nzamu ya heye ya kulavya nhambiko.
1.9: Kota vyoili chihendo cha watambika, simbi imgubuchila Sakaliya kwinjila Ng'handa ya Mkulu kufunyiza ubani.
1.10: Wanhu wenji wali wamemile kunze wolanda Nguluwi mhela awo wa kufunyiza ubani.
1.11: Hamba mhilisi wa Mkulu Nguluwi kamlawila Sakaliya, kema kudilo kwa honhu ha kulavila nhambiko ha kufunyiza ubani.
1.12: Sakaliya loyamuwene, nakatinuka vibi, yokakama aku yodumba.
1.13: Ila mhilisi wa kilanga nakamlonjela, “Sakaliya, uleche kudumba! Nguluwi kahulika kulanda kwa hegwe. Mdala wa hegwe Elisabeti kokulelela mwana mlume, hegwe kompa itagwa Yohani.
1.14: Hegwe kosangalala na kusechelela ng'hatu, na wanhu wenji wosechelela kuleligwa heye.
1.15: Kowa mng'hangala hali Mkulu. Honwa divai wala chinhu chigazaga. Komema Muhe Yelile kulawa mmunda mwa mamo wa heye.
1.16: Kowahilusa wanhu wenji wa Isilaeli wampale Mkulu, Nguluwi wa hewo.
1.17: Komlongolela Mkulu, kowa na mong'ho na ludali lwa mloli wa Nguluwi, Eliya, kowadita wahaza na wana wegane. Kowagalamla wanhu wohambe wamkunde Nguluwi wawe na majesa gatanganiche, na kuwakola wanhu wekale goya kumbochela Mkulu.”
1.18: Sakaliya nakamuuza ayo mhilisi wa kilanga, “Hino ndovizela ndaze kota mbuli ayi yakukomya? Heni ndala, na mdala wa heni kalala.”
1.19: Yula mhilisi wa kilanga nakamlonjela, “Heni Gabulieli, ndilingwima hali Nguluwi. Heye ndo yanhumile kuya kulonga na hegwe na kukulonjela mbuli ayi inojile.
1.20: Ila kwa vila hambe ukunde mbuli ayi yoilawila kwa mihela jake, kolemwela kulonga mbaka ago gondikulonjele, galawile.”
1.21: Mhela awo, wala wanhu wali wombeta Sakaliya, wabubuwala vyoyali yokawila kulawa mli Ng'handa ng'hulu ya Nguluwi.
1.22: Vyoyalawile kunze ya Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakalemwela kulonga nawo, ahyo nawavizela kona maono mla mng'handa ya Nguluwi. Kwa vila nayali yolemwela kulonga, ila yaliyolajila na moko.
1.23: Mhela wa heye wa kudita mijito kuli Ng'handa ng'hulu ya Nguluwi lo umalile, kahiluka kaye.
1.24: Hamba kuli mazuwa mado, mhazwa wa heye Elisabeti kawa na himila, kekala haluga mg'handa myezi jihano. Kalonga,
1.25: “Mkulu kanditila aga. Sambi kandajila isungu lya heye. Kambusila soni iwele na heni hali wanhu.” Kuleligwa kwa Yesu kwangudamligwa
1.26: Kuli mwezi wa sita wa himila ya Elisabeti, Nguluwi kamlajiza mhilisi wa kilanga yalinguchemigwa Gabulieli, yalute kuli muji ulinguchemigwa Nasaleti, kuli isi ya Galilaya.
1.27: Nakoya kwa mhinza yumwe yalinguchemigwa Maliya, yabanichilwe na munhu yumwe itagwa lyake Yusufu wa lukolo lwa mndewa Daudi.
1.28: Mhilisi wa kilanga nakaluta kwa heye, kamlamusa, “Kulamka! Mkulu Nguluwi kahamwe na hegwe, naheye kakutambichiza ng'hatu!”
1.29: Maliya loyahuliche luzi awo, nakesinza lukami, kaza ngijesa mnhumbula ya heye, kulamsa aku kwa ndaze?
1.30: Ila yula mhilisi wa kilanga nakamlonjela, “Maliya, uleche kudumba! Nguluwi kakugalila kunoga kwa heye.
1.31: Ahino, kowa na himila, hamba kolela mwana wa udewele mlume na komchemela itagwa Yesu.
1.32: Heye kowa mng'hangala na kochemigwa Mwana wa Nguluwi nayali kuchanya ng'hatu. Mkulu Nguluwi komdita yawe mndewa kota vyoyali sekulu wa heye Daudi.
1.33: Kowa mndewa wa lukolo lwa Yakubu kolutilila, na undewa wa heye wowa hela kuduma!”
1.34: Maliya nakamlonjela mhilisi wa kilanga, “Heni, sinating'hana na mlume. Lelo ago gowa ndaze?”
1.35: Yula mhilisi wa kilanga nakamlonjela, “Muhe Yelile kokudulichila, na mong'ho wa Nguluwi lokugubika. Kwa mbuli ayo, mwana yelile yoleligwa kochemigwa, Yelile mwana wa Nguluwi.
1.36: Ulole, Elisabeti mng'holoze heye! Wanhu nawamchemile mhende, leka sambi kana himila ya myezi sita, nakulala koyalalile.
1.37: Mina kwa Nguluwi kuduhuli mbuli iwele ngulemwelwa.”
1.38: Maliya kalonga “Heni nda chitumagwa wa Mkulu, iwe kota vyoulonjile.” Hamba yula mhilisi wa kilanga nakoka. Maliya kangumjendela Elisabeti
1.39: Logakolile mazuwa mado, Maliya nakawoha majendo kuluta himahima mbaka mji umwe, uwele mchidunda cha Yuda.
1.40: Ako nakenjila mng'handa ya Sakaliya, kamlamsa Elisabeti.
1.41: Elisabeti lowahuliche kulamusa kwa Maliya, chali chitigasika mmunda mwa heye. Elisabeti kamemezwa Muhe Yelile,
1.42: na heye kalonga kwa lizi likulu, “Kutambichizwa kusinda wadala weng'ha, na mwana youmulela kotambichizwa.
1.43: Heni nda whaani, leka mamo wa Mkulu wa heni yanjendele?
1.44: Lonyhuliche ulamso wa hegwe, chali mmunda mwa heni chitagasika kwa kusangalala.
1.45: Kutambichizwa ng'hatu hegwe kwa kukunda mbuli ya Mkulu, kwa vila yowa ikomya kwa gala Mkulu goyakulonjile hegwe!” Lwimbo lwa maliya.
1.46: Maliya kalonga, “Nhumbula ya heni yangumutogola Mkulu,
1.47: na muhe wa heni wangusangalala kwa Mbuli ya Nguluwi mlohozi wa heni,
1.48: Lekachoni kang'humbuka, chitumagwa wa heye yaholile! Kulawa sambi na kulutilila, wanhu weng'ha wonyhema mtambichizwa,
1.49: kwa vinhu vikulu Nguluwi vyoyaditile. Itagwa lya Nguluwi lyela.
1.50: Kulawa ulelo awu na kulutilila, kawalajila Isungu weng'ha walingumdumba heye.
1.51: Kadita mbuli ng'hulu kwa moko wa heye. Kawasambalula wali na mnvimnvi majesa ga mnhumbula za hewo.
1.52: Kawadulisa wandewa kulawa mvigoda vya hewo vya undewa, nakawakwiniza wala waholile.
1.53: Wali na nzala kawagutiza vinhu vinojile, wali na lufufu kawaleka walute moko yeng'ha.
1.54: Kambochela Isilaeli chitumagwa wa heye, yokumbuka isungu lyake.
1.55: Kota vonawalongane na wakulu wa hetwe, Abulahamu na ulelo wa heye mazuwa gose.”
1.56: Maliya nakekala na Elisabeti myezi jidatu, hamba kahiluka kaye kwa heye. Kuleligwa kwa Yohani Mbatiza
1.57: Mhela wa Elisabeti kulela naufika, kalela mwana mlume.
1.58: Wanhu wahabehi na haluga hake nawahulika Mkulu Nguluwi kamonela isungu ng'hatu, nawasangalala hamwe na heye.
1.59: Hamba mazuwa nane nagafika ga kumwinjiza yula mwana ikumbi, wazangugana kumchemela itagwa lya mhaza wa heye, Sakaliya.
1.61: Wamlonjela, “Lekachoni haduhu munhu mlukolo lwenu, yalinguchemigwa itagwa ali?”
1.62: Wamgodeza mhaza wa mwana yalonje, mwanage yapegwe itagwa lyachi.
1.63: Heye kalanda chibao cha kwandika kandika hino, Yohani ndo itagwa lyake, weng'ha wekala wabubuwale.
1.64: Bahala umyango na mlomo wa Sakaliya ugubuka kazangulonga kahi yomtogola Nguluwi.
1.65: Woga nauwenjila wanhu weng'ha wa hala habehi, na mbuli azo zenela chila honhu mchidunda cha Yudeya.
1.66: Weng'ha wahuliche mbuli ayo, nawejesa mnhumbula zawo wolonga, mwana ayu kowa ndaze? Mana loneka ludali lwa Mkulu Nguluwi lwali hamwe na heye. Lwimbo lwa Sakaliya
1.67: Sakaliya, mhaza wa Yohani, kamemezwa Muhe Yelile, kazangulonga lizi lya Nguluwi.
1.68: Yatogolwe Mkulu Nguluwi wa Isilaeli, kawoyela na kuwagombola wanhu wa heye.
1.69: Katugalila mlohozi mkulu nayali na ludali, lukolo lwa Daudi mtumigwa wa heye.
1.70: Na katulonjela aho katali kukolela kuli waloli wa heye welile.
1.71: Hino kotulohola mmoko mwa watwihilwe hetwe, na kulawa mmoko mwa wanhu weng'ha wehile.
1.72: Kalonga kowonela isungu wakulu wa hetwe, na kukumbuchila ilagano lyelile.
1.74: Kutulohola mmoko mwa wanhu watwihilwe, tuwafugamile ne kudumba,
1.75: Tuwe welile na watanganiche hali heye, mazuwa geng'ha ga ukomu wa hetwe.
1.76: Na hegwe go mwana wa heni, kochemigwa mloli wa Mkulu Nguluwi nayali kuchanya ng'hatu, komlongola Nguluwi mwana komgongomanyila nzila,
1.77: kowatagusila wanhu kota woloholigwa, na kusilwa gehile gowaditile.
1.78: Nguluwi wa hetwe kana isungu. Kotusomolela lumuli lya ulohozi lituyila kulawa kuchanya.
1.79: Nakuwamwesela weng'ha wekale kutitu kuli kwaga, na yalongoze migulu ja hetwe mnzila ya kikala goya.
1.80: Mwana kakula na ludali mli Muhe. Nekekala kugunuche mbaka loyelajile kwa wanhu wa Isilaeli.

2.1: Zuwa lila mndewa wa Loma Agusto nakalajiza, yogana wanhu weng'ha wa isi ila wawazigwe.
2.2: Kuwazigwa ako kwali kulongole, mhela Kulenio loyali mkulu wa Siliya.
2.3: Weng'ha nawaluta kuza kuwazigwa, chila munhu kaye koyekalaga.
2.4: Yusufu nakalawa muji wa Nasaleti kuli isi ya Galilaya nakaluta muji wa Betelehemu ya mkowa wa Yudeya koyaleligwe mndewa Daudi. Yusufu nakaluta ako kwa vila nayali wa lukolo lwa Daudi.
2.5: Nakaluta kuza wazigwa hamwe na mchewake Maliya heye Maliya nayali na himila.
2.6: Lowali ako zuwa lyake lya kulela Maliya nalifika,
2.7: nakalela mwana wa mwaluko wa udewele mlume, kamvika vibende vya chiwhana na kumuwasiliza mulibani lya kulisila misenga. Kwa vila nawahusa honhu ha kuwasa kuli ng'handa za wajenzi. Wadimi na Wahilisi
2.8: Honhu aho kwali na wadimi wochikala meho hamihe wololela migongolo jowafujile kwa kibochelela.
2.9: Mhilisi wa mkulu kawalawila ne kulonga, na ukulu wa Nguluwi uwamwesela nzingo zeng'ha wadumba.
2.10: Mhilisi wa kilanga nakawalonjela, “Mleche kudumba ikugalilani Mbuli Inojile iwoyele wanhu weng'ha.
2.11: Kwa vila, lehano kuli honhu ha Daudi, kaleligwa mlohozi kwa mbuli ya hemwe yuye Kilistu mkulu mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi.
2.12: Achi chokulajilani hemwe mochifika chali chivalizigwe nguwo za chiwana yawasilizwe hali honhu ha kudila misenga.
2.13: Baho chilundo chikulu cha wahilisi wa kilanga chilongozwa na ahyo mhilisi, wazangumtogola Nguluwi wolonga.”
2.14: “Tumtogole Nguluwi wa kilanga, kikala goya muisi kuli wanhu yawaganile!”
2.15: Bahala mhilisi wa kilanga nakoka na kuhiluka kilanga, wadimaji wazangilonjela. “Tucheni mbaka Betelehemu tukalilole ali lilawile lyotulonjelwe na Mkulu.”
2.16: Waluta wobilima, wamfika Maliya na Yusufu na yula mwana yawasilizwe honhu ha kulisila misenga,
2.17: Awo wadimi lowamuwene ayo mwana wawalonjela wayao mbuli yowahuliche ya ayo mwana.
2.18: Weng'ha wahuliche ago wekala mlomo mwazi mbuli zowalonjelwe na awo wadimi.
2.19: Ila Maliya nakagawika na kijesa aga geng'ha mnhumbula ya heye.
2.20: Wala wadimi wahiluka kaye kowekalaga kuno womtogola Nguluwi kwa geng'ha gowahuliche na kugona, geng'ha gawa hihila kota vowalonjelwe. Mwana kangupegwa itagwa
2.21: Mazuwa nane logafichile ga kumwinjiza ikumbi ayo mwana, nakapegwa itagwa lilila lya Yesu lyonayapeligwe na mhilisi wa kilanga yang'hali hola nyinda. Yesu kangulavigwa kumwando kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi
2.22: Mazuwa logafichile ga Maliya na Yusufu za kuhovugwa kota voiganigwe na malajizo ga Musa, wakulu awo nawamuhola yula mwana waluta naye Yelusalemu wamuwiche kumwando kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi.
2.23: Mli mzilo wa mkulu yandichigwa. “Chila mwana mlume yalongole kuleligwa, yalavigwe kwa Mkulu.”
2.24: Kahi nawaluta wakalavye nhambiko, ng'hunda mbili kota mzilo wa Mkulu Nguluwi vyoulingulonga.
2.25: Mihela ajo ako Yelusalemu kwali na munhu yumwe, nayali yanojile na yalingumdumba Nguluwi itagwa lyake Simoni, heye yaliyobeteza ulohozi wa Isilaeli. Muhe Yelile nayali hamwe na heye.
2.26: Muhe Yelile naimtawiza kota hobagama hebu mbaka yamone Kilistu wa Mkulu.
2.27: Yolongozwa na Muhe Yelile, Simoni nakenjila kuli luga lwa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, wahaza wa Yesu wamgala mwana wa hewo wamditile kota vyoilinguganigwa na malajizo ga Musa,
2.28: Simoni nakambochela ayo mwana mmoko mwa heye kuno yomtogola Nguluwi yolonga,
2.29: “Lelo Nguluwi Mkulu kudita choulonjile, mkundize chitumagwa wa hegwe yalute kwa kikala goya.
2.30: Mina kwa meho gangu ndiwona ulohozi wa hegwe,
2.32: alu ndo lumuli louwamwesele wanhu wa isi, na ukulu kwa wanhu wa hegwe Isilaeli.”
2.33: Mhaza wa Yesu na mayake newekala mlomo mwazi kwa ulonzi woyaliyolonga Simeoni kuli yula mwana.
2.34: Simoni kamtambichiza nakamlonjela Maliya mayake ayu mwana kahaguligwa na Nguluwi kuwifya na kigala ulohozi, kowalohola wanhu wenji wa Isilaeli. Heye kowa ulajilo wa chinhu chilemigwa na wanhu.
2.35: Majesa ga wanhu wenji gozangoneka hazelu usungu uwele ukali kota ipanga woihoma nhumbula ya hegwe.
2.36: Hali na munhu yumwe yatumigwe mdala itagwa lyake Ana mhinza wa Fanueli wa nhanzi ya Asheli. Nekekala na mlume mihela saba kulawa loyaholigwe.
2.37: Nakekala nayali hela mlume mbaka mihela ajo yawele mng'hangala wa miyaka makumi nane na gane mihela ajo jeng'ha nekekala hali Ng'handa ya Nguluwi yokwesela kulya na kulanda nemisi na nechilo,
2.38: Mihela jijo kalawa kumwando kamtogola Nguluwi na kudamla mbuli za ayo mwana kwa wanhu weng'ha awala wali wobeteza ugombozi wa Yelusalemu. Kuhiluka Nasaleti
2.39: Maliya na Yusufu lowaditile geng'ha gowalonjeligwe na mzilo wa Mkulu Nguluwi, wahiluka kaye kwawo Nasaleti wilaya ya Galilaya.
2.40: Mwana kakula kawa na ludali na luhala lukami, kunoga kwa Nguluwi kwali na heye. Yesu mung'handa ya Nguluwi
2.41: Chila mhela wahaza wa Yesu nawazowela kuluta Yelusalemu wone iwe mnvina ya Pasaka.
2.42: Yesu navyoyali na miyaka kumi na mili weng'ha waluta kuli mnvina vowazowele,
2.43: Mnvina loimalile nawaluka kuhiluka kaye kwawo, ila msongolo Yesu nakapona Yelusalemu ne wahaza wa heye kuvizela.
2.44: Nawavizela nayali hamwe na chilundo cha wanhu wawele ngilongoza, wajenda misi yeng'ha, hamba waluka kumpala hali wanhu yoyawazowele.
2.45: Lowawene hambe wamone nawahiluka Yelusalemu wompala.
2.46: Zuwa lya kadatu nawamfika kuli luga lwa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi hamwe na walangusa wa malajizo yowahulichiza na kuwauza mbuli.
2.47: Weng'ha wahuliche ulonzi wa heye wekala mlomo mwazi luhala loyali nalo kwa kwidichila gowali womuuza.
2.48: Wahaza wake lowamuwene wekala mlomo mwazi. Mayake kamuuza, “Gwa gomwana lekachoni kutuditila ahi? Mhaza wa hegwe na heni twali tukupala kwa isungu.”
2.49: Heye kawalonjela, “Lekachoni mnzengumala? Hamvizelele nanganigwa ndikale mng'handa ya Mhaza wa heni?”
2.50: Wahaza wa heye hawavizelele chila choyali yowalonjela.
2.51: Yesu kahiluka hamwe mbaka aho Nasaleti, kawahulika. Mayake kawika geng'ha gala mnhumbula.
2.52: Yesu kakula kwa lukuli na kwa luhala na kwakumnojeza Nguluwi na kuwanojeza wanhu kahi.

3.1: Yali miyaka ja kumi na jihano ja undewa wa Kaizali Tibeliyo na Pontio Pilato nayali yolongoza honhu ha Yudeya na Helodi nayali yolongoza honhu ha Galilaya na mng'holoze Filipo nayali yolongoza honhu ha Itulea hamwe na honhu ha Tlakoniti, hamba Lusania nayali yolongoza honhu ha Abilene kahi.
3.2: Anasi na Kayafa wali watambika wakulu. Mihela ajo lizi lya Nguluwi nalimuyila Yohani mwanage Sakaliya kuli honhu hagunuche.
3.3: Yohani nakaluta mweng'ha mla mbakane na lwanda lwa Yolodani. Kazangulangusa wanhu, mumgalamchile Nguluwi na kubatizigwa leka Nguluwi yawosele gehile.
3.4: Vyoyandichigwe mchitabu cha mloli Isaya, “Lizi lya munhu lyanguchema hagunuche, ‘Mgongomanyileni Mkulu nzila ya heye, mgolole nzila za heye ya kukola.
3.5: Hagwile howa hatiligwe, mla mwinuche mowa muselegwe, habinuche howa hagoloswe, nzila zihile zowa zigoloswe.
3.6: Na weng'ha womona Nguluwi yowalohola wanhu!’ ”
3.7: Wanhu wenji wali wokuya hala kubatizwa na Yohani na heye kazanguwalonjela, “Hemwe lulelo lwa izoka, yalikohi yowadeteleza kota moibilima ng'halazi ya Nguluwi ilihabehi kuya?
3.8: Mlajile kwa madito kota mumgalamchila Nguluwi. Mleche kwaluka sambi kota moibilima ng'halazi ya Nguluwi kwa kulonga, mhaza wa hetwe Abulahamu. Ndanguwalonjelani ng'hatu, Nguluwi kana ludali lwa kugagalula aga maganga gawe wana wa Abulahamu.
3.9: Iwago liwichigwa goya kuli mizabi ja igodi. Chila mgodi wohambe ulele mafuza ganojile, wotemangwa na kutajigwa mchiluli.”
3.10: Wala wanhu wamemile wamuuza, lelo tudite choni?
3.11: Nakawedichila, “Yawele na migwanda mili yamgawile nayali hela, hihyo nayali na ndiya yadite hiho.”
3.12: Wakongoza sendi nawo woya kubatizigwa, wamuuza, “Mlangusa tudite ndaze?”
3.13: Heye nakawalonjela, “Mleche konjeza kuhola chila chima chiwichigwe.”
3.14: Wamizi nawo wamuuza, “Hetwe natwe tudite choni? Kawedichila, mleche kuhola chinhu cha munhu kwa ludali kahi ne kumtagusa munhu kwa udesi, chikukwileni chila cho mpegwa.”
3.15: Weng'ha wali wobeteza chinhu chimwenga, waluka kiuza mnhumbula za hewo zilingumlapa Yohani. Wazanguvizela heye ndo Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi.
3.16: Baho Yohani kawalonjela weng'ha, “Heni ndanguwabatiza kwa mazi, ila kanguya myangu nayali na ludali kusinda heni. Sijeza kudohola ng'weso za makwamba ga heye. Heye kowa yobatiza kwa Muhe Yelile na kwa chiluli.
3.17: Heye kana luhelo lwa kuyugulila nyhadikwa, yalunde uhemba kuli ng'hano, na mibadu kojisoma kwa chiluli hambe chizime.”
3.18: Hamwe na luzi lwinji, Yohani nakawahimiliza wanhu yowadamlila Mbuli Inojile.
3.19: Ila Yohani nakamdeuza mndewa Helodi, kamuwala, nakamhola Helodiya mdala wa mng'holoze na kumdita mdala wa heye, hamba nakadita ganji menji gehile.
3.20: Kahi Helodi nakadita chinhu chinji chihile kwa kumuhindila Yohani mchinweng'ho. Yesu kangubatizigwa (Matei 3:13-17; Malichi 1:9-11)
3.21: Wanhu weng'ha lowabatizigwe, Yesu naye nakabatizigwa. Hoyali yomlanda Nguluwi, ulanga naugubuligwa,
3.22: Muhe Yelile imlagalila kota ng'hunda na lihulikwa lizi kulawa kilanga ilonga, “Hegwe ndo mwanangu ndikuganile, nojezwa na hegwe.” Lukolo lwa Yesu (Matei 1:1-17)
3.23: Yesu loyaluche kukola mijito, nayali na miyaka makumi gadatu, wanhu wali wochijesa heye mwana wa Yusufu mwanage Heli.
3.24: Heli nayali mwanage Matati na Matati nayali mwanage Lawi na Lawi nayali mwanage Meleki na Meleki nayali mwanage Yanai na Yanai nayali mwanage Yusufu,
3.25: Yusufu nayali mwanage Matasia na Matasia nayali mwanage Amosi na Amosi nayali mwanage Nahumu na Nahumu nayali mwanage Hesili na Hesili nayali mwanage Nagai,
3.26: Nagai nayali mwanage Maati na Maati nayali mwanage Matasia na Matasia nayali mwanage Shemeni na Shemeni nayali mwanage Yoseki na Yoseki nayali mwanage Yuda,
3.27: Yuda nayali mwanage Yoanani na Yohanini nayali mwanage Lisa na Lisa nayali mwanage Selubabeli nayali mwanage Shatieli na Sheatieli nayali mwanage Neli,
3.28: Neli nayali mwanage Meliki na Meliki nayali mwanage Adi nayali mwanage Kosamu na Kosamu nayali mwanage Elimadamu na Elimadamu nayali mwange Eli,
3.29: Eli yula nayali mwanage Yoshuwa na Yoshuwa nayali mwanage Elieseli na Elieseli nayali mwanage Yolimu na Yolimuyali mwanage Matati na Matati nayali mwanage Lawi,
3.30: na Lawi nayali mwanage Simeoni na Simeoni nayali mwanage Yudasi na Yudasi nayali mwanage Yusufu na Yusufu nayali mwanage Yonamu na Yonamu nayali mwanage Eliakimu,
3.31: na Eliakimu nayali mwanage Melea na Melea nayali mwanage Mena, na Mena nayali mwanage matata na Matata nayali mwanage Natani na Natani nayali mwanage Daudi,
3.32: na Daudi nayali mwanage Jese na Jese nayali mwanage Obedi na Obedi nayali mwanage Boasi na Boasi nayali mwanage Salimoni na Salimoni nayali mwanage Nashoni,
3.33: na Nashoni nayali mwanage Aminadabu, na Aminadabu nayali mwanage Alini na Alini nayali mwanage Hesiloni na Hesiloni nayali mwanage Pelesi na Pelesi nayali mwanage Yudasi,
3.34: Na Yudasi nayali mwanage Yakubu na Yakubu nayali mwanage Isaka na Isaka nayali mwanage Abulahamu, na Abulahamu nayali mwanage Tela na Tela nayali mwanage Naholi,
3.35: Na Naholi nayali mwanage Selugi, na Selugi nayali mwanage Leu na Leu nayali mwanage Pelagi na Pelegi nayali mwanage Ebeli na Ebeli nayali mwanage Sala,
3.36: na Sala nayali mwanage Kainamu, na Kainamu nayali mwanage Afakisadi na Afakisadi nayali mwanage Shemu na Shemu nayali mwanage Nuhu na Noa nayali mwanage Lameki,
3.37: Na Lameki nayali mwanage Metusela na Metusela nayali mwanage Henoki na Henoki nayali mwanage Yaledi na Yaledi nayali mwanage Mahalaleli na Mahalaleli nayali mwanage Kainamu.
3.38: Na Kainamu nayali mwanage Enoshi na Enoshi nayali mwanage Seti na Seti nayali mwanage Adamu na Adamu nayali mwana wa Nguluwi.

4.1: Yesu kalawa mlwanda lwa Yolodani yamemile Muhe Yelile, na Muhe ayo kamlongoza mbaka kugunuche.
4.2: Ako nakajezigwa na Limazoga mazuwa makumi gane. Mazuwa ago geng'ha hadile chinhu choneche chila, na logamalile mazuwa ago, kaihulika nzala
4.3: Limazoga limlonjela, “Wone uwele Mwanage Nguluwi, lilonjele iganga lino ligaluke kuwa ibumunda.”
4.4: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Yandichigwa, ‘Munhu howa mkomu kwa ibumunda hela.’ ”
4.5: Hamba Limazoga limhola mbaka kuchanya ng'hatu na kamlajila undewa weng'ha uli muisi.
4.6: Nabaho Limazoga limlonjela Yesu, “Ndokupa undewa na ludali lwa vinhu vyeng'ha vino, kwa vila vinhu vyeng'ha vya heni, na ndoweza kumha yeng'ha yula yondanda.
4.7: Avi vyeng'ha vyowa vya hegwe, wone ufugamile heni.”
4.8: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Yandichigwa, ‘Umfugamile Mkulu, Nguluwi wa hegwe na umditile heye yaliyeka.’ ”
4.9: Na baho Limazoga limhola Yesu mbaka Yelusalemu limkwiniza kuli ludandalo lwa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, limlonjela, “Kota uwele Mwana wa Nguluwi wilagaze kulawa hano mbaka hasi.
4.10: Kwa vila yandichigwa, ‘Nguluwi kowalajiza wahilisi wa kilanga wa heye wakwamilile.’
4.11: Na, ‘Hewo wokuhola mmoko mwawo, leka uleche kikwang'hwala magulu ga hegwe mmiganga.’ ”
4.12: Hamba Yesu nakamwidichila, “Yandichigwa, ‘Uleche kumjeza Mkulu Nguluwi wa hegwe.’ ”
4.13: Limazoga vyolisindile kumjeza chila nzila, hamba kamleka mbaka mhela ukundigwe. Yesu kangwaluka mijito ga heye ako Galilaya (Matei 4:12-17; Malichi 1:14-15)
4.14: Nabaho Yesu kahiluka Galilaya yawele yamemile mong'ho wa Muhe Yelile, mbuli za heye zenela Galilaya na kuli isi zeng'ha zilihabehi.
