16.17: Ila isi yeng'ha na kilanga vyokusigwa chimdawalo hela kusinda helufi imwe ya malajizo gandichigwe kusigwa.
16.18: “Yoneche yamleche mchewake na kuhola yunji, mng'hondwa, na yoneche nayali kumhola mdala yalechigwe mng'hondwa. Munhu nayawele na lufufu na Lasalo
16.19: “Kwali na munhu yumwe nayali na lufufu, nayali yovala mivalo ja sendi nyinji ng'hatu na kitani chinojile na kudita mnvina chila yokwinuka.
16.20: Kahi kwali na munhu yumwe nayali nguchemigwa Lasalo, yula nayali na vilonda lukuli lweng'ha nayali womigala mli lwizi lwa yula nayali na lufufu.
16.21: Nakaganaga yalye usanyangwa uwele ngulagala kulawa mli mchisanya ya yula nayali na lufufu, na ganji, mibwa jali jikuya jimyanga vilonda vya heye!
16.22: “Lelo yula munhu nayali hela chinhu kaholigwa na Nguluwi, mhilisi wa kilanga nakamhola, kekala habehi na Abulahamu na yula nayali na lufufu kaga, nakatiligwa.
16.23: Na yula nayali na lufufu yawele yogazigwa kula kuli isi ya wabagame, kenula meho ga heye, kamona Abulahamu kwa kutali na Lasalo yekale hafungo.
16.24: Hamba kachema kwa lizi, ‘Mhaza Abulahamu, mbonele isungu, mlonjele Lasalo yadolize chidole cha heye mli mazi yahoze umyango wa heni mina ndangugazigwa kuno kuli chiluli.’
16.25: “Ila Abulahamu nakedichila, ‘Kumbuche mwanangu hegwe na kupegwa ganojile lowali uchikala muisi, na Lasalo nakabochela gehile. Lelo heye kanguhozigwa na hegwe kwangugazigwa.
16.26: Ila na ago geng'ha, hotuli hetwe na komli hemwe hawichigwa ikulubila ikulu, ili wawele ngugana kuya kumuli kulawa kuno walemwele, na wawele komuli walemwele kuya kuno kotuli.’
16.27: Ayo nayali na lufufu nakalonga, ‘Lelo mhaza Abulahamu ndangukulanda umlajize yalute kaye kuli ng'handa ya mhaza wa heni.
16.28: Mina ndina wang'holozangu wahano yalute yawakanye waleche kuya kuno kuli kugazigwa.’
16.29: “Ila Abulahamu nakamlonjela, ‘Wang'holozo wanago Maandiko Matakatifu ga Musa na waloli wanji wa Nguluwi wowalonjela ago, waleche wawahulichize hewo chowolonga.’
16.30: Ila heye nakalonga, ‘Hebu mhaza Abulahamu! Ila wone munhu yazilipuche kulawa wanhu wajile na kuwalutila, womgalamchila Nguluwi.’
16.31: Heye Abulahamu nakalonga, ‘Wone hambe wagasome Gandichigwe ga Musa na waloli wanji wa Nguluwi, howojesa hebu! Wone yalute yazilipuche kulawa wanhu wabagame!.’ ”

17.1: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela wala walanguswa wa heye, “Havileka kulawila vinhu vilingujeza wanhu kudita gehile, ila kochona yula yojeza.
17.2: Naigana yafunjigwe iganga likulu lya lwala msingo na kutozigwa mli mlwanda, kuleka heye kumwambuza munhu yumwe wa awa wadodo kuwifya.
17.3: Milolele! Wone mng'holozo yakuditile gehile mdeuze, wone yakunde kumgalamchila Nguluwi, yamgalachile.
17.4: Kahila wone yakuzudize mala saba kwa zuwa limwe na yohiluchila kouli yolonga, ‘Ndimgalamchila Nguluwi,’ goya yakundile.” Makundo
17.6: Heye mkulu nakawedichila, Wone makundo ga hemwe na gawe mado kota nyhule ndodo ya haladali, mwahajezile kulilonjela ali igodi lya Mfolosadi ng'holeche ukenjile mli lwanda, nawo wawahuliche. Mijito ya chitumagwa
17.7: “Tulonje hemwe munhu yumwe kana chitumagwa nayali ngukola mijto ya kumgunda ama kangudima ming'holo lelo yohiluka kulawa kumgunda, komlonjela ayo chitumagwa himahima uye ulye ndiya?
17.8: Hebu! Komlonjela nhelechele ndiya wikale ung'holela mijito mbaka londisinda kulya na kunwa, ndo nagwe ulye.
17.9: Homnonela ayo mpogozi kwa vila nakakola goyalonjelwe.
17.10: Na hemwe namwe wone mdite gomlonjelwe, mlonje, ‘Hetwe wapogozi wohambe tupegwe chinhu, tukola gala gotulonjelwe tukole hela.’ ” Yesu kanguwalohola watamwa kumi.
17.11: Yesu loyali yojenda kuza Yelusalemu nakakola mmbaka mwa Samaliya na Galilaya.
17.12: Loyali yokwinjila mli chijiji chimwe, naketing'ha na wanhu kumi wali na uswema, wemile kutali.
17.13: Wachemeleza lizi wolonga, “Yesu mlangusa tonele isungu!”
17.14: Loyawawene nakawalonjela, “Mlute mkelajile kwa watambika.” Lowaliwoluta, nawona kuhovujigwa.
17.15: Myawo yumwe yonile nakoselwa mayamwa, kahiluka kamtogola Nguluwi kwa lizi ing'hangala.
17.16: Ketoza kumwando kuli magulu ga Yesu kuno yomnonela. Ayo nayali Msamalia.
17.17: Aho Yesu nakalonga, “Nandisile matamwa mwali kumi? Wala tisa wakohi?
17.18: Haduhuli yunji yahiluche kumtogola Nguluwi ila ayu mjenzi yaliyeng'ha?”
17.19: Yesu nakamlonjela yula munhu, “Winuche, ulute, makundo gako gakulohola.” Kuya kwa Undewa wa Nguluwi (Matei 24:23-28,37-41)
17.20: Mhela umwe Mafalisayo nawamuuza Yesu, “Undewa wa Nguluwi wokuya nili?” Heye nakawalonjela, “Undewa wa Nguluwi haukuya ukoneka.
17.21: Kahi haduhu munhu yolonga, wahano, ama wahala. Lelo Undewa wa Nguluwi wa mgati mwenu.”
17.22: Hamba kawalonjela walanguswa, “Mazuwa ganguya moza ngugana kulola zuwa limwe lya mwana wa munhu, ila hamyona.
17.23: Na wanhu wokulonjelani, ‘Mlole ka hala!’ Ama ‘Mlole ka hano!’ Ila hemwe mleche kulawa kahi mleche kuwawinza.
17.24: Mina kota hila lumwemwesa lwa limlungu ne kulonga lumwesa kilanga nzingo imwe mbaka iyage, ndo voiwa zuwa alyo Mwana wa Munhu loyokuya.
17.25: Ila ago gang'hali, kogazigwa lukami na kulemigwa na lulelo alu.
17.26: Kota vyonaiwele mhela wa Nuhu ndo vyoiwa hoyokuya Mwana wa Munhu.
17.27: Wanhu nawalyaga na kunwa wohola na kuholeka mbaka mhela ula Nuhu loyenjile mli itumbwi ling'hangala. Mazi metemete logalawile na kuwakopola weng'ha.
17.28: Yowa kota vyoilawile mhela wa Loti. Wanhu wazangulya na kunwa, kugula na kuguza, kunyala nyhadikwa na kuzenga.
17.29: Ila zuwa Loti loyochile sodoma, maganga ga chiluli nagalawila gazangutowa kota nhonya kulawa kilanga na kuwakopola weng'ha.
17.30: Ndo vyoiwa zuwa alyo Mwana wa Munhu loyogubuligwa.
17.31: “Zuwa alyo, wone munhu yawele chinduwiko mwa ng'handa ya heye, yaleche kudulika yahole vinhu vya heye vili mng'handa nayali kumgunda yaleche kuhiluka koyalawile.
17.33: Munhu yalingugana kululohola lukuli lwa heye kolwajiliza, na munhu yolwajiliza kolulohola.
17.34: Ndangukulonjelani, zuwa alyo wanhu weli wowa wawasile hamihe, yumwe koholigwa na yunji kolechigwa.
17.35: Wadala weli wowa wotwanga ndiya hamwe. Yumwe koholigwa na yunji kolechigwa.”
17.36: Wanhu weli wowa kumgunda, yumwe koholigwa na yunji kolechigwa.
17.37: Wamuuza kohi Mkulu? Kawalonjela, “Hawele na mtufi, ndo hojimema mikungule.”

18.1: Hamba Yesu nakawasimila walanguswa wa heye nhelo ayi, imgana munhu yaze kumlanda Nguluwi ne kugozola.
18.2: Nakalonga, “Kuli honhu hamwe kwali na mtagusa yumwe nayali yomuwinza Nguluwi, kahi nahamjesaga ne munhu.
18.3: Na honhu aho, kwali na mamo yumwe yalechelelwe, nakamlutilaga ayo mtagusa yomlanda yamtagusile goya kulawa kwa munhu nayali ngumhwihilwa.
18.4: Mihela minji ayo mtagusa nahaganaga kumlewela ayo mamo, ila mwiso kazangulonga, ‘Wone hambe ndimjese Nguluwi na wanhu,
18.5: Ila ayu mdala kanguya yongaza, ndomleweleza wone siditile ahyo kozanguya hano mwiso konhosa lukami.’ ”
18.6: Mkulu nakawalonjela, “Muhulika vyoyalonjile ayo mtagusa yehile.
18.7: Lelo Nguluwi howalewela wala yawahagule, wala wali ngulanda nemisi na nechilo? Koleka kuwahulichiza?
18.8: Ndangukulonjela kowalewela himahima. Kahi, kowa kuduhu makundo amu muisi mhela Mwana wa Munhu loyokuya?” Chilanguso cha Mfalisayo na mkongoza sendi
18.9: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela kahi nhelo kota hino, wala wanhu nawewonaga watanganika na kuwabeza wayawo wanji.
18.10: “Nakalonga, Wanhu weli nawaluta mluga lwa ng'handa ya Nguluwi kuza kulanda Nguluwi, yumwe Mfalisayo, na yunji mkongoza kodi.
18.11: “Ayo Mfalisayo kema hafungo na kumlanda Nguluwi mnhumbula, ‘Gwa Nguluwi, malumbo, heni siwele kota wala wawele wadesi, wawele wabuhu na wang'hondwa na walinguboka. Malumbo, heni siwele kota ayu mkongoza sendi.
18.12: Ndangwesela kulya mazuwa meli, ndangulavya imwe ya kumi ya lufufu londiwele kupegwa.’
18.13: “Ila yula mkongoza sendi, nayali yemile kwa kutali henule ne meho gake kilanga, ila nakebata chipambaga kuno yesinzile kulajila kana masinzo, kalonga, ‘Gwa Nguluwi mbonele isungu heni ndiwele na gehile!’
18.14: Ndangukulonjelani,” “Ayu mkongoza sendi kahiluka kaye yawele yakundigwe na Nguluwi kusinda yula Mfalisayo. Mina, chila yalingikwiniza koduliswa, na yoneche yawele liholile, kokwinizwa.” Yesu kanguwatambichiza wana wadodo (Matei 19:13-15; Malichi 10:13-16)
18.15: Wanhu wamigalila Yesu wana wadodo yawawichile moko. Walanguswa wawawene nawawang'hanuchila.
18.16: Ila Yesu nakawachema hoyali yolonga, “Muwaleche awo wana wadodo woye kwa heni, mleche kuwalemeza, mina Undewa wa Nguluwi wanguwagana wanhu kota awa.
18.17: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya ng'hatu, munhu yohambe youbochele Undewa wa Nguluwi kota mwana mdodo, hokwinjila kuli undewa awo.” Munhu yawele na lufufu (Matei 19:16-30; Malichi 10:17-31)
18.18: Mkulu yumwe wa Wayahudi nakamuuza Yesu, “Mlangusa yanojile, ndite ndaze leka mhegwe ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma?”
18.19: Yesu nakamuuza, “Lekachoni kwangundonjela noga? Haduhu munhu yanojile ila yumwe, Nguluwi yaliyeng'ha.
18.20: Kujizela mizilo, ‘Uleche ung'hondwa, uleche kukopola, uleche kuhiza, uleche kumwimilila munhu udesi, uwahulichize mhaza na mayako.’ ”
18.21: Heye nakalonga, “Ago geng'ha ndigabata kulawila londali msongolo.”
18.22: Yesu loyahuche ago nakamlonjela, “Kwanguganigwa kudita chinhu chimwe, uguze chila chinhu, wagawile wanzunwa, na hegwe kowa na ng'hano kilanga, hamba uye umbinze.”
18.23: Ila ayo munhu loyahuliche ago, yawele na masinzo, kwa vila, nayali na lufufu lwinji.
18.24: Yesu loyamuwene kangugana ahyo, nakalonga, “Kota voiwa nongwa kwa wali na lufufu, wolemwela kwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi!
18.25: Ahi ndo yowa ubewe kwa Ngamiya lyoweza kukola mlinanga ya chihomo kusinda nayali na lufufu kwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi.”
18.26: Wala wanhu wahuliche ago, nawalonga, “Yalikohi yoloholigwa?”
18.27: Yesu kawalonjela, “Gali ngulemweligwa kwa wanhu. Kwa Nguluwi zoditikwa.”
18.28: Heye Petili nakamuuza, “Na hetwe ndaze? Tuleka geng'ha natukuwinza!”
18.29: Yesu nakawalomjela, ndangukulonjelani ndikomya, “Munhu yalechile ng'handa ama mdala ama mkulugwe ama wamlelile na wana kwa Undewa wa Nguluwi,
18.30: Kobochela menji ng'hatu mhela awu wa sambi, na mhela ukuya ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.” Yesu kangulonga lwa kadatu vyoyobagama na vyoyozilipuka (Matei 20:17-19; Malichi 10:32-34)
18.31: Yesu nakawahola hafungo wala walanguswa, kawalonjela, “Mhulichize! Twanguluta Yelusalemu na ako chila chinhu chandikwe na waloli gomlapa Mwana wa Munhu, gowa gakoligwe.
18.32: Mina kowichigwa mmoko mwa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi, na hewo womditila gehile na kummizila mite.
18.33: Womtowa na ng'hobwa, womkopola, ila zuwa lya kadatu kulawa loyabagame, kozilipuka.”
18.34: Ila hewo nahawavizelele mbuli ne imwe, nawavisigwa ulonzi awo, nahawavizelele choni chilingulonjigwa. Yesu kangumlohola munhu hambe yalole (Matei 20:29-34; Malichi 10:46-52)
18.35: Mhela Yesu loyali habehi kwinjila Yeliko, kwali na munhu yumwe hambe yalole yekalise mnzila yolanda,
18.38: Heye nakachemeleza lizi yolonga, “Yesu Mwana wa Daudi, umbonele isungu!”
18.39: Kwangugana ndikuditile ndaze? Wala wanhu walongole wamdeuza wamlonjela nyamalile ila heye hahuliche kaza nguchemeleza lizi, “Mwana wa Daudi, umbonele isungu.”
18.40: Yesu kema kawalonjela wamigale hoyali. Yula munhu yohambe yalole loyoile habehi, Yesu nakamuuza,
18.41: “Kwangugana ndikuditile choni?” Nakedichila, “Mkulu ndangulanda ndizengulola kahi.”
18.42: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ulole! Makundo ga hegwe gakulohola.”
18.43: Bahala yula yawele yohambe yalole kazangulola. Kamuwinza Yesu kuno yomtogola Nguluwi. Wala wanhu weng'ha lowawene ago, wamtogola Nguluwi.

19.1: Yesu nakenjila mujini Yeliko, loyali yokola mnzila za honhu aho.
19.2: Kalawila munhu yumwe, itagwa lyake Sakayo. Ayo nayali chilongozi wa wakongoza sendi na kahila nayali munhu nayali na lufufu.
19.3: Kagana kulola Yesu munhu wachi, lelo wanhu wali wenji lukami, ila heye nayali chifude na kalemwela kumona.
19.4: Ahyo! Nakabilima kumwando, kakwina mchanya mli ikuyu leka wamone Yesu, mina nayali yokolela aho.
19.5: Yesu loyafichile honhu hala, nakalola mchanya nakamlonjela, “Sakayo, uduliche hasi himahima, mana lelo hano ndogana nsinde haluga hako.”
19.7: Wanhu weng'ha lowawene ago, waluka kulonga longa, “Kaluta kikala na munhu yawele na gehile.”
19.8: Ila Sakayo kenuka nakamlonjela Yesu, “Hulichize Mkulu! Heni ndowapa wali hela vinhu nusu ya vinhu vya heni na wone ndimlande munhu chinhu, ndomhilusila kota acho mala zine.”
19.9: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Lehano ulohozi uya ng'handa ayi, mina ayo na heye mwana wa lukolo lwa Abulahamu.
19.10: Mina Mwana wa Munhu koya kupala na kulohola wajilile.” Kulangusa kwa migwala (Matei 25:14-30)
19.11: Mhela wanhu lowang'hali wohulichiza ago, Yesu nakawalangusa kwa nhelo yolonga, aho yalibehi na Yelusalemu, na wanhu wavizela mhela wuwu, Undewa wa Nguluwi wokwiza.
19.12: Aho nakawalonjela, “Kwali na munhu yumwe yatanganiche na kadita majendo kuluta isi ya kutali yakabochele undewa, hamba yahiluche.
19.13: Yang'hali kuka kawachema wala watumagwa kumi, kampa chila munhu sendi zihejile msahala wa myezi jidatu na kuwalonjela, ‘Mgulile vinhu mzenguguza mbaka londihiluka.’
19.14: Ila wanhu wanji nawamwihilwa na wawalajiza watumagwa walute wakalonje! ‘Tumlema ayu yaleche kuwa mndewa wa hetwe.’
19.15: “Aho munhu loyapeligwe undewa nakahiluka, bahala kalonga wala watumagwa wapeligwe sendi wachemigwe. Yogana yavizele chila munhu zilela zilinga.
19.16: Yula yalongoligwe kupegwa kalawila kalonga, ‘Mkulu zoumhele, ndizonjeza mala kumi.’
19.17: Heye nakamlonjela, ‘Goya,’ Hegwe kwa chitumagwa unojile! Kunoga kuli mbuli ndodo, kowa ulongoza miji kumi!,
19.18: Chitumagwa wa keli koya, nakalonga, ‘Mkulu, nguza zonjezeka mala zihano ya zila zoumhle!’
19.19: Heye nakamlonjela, ‘Nagwe kowa mkulu wa miji jihano.’
19.20: “Chitumagwa yunji koya, kalonga, ‘Mkulu, uhole sendi zako, nandizivisa goya mchibende,
19.21: nandumba hegwe kwa munhu yang'ang'ale, kwangusa chohuwichile, na kubeta cho hunyalile.’
19.22: Heye nakamlonjela, ‘Vyoulonjile ahyo ndokutagusa kwa mlomo wa hegwe, hegwe kwa chitumagwa wihile! Nakuvizela heni nda munhu yang'ang'ale, ndangubeta vyosinyalile.’
19.23: Lekachoni huwichile sendi kuli wanhu walingonjeza londikuya nyhole na zila zonjezeche?
19.24: “Aho nakawalonjela wala wali hala, ‘Msukuleni alyo igwala limwe, na mumhe yula yawele na zila zonjezeche mala kumi.’
19.25: Hewo anwamlonjela, ‘Ila Mkulu heye kanazo zonjezeche mala kumi!’
19.26: ‘Heye nakawalonjela,’ ‘Chila yawele na chinhu, kokonjezelwa chiyage, ila yula yawele hela chinhu, chila chidodo choyawele nacho, choholigwa.
19.27: Na sambi, wala wohambe wagane ndiwe mndewa wa hewo, muwagale aha, muwakopole nani ndilola.’ ” Yesu kangwinjila Yelusalemu kwa mnvina (Matei 21:1-11; Malichi 11:1-11; Yohana 12:12-19)
19.28: Yesu nakalonga ago, yolawa nakalongola kumwando kuza Yelusalemu.
19.29: Hoyali habehi na Betifage na Betaniya, behi na chidunda cha Mizeituni, nakawalajiza walanguswa wa heye weli.
19.30: Nakawalonjela, “Mlute hali chijiji chiwele kumwando kwa hemwe. Lomuwa mukwinjila mchijiji, molifika mwana idogowi liwohigwe halina kwinigwa na munhu, mdohole mligale hano.
19.31: Wone munhu yawauze, lekachoni mlingulidohola, mlonje ‘Mkulu kangumgana.’ ”
19.32: Wolawa waluta wafika kota Yesu voyawalonjele.
19.33: Lowali wolidohola lila lidogowi, hewo wawauza, “Lekachoni mlingulidohola ali idogowi?”
19.35: Wolawa waligala lila idogowi kwa Yesu. Wolawawahola nguwo za hewo watambalika hamgongo mwa idogowi, wamkwiniza Yesu mchanya wa alyo idogowi.
19.36: Yesu kazanguluta yawele mchanya mli idogowi. Na wanhu nawazanza nguwo za hewo mbalabala.
19.37: Loyali behi na Yelusalemu, hali mduliko wa chidunda cha Mizeituni, walanguswa wa heye na wanhu wenji wazakwimba na kumtogola Nguluwi kwa lizi ling'hangala kwa mbuli ng'hulu zowaziwene;
19.38: Wazangulonga, “Yamtambichize Mndewa yokuya kwa itagwa lya Mkulu. Kikala goya kuchanya kilanga, na ukulu ng'hatu kwa Nguluwi!”
19.39: Aho Mfalisayo wamwe wala wali hala hali wanhu wamemile, nawamlonjela, “Mlangusa,” “Walonjele walanguswa wa hegwe wanyamalile!”
19.40: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndangukulonjelani wone awa wenyamalile, ago maganga gochemeleza lizi.” Yesu kanguulilila muji wa Yelusalemu
19.41: Loyali habehi ng'hatu na kuwona muji wa Yelusalemu, Yesu nakaulilila,
19.42: yolonga, “Yaligoya hegwe nagwe lelo hano mbuli ilingigala makundo! Ila, lelo gavisigwa mmeho gako.
19.43: Mina zuwa lyanguya wakwihilwe wokuzungulusila lugagala, wokuzunguluta na kukibata kulawa nzingo zeng'ha.
19.44: Wokukopola hegwe na wanhu walingikala amo, howokulechela ne iganga likwima mli iganga liyage, kwa vila, hauzelele ula mhela Nguluwi hoyokuyila kukulohola.” Yesu kangwinjila kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi (Matei 21:12-17; Malichi 11:15-19; Yohana 2:13-22)
19.45: Yesu nakenjila mli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kaluka kuwawinga kunze wanhu walinguguza vinhu.
19.46: Nakawalonjela, “Yandichigwa, ‘Ng'handa ya heni yowa ng'handa ya kulandila.’ Ila hemwe muigalula mhalika ya wabokaji!”
19.47: Chila zuwa Yesu kazanguwalangusa ng'handa ya Nguluwi. Watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na wakulu wa wanhu nawagana kumkopola,
19.48: Ila hewo hawaliwene lya kudita, mina wanhu weng'ha wali wekale tulu womhulichiza chila luzi.

20.1: Zuwa limwe, Yesu nayali yawalangusa wanhu honhu ha kusalila na kuwatagusila Mbuli Inojile, watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na wakulu wamwe nawoya,
20.2: Walonga, “Tulonjele! Kwangudita mbuli azi kwa ludali lwachi, ama yalikohi yakupele ludali luno?”
20.4: ludali lwa Yohani lwa kubatiza nalulawa kilanga kwa Nguluwi ama kwa wanhu?”
20.5: Ila hewo nawalonga ahi, “Wone tulonje nalulawa kilanga, kotuuza, ‘Lekachoni hamumkundile?’
20.6: Na wone tulonje nalulawa kwa wanhu, wanhu weng'ha wa hano wotutowa na maganga, mina weng'ha nawakunda kota Yohani nayali mloli wa Nguluwi.”
20.8: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Na heni siwalonjela ndangudita mbuli zino kwa ludali lwachi.” Nhelo ya walimi na mgunda wa zabibu (Matei 21:33-46; Malichi 12:1-12)
20.9: Yesu kazangulangusa wanhu yolonga kwa nhelo ayi, “Munhu yumwe nakalima mgunda wa zabibu, nakawabasila walimi, heye nakaheluka isi ya kutali, kekala ako mihela minji.
20.10: Mhela wa kubeta, ayo munhu kemigala chitumagwa kwa wala walimile yakahole kumgunda gojilelile mizabibu. Ila wala walimile wamsubula ayo chitumagwa na kumhilusa ne chinhu.
20.11: Yula munhu nakamigala chitumagwa yunji, ila hewo kahila wamtowa ayo chitumagwa na kumbasa soni na kumhilusa ne chinhu.
20.12: Kahi kamigala wa kadatu, heye ayo lowamlumize, wamuwinga.
20.13: Yula yawele na mgunda nakejesa, ‘Ndodita choni? Ndomgala mwana wa heni ndimganile, yolonga heye womhulichiza.’
20.14: Wala walingulima lowawene, wazangilonjela, ‘Ayu ndo yohalila. Tumkopole leka kuhalila kwa heye kuwe kwa hetwe.’
20.15: Lelo Nawamlavya hafungo mwa mgunda wa mizabibu. Wamkopola.?” Yesu nakauza, “Yula yawele na mgunda kowadita ndaze wala walimi?”
20.16: “Kokuya kuwabagamiza awala walingulima, na kowapa walimi wanji awo mgunda wa zabibu.” Wanhu lowahuliche yolonga ahyo, nawalonga, “Hebu haiwa ahyo!”
20.17: Ila Yesu kawalola, nakawalonjela gano, “Maandiko Matakatifu gana mana yachi? “ ‘Iganga lilemigwe na walinguzenga, lelo liwa iganga likulu lya msisi!’
20.18: Wone munhu yogwa mchanya mwa iganga alyo, kobeneka pasapasa na wone iganga limgwile munhu yoneche, lyomhondanga.” Mbuli ya kulavya kodi. (Matei 22:15-22; Malichi 12:13-17)
20.19: Walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na watambika wakulu nawavizela, yaliyowalangusa kwa nhelo ayo yowalangusa hewo, wazangugana wambate bahala, ila nawadumba wanhu
20.20: Wazangupala mhela unojile. Wapala wanhu wazengidita wanoga, kumuuza. Aho wali wogana wambate na kumgala kuli ludali lwa chilongozi.
20.21: Wala wapugajizi nawamlonjela, “Mlangusa, tuvizela hegwe kwangulangusa na kulonga aku wokomya, tuvizela hambe umbagule munhu, kwangulangusa nzila za Nguluwi.
20.22: Lelo tulonjele iwa goya kumpa mndewa wa Loma kodi?”
20.24: “Mndajile sendi ayo. Ndaze mutwi na itagwa ali ndo lya whaani?” “Mutwi wa Kaizali.” Nawedichila.
20.25: Yesu nakawalomjela, “Goya, mmigalile Kaizali gawele ga Kaizali na mmigalile Nguluwi gawele ga Nguluwi.”
20.26: Aho hali wanhu walemwela kumgwiliza, wekala tulu wochijesa vyoyawalonjele. Mbuli ya kuzilipuka (Matei 22:23-33; Malichi 12:18-27)
20.27: Wala Masadukayo, nawawele walonga kuduhu uzilipuko kwa wabagame, woya hali Yesu, wazangulonga.
20.28: “Mlangusa, Musa nakatwandichila, ‘Wone mng'holozo yumwe yaje ne kulela mwana, yogana munhu yumwe wa lukolo lwenu yamhalile ayo mdala, yamlelele wana mng'holoze.’
20.29: Lelo mhela umwe kwali na wanhu saba wa lukolo lumwe. Yula yalongole kamhola, hamba nakabagama ne kulela mwana.
20.30: Mng'holoze wa keli nakamhola yula mdala mlekwa, naye kahi nakabagama.
20.31: Na wakadatu hiho. Wazanguluta hiho mbaka weng'ha saba nawabagama haduhu yalechile mwana kuli yula mdala.
20.32: Logadumile, yula mdala na heye nakabagama.
20.33: Lelo zuwa lya wabagame kuzilipuka mdala ayo kowa mdala wa yalikohi? Weng'ha saba na wali wamhesile.”
20.34: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Walume na wadala wa mihela aji wanguhola na kuholeka,
20.35: Ila wala Nguluwi yowawika mbaka mhela wa kuzilipuka, howohesa ne kuhesigwa hebu.
20.36: Awo howobagama kahi, kwa vila, wowa kota wahilisi wa kilanga wa Nguluwi. Na ndo wana wa Nguluwi mina hewo walawa kuli wanhu wabagame.
20.37: Ila kuzilipuka kwa wabagame, Musa kahi nakakunda mbuli azo kuli gandichigwe gelile. Yolajila hala honhu hali chisosolo lochali chikwaka chiluli, kangumchema Mkulu kota Nguluwi wa Abulahamu na Nguluwi wa Isaka na Nguluwi wa Yakubu. Lelo heye hawele,
20.38: Nguluwi wa wanhu wabagame, ila Nguluwi wa wanhu wakomu, mina wala yawachemile kowali, wangikala na heye.”
20.39: Walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nawalonga, “Mlangusa kwidichila goya ng'hatu.”
20.40: Mina huganile kumuuza kahi chinhu chinji. Mbuli Ya munhu yabachigwe mafuta (Matei 22:41-46; Malichi 12:35-37)
20.41: Yesu nakauza, “Lekachoni wanhu walingulonga Kilistu Mlohozi ndo mwana wa Daudi?
20.42: Mina yuye Daudi kangulonga mlichitabu cha heye cha zabuli, “ ‘Mkulu, nakamlonjela Mkulu wa heni, kalise nzingo ya heni ya kudilo,
20.43: mbaka ndiwawiche wang'honyo wa hegwe, wawe chigoda cha kuwichila magulu ga hegwe.’
20.44: Daudi na kamchema ahyo heye, ‘Mkulu,’ Yowa ndaze lelo, Kilistu Mlohozi yawe mwana wa Daudi?” Yesu kanguwadeuza walangusa wa malajizo (Matei 23:1-36; Malichi 12:38-40)
20.45: Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa hali wanhu weng'ha,
20.46: “Milolele na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa hewo waganaaga kukola wavalile kanzu, wangana kulamsigwa na wanhu watanganiche kuli masoko. Na kikalisa kumwando mli ng'handa za kusalila na kuhola vigoda vya kumwando hali mnvina.
20.47: Wanguwabunza wadala walekwa na wangihada hewo wanoga kwa kulanda kwa sala zihejile. Zuwa Nguluwi loyowazapa wanhu, wotagusigwa kwa wihe lukami ng'hatu!”

21.1: Yesu nakalola kweng'ha, kawona wanhu wali na lufufu wojela ndolendole zowegale mli isanduku lya ndolendole kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi,
21.2: kahi nakamona mamo yumwe mlekwa mzunwa yolavya mumo migwala mili midodo.
21.3: Nakalonga, “Ndangukulonjelani ndikomya, mamo ayu mlekwa nakalavya nyinji ng'hatu kusinda wanhu weng'ha.
21.4: Mina wanhu wawele na lufufu nawalavya ndolendole kulawa kuli lufufu nalowawele nawo. Ila ayu mamo kwa uzunwa wa heye, kalavya chila chinhu choyawele nacho.” Yesu kangulonga kubenigwa kwa ng'handa ya Nguluwi (Matei 24:1-2; Malichi 13:1-2)
21.5: Walanguswa wamwe wali wolonga mbuli za Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, vyoizenjigwe na maganga ga sendi nyinji, na vinhu vyowalavile kwa Nguluwi. Yesu nakalonga,
21.6: “Aga geng'ha go mgona zuwa likuya haduhu iganga nelimwe lya ng'handa lisigala mchanya mwa iganga liyage, chila chinhu chowifigwa.” Nongwa na kugazigwa (Matei 24:3-14; Malichi 13:3-13)
21.7: Wanhu nawamuuza Yesu, “Mlangusa, mbuli azo zolawila nili? Choni chowa ulajilo wa mbuli azo zahabehi kulawila?”
21.8: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Milolele, mleche kubadigwa, mina wanhu wenji wokuya kwa kukolela itagwa lya heni wolonga, ‘Heni nda Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi, Mhela wa habehi. Ila hemwe mleche kuwawinza!’
21.9: Lelo lomhulika mbuli za ngondo na kugazigwa, mleche kutigasigwa, mina ago golongola kulawila, ila kuduma kwa geng'ha kung'hali.”
21.10: Yesu nakalutilila kulonga, “Isi imwe yochitowa na isi iyage, na undewa umwe wochitowa na undewa uyage.
21.11: Chila honhu howa na jimachinyina mikulu, kowa na nzala na matamwa ga kulecheza. Kowa na vinduzanduza vya kudumbigwa na ulajilo mkulu kilanga.
21.12: Ila logowa gang'hali kulawila ago geng'ha, wokubatani, wokugazani na kuwagalani mli ng'handa za kusalila na kuwawika mchinweng'ho. Mohilikwa kuli wandewa na vilongozi kwa chiwalo cha itagwa lya heni,
21.14: Ila hemwe mleche kuwa na lunhwinhwi ndaze vyomchigombela.
21.15: Kwa vila nene ndokupani ulonzi wa kulonga na wanhu wakwihileni howoweza kiziganila na hemwe kahi howoibeza.
21.16: Molemigwa na wakulu wa hemwe na wang'holozenu na wanhu weng'ha womiganaga. Nawo wowakopola wamwe wa hemwe.
21.17: Wanhu weng'ha wokulemani kwa nongwa ya kumbinza heni.
21.18: Ila nemnvili imwe haikwajilila mmitwi ja hemwe.
21.19: Kwa kwimilila kwa hemwe, molohola ukomu wa hemwe. Yesu kangulonga kubenangwa kwa Yelusalemu (Matei 24:15-21; Malichi 13:14-19)
21.20: “Lomuuwona muji wa Yelusalemu uzumgulutwe na wamizi, mvizele kuwifigwa kwake kwa habehi.
21.21: Aho wawele Yudeya wabilimile kuchidunda, wala wawele mli muji walawe na wala wawele kumgunda waleche kwinjila kuli muji awo.
21.22: Mazuwa ago ndo mazuwa ga kugazigwa, leka geng'ha gandikwe galawile.
21.23: Mane wawo wala wawele na himila na walingonyeza zuwa azo! Mina muli isi mowa na nongwa ng'hulu ng'hatu na ng'halazi ya Nguluwi yowoyela wanhu awa.
21.24: Wamwenga wakopoligwa kwa ipanga, wamwenga wochibatigwa woholigwa mli isi zeng'ha, na muji wa Yelusalemu wobijigwa na isi zinji, mbaka mhela houkuya. Kuya kwa mwana wa munhu (Matei 24:29-31; Malichi 13:24-27)
21.25: “Kowa na vinhu vyokoneka kuli zuwa na nyelezi na nondwe. Wanhu weng'ha muisi wozangugaya kwa chiwalo cha kudumba mtigasiko wa nigu za bahali.
21.26: Wanhu wozilika kwa kudumba, wololela mbuli ziza ngulawila muisi, mina mong'ho ubatilile vinhu avyo vyeng'ha wotigaswa,
21.27: Hamba womona Mwana wa Munhu yokuya kuli ng'hungugu. Yali na ludali na ukulu lwinji.
21.28: Mhela mbuli azo lozikwaluka kulawila, mwinuche na kwinula mitwi jenu mchanya, mina kugomboligwa kwa hemwe kwa habehi.” Kulangusa kwa igodi lya ikuyu (Matei 24:32-35; Malichi 13:28-31)
21.29: Hamba nakawalangusa yolonga kwa nhelo, “Mlole ikuyu na migodi jinji jeng'ha.
21.30: Wone mone galuka kuzuka mahamba, mvizela mhela wa nhonya wa habehi.
21.31: Namwe hihyo, homkona mbuli azo zilawila, mvizele Undewa wa Nguluwi wa habehi.
21.32: “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, lulelo alu halubagama gang'hali ago geng'ha kulawila.
21.33: Ulanga na isi zopuluta, ila ulonzi wa heni haupuluta hebu. Yangugana muwe meho
21.34: “Muwe meho nhumbula za hemwe zileche kuganilila kuli vinhu vinji vya ukomu awu, kudita kuli mbuli zihile na mijito ja amu muisi. Zuwa alyo lyokuyilani ne kuvizela.
21.35: Mina chokuyilani kota chinhu chitejigwe, wanhu weng'ha wali ngikala muli isi.
21.36: Milolele, mze ngulanda leka muwe na ludali lwa kukola mli mbuli azo zeng'ha zilawila, na kwima kumwando kuli Mwana wa Munhu.”
21.37: Zuwa alyo, nemisi, Yesu nayali yowalangusa wanhu Mng'handa ya Nguluwi ila hamihe nakalutaga kuli chidunda cha Mizeituni na kikala ako.
21.38: Wanhu weng'ha nawalutaga hali Ng'handa ya Nguluwi kung'hali lufuku. Wazengumhulichiza.

22.1: Mnvina ya mibumunda hajisasile, ilinguchemigwa Pasaka, nayali habehi.
22.2: Watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa wazangupala nzila ya kumkopola Yesu, ila nawawadumba wanhu. Yuda kangukunda kumlavya Yesu (Matei 26:14-16; Malichi 14:10-11)
22.3: Na baho Limazoga limwinjila Yudasi yalinguchemigwa Isikalioti, yumwe wa wala walanguswa kumi na weli.
22.4: Ahyo nakaluta kwa wakulu wa watambika na walolezi wa ng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakalonga nawo vila vyoyomuhinduchila Yesu.
22.5: Na hewo wasechelela nawalagana kumha sendi.
22.6: Yudasi nakakunda na kazangupala mhumhu ya kumhinduchila Yesu ne wanhu kuvizela. Wangugongomanya ndiya ya Pasika (Matei 26:17-25; Malichi 14:12-21; Yohana 13:21-30)
22.7: Zuwa lya mnvina ya mibumunda hajisasile wali habehi. Ahyo ndo vyoili mwanaing'holo kolavigwa nhambiko ya Pasaka.
22.8: Yesu nakawalajiza Petili na Yohani kawalonjela, “Mlute mkatugongomanyile mnvina ya Pasaka tulye.”
22.10: Nakawedichila, “Mhulichize! Lomuwa mluta mjini, moting'hana na mlume yawele yedwichile chiya cha mazi. Mumuwinze mbaka ng'handa yoyokwinjila.
22.11: Na mumlonjele yawele na ng'handa, ‘Mlangusa kanguuza, chilikohi chihengo cha wajenzi choyodila Pasaka hamwe na walanguswa?’
22.12: Na heye kokulajilani chihengo chikulu cha mchanya mina chiwichigwe goya, mgongomanyile mumo.”
22.13: Nawaluta wona hihila kota Yesu vyoyawalonjele. Na hewo nawawika goya ndiya ya Pasaka. Chilyo cha Mkulu (Matei 26:26-30; Malichi 14:22-26; 1 Kolinto 11:23-25)
22.14: Mhela loufichile, Yesu kawahola watumigwa wa heye na kikala na hewo mchisanya.
22.15: Nakawalonjela, “Ndangugana kulya hamwe na hemwe mnvina ayi ya pasaka nding'hali kugazigwa!
22.16: Kwa vila ndangukulonjelani, silya kahi mbaka kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi.”
22.17: Hamba kahola chizombe cha divai, katambichiza, kalonga, “Mbochele chino munwe mweng'ha.
22.18: Ndangukulonjelani kulawa sambi sinwa divai kahi mbaka undewa wa Nguluwi houkuya.”
22.19: Hamba kahola ibumunda, katambichiza na kamogola, kawapa walanguswa wa heye yolonga, “Alu ndo lukuli lwa heni, loulavigwa kwa mbuli ya hemwe. Mdite hino lomng'humbuka heni.”
22.20: Kahi hiho na chizombe, loyadile kalonga, “Chizombe chino cha ilagano lya sambi lilingulajila kwa danda ya heni yoibohoka kwa mbuli ya hemwe.
22.21: “Ila loleni! Munhu yula yongalamka kabahano kangulya hamwe na heni!.
22.22: Mwana wa Munhu kanguluta kukopoligwa kota voyaganile Nguluwi, ila mane munhu yula yamuhinduche.”
22.23: Aho wazangiuza wawo yeng'ha yalikohi yodita mbuli ayo. Yalikohi yawele Mkulu
22.24: Nakulawila kitwanza hali walanguswa yalikohi yozanguwa mkulu ng'hatu hali hewo weng'ha.
22.25: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Vilongozi wa isi walongozaga wanhu kwa lupichi na hewo wochichema ‘Watanza wanhu.’
22.26: Ila hemwe ileche kuwa ahyo, nayali mkulu hali hemwe imgana yawe mdodo kusinda weng'ha, na yawele mkulu imagana yawe kota chitumagwa.
22.27: Kwa vila yalikohi nayali mkulu? Yula yalingikalisa mchisanya na kulya, ama yula nayali chitumagwa? Hebu! Yowa yula yalingikala mcchisanya na kulya ndiya! Ahyo, heni nda hano hagati ha hemwe kota mkolamijito.
22.28: “Hemwe ndo mponile na heni, mhela weng'ha wa kujezigwa kwa heni.
22.29: Kota mhaza wa heni voyangalile heni undewa wuwula. Na heni nani, ndangukupani hemwe undewa.
22.30: Molya na kunwa mchisanya ya heni kuli undewa wa heni na kikalisa mvigoda vya undewa na kutagusa nhanzi kumi na mbili za Isilaeli. Yesu kangulonga Petili kombela (Matei 26:31-35; Malichi 14:27-31; Yohana 13:36-38)
22.31: “Simoni, Simoni! Hulichize! Limazoga lyangugana kuwabetani hemwe kota munhu yobeta uhemba.
22.32: Ila heni ndokulandila kwa Nguluwi leka makundo ga hegwe galeche kuwa mado. Wone uhiluche kuli heni wasindamize nhumbula wang'holozo.”
22.33: Petili nakalonga, “Mkulu, heni ng'hunda kuluta na hegwe mchinweng'ho na kuli kubagama.”
22.34: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ndangukulonjela Petili, lehano izogolo ling'hali kwika, kombela kadatu kota hunzelele heni.” Mhela wa kugazigwa
22.35: Hamba Yesu kawauza walanguswa wa heye. “Hala ndiwalajize mli hela sendi ne mhako ne makwamba, namwisilwa chinhu?” Nawamwidichila, “Hatwisilwe ne chinhu hebu!”
22.36: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ila sambi yoneche yula yalihela mhako wa sendi yahole. Na nayali na mhako yadite hiho! Na nayali hela ipanga, yaguze ikoti lyake yagule umwe.
22.37: Kwa vila Maandiko Matakatifu galonga, ‘Na heye kohanzwa hamwe na wehile,’ Ndanguwalonjelani, geng'ha gandichigwe mbuli ya heni, ganguza kuduma.”
22.38: Walanguswa nawalonga, “Mkulu ulole hano hana mipanga mili.” Nakawalonjela, “Ikwila!” Yesu kangumlanda Nguluwi kuchidunda cha mzeituni (Matei 26:36-46; Malichi 14:32-42)
22.39: Yesu koka na kuluta kuli chidunda cha Mizeituni kota vyoyazowele, walanguswa wa heye na hewo wamuwinza.
22.40: Loyafichile ako nakawalonjela, “Mlande leka mleche kwinjila kuli kujezigwa.”
22.41: Na baho kawaleka, kaluta honhu hatali hado ha munhu kutoza iganga, kafugama, kalanda.
22.42: “Mhaza wone ulingugana, umbusile chino chizombe cha kugazigwa kwa heni, ila haiwele vyondigana heni, leka kota vyoulingugana hegwe gakoleke.”
22.43: Aho mhilisi kulawa kilanga kalawila kaza kumtanza.
22.44: Yawele mli usungu ukulu, kakobanya kulanda ng'hatu, na chituguti chiwele kota danda, kizangulagala hasi.
22.45: Loyasindile kulanda, kawahiluchila walanguswa wa heye, nakawafika wawasile, kwa vila nawali na masinzo lukami.
22.46: Nakawalonjela, “Lekachoni muwasile? Mwinuche mlande mleche kwinjila kuli kujezigwa.” Yesu kangibatigwa (Matei 26:47-56; Malichi 14:43-50; Yohana 18:3-11)
22.47: Yesu loyali yolutilila kulonga, lung'hongola lwa wanhu, welongoze na yula nayachemagwe Yudasi, yumwe wa wala kumi na weli. Yudasi kumlamsa Yesu kwa kumnonela.
22.48: Ila Yesu nakamlonjela, “Yudasi! Kwangumlavya Mwana wa Munhu kwa kumnonela?”
22.49: Walanguswa nawekale hamwe na Yesu, lowawene mbuli zila zilawile, nawauza, “Mkulu tuwahenje na mipanga?”
22.50: Na myao yumwe kamtowa kwa ipanga chitumagwa yumwe wa mtambika mkulu, nakamdumula ikutu lya kudilo.
22.51: Baho Yesu nakalonga. “Leka ayi ikwila!” Kalidoliza lila ikutu na kumlohola.
22.52: Hamba Yesu nakawalonjela watambika wakulu na walolezi wa ng'handa ya Nguluwi woyile kumibata. “Muya na mipanga na nyimbati kundibata kota heni nda mbokaji?
22.53: Londali hamwe na hemwe chila zuwa na ndikala hamwe na hemwe mli ng'handa ya Nguluwi, hambichile hali ludali lwa hemwe hebu. Ila saa ino ya hemwe, na undewa wa kutitu.” Petili kangumbela Yesu (Matei 26:57-58; 26:69-75; Malichi 14:53-54; 14:66-72; Yohana 18:12-18; 18:25-27)
22.54: Wambata Yesu na kumhola, waluta naye kuli ng'handa ya mtambika mkulu. Petili kazangumuwinza kumbele nayali kutali.
22.55: Nawawesa chenje hagati hali luga, wekalisa hamwe, Petili na kekalisa hamwe na hewo.
22.56: Chitumagwa yumwe mdala loyamuwene Petili yekalise behi na chenje, kazangumlola na kalonga, “Munhu ayu nayali hamwe na Yesu.”
22.57: Ila Petili nakabela mbuli ila yolonga, “Mdala hegwe, simzelele yuno youmlonga!”
22.58: Hamba munhu yunji nakamona Petili, kalonga, “Na hegwe nagwe kwa yumwe wa hewo!” Ila Petili kedichila kalonga, “Mkulu, hebu! Siwele heni!”.
22.59: Baho saa imwe hamwande, munhu yumwe kakangaza yolonga, “Ndangukomya, munhu yuno nayali hamwe na Yesu kwa vila heye naye nakalawa Galilaya.!”
22.60: Ila Petili kedichila, “Munhu hegwe, sivizelele ne choulingulonga!” Na baho loyali yang'hali yolonga, izogolo nalika.
22.61: Mkulu kahinduka kamlola Petili. Petili nakakumbuchila gala gonayamlonjele Yesu. “Lehano izogolo halina kwika kombela mala zidatu kota hunzelele.”
22.62: Petili kalawa kunze, nakalila lukami. Yesu kangubezigwa na kutowigwa (Matei 26:67-68; Malichi 14:65)
22.63: Wala wanhu wali womlolela Yesu wazangumtowa na kumbeza.
22.64: Wamuwoha chibende kumeho, wazangumuuza, “Tulagulile lelo, yalikohi yakutowile?”
22.65: Wazangumlonjela mbuli nyinji za kumliga Yesu. Yesu hali Balaza lya Wayahudi (Matei 26:59-66; Malichi 14:55-64; Yohana 18:19-24)
22.66: Loifichile mitondo, balaza lya wasekulu, watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nawating'hana hamwe mchitala na kumchema Yesu.
22.67: Nawalonga, “Tulonjele! Hegwe kwa Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi?” Yesu nakawedichila, “Wone ndikulonjeleni hamkunda,
22.69: Ila kulawa sambi na kulutilila, Mwana wa Munhu kowa yekalise kudilo kwa Nguluwi nayali na mong'ho weng'ha.”
22.70: Weng'ha nawamuuza, “Hambi hegwe kwa Mwana wa Nguluwi?” Na heye kawedichila, “Hemwe mwangulonga heni nda mwana wa Nguluwi.”
22.71: Wazangulonga, “Hambi topala chinhu chachi kahi? Hetwe baha tuhulika yolonga kwa mlomo wa heye du!”

23.1: Hamba, wanhu weng'ha wenuka, wamigala Yesu kwa Pilato.
23.2: Waluka kumlonjeleza wolonga, “Tumfika munhu ayu yowahada wanhu wa hetwe, yowalemeza kulavya kodi kwa mndewa wa Loma na kichema heye Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi.”
23.3: Pilato nakamuuza, “Hegwe kwa mndewa wa wayahudi?” Yesu kedichila nakamlonjela, “Hegwe kulonga.”
23.4: Pilato nakawalonjela watambika wakulu na wala wanhu wamemile, “Sichiwene chinhu cha kumtagusa munhu yuno.”
23.5: Ila Hewo wang'ang'anila walonga, “Nakanguwasonjeleza wanhu vibi wetowe na undewa wa Loma kwa ulanguso wa udesi muli isi yeng'ha ya Yudeya, kaluchila Galilaya na sambi ka hano.” Yesu kangigaligwa kwa Helodi
23.6: Pilato loyahuliche ago, nakawauza, “Munhu ayu mwenyeng'haye wa Galilaya?”
23.7: Loyavizelele Yesu nayali hasi ha ulongozi wa mndewa Helodi, kamgala kwa Helodi, mhela awo nayali Yelusalemu.
23.8: Helodi loyamuwene Yesu kazangusechelela ng'hatu. Kwa vila nakagana kumona kulawa mazuwa menji. Nakahulika mbuli za heye, na kagana yamone yodita vinduzanduza.
23.9: Lelo kamuuza Yesu mbuli nyinji kwa mhela uhejile, ila Yesu hedichile ne chinhu.
23.10: Watambika wakulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa, wema wamlonjeleza Yesu kwa lupichi.
23.11: Helodi hamwe na wala walingulolela wazangumbasa soni Yesu na kumbeza, wolawa wamvalisa nguwo ya chiundewa, wamhilula kwa Pilato.
23.12: Helodi na Pilato, wala aho katali wali wehilwe, kulawa zuwa lilila wazangigana. Yesu kangutagusigwa yabagame (Matei 27:15-26; Malichi 15:6-15; Yohana 18:39-19:16)
23.13: Pilato nakawachema watambika wakulu na vilongozi na wanhu.
23.14: Baho nakawalonjela, “Mmigala munhu ayu kwa heni, mlonga kota nayali yowahada wanhu. Lelo mhulichize! Na heni ndizipugajiza mbuli za heye, ila sonile ne chinhu choyawifile kuli mbuli azo zomumlonjeleze.
23.15: Si nene yeng'ha, na heye Helodi hachiwene ne chinhu choyawifile munhu ayu chilingumgana yakomigwe.
23.16: Ahyo ndangugana yazapigwe ng'hobwa hamba ndomlechela.”
23.17: Kwa vila kaganigwa yamlechele munhu yumwe kwa wala wawele mchinweng'ho kuli mnvina ya Pasaka.
23.18: Ila lung'hongola lweng'ha lwa wanhu wachemeleza hamwe, “Mkopoleni munhu ayo na utuchumulile Balaba!”
23.19: Balaba nayali yahindilwe kwa kwambuza wanhu kuhinduka kuli muji na kukopola.
23.20: Pilato nakagana kumlechela Yesu, yolawa kalongana nawo kahi,
23.21: ila hewo wachemeleza, “Muwambeni mumsalaba, muwambeni mumsalaba.”
23.22: Pilato nakawalonjela lwa kadatu, “Kadita choni chihile? Hambe ndichone chinhu chimwambuza yabagame, ndolajiza yasubuligwe ng'hobwa, hamba ndomlechela.”
23.23: Ila hewo waza nguchemeleza lukami ng'hatu twangugana Yesu yawambigwe mumsalaba, hamba lizi lyawo lihulikwa hamba wakundizwa chowaganile.
23.25: Kachumula kamlavya yula walingumgana, yula yawohigwe kwa kwambuza kuhinduka na kukopola wanhu, yolawa kamlavya Yesu wamditile vowogana. Yesu kanguwambigwa mumsalaba (Matei 27:32-44; Malichi 15:21-32; Yohana 19:17-27)
23.26: Lowali womgala wating'hana na munhu yumwe nayali nguchemigwa Simoni mwenyeng'haye wa Kilene, nayali yolawa kumgunda. Wamibata wamdwika ula msalaba yauhole kumbele kwa Yesu.
23.27: Lung'hongola lwa wanhu lwali lumuwinza, wali mumo wadala womlilila na kumuwembela.
23.28: Yesu kagalamka nakawalonjela, “Hemwe wadala wa Yelusalemu! Mleche kundilila heni, ila mililile mwemwe na wana wa hemwe!
23.29: Kwa vila mazuwa ganguya mozangulonga, ‘Wabweda wala wali mhende, hewo hawalelile na hambe wonyeze wana!’
23.30: Baho wanhu wokwaluka kuvilonjela vidunda, ‘Tugwile!’ Na vidunda, ‘Tugubicheni!’
23.31: Kwa vila wanhu wangudita vinhu avi kuli igodi idodi, ahyo yowa ndaze kwa igodi likalile?”
23.32: Wanhu wanji weli wehile na wegaligwa bahala, wakopoligwe hamwe na Yesu.
23.33: Lowafichile honhu hamwe hali nguchemigwa, “Izeje lya mutwi,” Baho wamuwamba Yesu mumsalaba hamwe na wala wabokaji, yumwe kudilo na yumwe kumoso.
23.34: Yesu nakalonga, “Mhaza uwalechele kwa vila hawavizelele hebu chowalingudita.” Wahola nguwo zonayavalaga kwa kuzitowela simbi.
23.35: Wanhu wema wazanguwalola. Wakulu wa Wayahudi wazangubeza wolonga, “Kawalohola wanhu wanji, lelo yelohole yuye wone heye yawele Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi!”
23.36: Wamizi nawo wazangumbeza, waluta wampa divai izazame.
23.37: Wolonga, “Wilohole uliyeka wone hegwe ndo uli Mndewa wa Wayahudi.”
23.38: Mchanya ha msalaba wa heye, na wandika mbuli ino, “Yuno ndo Mndewa wa Wayahudi.”
23.39: Yumwe wa wala wabokaji wawambigwe hamwe na Yesu nakamliga Yesu kalonga, “Hambi hegwe hauwele Kilistu Mlohzi!? Wilohole gwegwe na hetwe.”
23.40: Ila yula mbokaji yumwe, kamdeuza miyage, yolonga, “Hegwe hambe umdumbe Nguluwi hebu? Hegwe nagwe kwa mumo kuli kutagusigwa kwa wihe hihyo.
23.41: Hetwe, twangutagusigwa hano kwa mbuli zihile zotuditile. Ila ayu munhu haditile ne chinhu chihile.”
23.42: Hamba nakamlonjela Yesu, “Yesu! Ung'humbuche loukwinjila Undewa wa hegwe.”
23.43: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ndangukulonjela ndikomya lelo hano kowa hamwe na heni kuli lubehelo kuchanya kwa Nguluwi.” Yesu kangubagama mumsalaba (Matei 27:45-56; Malichi 15:33-41; Yohana 19:28-30)
23.44: Yali iwele saa sita nemisi; jiza ligubika isi yeng'ha mbaka saa tisa
23.45: na ipaziya lya honhu helile ng'hatu kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi lidejeka vibende vili.
23.46: Yesu nakalila kwa kuchemelela, “Mhaza mmoko wa hegwe ndanguwika muhe wa heni.” Na loyalonjile hino, nakatwesemka lwa mwiso.
23.47: Mkulu wa wamizi wa Loma, loyawene gogalawile, kamtogola Nguluwi yolonga, “Kakomya, ayu nayali munhu yanojile.”
23.48: Na wanhu weng'ha wali aho wamemile wololela mbuli ayo, vyowawene ago galawile wahiluka kuluga wotowa vipambaga kwa kulajila masinzo.
23.49: Wala wanhu weng'ha wamzelele Yesu na wala wadala wamuwinzile Galilaya, wema kutali wolola vinhu avyo. Lukuli lwa Yesu lwangutiligwa (Matei 27:57-61; Malichi 15:42-47; Yohana 19:38-42)
23.50: Kwali na munhu yumwe itagwa lya heye Yusufu, Mwenyeng'haye wa chijiji chimwe cha Wayahudi chilinguchemigwa Alimataya. Nayali munhu yanojile yodita galinguganigwa na Nguluwi.
23.51: Nakekala yobeteza kuya kwa Undewa wa Nguluwi, ila heye nayali munhu wa Alimataya muji umwenga wa Wayahudi, yumwe wa wakulu wa kutagusa, hakundile chila chowadile wayage.
23.52: Heye kaluta kwa Pilato, kalanda yapegwe lukuli lwa Yesu.
23.53: Kaludulisa hasi, kaugubichiza sanda inojile ng'hatu, kauwika mchilaga chihongoligwe mmitalawe na hachinawichigwa ne lukuli mgati.
23.54: Zuwa alyo lyali Ijumaa, lya kiwika goya Zuwa lya Kwesela gali gokwaluka.
23.55: Wala wadala nawelongoze hamwe na Yesu kulawa Galilaya nawamuwinza Yusufu, wahona hala honhu hali chilaga na wawona lukuli lwa Yesu houwichigwe.
23.56: Na baho wahiluka kuluga, waza hola mafuta ga kunhunyhilila na Malihamu ga kulukumbika lukuli lwa Yesu. Kuli Zuwa lya Kwesela, nawesela kota Malajizo ga Musa vyogalingugana.

24.1: Jumapili kung'hali lufuku ng'hatu, wadala wahola mafuta ga kunhunyhilila gowawichile na waluta kuli chilaga.
24.2: Walifika lila iganga lowadinyile chilaga, lihejele kutali na lwizi lwa chilaga.
24.3: Wenjile mgati mchilaga hawauwene lukuli lwa Mkulu Yesu.
24.4: Wang'hali wabubuwale na mbuli ayo, bahala wanhu weli wavalile nguwo nzelu chweya! Wema behi na howali.
24.5: Wadala wazangudumba ng'hatu na wenamiza hanyi. Ila wala wanhu wawalonjela, “Lekachoni mwangumpala nayali mkomu kuli wanhu wabagame?
24.6: Yesu haduhu hano, nakazilipuka. Mkumbuchile vyonayakulonjeleni loyali kula Galilaya,
24.7: ‘Mwana wa Munhu kolavigwa kulimhoko ga wanhu wehile, hewo womgaza na kumuwamba mumsalaba, ila zuwa lya kadatu kozilipuka.’ ”
24.8: Baho wala wadala wakumbuchila mbuli ila yoyawalonjele.
24.9: Lowahiluche kulawa kuchilaga, wawalonjela mbuli yila wala walanguswa kumi na yumwe na wanhu weng'ha.
24.10: Walonjile mbuli azo kwa watumigwa wali, Maliya Madelena na Yohana na Maliya mayake Yakubu na wadala wanji wawele hamwe kuli chilaga.
24.11: Watumigwe na wona mbuli azo kota hazitanganiche, nahawakundile.
24.12: Ila Petili kalawa hala na kubilima mbaka kuli chilaga. Loyafichile, kenamiza na kusunjilila mgati, baho kayona ila sanda. Kahiluka kaye aku yabubuwale kwa gala galawile. Yesu kanguwalawila watumigwa weli (Malichi 16:12-13)
24.13: Kuli zuwa lilila, wanhu weli walwele walanguswa wa Yesu wali woluta kuli chijiji chilinguchemigwa Emau, utali wa chilomita kumi na imwe kulawa Yelusalemu.
24.14: Wazangulonga mbuli zila za vinhu vyeng'ha lozilawile.
24.15: Lowaliwolonga na kiuza, heye Yesu nakalawila, kaza kilongoza na hewo.
24.16: Wazakumona na meho ila hawali womzela kota ndo Yesu.
24.17: Yesu nakawauza, “Mbuli zachi zino zomlonga kuno mjenda?” Wema tulu, wakwisuche kumeho kuno wesinzile.
24.18: Yumwe yalinguchemigwa Kiliopasi, nakamlonjela, “Hegwe kwa mjenzi hano Yelusalemu, hugazelele galawile ako mazuwa gano?”
24.19: Yesu nakawauza, “Mbuli zachi?” Na hewo nawamwidichila, “Mbuli zimlawile Yesu wa Nasaleti, heye nayali mloli wa Nguluwi, yadahile kulangusa mbuli zeng'ha hali Nguluwi na hali wanhu weng'ha.
24.20: Watambika wakulu na wakulu wa hetwe wamigala kwa wakulu wa Loma yatagusigwe kwa wihe kubagama, na hewo wamuwamba mumsalaba.
24.21: Hetwe natukunda kota heye ndo yawagombole Waisilaeli. Lelo kwa ago geng'ha lehano zuwa lya kadatu kulawa lovilawile vinhu avyo.
24.22: Vivila wadala wamwenga kulawa mchilundo cha hetwe watinuswa ng'hatu. Mitondo kung'hali lufuku nawaluta kuli chilaga.
24.23: Ila hawaluwene lutufi lwake. Wahiluka walonga walawilwa na wahilisi wa kilanga walonjelwa ka mkomu.
24.24: Wanhu wamwenga kulawa mchilundo cha hetwe, waluta kuli chilaga, na hewo wona kota wadala wala vyowalonjile, ila heye hawamuwene.”
24.25: Na baho Yesu nakawalonjela, “Lekachoni mli wapoka ahi na nhumbula za hemwe hambe zikunde geng'ha galonjigwe na waloli wa Nguluwi?
24.26: Haimganile Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi kugazigwa, na hamba yenjile mli ukulu wa heye?”
24.27: Na Yesu kawagubulila mbuli zeng'ha zilingumgana heye kuli Maandiko Matakatifu, kwaluchila chitabu cha Musa mbaka gandichigwe na waloli wa Nguluwi weng'ha.
24.28: Lowali behi na chijiji chowaliwoluta, Yesu kedita kota kangulutilila na majendo kumwando.
24.29: Ila hewo wamlanda wolonga, “Wikale hamwe na hetwe kwa vila zuwa liswa, chilo changwinjila.” Baho kenjila wekala hamwe.
24.30: Loyali yekalise hamwe na hewo kulya ndiya, kahola ibumunda, katambichiza kamogola kawapa.
24.31: Bahala meho gawo gagubuligwa na wamzela ndo Yesu, ila heye na kajilila hawamuwene kahi.
24.32: Wazangulonga hewo kwa hewo, “Nhumbula za hetwe ha zali zimweka mgati mwa hetwe loyali yolonga na hetwe mnzila na kutudamlila goya Maandiko Matakatifu?”
24.33: Bahala hihila woka, wahiluka Yelusalemu, kula wawafika wala watumigwa kumi na yumwe, wehanzile na wanhu wanji.
24.35: Wala watumigwa weli nawawalonjela wayao mbuli zeng'ha zowalawile mnzila, na vyowamzelele Mkulu kwa kumogola ibumunda. Yesu kanguwalawila watumigwa (Matei 28:16-20; Malichi 16:14-18; Yohana 20:19-23; Madito 1:6-8)
24.36: Bahala lowali wochilonjela ago. Yesu kema hagati howali, nakawalonjela, “Mikale goya.”
24.37: Watinuka na wazangudumba na wejesa kota wangulyona ilaika
24.38: Na heye kawalonjela, “Lekachoni mwangisinza? Na mmemile majesa Mnhumbula za hemwe?
24.39: Ila Mlole moko na magulu ga heni nda yuye. Mbateni mndole, mina ilaika lyahela lukuli na mizeje kota vyommbona.”
24.40: Na loyasindile kulonga ago, kawalajila moko na magulu.
24.41: Lowali wekale wabubuwale aku hambe wakunde kwa kusangalala, nakawauza, “Hano mwanacho chinhu cheng'ha chila cha kulya?”
24.43: Yesu kahola na kalya weng'ha womona.
24.44: Hamba nakawalonjela, “Ahino ndokota vonandikulonjeleni londali hamwe na hemwe. Goye geng'ha ga heni, mizilo ja Musa na gandichigwe kuli vitabu vya waloli na zabuli.”
24.45: Na baho Yesu kawagubulila luhala yogana wavizele Maandiko Matakatifu
24.46: Nakawalonjela, “Yandichigwa hino, Kilistu Mlohozi kogazigwa na zuwa lya kadatu kozilipuka.
24.47: Na baho iganigwa kwa itagwa lya heye isi zeng'ha kulawa Yelusalemu zidamuligwe mbuli zinojile kota wanhu wanguganigwa kumgalamchila Nguluwi na Nguluwi kowosela gehile ga hewo.
24.48: Na hemwe mokwimilila mbuli azo, na azo ziganigwa mkazilavile ulolezi.
24.49: Na Heni baha ndowegalila yula Mhaza nayalagane na hetwe komlajiza, ila mbeteze mbaka homchigalilwa mong'ho kulawa kilanga.” Yesu kanguholigwa kuluta kilanga (Malichi 16:19-20; Madito 1:9-11)
24.50: Yolawa kawalongoza hafungo ha muji mbaka Betaniya, na heye kenula mhoko gake kuchanya na kawatambichiza.
24.51: Loyawawichile moko na kuatambichiza, kawaleka, kaholigwa kuluta kilanga.
24.52: Na hewo wamfugamila wahiluka Yelusalemu, wawele wasangalale ng'hatu,
24.53: Wekala kuli luga lwa ng'handa ya Nguluwi womtogola Nguluwi, mhela weng'ha.

1.1: Aho mwaluko kwali na yumwe yochemigwa Luzi, na heye luzi nayali hamwe na Nguluwi, na heye Luzi nayali Nguluwi.
1.2: Kulawa mwaluko Luzi nayali hamwe na Nguluwi.
1.3: Kwa kukolela heye, vinhu vyeng'ha navilumbigwa. Kuduhu chinhu ne chimwe chilumbigwe kuduhu heye.
1.4: Heye nayali mwaluko wa ukomu, na auno ukomu wali lumuli lwa wanhu.
1.5: Na lumuli alo lwangumwesela kutitu, na ako kutitu kulemwela kuusuma.
1.6: Nguluwi nakamlajiza munhu yumwe, itagwa lyake Yohani.
1.7: Ayo nakoya yawalonjele wanhu weng'ha mbuli za alo lumuli, wanhu weng'ha wahuliche ulonzi wa heye na wakunde.
1.8: Heye hawele alo lumuli, ila nakoya hela kuwalonjela wanhu mbuli ya alo lumuli.
1.9: Alu ndo lumuli lwa kukomya ng'hatu, lumuli lulinguya kuli isi na kuwamulichila wanhu weng'ha.
1.10: Lelo Luzi nayali mu isi, na kukolela heye Nguluwi nakalumba isi, ila wanhu wa isi nahawamkundile heye.
1.11: Nakoya hali isi ya heye yuye, ila wanhu wali hali isi hake hawambochele.
1.12: Ila wala wanhu wambochele na wamkundile, nakawapa ludali lwa kuwa wana wa Nguluwi.
1.13: Hawali wana wa Nguluwi kwa nyhala za chiwunhu, kahi kwa ludali lwa lukuli na ligano lya munhu, ila kwa heye yawaditile wana wa Nguluwi kwa danda ya heye.
1.14: Na heye luzi kawa munhu na kikala kwa hetwe. Na hetwe tuwona ukulu wa heye, ukulu wa heye yawele Mwana yaliyeka wa Mhaza, kamema isungu na kukomya.
1.15: Yohani nakawalonjela wanhu mbuli ya heye, nayali yochemelela yolonga, “Ayu ndo ndalindilonga hala hondonjile, ‘Kanguya munhu yumwe hambele hangu, yawele mkulu kwa heni, kwa vila nayalibaha heni sinavumbuka.’ ”
1.16: Kwa winji wa isungu lyake, hetwe tweng'ha tubochela kunoga kwa heye.
1.17: Nguluwi katupa Malajizo kukolela Musa, ila Yesu Kilistu katugalila kunoga kwa heye na kukomya.
1.18: Kuduhu munhu yamuwene Nguluwi mhela woneche ula. Mwanage yaliyeka, yewhanile na Nguluwi, yawele hamwe na Mhaza, ayo ndo yatuditile tumzele Nguluwi. Ulolezi ya Yohani Mbatiza (Matei 3:1-12; Malichi 1:1-8; Lukasi 3:1-18)
1.19: Na awu ndo ulolezi Yohani nayaulavile mhela vilongozi wa Wayahudi kula Yelusalemu loyawalajize watambika wa Walawi kwa heye wamuuze, “Hegwe kwa whaani?”
1.20: Yohani nahalemile kwidichila goyauzigwe, ila heye kalonga yodamla, “Heni siwele Kilistu Mlohozi.”
1.21: Baho wamuuza, Lelo hegwe kwa whaani? Hegwe uli Eliya? Kawedichila, Hebu. Heni siwele Eliya! Wamuuza, Lelo hegwe kwa Mloli? Heye kedichila, Hebu!
1.22: Ahyo wamuuza, “Lelo kwa whaani? Kwangulonga ndaze kwa hegwe gwegwe? Tulonjele leka tuwahilusile ko kowutulajize goukwidichila.”
1.23: Yohani kawedichila, “Heni ndo yula mloli Isaya yalonjile mbuli za heye kuta, “ ‘Lizi lya munhu lyanguhulikwa hagunuche, mgongomanyileni Mkulu nzila ya heye!’ ”
1.24: Awo wanhu wali watumigwa na chikundi chichemigwe Mafalisayo.
1.25: Hamba wamuuza Yohani, “Wone hegwe huli Kilistu Mlohozi na huwele Eliya na huwele mloli wa Nguluwi, lelo Iekachoni kwangubatiza wanhu?”
1.26: Yohani nakedichila, “Heni ndangubatiza kwa mazi, ila hali hemwe kabaho yumwe yo hamzelele.
1.27: Kulawa heni kanguya yunji hambele hangu, na heni siganigwa hebu kudohola ng'weso za makwamba ga heye.”
1.28: Geng'ha aga nagalawila akula Betaniya, kumwambu kwa lwanda lwa Yolodani, Yohani koyali yobatiza wanhu. Yesu ndo Ing'holo lyana lya Nguluwi
1.29: Mitondo iyage, Yohani nakamona Yesu yokuya koyali, kata, Mlole, “Mwanaing'holo lya Nguluwi, yalingusa gehile ga wanhu wa isi yeng'ha!
1.30: Ayu ndo munhu nandonjile mbuli za heye hala hondonjile, ‘Kanguya munhu kumbele kwa heni, yawele mkulu kwa heni, kwa vila nayalibaha heni sinavumbuka!’
1.31: Heni hano nasimzelele, ila mbuya kuwabatiza kwa malenga leka wanhu wa Isilaeli wamzele.”
1.32: Yohani kalavya ulolezi wa heye kalonga, “Nandimona Muhe Yelile yodulika kota ng'hunda kulawa kilanga ikwima kumutwi kwa heye.
1.33: Heni nasimzelele, ila yula Yanhumile heni ndiwabatize wanhu kwa malenga nakandonjela, ‘Munhu yula youmona Muhe Yelile yomlagalila kulawa kilanga na kikala mchanya hake, ayu ndo yobatiza kwa Muhe Yelile.’
1.34: Heni ndimona na kukunda kuta ayu ka Mwana wa Nguluwi.” Walanguswa wa mwaluko wa Yesu
1.35: Hamitondo, Yohani nayali yemile na Walanguswa wa heye weli.
1.36: Vyowamuwene Yesu yokola, kalonga, “Mlole! Ayu ndo Mwanaing'holo wa Nguluwi!”
1.37: Awala walanguswa weli nawamhulika Yohani yolonga ago, wamuwinza Yesu.
1.38: Lelo Yesu nakahinduka, na loyawawene awo walanguswa womuwinza heye, kawauza, “Mwangupala choni?” Hewo nawedichila, “Labi, kwangikala kohi?” (Labi mina yake mlangusa).
1.39: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Muye, na hemwe mohona.” Hewo walanguswa wamuwinza, wahona honhu hoyali ngikala, wawasa na heye zuwa alyo. Yali ifichile saa kumi matinazo.
1.40: Andeleya, mng'holoze Simoni Petili, nayali yumwe wa awo weli wamhuliche Yohani yolonga ago, ahyo wamuwinza Yesu.
1.41: Andeleya vyoyamfichile mkulugwe, Simoni, nakamlonjela, “Tumona Kilistu Mlohozi.”
1.42: Hamba kamwigala Simoni kwa Yesu. Na heye Yesu kamlola Simoni, nakamlonjela, “Itagwa lyako ni Simoni mwana Yohani. Ila kulawa sambi kochemigwa Kefa.” Chigiliki itagwa Petili lilinguzeleka kota italawe. Yesu kanguwachema Filipo na Natanaeli
1.43: Zuwa liyage Yesu nakalapa yalute Galilaya. Kamfika Filipo nakamlonjela, “Umbinze.”
1.44: Filipo nayali mwenyeng'haye wa Betisaida, muji yoyalingikala Andeleya na Petili.
1.45: Na heye Filipo nakamfika Natanaeli, nakamlonjela, “Natumona munhu Musa yamwandiche mchitabu cha Malajizo, na waloli, Yesu mwana wa Yusufu, wa Nasaleti.”
1.46: Natanaeli kamuza Filipo, “Ahi chinhu chinojile choweza kulawa Nasaleti?” Filipo kamwidichila, “Uye ulole.”
1.47: Yesu vyowamuwene Natanaeli yokuwa kwa heye, kasima mbuli za heye zeng'ha, nakawalonjela, “Mlole, ayu ndo Muisilaeli ng'hatu, kuduhuli udesi mgati mwake.”
1.48: Natanaeli kamuuza Yesu kalonga, “Kunzela ndaze heni?” Yesu nakamwidichila, “Nandikona ahala nalowikale hasi hali igodi lya msada, lonaung'hali chemigwa na Filipo nandikona.”
1.49: Natanaeli kedichila, Mlangusa, hegwe ndo Mwana wa Nguluwi! Kahi uli Mndewa wa Isilaeli.
1.50: Yesu nakamlonjela Natanaeli kalonga, “Kwangukunda kwa vila ndikulonjela nandikona hasi hali igodi lya msada? Kogona makulu kusinda aga.”
1.51: Yesu nakalutilila kuwalonjela hewo kalonga, “Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, mokona kilanga kugubuka na wahilisi wa kilanga wa Nguluwi wokwina na kudulika ha Mwana wa Munhu.”

2.1: Zuwa lya kadatu kwali na mnvina ya munhu yohesa ako Kana Galilaya, na mayake Yesu nayali baho.
2.2: Heye Yesu nayali yalalikwe kuli mnvina ya kuhesa hamwe na walanguswa wa heye.
2.3: Divai vyoimalile, mayake Yesu nakamlonjela mwanage kalonga, “Wahela divai.”
2.4: Yesu nakamwidichila mayake kalonga, “Mamo lekachoni ulingundonjela mbuli ino, mhela wa heni hainoya.”
2.5: Mayake Yesu nakawalonjela wakolamijito kalonga, “Choyowalonjela kukola, mkole hihyo.”
2.6: Baho kwali na mibiga sita ja maganga, ibiga limwe lyali lihega kuwika madebe meli ama gadatu. Jali jiwichigwe aho kwa mbuli ya kihendo cha Wayahudi cha kihovuga.
2.7: Yesu nakawalonjela awala wanhu wali wotanza ahala honhu kalonga, “Mjele malenga aji mbiga jimeme.” Wawika malenga mli mibiga mbaka jimema.
2.8: Hamba kawalonjela, “Lelo deheni mumgalile mkulu wa mvina auno.”
2.9: Mkulu wa mnvina nakagajeza ago malenga gagaluche kuwa divai. Heye nahavizelele koilawile, ila wala vitumagwa wadehile gala malenga nawavizela. Mkulu wa mvina kamchema mkasano,
2.10: nakamlonjela, “Chila munhu kagugongomanya Divai inojile ilongole, na wone wanhu wawe wagalile, ndo kangulavya aila ihile. Leka hegwe kuwika ujimbi inojile mbaka sambi!”
2.11: Yesu nakadita ulajilo awu wa mwaluko ako Kana, mli isi ya Galilaya. Ako nakalajila ukulu wa heye, na walanguswa wa heye wamkunda.
2.12: Ago logapulute, Yesu nakadulika hamwe na mamo wa heye, wang'holoze na walanguswa wa heye. Waluta Kapanaumu, kula nawekala kwa mazuwa mado. Yesu kangwijila mung'handa wa Nguluwi (Matei 21:12-13; Malichi 11:15-17; Lukasi 19:45-46)
2.13: Mnvina ng'hulu ya Pasaka ya Wayahudi nayali habehi. Ahyo Yesu nakaluta Yelusalemu.
2.14: Loyenjille mli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakawafika wanhu woguza misenga na ming'holo na ng'hunda, na kwali wanhu wanji wali wovunza sendi wachikale muli visanya jawo.
2.15: Baho kabota ng'hobwa ya isali, kaluka kuwawinga wanhu weng'ha na misenga na ming'holo jawo hanze ha Ng'handa ya Nguluwi. Kagwisa visanya ja awala wavunza sendi na kuboholanga sendi zawo.
2.16: Nakawalonjela wala waweleguza ng'hunda kalonga, “Muuse vinhu avi aha. Mleche kugalula ng'handa wa Mhaza wa heni kuta soko!”
2.17: Awala walanguswa wakumbuchila Maandiko Matakatifu gangulonga, “igano lyangu kwa ng'handa ya hegwe kong'hopola.”
2.18: Wayahudi wamwe nawamuuza Yesu, “Kodita chinduza nduza chachi, kutulajila kuta kwanayo hachi ya kudita aga?”
2.19: Yesu nakawedichila kawalonjela, “Beneni ng'handa ino ya Nguluwi na heni ndoizenga kwa mazuwa gadatu.”
2.20: Wayahudi nawalonga, “Ng'handa ayi ya Nguluwi naizenjigwa kwa mihela makumi gane na sita. Hegwe koizenga ndaze kwa mazuwa gadatu hela?”
2.21: Ila ng'handa nayali yolonga Yesu nayali lukuli lwake.
2.22: Loyazilpuche kulawa koyatiligwe, awala walanguswa wakumbuchila nagoyalonjile Yesu. Ahyo nawakunda Maandiko Matakatifu na luzi loyalonjile Yesu. Yesu kazizela nhumbula za wanhu weng'ha
2.23: Yesu loyalutile Yelusalemu kuli mnvina ya Pasaka, wanhu wenji nawamkunda wawene ulajilo wa vinduzanduza vyoyaditile.
2.24: Ila Yesu hali yowakunda kwa vila nakawazela weng'ha.
2.25: Nahaviganile kulonjelwa choneche kuli mbuli za wanhu kwa vila nakagazela goya galimgati mwa nhumbula za hewo.

3.1: Kwali na Mkulu yumwe wa Wayahudi, itagwa lyake lyali Nikodemo. Mkulu ayu nayali mli chilundo cha Mafalisayo.
3.2: Nechilo imwe nakaluta kwa Yesu na kumuuza, “Mlangusa, tuvizela kota hegwe uli mlangusa yatumigwe na Nguluwi, kwa vila kuduhu munhu yolajila viduzanduza kota vyoudita hegwe wone hawele na ludali lya Nguluwi.”
3.3: Yesu nakedichila, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, kuduhu munhu yowona Undewa wa Nguluwi mbaka yavumbuche lwa keli.”
3.4: Nikodemo nakauza, “Yowa ndaze munhu mkulu yavumbuche lwa keli? Hambi koweza kwinjila kuli munda wa mayake ndo yavumbuche lwa keli!”
3.5: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, kuduhu munhu yokwinjila kuli Undewa wa Nguluwi wone havumbuche kwa malenga na kwa Muhe Yelile.
3.6: Munhu kovumbuka chilukuli na Mhaza wa heye na mayake, ila kovumbuka kwa Muhe Yelile.
3.7: Uleche kijesa vyondikulonjele kota igana mvumbuche lwa keli.
3.8: Mbeho iputaga kweng'ha kota vyoilingugana, hegwe kohulika lizi vyoidita, ila kowa huvizelele kota kohi koulawila na kohi kouluta. Ahi ndo vyoili kwa munhu yaleligwe kwa Muhe Yelile.”
3.9: Nikodemo nakamuuza, “Mbuli azi zowa ndaze?”
3.10: Yesu nakedichila, “Hegwe uli mlangusa mkulu ahano Isilaeli ila hugazelele agano?
3.11: Ndangukulonjela ndikomya, twangulonga agala tugazelele na twangulonga ulolezi kwa agala tugawene, ila kuduhu munhu yowakola lupichi kubochela aga tutumigwe.
3.12: Wone hamkundile hondiwalonjele mbuli za isi ino, hambi mokunda ndaze hondiwalonjela mbuli za kilanga?
3.13: Kuduhu munhu yalutile kilanga ila heye Mwana wa Munhu, yaduliche kulawa kilanga.”
3.14: Kota vila Musa vyowenule izoka lya shaba akula kugunuche, hiho yowa kuli Mwana wa Munhu kokwinuligwa kuchanya,
3.15: leka munhu yoneche yomkunda yawe na ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.
3.16: Nguluwi nakawagana wanhu wa isi, mbaka kamigala Mwanage yaliyeng'ha leka chila munhu yomkunda yaleche kubagama ila yawe na ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.
3.17: Nguluwi hamwigale Mwanage kuli isi leka yawataguse wanhu, ila kamigala yawalohole.
3.18: Munhu yoneche yamkundile Yesu kahela utaguso, ila munhu yohomkunda, mina katagusigwa, kwavila kalema kumkunda Mwana yaliyeng'ha wa Nguluwi.
3.19: Utaguso awo ndo uno. Lumuli luya kuli isi yeng'ha ila wanhu nawagana kutitu woleka lumuli, kwa vila madito gawo geha.
3.20: Chila munhu yalingudita gehile kangulema lumuli, nahokuya kuli lumuli mina halingugana gehile ga heye goneche.
3.21: Leka munhu yoneche yalingudita ga kukomya galingumnojeza Nguluwi koyaga kuli lumuli, leka madito ga heye goneche gaditigwa kwa kumtogola Nguluwi. Yesu na Yohani Mbatiza
3.22: Kumala kwa ago, Yesu nakafika mkowa wa Yudeya hamwe na walanguswa wa heye. Nakekala ako hamwe na hewo hado, yowabatiza wanhu.
3.23: Yohani na heye nayali yobatiza wanhu ako Ainoni, behi na Salemu, mina ako kwali na malenga menji. Wanhu nawaluta kwa heye, na heye nakawabatiza.
3.24: Mhela awo Yohani nayang'hali hindilwa mchinwengho.
3.25: Kitwanza nakulawila hagati kwa wamwe wa walanguswa wa Yohani na Myahudi yumwe kuli chihendo cha kihovuga leka wamlande Nguluwi.
3.26: Walanguswa awo nawamlutila Yohani na kumlonjela, “Mlangusa, yula munhu yawele hamwe na hegwe kumwambu kwa Yolodani, na hegwe ulonjile mbuli za heye, sambi na heye kangubatiza, na wanhu weng'ha wanguluta kwa heye!”
3.27: Yohani nakamlonjela, “Munhu howeza kuwa na chinhu wone hapeligwe kulawa kilanga.
3.28: Na hemwe namwe moweza kulavya ulolezi kota nandonga, ‘Heni siwele Kilistu Mlohozi, ila nhumigwa leka ndimlongole!’
3.29: Mkasano wa heye mzenjele, ila mganwa wa mzenjele, yalingwima na kuhulichiza, kasechelelaga hoyohulika mzenjele yolonga. Ndo usangalalo wa heni vyowenele.
3.30: Imgana heye yazidi kuwa na ukulu, na heni ndiwe mdodo.” Yalinguya kulawa kilanga
3.31: Munhu yawele nguya kulawa kilanga ka mkulu kwa weng'ha, yalingulawa kuli isi ndo wa isi, na hulongaga mbuli za isi. Ila yalinguya kulawa kilanga mkulu kusinda weng'ha.
3.32: Heye kalongaga gala goyawene na kugahulika, ila kuduhu ne munhu yalingukunda usenga wa heye.
3.33: Ila munhu yoneche yalingukunda usenga wa heye kangukangaza kuta Nguluwi kangukomya ng'hatu.
3.34: Yula yatumigwe na Nguluwi kangulonga ulonzi wa Nguluwi, mina Nguluwi kampaga munhu Muhe wa heye kulihela mmbaka.
3.35: Mhaza kangumgana Mwana wa heye na kangumpa vinhu vyeng'ha mmoko mwake.
3.36: Yalingumkunda Mwana kanawo ukomu wa mazuwa gose, yohambe yamkunde Mwana howa na ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, na heye kopona kuli kuzudila kwa Nguluwi.

4.1: Mafalisayo nawahulika kota, Yesu kangikala yowapata na kuwabatiza walanguswa wenji kusinda Yohani.
4.2: Heye Yesu nayali hambe yabatize wanhu, walanguswa ndo wali wobatiza wanhu.
4.3: Yesu vyoyahuliche ago gowaliwolonga wanhu, koka Yudeya nakahiluka Galilaya.
4.4: Loyali yoluta mnzila naimgana yakolele Samaliya.
4.5: Lelo loyafichile Sukali, muji umwe wa Samaliya, habehi na mgunda wa Yakubu nayampele mwanage Yusufu.
4.6: Honhu aho hali na ideho lya Yakubu. Yesu vyoyali yatochile kujenda, kekalisa hanyi hafungo ha ideho. Yali iluta saa sita nemisi.
4.7: Baho koya mdala wa Samaliya kudeha malenga. Yesu nakamlonjela, “Umhe malenga nyinwe.”
4.8: Mhela awo walanguswa wa heye nawaluta kuli muji kugula ndiya.
4.9: Yula mdala Msamalia nakalonga, “Hegwe kwa Myahudi na heni nda Msamaliya, iwa ndaze kwangundanda malenga ga kunwa?” Kwa vila Wayahudi na Wasamaliya hawahangaga vinhu.
4.10: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Hegwe na uvizele choyokupa Nguluwi, na munhu wachi yalingukulanda malenga, na wahamlandile heye malenga galingigala ukomu nayahakupele.”
4.11: Mdala yula kamuuza, “Mkulu, hegwe kwahela chinhu cha kudehela malenga, na ideho liluta hasi lukami, kogapata kohi malenga ga ukomu?
4.12: Hambi hegwe kwa mkulu kusinda mhaza wa hetwe Yakubu yatupele ideho lino, heye kanwa malenga gano na wanage na misenga jake?”
4.13: Yesu nakedichila, “Wanhu weng'ha walingunwa malenga aga, woza ngona ng'halu kahi,
4.14: ila munhu yonwa malenga ga heni hokona ng'halu ne hado. Malenga gowa nzasa imwigalila malenga ga ukomu. Kahi gompa ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.”
4.15: Ayula mdala nakamlonjela Yesu, “Mkulu, umhe heni ago malenga ndeche kuyona ng'halu iyage na ndoleka kuya ahano kudeha malenga.”
4.16: Yesu nakamlonjela ayula mdala, “Ulute kamcheme mlume wa hegwe uye naye ahano.”
4.17: Ayula mdala nakamwidichila, “Ndahela mlume.” Yesu nakedichila, “Nakukomya vyoulonjile kwahela mlume.
4.18: Nakuholigwa na walume wahano, na mlume ulingikala naye sambi hawele mlume wa hegwe. Goulonga kukomya.”
4.19: Yula mdala nakamlonjela, “Mkulu, ndangukona hegwe kwa mloli wa Nguluwi.
4.20: Wasekulu wa hetwe wali wotambichiza Nguluwi kuli chidunda chino, ila hemwe Wayahudi mwangulonga Yelusalemu ndo honhu ha kutambichiza Nguluwi.”
4.21: Yesu nakamlonjela yula mdala, “Mdala ukunde gondilonga, mhela wanguya wanhu howomtambichiza Nguluwi kuli chidunda chino ama kula Yelusalemu.
4.22: Hemwe Wasamaliya hamzelele yalikohi wa kumtambichiza, ila hetwe Wayahudi tumzela yalikohi wa kumtambichiza, kwa vila ulohozi wolawa kwa Wayahudi.
4.23: Ila mhela wanguya nawabaha ufika, walingutambichiza wokomya, womtambichiza Mhaza wolongozwa kwa Muhe Yelile na kukomya.
4.24: Nguluwi ndo Muhe. Ahyo wanhu walingumtambichiza, wamtambichize kwa kulongozwa kwa Muhe na kukomya.”
4.25: Mdala nakamlonjela Yesu hino, “Ndivizela kota Masiha yochemigwa Kilistu Mlohozi kokuya. Hoyokuya, kotulonjela hetwe mbuli zeng'ha.”
4.26: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Heni ndo nene ndilingulonga na hegwe!”
4.27: Baho du, walanguswa nawahiluka, wabubuwala vyowamfichile Yesu yolonga na mdala. Ila kwali kuduhu ne yumwe yamuuzile ayula mdala kota, “Kwangugana choni?” Nakumuuza Yesu, “Ndaze kwangulonga na ayu mdala?”
4.28: Hamba ayula mdala nakaleka chiya cha malenga, kahiluka kuluga kuwalonjela wanhu,
4.29: Muye mlole, munhu yandonjele heni geng'ha gong'holile, kowa yawele Kilistu Mlohozi?
4.30: Baho wanhu nawoka kuli muji nawaluta koyali Yesu.
4.31: Mhela wuwo walanguswa wali womdedeza Yesu, “Mlangusa, ulye chilyo.”
4.32: Ila heye nakawedichila, “Ndina chilyo cha kulya cho hamchizelele hebu.”
4.33: Walanguswa nawaluka kiwuza hewo waliyeka, “Hambi kwali na munhu yamigalile chilyo?”
4.34: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Chilyo cha heni chowa kudita vyoyaganile heye yanhumile na kukola mbuli zoyalajize.
4.35: Vyomzowele kulonga, ‘Jinghali myezi jine hela mhela wa mbena.’ Ila ndangukulonjelani mlole goya kuli migunda, vilyo vikangala goya kubenigwa.
4.36: Ayula yokola mijito ya mbena, kowa yopegwa sendi, na kukungajiza chilyo kuli ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, yumwe yonyala na yumwe yobena, weng'ha wowa wosechelela hamwe.
4.37: Kwa vila ulonzi awu ukomya, yumwe konyala na yumwe kobena.
4.38: Ndiwalajiza hemwe mkabene kuli migunda johamkolile mijito, wanji wochitunya hala na hemwe mohola hela.”
4.39: Wasamaliya kuli muji ula nawamkunda Yesu kota ayula mdala vyoyawalonjele, “Kandonjela geng'ha gonditile.”
4.40: Wasamaliya vyowoyile kwa Yesu, nawamdedeza yekale na hewo. Yesu kekala na hewo mazuwa meli.
4.41: Wanhu wenji ng'hatu nawakunda kwa mbuli ya usenga wa Yesu.
4.42: Wamlonjela ayula mdala, “Hetwe hambe tukunde hela kwa mbuli ya ulonzi wa hegwe, ila hetwe twetwe tumhulika na tuvizela kota ayu ndo Mlohozi wa isi yeng'ha.” Yesu kangumlohola mwana wa mkulu wa wamizi wa Lumi
4.43: Lowekale mazuwa meli, Yesu koka aho kaluta Galilaya.
4.44: Kwa vila Yesu nakatawiza, “Mloli hatogolagwa hebu kuli isi ya heye.”
4.45: Lelo vyowafichile Galilaya, wanhu ahala wambochela, kwa vila nawo nawaluta kuli mnvina ya Pasaka, nawagona geng'ha gowaditile ako Yelusalemu kuli mnvina ila.
4.46: Yesu nakafika kahi ako Kana iwele Galilaya, konayagalule malenga gawa divai. Kwali na mkulu wa wamizi mloma, nayali na mwana mtamwa ako Kapanaumu.
4.47: Lelo mkulu ayo wa isi loyahuliche Yesu koya yolawila Yudeya mbaka Galilaya, kaluta kumlanda yamlohole mwanage msongolo yawele mtamwa lajilaji.
4.48: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Kuduhu munhu ne yumwe, yokunda mbaka yavyone vinduzanduza na ulajilo.”
4.49: Ayula mkulu wa undewa wa isi nakamlonjela Yesu, “Mkulu, dedede, tulute himahima mwanangu hanabagama.”
4.50: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ulute kaye komfika mwanago yawele mkomu.” Ayula munhu nakakunda goyalonjile Yesu, koka kaluta kaye.
4.51: Vyoyali yoluta mnzila kuza kaye, kating'hana na vitumagwa wa heye, nawamlonjela, mwanago mkomu.
4.52: Heye nakawauza, wali mhela wachi? Nawamlonjela, “Yali ifichile saa saba nemisi, utamwa lowaluche kumlechela.”
4.53: Baho ayula mkulu nakakumbuchila nayali ndo mihela jijila Yesu vyoyamlonjele kota, “Mwanago kowa mkomu.” Baho ivyazi lyake nawakunda goyalonjile Yesu.
4.54: Achi chali chinduzanduza cha keli Yesu yalajile vyoyalawile Yudeya kuluta Galilaya.

5.1: Vyogamalile ago Yesu nakaluta Yelusalemu. Na ako kwali na mnvina ya Wayahudi.
5.2: Ako Yelusalemu habehi na chihindilo chikulu luchemigwa Chihindilo cha ming'holo, kwali na izimbo na hafungo hake hali na vibumuli vihano, Waebulaniya wali wochema Betisata.
5.3: Na mumo mvibumuli mwali na watamwa wenji wawasile habehi na hali vibumuli, vipofu na wali chete na waziliche lukuli, wekale wobeteza malenga gatiguligwe.
5.4: Kwa vila mhilisi wa Nguluwi kawaga yokuya na kwinjila mli malenga na kugatigulanga na heye yokwaluka kwinjila, kawaga yaloholigwe.
5.5: Baho kwali na munhu yumwe mtamwa, yekale yotamika mihela makumi gadatu na nane.
5.6: Yesu vyoyamuwene munhu ayula yatambalize baho, kavizeela kota yaliyokugula kulawa katali. Ahyo nakamuuza, “Ndaze, kwangugana uwe mkomu?”
5.7: Ayula mtamwa nakedichila, “Mkulu, ndahela munhu ahano wa kunyasula wanhumbuchize mchihengo cha izimbo malenga ho gatiguche. One njeze kwinjila, munhu yunji kangulongola.”
5.8: Yesu nakamwidichila, nakamlonjela, “Winuche uhole mcheka wa hegwe ujende.”
5.9: Baho du, ayula mtamwa kawa mkomu, kahola mcheka wa heye kaluka kujenda. Mbuli ayi na ikoleka Zuwa lya Kwesela.
5.10: Wayahudi wamwenga, wamlonjela yula munhu yaloholigwe, “Lehano ndo Zuwa lya Kwesela haiwa goya kupika lutenvu lwako.”
5.11: Munhu yaloholigwe nakawedichila, “Munhu yanditile hino kandonjela nyhole lutenvu lwangu njende.”
5.12: Wamuuza heye wata, “Yalikohi yakulonjele hegwe widwiche lutenvu lwako ujende?”
5.13: Heye nahamzelele munhu yamlohole, kwa vila Yesu nayali yochile honhu hala, na baho kwali na lung'hongola lwa wanhu.
5.14: Hamba Yesu nakamfika ayula munhu yaloholigwe mli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, na kumlonjela, “Uhulichize sambi kwa mkomu, uleche kudita gehile kahi, uleche kufichigwa na mbuli ihile lukami.”
5.15: Hamba ayula munhu kaluta kuwalonjela wakulu wa Wayahudi, nakawalonjela Yesu ndo yaditile hino.
5.16: Hamba wakulu wa Wayahudi waluka kumonela fihi Yesu, kwa vila nakadita mbuli ayo kuli Zuwa lya Kwesela.
5.17: Yesu nakawedichila kawalonjela kata, “Mhaza wa heni kangukola mijito mazuwa gose, na heni ndangudita hiho.”
5.18: Kwa mbuli ya ulonzi awo, wakulu wa Wayahudi walutilila kupala nzila ya kugana kumkopola, hawali kwa vila nakabena mlongo weka wa Zuwa lya Kwesela, ila akula kulonga Nguluwi wali Mhaza wa heye, na ahyo kedita heye kota Nguluwi. Ludali lwa Mwana wa Nguluwi
5.19: Yesu nakawedichila, “Ndangulonga ndikomya, Mwana hokola chila chinhu yaliyeka, koweza kudita chila choyodita Mhaza, kwa vila choyodita Mhaza, Mwana kodita hihila.
5.20: Mhaza kangumgana mwanage na komlajila chila chinhu chowodita Mhaza, kahi komlajila mbuli ng'hulu kusinda ayi, na mweng'ha mobubuwala.
5.21: Kota vila Mhaza vyoyowazilipula wabagame na kuwapa ukomu, hihyo na heye Mwana kowapa ukomu wala walingugana.
5.22: Mhaza homtagusa munhu yoneche, mbuli yeng'ha ya utaguso kamlechela Mwana,
5.23: leka wanhu weng'ha wamdumbe Mwana, kota vyowalingumdumba Mhaza. Heye wali hambe wamdumbe Mwana halingumdumba Mhaza yamtumile.
5.24: “Ndangulonga ndikomya, heye yohulika mbuli ya heni, na kukunda ga heye Yanhumile kowanawo ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma. Hotagusigwa hebu, kowa yalochile kulawa kuli kubagama kwinjila kuli ukomu.
5.25: Ndangulonga ndikomya, mhela wanguya na mina ufika, aho awala wabagame wohulika lizi ya Mwana wa Nguluwi, na hewo woihulika wowa na ukomu.
5.26: Kota vila Mhaza yawele kwaluka kwa ukomu, hihyo kahi vyoyomtogola mwanage yawele mwaluko wa ukomu.
5.27: Nakamwigalila mwanage ludali lwa kutagusa, kwa vila yawele Mwana wa Munhu.
5.28: Mleche kuta ndangudeta, mina mhela wanguya weng'ha wabagame woihulika lizi lya heye Nguluwi.
5.29: Na hewo wozilipuka kulawa kowabagame, na awala waditile ganojile, wozilipuka na kuwa wakomu, na awala waditile gehile wozilipuka na kutagusigwa. Ulolezi wa Yesu
5.30: “Heni siweza kudita cheng'ha chila, ndangutagusa kota vyonyuliche kwa Mhaza, na utaguso wa heni unoga, kwa vila silingudita vyondigana heni, ila vyoyogana heye Yanhumile.”
5.31: “Wone ndichinojeza ndiliyeka, wanhu howokunda ago gondonjile kuta ndikomya.
5.32: Ila kabaho yumwe yolovya ulolezi wa heni, na heni ndivizela kuta geng'ha goyolonga kwa heni kakomya.
5.33: Hemwe na mlajiza usenga kwa Yohani na ulolezi wa heni yoyalonjile kakomya.
5.34: Heni silingitumbila ulolezi wa wanhu, ila ndagulonga mbuli zino leka mloholigwe.
5.35: Yohani nayali kota chenje chikwaka na kumulika na hemwe namwimilila kusechelela alo lumuli kwa mhela udo.
5.36: Ila heni ndangilavila ulolezi kwa mbuli ya heni loyali mkulu ng'hatu kusinda ula wa Yohani. Kwa vila mbuli zondilingukola, mbuli zoyamhele Mhaza ndite, azo zangulajila kota Mhaza ndo yanhumile.
5.37: Na heye Mhaza yanhumile kangulavya ulolezi. Hemwe hamnahulika lizi lya heye, ne kumona kumeho.
5.38: Usenga wa hemwe haulingikala mgati mwa hemwe mina mlema kumkunda yula yanhumile.
5.39: Hemwe mgalolaga goya Maandiko Matakatifu mchijesa kota mgati mwake mopata ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, na aku Gandichigwe gago gangulavya ulolezi wa mbuli za heni.
5.40: Lelo hemwe mwangulema kuwa kwa heni leka muwe na ukomu.
5.42: Ila nandiwazela hemwe, ndivizela kota hemwe hamlingumgana Nguluwi.
5.43: Heni mbuya kwa ludali lwa Mhaza wa heni, ila hambochele. Ila munhu yunji loyokuya kwa ludali lwake, mombochela.
5.44: Mokunda ndaze hanga hemwe mwangugana kutogoligwa hemwe kwa hemwe baho, na hamlingupala kutogoligwa na heye yawele yeka Nguluwi?
5.45: Mleche kijesa kota heni ndoyowalonjeleza kwa Mhaza. Musa yomlingitumbila ndo yowalonjeleza.
5.46: Wone na muwe mumkundile ng'hatu Musa, mwahang'hundile heni kahi, kwa vila Musa nakandika mbuli za heni.
5.47: Wone hamlingukunda gala goyandiche Musa, hambi mokunda ndaze ulonzi wa heni?”

6.1: Ago logapulute, Yesu nakaloka ilamba lya Galilaya, ama ilamba Tibeliya.
6.2: Chilundo chikulu cha wanhu nachimuwinza Yesu kwa wanhu awo wali wagawene goyalajile kwa kuwosa matamwa.
6.3: Yesu nakaluta kuchanya kuchidunda, kekalisa hanyi na walanguswa wa heye.
6.4: Mnvina ya Pasaka ya Wayahudi nayali habehi.
6.5: Yesu nakalola kufungo, nakona lung'hongola lwa wanhu wokuya kuli heye. Ahyo nakamlonjela Filipo, “Kohi kotugula chilyo cha kuwagutiza wanhu weng'ha awa?”
6.6: Yesu nakalonga ahyo kwa kumjeza Filipo, kwavila nakavizela choni chowodita!
6.7: Filipo nakedichila, “Itugana tuwe na sendi denali miya mbili nyinji za kugula chilyo cha kulya wanhu weng'ha wano!”
6.8: Yumwe wa awala walanguswa, Andeleya yawele mkulugwe na Simoni Petili, nakalonga,
6.9: “Hana msongolo baha, kana mibumunda jihano na somba mbili, na vyokwila choni kwa wanhu weng'ha awa?”
6.10: Yesu nakalonga, “Namuwalonjele wanhu wekalise hanyi.” Baho wanhu weng'ha wekalisa hanyi, kwali na walume kota elufu zihano hino.
6.11: Yesu kahola ajila mibumunda, katambichiza na kawamogolela awala wanhu wekalise, kadita hihila na zila somba. Wanhu weng'ha walya kota vyowaganile mbaka weguta.
6.12: Vyowegute, Yesu nakawalonjela walanguswa, “Mlokoteze chilyo chisigale, tuleche kwajiliza chilyo ne hado.”
6.13: Walokoteza upumunizo wa mibumunda na somba, vimema vidoto kumi na vili vyowalechelele wala wanhu.
6.14: Vyowawene ulajilo wa vila vinduzanduza vyoyaditile Yesu, wanhu ahala walonga kota wakomya ayu ndo mloli wa Nguluwi yawele kuya kuli isi.
6.15: Hamba Yesu wavizelele kota wangugana yoye wamkabajize yawe mndewa vyohaviganile, baho nakoka, kaluta kahi kukula kuchidunda. Yesu kangujenda mchanya mmalenga (Matei 14:22-33; Malichi 6:45-52)
6.16: Loyali lufuku, walanguswa wa Yesu wadulika mbaka kuli ilamba.
6.17: Wakwina mli itumbwi leka waloche kuluta Kapanaumu. Nechilo injila, Yesu nayali yang'hali kuwahejelela hebu.
6.18: Ilamba lyaluka kutiguka kwa vila mbeho nayali iputa.
6.19: Walanguswa lowali walutile utali wa chilometa zihano ama sita hino, nawamona Yesu yojenda mchanya mmalenga, yohejelela itumbwi. Nawadumba heko.
6.20: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela, “Nda heni! Mleche kudumba!”
6.21: Hamba nawagana kumwinula kumwinjiza mgati mli itumbwi, na baho itumbwi nalifika kumwambu hafungo koyali yoluta. Wanhu wangumpala Yesu
6.22: Mitondo, chilundo cha awala wanhu wekale hafungo mwa ilamba, na wavizela kota itumbwi limwe hela na lipona ahala honhu. Yesu nahalutile na awala walanguswa, ila walanguswa nawaluta waliyeka.
6.23: Mitumbwi jinji kulawa Tibeliya najuya honhu hala wanhu howadile mibumunda Mkulu loyasindile kumtogola Nguluwi.
6.24: Wanhu awo lowawene ahala honhu haduhuli Yesu na walanguswa wa heye, weng'ha wakwina mli ajila mitumbwi na waluta Kapanaumu kumpala Yesu. Yesu ndo libumunda lya ukomu
6.25: Wanhu vyowamuwene Yesu kumwambu kwa ilamba, wamuuza, “Mlangusa, kuya nili hano?”
6.26: Yesu nakedichila, “Ndangulonga ndikomya, mwangumhala heni haiwele kwa vila vyomuwene ulajilo, ila kwa vila namulya mibumunda na miguta.
6.27: Mleche kugayila chilyo chilingola, iponile migayile chilyo chilingikala kwa mbuli ya ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma. Achi ndo chilyo choyowapani Mwana wa munhu kwa vila kahaguligwa na kukundigwa na Nguluwi Mhaza.”
6.28: Hewo nawamuuza Yesu, “Tudite choni leka tuweze kudita choyalingugana Nguluwi?”
6.29: Yesu nakawedichila, “Ayi ndo mijito yalingugana Nguluwi mdite, mumkunde yula yamlajize.”
6.30: Aho, nawamlonjela, “Kolajila chinduzanduza chachi tuchone ndo tukukunde? Kodita chinhu chachi?
6.31: Wasekulu wa hetwe nawalya tubumunda kula kugunuche, kota gandichigwe vyogalonjile, ‘Na kawalavila hewo chilyo cha kulawa kilanga walye.’ ”
6.32: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, Musa hawapele mibumunda kulawa kilanga, Mhaza wa heni ndo yawapele hemwe mibumunda kulawa kilanga.
6.33: Libumunda lya Nguluwi, ndo ayula yodulika hasi kulawa kilanga yochigala ukomu kwa wanhu wa isi.”
6.34: Nawamlonjela wata, “Mkulu, tupegwe hetwe mibumunda mazuwa gose.”
6.35: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Heni nda chilyo chilingigala ukomu. Heye yokuwa kwa heni hokona nzala hebu, na hewo wokunda ga heni wowa hela ng'halu ng'oo.
6.37: Weng'ha wondipegwa na Mhaza, wokuya kwa heni, na heni simtoza kunze munhu yoneche yokuya kwa heni,
6.38: kwa vila mbuya hanyi kulawa kuchanya kilanga haiwele kwa kudita kota vyondiviganile, ila kwa gala yalingugana Mhaza yanhumile.
6.39: Goyalingugana yula yanhumile ndo aga, ndeche kumwajiliza ne yumwe kwa wala yowamhele, ila ndiwazilipule hewo weng'ha zuwa lya kuduma.
6.40: Choyalingugana Mhaza, ndo achi chila yomona Mwana na kumkunda yawe na ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, na heni ndomzilipula zuwa lya kuduma.”
6.41: Lelo Wayahudi nawaluka kung'ung'uta kwa vila Yesu nakalonga, “Heni nda libumunda lyuyile hasi kulawa kuchanya kilanga.”
6.42: Hamba nawalonga, “Ayu munhu hawele Yesu mwanage Yusufu siyuyu? Tumzela Mhaza na mayake! Lelo yandaze yolonga heye kedulika kulawa kuchanya kilanga?”
6.43: Yesu nakedichila kawalonjela, “Mleche kung'ung'uta mwemwe kwa mwemwe.
6.44: Kuduhu munhu yokuya kuli heni, wone Mhaza yanhumile hamkwejile kuli heni, heni ndomzilipula zuwa lya kuduma.
6.45: Waloli nawandika wata, ‘Wanhu weng'ha wowa walangusigwe na Nguluwi.’ Heye yohulika ga Mhaza na yelanguse ga heye, kokuya kuli heni.
6.46: Chondilonga ndo achi, kuduhu munhu yoneche wamuwene Mhaza, ila yula yalawile kwa Nguluwi, ayo ndo yuye yeka yamuwene Nguluwi.
6.47: Ndangukulonjelani ndikomya, heye munhu yokunda kowa na ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.
6.49: Wasekulu wa hemwe na walya chilyo chichemigwe mana akula kugunuche nawabagama.
6.50: Achi ndo chilyo chuyile kulawa kilanga, yula yolya chilyo acho hobagama hebu.
