6.51: Heni nda chilyo chilingigala ukomu chiduliche kulawa kilanga, wone munhu yalye chilyo chino, kochikala lukami. Na chilyo chondimpa heni, chowa lukuli lwangu ndilulavya kuli ukomu wa wanhu wa isi.”
6.52: Baho hewo Wayahudi nawaluka kulonga longa akuno wazudile, wata, “Yowa ndaze ayu munhu yatupe lukuli lwake tulye?”
6.53: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, wone hamdile lukuli lwa Mwana wa Munhu, na kunwa danda ya heye, mowa hela ukomu mgati mwa hemwe.
6.54: Yula yolya lukuli lwangu na kunwa danda ya heni, kanawo ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, heni ndomzilipula zuwa lya kuduma.
6.55: Lukuli lwangu ndo chilyo ng'hatu, na danda ya heni, ndo cha kunwa ng'hatu.
6.56: Yoneche yolya lukuli lyangu na kunwa danda ya heni, kochikala mgati mwa heni na heni mgati mwa heye.
6.57: Mhaza nayali mkomu kanhuma heni, na ndamkomu kwa mbuli ya heye. Na heye yolya lukuli lwa heni, kowa na ukomu kwa heni.
6.58: Achi ndo chilyo chiduliche hanyi kulawa kilanga, hachiwhanile kota chilyo chowadile wasekulu wabagame. Ila hewo wolya achi chilyo wowa na ukomu wa mazuwa gose.”
6.59: Yesu nakalonga agano koyali yolangusa mng'handa ya kusalila ako Kapanaumu. Ulonzi ulingigala ukomu wa mazuwa gose
6.60: Walanguswa wenji nawamuwinzile Yesu nawahulika ago, walonga, “Ulanguso uno yowa ngondo kuuzela, yalikohi yoweza kuhulichiza?”
6.61: Yesu nakavizeela halonjelwe na munhu, walanguswa wa heye wali wong'ung'uta, nakawauza, “Mbuli ayi, yanguwadita hemwe mdumbe?
6.62: Hamba yowa ndaze, wone mmone Mwana wa Munhu yokwina kuza kula koyalawile?
6.63: Muhe ndo ulingigala ukomu, ludali lwa munhu luliyeng'ha haludita chinhu. Ulonzi wo ndikulonjelani, ndo Muhe wa Nguluwi na ulingigala ukomu.
6.64: Kuna yumwe mwa hemwe kowa hambe yakunde.” Yesu nakalonga hino kwa vila nakavizela koya na wanji hawokunda na yumwe komhinduka.
6.65: Wolawa aho kalonga kahi, “Ahi ndo inhumile ndiwalonjele hemwe, kuduhu munhu yokuya kuli heni mbaka yadite goyalajize Mhaza.”
6.66: Kulawa kwa ago, wenji wa walanguswa wa Yesu nawahiluka kumbele wolema kulutasa na heye kahi.
6.67: Yesu kawauza na awala kumi na weli, “Na hemwe namwe mwangugana kuka?”
6.68: Simoni Petili kamwidichila, “Mkulu, toza kwa whaani? Hegwe kuna ulonzi ulingigala ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.
6.69: Hetwe twangukunda na kuvizela kota hegwe uli yumwe Yelile yalawile kwa Nguluwi.”
6.70: Yesu nakedichila, “Ndiwahagula hemwe kumi na weli, siditile hino? Lelo yumwe wa hemwe, kagaluka Limazoga!”
6.71: Yaliyolonga agala goyokola Yudasi, mwana wa Simoni Isikalioti. Kwa vila Yudasi ndo yomhinduka, hanga na nayali yumwe wa awala kumi na weli.

7.1: Logamalile ago, Yesu nayali yojenda ako Galilaya. Nahaganile kujenda mkowa wa Yudeya kwa vila wandewa wa Wayahudi wali wogana wamkopole.
7.2: Mnvina ya Wayahudi ya vibumuli nayali habehi.
7.3: Lelo wang'holoze Yesu nawamlonjela, “Ulawe ahano, ulute Yudeya leka walanguswa wa hegwe wazone mbuli zoulingudita.
7.4: Munhu halingudita vinhu kwa uviso wone walingugana yazeleche kwa wanhu. Kwa vila kwangudita mbuli zino, lelo wilajile kwa isi yeng'ha
7.5: Na wang'holoze Yesu nawo hawamkundile!”
7.6: Lelo Yesu nakawalojela, “Mhela wa heni unojile haufichile hebu, ila kwa hemwe chila mhela unoga.
7.7: Isi yeng'ha haiwazudila hemwe, ila heni yanguzudila kwa vila heni ndangulavya ulolezi wake kuta goyalingudita geha.
7.8: Hemwe mlute kuli mnvina ayo. Heni siluta hebu ako kuli mnvina, mhela wa heni unojile haufichile.”
7.9: Nakalonga ago hamba kapona kuko Galilaya. Yesu kuli mnvina ya vibumuli
7.10: Wang'holoze lowalutile kuli mnvina, na Yesu naye nakaluta, ila halutile hazelu nakaluta kwa uviso.
7.11: Wakulu wa Wayahudi wali wompala heye kuli mnvina ila nawauza, “Kakohi?”
7.12: Kwali na kuheha kwinji hali wanhu wala. Wamwe wa hewo nawalonga, “Kamunhu yanojile.” Wanji nawalonga, “Hebu! Kanguwajiliza wanhu.”
7.13: Ila kwali kuduhu munhu yajezile kulonga mbuli za heye hazelu kwa kudumba wandewa wa Wayahudi.
7.14: Mnvina ila loyali ifichile hagati, Yesu naye nakaluta kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakaluka kulangusa.
7.15: Lelo Wayahudi na wabubuwala na kulonga, “Munhu ayu kapata kohi elimu na heye halutile kusule?”
7.16: Aho Yesu nakawedichila, “Ulanguso wondilingulangusa hauwele wa heni, ila ulawa kwa yula yanhumile.
7.17: Munhu yalingugana kudita gala goyogana Nguluwi, kovizele kota ulanguso wa heni ulaya kwa Nguluwi, ama heni ndangilonjela hela.
7.18: Heye yalingilonjela hela yuye kangupala kitogola yuye, ila yalingupala kumtogola yula yamtumile, ayo wa kitumbila, na mgati mwake mwahela wihe woneche ula.
7.19: Ndaze, Musa hawapele utaguso? Ahyo, kuduhu ne yumwe wa hemwe yalinguwinza mizilo. Iekachoni mwangugana kung'hopola?”
7.20: Aho wanhu nawamwidichila, “Kuna chijeni hegwe yalikohi yalingugana yakukopole?”
7.21: Yesu nakawedichila, “Kuna mbuli imwe yonditile, na hemwe mwangububuwala.
7.22: Musa nakawapa chila chihendo cha kwinjiza ikumbi. Na chihendo acho hachilawile kwa Musa. Ila na vilawa kwa wasekulu. Sambi hemwe mwangwinjiza munhu ikumbi kuli Zuwa lya Kwesela.
7.23: Hino lelo, munhu kenjizagwa ikumbi kuli Zuwa lya Kwesela, ila yolema malajizo ga Musa galeche kubezigwa, lekachoni mwangunzudila kwa vila ndimdita munhu yawe mkomu ng'hatu Zuwa lya Kwesela?
7.24: Mleche kutagusa mbuli kwa kulola kunze hela, lavyeni utaguso utanganiche.” Hambi ayu ndo Kilistu Mlohozi
7.25: Wamwe wa wanhu wa Yelusalemu nawalonga, “Ndaze, yula munhu walingumpala wamkopole hawele yuyu?
7.26: Mlole sambi! Kanguwakanya hazelu, na kuduhu munhu yalingumlonjela ne chinhu. Ndaze, iwa kota vilongozi wa wamzela ng'hatu ayu ndo Kilistu Mlohozi?
7.27: Kilistu Mlohozi hoyokuya kuduhu munhu yovizela honhu yalawile, ila hetwe tuvizela koyalawile munhu yuno.”
7.28: Lelo Yesu vyoyali yolangusa kuli ng'handa ya Nguluwi kakwiniza lizi na kulonga, “Hambi mvizela. Na kondawile mvizela! Ahyo, suyile kwa ludali lyangu heni baha, ila heye yanhumile heni ndo wakukomya, na hemwe hamzelele.
7.29: Ila heni ndimzela kwa vila ndawa kwa heye, na heye ndo yanhumile.”
7.30: Lelo wanhu na wagana kumibata, ila kuduhu munhu yajezile kumibata kwa vila mhela wa heye hainoya hebu.
7.31: Wenji kulichila chilundo cha wanhu nawamkunda, nawalonga, “Ndaze, Kilistu Mlohozi loyokuya kodita ulajilo mkulu ng'hatu kusinda ayu?” Wamizi wangutumigwa kumibata Yesu
7.32: Mafalisayo nawawahulika wanhu woheha mbuli azo za Yesu. Lelo hewo hamwe na watambika wakulu wawalajiza wamizi wamibate.
7.33: Yesu nakalonga, “Nding'hali na hemwe mhela uchefu, hamba ndoluta kwa heye Yanhumile.
7.34: Momhala heni, ila hammbona hebu, na hala hondiwa hemwe hamfika hebu.”
7.35: Vilongozi wa Wayahudi nawalonga hewo kwa hewo, “Munhu ayu koluta kohi kotulemwela kumfika? Koluta kwa Wayahudi wasambaluche hali Wagilichi, na kuwalangusa Wagilichi?
7.36: Kana mana yachi hoyolonga, ‘Momhala ila hambona, na hala hondiwa hemwe hamfika hebu?’ ” Nzanda za malenga ga ukomu
7.37: Zuwa lila lya kuduma lya mnvina ahyo nayali zuwa itanganiche. Yesu nakema, kachemeleza, “Munhu yoneche yawele na ng'halu, yoye kwa heni yanwe.
7.38: Kota vyogolonga Maandiko Matakatifu, ‘Munhu yalingung'hunda heni, nzanda za malenga galingigala ukomu gobogoma kuli nhumbula ya heye.’ ”
7.39: Nakalonga ago kwa mbuli ya Muhe yawele kwa wala wamkundile heye wombochela. Mhela awo Muhe Yelile nayali hanafika kwa vila Yesu nayali hanapegwa ukulu na Nguluwi. Kibagula kwa wanhu kuli mbuli ya Yesu
7.40: Wanhu wamwe nawamemile hala nawahulika ulonzi awo, nawalonga, “Kakomya munhu ayu ndo yula Mloli!”
7.41: Wanji nawalonga, “Ayu ndo Kilistu Mlohozi!” Ila wanji nawalonga, “Ndaze, hambi mlohozi kolawa Galilaya!
7.42: Maandiko Matakatifu gangulonga ndaze? Gangulonga, Kilistu Mlohozi kolawa lukolo lwa Daudi, kopondigwa ako Betelehemu, muji wa Daudi!”
7.43: Kwa mbuli ya Yesu nakulawila kibagula hali wanhu wala wamemile.
7.44: Wanhu wamwe nawagana kumibata ila kuduhu yajezile kumdoliza. Vilongozi wa Wayahudi hambe wakunde
7.45: Hamba wala wamizi nawahiluka kwa watambika wakulu na Mafalisayo, na hewo nawauza, “Lekachoni hammigale?”
7.46: Wamizi wawedichila, “Kuduhu munhu yadahile kulonga kota heye!”
7.47: Mafalisayo yawauza, “Ndaze, na hemwe namwe kawabadani?
7.48: Ndaze, mina mmona ne chilongozi yumwe wa wanhu, ama yumwe wa Mafalisayo yamkundile heye?
7.49: Ila awa wanhu hawauzelele mzilo wa Musa, wapanjilwa na Nguluwi!”
7.50: Mfalisayo yumwe nayali hala, nayali Nikodemo na yalutile kwa Yesu katali, heye nakawalonjela wayage,
7.51: “Ndaze, mzilo wa hetwe haulingumtagusa munhu ne kumhulika na kuvizela kangudita choni?”
7.52: Na hewo wamwidichila, “Ndaze, hegwe nagwe kulawa Galilaya? Lelo kagakagule Maandiko Matakatifu nagwe kogona kota Galilaya hakulingulawa Mloli.”
7.53: Hamba chila munhu kaluta kaye kwake.

8.1: Yesu nakaluta kuchidunda cha Mizeituni.
8.2: Mitondo kung'hali lufuku, Yesu nakaluta kahi kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi. Wanhu weng'ha wammemelela, na heye kekalisa na nayali yowalangusa.
8.3: Walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo nawamwigala mng'handa mdala wamwibate wodita ung'hondwa. Hamba wamuwika hagati.
8.4: Nawamlonjela Yesu, “Mlangusa, mdala ayu kebatigwa kuli ung'hondwa.
8.5: Kuli Malajizo, Musa kalajiza mdala kota ayu kanguganigwa yatowigwe na maganga mbaka yabagame. Lelo hegwe kwangulonga ndaze?”
8.6: Nawalonga hino kumjeza Yesu, wogana wapalile honhu ha kumtagusa, ila Yesu kenamiza na kukwada na chidole hasi.
8.7: Lowawele womuuza lukami, kenuka na kuwalonjela, “Yumwe wa hemwe, yawele hela gehile, yamtozele iganga lya mwaluko mdala yuno.”
8.8: Hamba kenamiza kahi, kaza kwaandika hasi.
8.9: Lowahuliche ago, waaluka kuka yumweyumwe, walongole wakulu kuli mdodo. Yesu nakapona waliyeka na ayula mdala yemile bahala.
8.10: Yesu loyenuche, nakamuuza ayula mdala, “Wakohi awala wanhu? Ndaze, haduhu ne yumwe yakutaguse kwa wihe?”
8.11: Nakedichila, “Kuduhu ne yumwe, mkulu.” Yesu nakamlonjela, “Goya, na heni sikutagusa kwa wihe hebu, ila ulute uleche kudita kahi gehile.” Yesu ndo lumuli lwa isi
8.12: Yesu nakawalonjela Mafalisayo, “Heni nda lumuli lwa isi, munhu yoneche yombinza heni, hojenda kutitu, ila kowa na lumuli lwa ukomu.”
8.13: Mafalisayo nawamlonjela Yesu, “Hegwe kwangulavya ulolezi uliyeka kota kwa lumuli, awo ulolezi hulingukomya.”
8.14: Yesu nakedichila, “Hebu!,” “Wone ndilingilavila ulolezi ndiliyeka, agala gondiwalonjele ndangukomya kwa vila ndivizela kondawile na kondiluta. Hemwe hamvizelele kondawile na kondiluta.
8.15: Hemwe mwangutagusa kota wanhu vyowalingutagusa, heni silingumtagusa ne munhu.
8.16: Ila wone nhaguse, ndahataguse kwa kukomya kwa vila siwele ndiliyeng'ha kwa alino. Mhaza yanhumile kahamwe na heni.
8.17: Yandichigwa kuli Malajizo ga hemwe kota, wone wanhu weli walavye ulolezi, wowa wokomya.
8.18: Ndangilavila ulolezi ndiliyeng'ha kuta nda whaani, na heye Mhaza yanhumile kuli isi, kangulonga hihyo.”
8.19: Hewo nawamuuza Yesu, “Mhaza wa hegwe kakohi?” Heye nakawedichila, “Hemwe hamnzelele heni wala hamzelele Mhaza wa heni?” “Wone namnzele heni, mwahamzelele na Mhaza wa heni.”
8.20: Yesu nakalonga ago vyoyaliyolangusa kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kuluhengo kowawichile vinhu vyowalavile mli isanduku lya ndolendole. Na kuduhu munhu yamibate, kwa vila mhela wa heye kibatika wali ung'hali. Kondiluta heni hemwe hamfika.
8.21: Yesu kahiluchila kuwalonjela, “Ndanguka, ila hemwe mowa mmhala na mobagama na gehile genu. Kondiluta heni hemwe hamfika.”
8.22: Vilongozi wa Wayahudi nawalonga, “Kanguluta kikopola yaliyeng'ha. Lekachoni kangulonga, kondiluta hemwe hamfika hebu?”
8.23: Yesu nakawedichila, “Hemwe mwa wanhu wa baha hasi, heni ndawa kuchanya. Hemwe mwa wa isi ino, heni silawile isi ino.
8.24: Ndo mana ndiwalonjeleni, kota mobagama kuli gehile gomditile, na mobagama kwa gehile, wone hamlingukunda kota, ‘Heni ndo yuye.’ ”
8.25: Hewo wamuuza, “Hegwe kwa whaani?” Yesu nakedichila, “Kota agala gondiwalonjeleni kulawa mwaluko!
8.26: Ndanago menji ga kulonga na ga kuwatagusa hemwe, ila heye yanhumile kangukomya. Na heni ndanguwalonjela wanhu muisi, mbuli zila hela zonyhuliche kulawa kwa heye.”
8.27: Hawavizelele kota Yesu yaliyolonga mbuli ya Mhaza.
8.28: Hamba Yesu nakalonga na hewo, “Baho hommwinula Mwana wa Munhu, movizela kota, ‘Heni Ndo Yuye’ Hamba movizela kota silingudita kwa ludali lwangu, mina ndangulonga Mhaza goyandanguse.
8.29: Na yula yanhumile heni twahamwe handechile ndiliyeng'ha kwa vila mazuwa gose ndangukola agala galingumnojeza.”
8.30: Wanhu wenji lowahuliche ago yalonjile nawamkunda. Yesu ndo kukomya kowawikani milejehe
8.31: Yesu nayali yowalonjela awala Wayahudi waliwomkunda, Ndangukomya wone mkunde gondiwalangusa, mowa walanguswa wa heni ng'hatu.
8.32: Ahyo movizela kukomya, nako kukomya kowalekani hemwe milejehe.
8.33: Na hewo wamwidichila wata, “Hetwe twa ivyazi lya Abulahamu, na hatuwele vitumagwa wa munhu yoneche. Lekachoni kwangulonga, ‘Mowa milejehe?’ ”
8.34: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndangulonga ndikomya, munhu yoneche yalingudita gehile, kowa chitumagwa wa gehile.
8.35: Chitumagwa hawaga yehanzile na lukolo mazuwa gose, ila mwana kawaga wa lukolo lulula mazuwa gose.
8.36: Wone Mwana yawaleche milejehe, mowa milejehe ng'hatu.
8.37: Ndivizela kota mwa ivyazi lya Abulahamu. Ila mwangugana mng'hopole kwa vila hamlingubochela gondilinguwalangusa.
8.38: Ndangulonga agala gondigawene kwa Mhaza wa heni, ila hemwe namwe mwangudita kota vyomlonjelwe na mhaza wa hemwe.”
8.39: Hewo nawamwidichila, “Mhaza wa hetwe Abulahamu.” Yesu nakawalonjela, “Wone namuwe ivyazi lya Abulahamu, mwahaditile kota vyoyaditile heye.
8.40: Geng'ha gonditile ndo kuwalonjela ga kukomya gonyhuliche kwa Nguluwi, ila hemwe mwangujeza kung'hopola. Abulahamu haditile chinhu kota chino!
8.41: Hemwe mwangukola cho yakolile mhaza wa hemwe.” Hewo wamlonjela wata, “Hetwe hatuwele vilokote, twanaye Mhaza yumwe hela, na heye ndo Nguluwi.”
8.42: Yesu kawalonjela, “Wone Nguluwi nayawe Mhaza wa hemwe, mwahanganile heni, kwa vila mbuya kulawa kwa Nguluwi, na sambi nda hano. Suyile kwa ludali lwangu nene, leka heye nakanhuma.
8.43: Lekachoni hamlinguweza gondilinguwalonjela? Kwa vila hambe muhulichize usenga wa heni.
8.44: Hemwe mwa wana wa mhaza wa hemwe, Limazoga, choyalingugana mhaza wa hemwe, ndo mlingugana kudita. Heye koyaluchile nayali yokopola, na hemile kuli kukomya, kwa vila munhu ayu nayali mdesi. Wone yalonje udesi, kangulajila kota vyoyali, hambi nayali mdesi mhaza wa udesi.
8.45: Ila kwa vila heni ndanguwalonga ndikomya, ndo mina hemwe hamlingukunda.
8.46: Yalikohi yumwe mwa hemwe yolavya ulolezi kota heni ndita gehile? Wone ndilingulonga ndikomya, iwa ndaze hamlingukunda ga heni?
8.47: Munhu wa Nguluwi kahulikaga ulonzi wa Nguluwi, ila hemwe hamuwele wanhu wa Nguluwi, ndo mina hamlinguhulika.” Yesu nayali baha Abulahamu hanavumbuka
8.48: Wayahudi nawamliga Yesu wamuuza walonga, “Hegwe kwa Msamalia na kuna Limazoga?”
8.49: Yesu nakawedichila, “Ndahela Limazoga, ndangumtogola Mhaza wa heni, ila hemwe mwangumbeza heni.
8.50: Heni silingupala ukulu ndiliyeka, ila kuna yumwe yalingupala ukulu awo, na heye ndo mtagusa.
8.51: Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, munhu yoneche yobochela gondilingulangusa hobagama hebu.”
8.52: Hamba Wayahudi wamlonjela wata, “Sambi twangukunda kota hegwe kuna Limazoga! Abulahamu kabagama, na waloli nawabagama, kahi hegwe kwangulonga munhu yobochela goulangusa hobagama hebu!
8.53: Hegwe kwangidita kwa mng'hangala kusinda Mhaza wa hetwe Abulahamu yabagame? Na waloli nawo nawabagama. Hegwe kwangidita kwa whaani?”
8.54: Yesu nakedichila, “Wone na iwe kitogola heni ndiliyeka kwali hela mbuli. Heye yotogola ga heni ndo Mhaza wa heni, ayu yomlonga kowa Nguluwi wa hemwe.
8.55: Hamumzelele heye, ila heni, ndimzela. Wone ndonje simzelele ndowa ndilonga udesi kota hemwe vyomuwele wadesi. Ndimzela na ndangukunda ulonzi wa heye.
8.56: Mhaza wa hemwe Abulahamu nakasechelela kalyona zuwa lya kuwa kwa heni, kawona na kasangalala.”
8.57: Wayahudi nawamlonjela Yesu wata, “Ung'hali fika mihela kumi jihano. Kumonela kohi Abulahamu?”
8.58: Yesu nakawedichila, “Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, Abulahamu naloyang'hali kuvumbuka, nene ndali baha.”
8.59: Hamba nawalokota maganga kumtozela Yesu, ila Yesu koka Mng'handa ya Nguluwi.

9.1: Yesu loyali yokola nakamona munhu yumwe, hambe yalole kulawa yaleleche.
9.2: Walanguswa nawamuuza, “Mlangusa! Whaani yaditile gehile, munhu ayu, ama wahaza wa heye, yaleleche hambe yalole?”
9.3: Yesu nakedichila, “Mbuli ayi hailawile kwa kudita gehile ga heye, ila na kalela hambe yalole leka ludali lya Nguluwi loneche lukola mijito mgati mwa heye.
9.4: Kung'hali nemisi itugana kulutilila kukola mijito ja yula yanhumile, mina chilo changuya munhu howeza kukola mijito.
9.5: Mhela londing'hali muisi, heni nda lumuli lya isi.”
9.6: Vyoyalonjile ago, Yesu katema lite hasi kadita nhope kambakaliza yula yohambe yalole mmeho,
9.7: Nakamlonjela, “Ulute ukahovuge kumeho kuli izimbo lya Siloamu.” Aho ayula munhu kaluta kuhovuga kumeho na kahiluka yolola.
9.8: Lelo yalingikala habehi na heye wala wamzelele kuta aho ha ulongolo nayali mzunwa mlandaji, nawalonga, “Ayu hawele yula mzunwa yekalisaga na kulanda?”
9.9: Wamwe wata, “Ayu ndo heye,” Wanji nawalonga, “Hebu hawele heye, wewhana hela.” Ila heye nakawalonjela, “Nda nene!”
9.10: Hewo nawamuuza wata, “Iwa ndaze sambi kwangulola?”
9.11: Heye nakedichila, “Yula munhu yochemigwa Yesu, nakahola nhope, kambakaliza kumeho na kundonjela, ‘Lute kihovuje kuli izimbo lya Siloamu.’ Aho heni nduta, ndizanawa, nakwaluka kulola. Kuhovuga kumeho, baho du mbona meho gangu galuka kulola.”
9.12: Hewo nawamuuza wata, “Kakohi heye?” Nakawedichila, “Heni sivizelele!” Mafalisayo wangumpala yamlohole munhu hambe yalole
9.13: Hamba wanhu wamhola ayula munhu yohambe yalole, wamhilika kuli Mafalisayo.
9.14: Zuwa lila Yesu vyoyamditile ayula munhu mitope yalole, lyali Zuwa lya Kwesela.
9.15: Hamba Mafalisayo nawamuuza munhu ayo, wata, “Kulola ndaze?” Heye nakawalonjela, “Kambaka nhope mmeho, na heni ndizahovuga mazi, na sambi ndangulola.”
9.16: Mafalisayo wamwe nawalonga, “Munhu ayu halawile kwa Nguluwi, mina hambe yebate Malajizo ga Zuwa lya Kwesela.” Ila wamwe walonga, “Yowa ndaze munhu yawele na gehile kulajila vinduzanduza kota avino?”
9.17: Hamba nawamuuza kahi yula munhu yawele nayali yohambe yalole, “Vila heye kakugubula meho, kwangulonga ndaze kuli munhu ayo?” Heye nakawedichilla, “Heye ka mloli wa Nguluwi!”
9.18: Vilongozi wa Wayahudi, nahawakundile kuta munhu ayo nayali hambe yalole tangia kalonga na sambi kangulola, mbaka wawachemile wahaza wa heye.
9.19: Wolawa, wawauza wahaza wa heye, “Ayu ndo mdodo wa hemwe mwangulonga nakalela hambe walole? Lelo kalola ndaze?”
9.20: Wahaza wa heye wedichila, “Tuvizela ayu mdodo wa hetwe, na kalela hambe walole.
9.21: Lelo kalola ndaze, hatuvizelele, kahi hatuvizelele yula wamgubule meho. Mumuuze yuye, heye ndo munhu mkulu, kochilohola yuye.”
9.22: Wahaza wa heye nawalonga ahyo, kwa vila wali wowadumba wakulu wa Wayahudi, hewo wali walongane ku munhu yoneche wovumila kuta Yesu ndo Kilistu Mlohozi kowinjigwa kunze mwa ng'handa ya kusalila.
9.23: Ndo mina wahaza wa heye walonjile, “Heye mkulu mumuuze.”
9.24: Lwa keli kahi, wamchema ayula munhu yaloholigwe na nayali hambe yalole wamlonjela wata, “Wilahe kwa Nguluwi yawele na ukulu, kota kotulonjela ukomya, tuvizela kota ayula munhu yakulohole nayali na gehile.”
9.25: Heye nakawedichila, “Wone nayali na gehile heni sivizelele. Ila chinhu chimwe ndivizela. Ndali hambe ndole, na sambi ndangulola.”
9.26: Nawamuuza, “Kakuditila choni? Na kakugubula ndaze meho ga hegwe?”
9.27: Ayula munhu nakawalonjela, “Ndiwalonjela na hemwe hamunyhulichize, lekachoni mwangugana kuhulika kahi? Namwe mwangugana muwe walanguswa wa heye?”
9.28: Ila hewo wamliga wolonga, “Hegwe kwa mlanguswa wa heye, hetwe twa walanguswa wa Musa.
9.29: Hetwe tuvizela kuta Nguluwi nakalonga na Musa, ila munhu ayu hatuvizelele kangulawa kohi!”
9.30: Heye nakawalonjela, “Mbuli ayi ya kububuwaza! Hemwe hamzelele kalawa kohi, ila kangubula meho ga heni!
9.31: Tuvizela Nguluwi hawahulichizaga wanhu wali na gehile, ila kamhulichizaga yoneche yalingumhulichiza na magano ga heye.
9.32: Kulawa katali haina hulikwa munhu kamgubula meho ga munhu yaleleche hambe yalole.
9.33: Wone ayu munhu yawe halawile kwa Nguluwi, hali dita choneche.”
9.34: Hewo nawamwidichila wata, “Hegwe kuvumbuka na kukulila mli gehile, lelo kwangujeza kutulangusa hetwe?” Wamuwinga kulawa kuli Ng'handa ya kusalila. Kutita kwa Nhumbula
9.35: Yesu vyoyahuliche wamuwinga mli Ng'handa yakusalila, kampala ayula munhu, nakumuuza, “Kwangumkunda Mwana wa Munhu?”
9.36: Ayula munhu nakedichila, “Mkulu, undonjele heye ka whaani, leka ndimkunde.”
9.37: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Mina kumona, na heye ndo mlingulongasa na hegwe sambi.”
9.38: Ayula munhu kalonga, “Ndangukunda Mkulu!” Na baho kamwinamila Yesu.
9.39: Yesu nakalonga, “Heni mbuya muisi kutagusa wanhu, hewo hawalingulola walole, na walingijesa wangulola waleche kulola.”
9.40: Mafalisayo wamwe wali hamwe na heye nawahulika ulonzi awo, nawamuuza wata, “Ndaze, kwangulonga na hetwe hambe tulole?”
9.41: Yesu nakedichila, “Wone na muwe hambe mlole, mwahawele hela nongwa, ila lelo hemwe mwangulonga, hetwe twangulola, na ahyo mwangulajila mng'hali na nongwa.”

10.1: Yesu nakalonga kata hino, “Ndangulonga ndikomya, wone munhu yogana kwinjila mli mibani ja ming'holo ne kukolela hali lwizi, na kwinjila kwa kukwina kulukanzi mwa mibani, ayo kowa muhizi na mbokaji.
10.2: Munhu yalingukolela hali lwizi lwa mibani, ayo ndo kowa mdima ming'holo yanojile.
10.3: Mlolela mibani komchumulila, na ming'holo ja heye johulika mluzi wa mdimi, kowa wojichema ming'holo kwa matagwa, na kujilongoza kunze.
10.4: Wone wajilavye kunze, heye kowa yalongole kumwando na ming'holo jimuwinza kumbele, kwa vila jowa jihulika lizi lya mdimi.”
10.5: Ming'holo hajimuwinza munhu mjenzi, ila jombilima, kwa vila hajizelele lizi lya heye.
10.6: Yesu nakawalonjela nhelo ayi, ila hewo nahawavizelele choni choyaganile kuwalonjela. Yesu ndo nayali mdimi yanojile.
10.7: Yesu nakahiluchila kulonga, “Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, heni ndo hali lwizi lwa kukolela ming'holo.
10.8: Hewo woyile heni sinoya, awo wowa wahizi na wabokaji, ila ming'holo hajiwahulika hewo.
10.9: Heni ndo lwizi lwa kukolela, munhu yoneche yokwinjila kukolela hali heni, kowa yaloholigwe, yokwinjila na kulawa kunze, na kuwona mhale.
10.10: Muhizi koyaga hela kuhiza na kukopola na kuwifya. Heni mbuya hela, ndiwape hemwe ukomu, ukomu wenele.
10.11: “Heni nda mdimi nojile, yawele kuya na kukopoligwa kwa kujilohola ming'holo.
10.12: Wone hawele mdimi yanojile, na ming'holo hajiwele ja heye, wone yalyone libwa lya kisolo likuya, kobilima na kuleka ming'holo jiliyeka. Aho libwa lyochibata na kibagulanga nakachene ming'holo.
10.13: Munhu yavisigwe kangubilima, kwa vila heye ka munhu wa mijito hela, kahela isungu na ming'holo.
10.14: Heni nda mdimi nojile. Ndiwazele wali wa heni, na hewo wali wa heni wanzela.
10.15: Kota vila Mhaza vyoyanzelele, na heni vyondimnzelele Mhaza. Heni ndangulavya ukomu wa heni kwa chiwalo cha mingholo.
10.16: Na ming'holo jinji ndigalilwe heni, hajiwele hamwe na jiyawo, ndojiwinza na kujihanza ha jiyawo, johulika lizi lya heni na jowa mchilundo chimwe chili na mdimi yumwe.
10.17: “Mhaza kangungana heni, kwa vila ndangukunda kulavya ukomu wa heni, leka hamba ndiuhiluse kahi.
10.18: Kuduhu munhu yowa na ludali lwa kusa ukomu wa heni. Ndangulavya kota vyonganile heni. Ndoweza kuulavya na kuuhilusa kahi. Ahi ndo Mhaza wa heni vyoyandajize heni kudita.”
10.19: Kahi kwali na kibagula kwa hewo Wayahudi kwa aula ulonzi woyalonjile Yesu.
10.20: Wanhu wenji nawalonga, “Kana Limazoga! Kana lukwale! Iwa ndaze mwangumuhulichiza heye?”
10.21: Ila wanhu wanji nawalonga, “Munhu yawele na chijeni, kowa yolonga kota hino! Yowa ndaze Limazoga limlohole munhu nayali yohambe yalole?” Yesu kangulemigwa na Wayahudi.
10.22: Ako Yelusalemu kwali na mnvina ya kukumbuchila kwela kwa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi kwa Nguluwi. Mhela awo kwali na mbeho.
10.23: Yesu nayali yojenda mchipepela cha Solomoni, kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi.
10.24: Wayahudi vyowamuwene, wammemelela na kumuuza, wata, “Kotuleka mu uviso mbaka nili? Utulonjele kukomya, hegwe ndo Kilistu Mlohozi.”
10.25: Yesu nakawedichila, “Mina ndiwalonjela, ila hemwe hamlingukunda hebu. Vinhu vyondilingudita vifanda kota heye yandajize heni ndite.
10.26: Ila hemwe hamkunda hebu, vyohamuwele ming'holo ja heni.
10.27: Ming'holo ja heni jihulikaga lizi lya heni, na heni ndijizela na jangumbinza.
10.28: Ndanguwapa ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, na hawobagama hebu, na kuduhu munhu yoweza kuwalavya mmoko wa heni.
10.29: Mhaza wa heni ndo yamhele awo, wawele mng'hangala kusinda weng'ha, na hewo hawokwaga mazuwa gose, na kuduhu munhu yomboka mmoko wa heni.
10.32: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Ndiwalajilani mbuli nyinji kulawa kwa Mhaza. Ilikohi kuli azo zilinguwadita msubule na maganga?”
10.33: Wayahudi nawamwidichila wata, “Hatulingugana tukutowe na maganga kwa agala ganojile gouditile, ila vyoumkovula Nguluwi. Kwa vila hegwe kwa munhu hela, ila kwangidita kota Nguluwi!”
10.34: Yesu nakedichila, “Ndaze, hayandichigwe kuli chitabu cha Malajizo ga hemwe kota Nguluwi kalonga, ‘Heni ndonga hemwe mwa milungu?’
10.35: Nguluwi kawachema milungu wala wapeligwe usenga wa heye, na hetwe tuvizela kota Maandiko Matakatifu gangukomya ng'hatu mazuwa gose.
10.36: Kota vila Mhaza kanyhagula heni na kunhuma kuli isi yeng'ha, mwangumlonjela, kwangukovula, kwa vila nandonga, ‘Heni nda mwana wa Nguluwi.’
10.37: Wone muwene silingudita mijito johaganile Mhaza wa heni, mleche kung'hunda.
10.38: Ila wone ndilingudita, na hemwe mlema kung'hunda heni, yowa goya wone mkunde gondilingudita, aho mowa mvizelele kota, Mhaza kangikala mgati mwa heni, na heni ndangikala mgati mwa Mhaza.”
10.39: Nawalapa kahi wamibate Yesu, ila heye kasulupuka mmoko mwawo.
10.40: Yesu nakaluta kahi mwambu mwa lwanda lwa Yolodani, honhu Yohani nayali yobatiza, nakekala kuko.
10.41: Wanhu wenji nawoya walonga, “Yohani nahaditile ulajilo woneche,” “Geng'ha gowalonjile kwa munhu ayu nakakomya.”
10.42: Wanhu wenji wa ako nawamkunda Yesu.

11.1: Munhu yumwe nayali yochemigwa Lasalo nayali mtamwa. Munhu ayo nayali yochikala hali muji wa Betaniya. Muji awo ndo kwali hakaye ha Maliya na lumbulye Malita.
11.2: Maliya ayu ndo yuyula yambakaze Mkulu Yesu mafuta ga kubakaliza na kubagusa kwa mnvili za heye. Lelo Lasalo, lumbulye ndo nayali yotamika.
11.3: Awala wadala wahilika usenga kwa Yesu walonga, “Mkulu, mkulugwe ulingumgana Lasalo kangutamika.”
11.4: Yesu vyoyahuliche ago, nakalonga, “Utamwa awu haumkopola hebu Lasalo, ila ni kwa mbuli ya ukulu wa Nguluwi. Lasalo kotamika leka kwa kukolela ayo Mwana wa Nguluwi yapegwe ukulu.”
11.5: Yesu nakamgana heko Malita na lumbulye na mkulu wawo Lasalo.
11.6: Vyoyahuliche kota Lasalo mtamwa, kekala bahala hoyawele mazuwa gayage meli.
11.7: Hamba nakawalonjela walanguswa wa heye, “Tucheni tuhiluche Yudeya.”
11.8: Walanguswa nawamwidichila, “Mlangusa, kusemwa mhela udo hela Wayahudi vyowali wogana kukusubula na maganga, kahi kwangugana uhiluche kuko?”
11.9: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Zuwa limwe lina saa kumi na meli, si ndo vyoili? Lelo heye yojenda kuzelu hochikwang'wala hebu, kwavila kanguwona uzelu.
11.10: Ila wone munhu yojenda nechilo, kochikwang'hbwala, kwa vila kahela lumuli mgati mwa heye.”
11.11: Yesu nakalonga ago na konjezela, “Mganwa wa hetwe Lasalo kawasa, heni ndoluta ndikamwinule.”
11.12: Walanguswa nawedichila, “Mkulu, wone yawasile kowa mkomu.”
11.13: Yesu nayali yolonga mbuli ya kubagama kwa Lasalo, ila walanguswa hewo nawavizela kota Lasalo kawasa hela.
11.14: Hamba Yesu nakawatubulila kalonga, “Lasalo kabagama.
11.15: Ndangusangalala kwavila nasali ako ila mkunde. Lelo tucheni koyali.”
11.16: Tomasi nayali yochemigwa mnyambili kawalonjela walanguswa wayage kalonga, “Tucheni na hetwe tukabagame hamawe na heye.” Yesu ndo uzilipulo na ukomu
11.17: Yesu vyoyafichile, nakafika wamtilile Lasalo katali mazuwa gane nagakola.
11.18: Betaniya kwali kutali kwa kota maili zidatu hino kulawa Yelusalemu.
11.19: Wayahudi wenji nawoya kuwahembuliza Malita na Maliya kwa kufiligwa na lumbulyawo Lasalo.
11.20: Malita vyoyahuliche kota Yesu kanguya, nakaluta kumbochela, ila heye Maliya nakapona hakaye.
11.21: Malita nakamlonjela Yesu, “Mkulu, na uwe baha, lumbulyangu hali bagama!
11.22: Ila ndivizela kota na sambi, Nguluwi kokupa choneche choumlanda!”
11.23: Yesu nakamlonjela Malita, “Lumbulyake heye kozilipuka kahi.”
11.24: Malita nakedichila, “Ndivizela kota kozilipuka kuli zuwa lya kuduma.”
11.25: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Heni nda uzilipulo na ukomu. Munhu yoneche yalingung'hunda, kowa mkomu Ila wone yabagame.
11.26: Na munhu yoneche yalingikala na kung'hunda hobagama hebu! Lelo kwangukunda aga?”
11.27: Malita nakedichila, “Ena Mkulu! Ndangukunda kota hegwe uli Kilistu Mlohozi, Mwana wa Nguluwi yalinguya muisi.” Yesu kangulila mahozi
11.28: Malita vyoyalonjile ago, nakahiluka mng'handa na kumchema lumbulye Maliya hafungo yaliyeka. Nakamlonjela, “Mlangusa koya, kangukuchema hegwe.”
11.29: Maliya vyoyahuliche ago, nakenuka na kubilimila kunze kumbochela Yesu.
11.30: Yesu nayali yang'hali kwinjila hali chijiji chila, nayali yang'hali hahala honhu Malita hoyamting'hanize.
11.31: Wayahudi nawekale hamwe na Maliya womhoza vyowamuwene yokwinuka yolawa kunze, nawo nawenuka na kulawa kunze. Nawejesa kota kanguluta ko wamtilile Lasalo yakalile kahi.
11.32: Maliya vyoyafichile koyali Yesu na vyoyamuwene, nakafugama mmagulu ga Yesu, nakamlonjela, “Mkulu, na uwe baha, lumbulyangu nahambe yabagame!”
11.33: Yesu vyowamuwene Maliya yolila, na awala Wayahudi welongozase nawo wolila, nakawa na masinzo ng'hatu mnhumbula mwa heye na kwinjililwa na isungu.
11.34: Yesu nakawauza, “Mumuwika kohi?” Nawamwidichila wata, “Mkulu, uye ulole.”
11.36: Wayahudi nawalonga wata, “Mlole navyoyali yamganile lukami!”
11.37: Baho wanhu wanji nawalonga wata, “Hino hawele yuyu yamgubule meho ayula yohambe yalole? Nakalemwela ndaze kumdita Lasalo yaleche kubagama?” Yesu kangumzilipula Lasalo
11.38: Yesu vyoyali na isungu ng'hatu mnhumbula mwa heye, nakaluta kuli chilaga. Chilaga acho chali mhalika, kahi liganga likulu naliwichigwa hamlango.
11.39: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Muse iganga hali lwizi.” Malita, lumbulye Lasalo nakalonga, “Mkulu, kaluka kunhung'ha, kwa vila kawichigwa mchilaga lehano zuwa lya kane!”
11.40: Yesu nakamlonjela Malita, “Sikulonjele kota wone ukundile kowona ukulu wa Nguluwi?”
11.41: Nawosa iganga hali lwizi na baho Yesu kalola kuchanya, nakalonga, “Ndangukutogola Mhaza kwa vila hegwe kwangunyhulichiza.
11.42: Ndivizela kota kwangunyhulika heni mazuwa gose. Ila ndangulonga aga kwa chiwalo cha wanhu awa leka wakunde kota hegwe ndo unhumile heni.”
11.43: Vyoyalonjile ago, nakachema kwa lizi ng'hulu kalonga, “Lasalo, ulawe kunze!”
11.44: Lasalo nakalawa kunze, moko na magulu gawopigwe na sanda, na chibende chimgubike chihanga. Yesu nakawalonjela wanhu, “Mumdohole na mumleche yalute.” Uhesi wa kumkopola Yesu (Matei 26:1-5; Malichi 14:1-2; Lukasi 22:1-2)
11.45: Wayahudi weng'ha wawele ahala kwa Maliya nawagona goyaditile Yesu, nawamkunda.
11.46: Ila wamwe wa hewo nawahiluka kwa Mafalisayo nawawalonjela goyaditile Yesu.
11.47: Baho Mafalisayo na wakulu wa watambika wating'hana wata, “Tudite ndaze? Mlole vinduzanduza vyoyalingulajila na kudita munhu ayu!
11.48: Wone tumleche, wanhu weng'ha womkunda heye, hamba wakulu wa Loma wohola isi ya hetwe na kuwifya ng'handa ya Nguluwi ya hetwe!”
11.49: Munhu yumwe wa hewo nayali yochemigwa Kayafa nayali Mtambika Mkulu mhela ula nakawalonjela, “Hemwe hamchizelele chinhu!
11.50: Hamvizelele kota yowa goya munhu yumwe yabagame kwa mbuli ya wanhu wenji, kuleka isi yeng'ha igwiswe?”
11.51: Kayafa halonjile ago kwa ludali lya heye, ila kwa vila nayali Mtambika Mkulu mhela ula, yaliyolonga kota Yesu kanguzabagama kwa mbuli ya isi ya hewo.
11.52: Kahi haiwele hela kwa hewo, ila kahi kowegala hamwe wanhu wa Nguluwi wasambaluche.
11.53: Ahyo kulawa zuwa lila wakulu wa Wayahudi waliwoheha na kupala nzila ya kumkopola Yesu.
11.54: Ahyo Yesu nahawele yojenda hazelu hagati mwa Wayahudi, ila kalawa aho, nakaluta honhu habehi na hagunuche, hali muji wa Efulaimu. Kekala kuko na walanguswa wa heye.
11.55: Mnvina ya Pasaka ya Wayahudi vyoyali habehi, wanhu wenji wali woluta Yelusalemu kulavya nhambiko kihovuga yawe Yelile Pasaka ing'hali.
11.56: Wali wompala Yesu, na vyowamemile mli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, weuza wata, “Hemwe mwangijesa ndaze? Hino hokuya hebu kuli ino mnvina?”
11.57: Mtambika mkulu na Mafalisayo nawalavya ilajizo kota wone munhu yamone Yesu koyali, yoye yalonje wakamibate.

12.1: Mazuwa sita vyogaponile kulutila Pasaka, Yesu nakahiluka Betaniya, konayali kikala Lasalo, yula Yesu yamzilipule kulawa kwa wabagame.
12.2: Ako nawamwichila Yesu chilyo cha nechilo. Malita nayali yoyawichila vilyo, na Lasalo nayali yumwe wa awala wekale hali chisanya na Yesu.
12.3: Maliya nakahola nusu lita ya mafuta galingununyhilila ga nado galinguguzigwa kwa sendi nyinji, nakambakaliza Yesu magulu, hamba kaibagusa na mnvili za heye. Na ng'handa yeng'ha naimema unusi wa kununyhilila.
12.4: Yudasi Isikalioti, yumwe wa walanguswa wa Yesu, ayula yokuya kumhinduka Yesu nakalonga,
12.5: “Hambi iwa ndaze, Mafuta aga gahaguzigwe kwa sendi denali miya zidatu zilinguhega kwa mwezi umwe ng'hatu na sendi azo wapegwe wazunwa?”
12.6: Yudasi nahalonjile ago kwa vila nakawonela isungu wazunwa, ila kwa vila nawali wojenda na muhako wa sendi, na mala inji nayali yohiza sendi.
12.7: Ila Yesu nakalonga, “Mleche kumgaza ayu mdala. Mumleche yawiche ago mafuta kwa chiwalo cha zuwa lya kutiligwa lukuli lwangu.
12.8: Wazunwa mwanawo mazuwa geng'ha, ila hamuwa na heni mazuwa geng'ha.” Uhesi wa kumkopola Lasalo
12.9: Wayahudi wenji nawahulika kota Yesu nayali Betaniya, ahyo nawaluta kuko. Hewo hawalutile kumlola Yesu hela, ila kahi nawaluta kumlola Lasalo yawele ayula Yesu yamzilipule kulawa kwa wabagame.
12.10: Ahyo wakulu wa watambika nawagana wamkopole Lasalo na heye,
12.11: mina kwa chiwalo cha Lasalo Wayahudi wenji nawawalema wandewa wa hewo na kumkunda Yesu. Yesu kangwinjila Yelusalemu kwa luchenze (Matei 21:1-11; Malichi 11:1-11; Lukasi 19:28-40)
12.12: Zuwa iyage, wanhu wenji nawoyile kuli mnvina ya Pasaka nawahulika kota Yesu kanguwa Yelusalemu.
12.13: Baho wahola miputi ja mgoda wa mitende na waluta kuza kumbochela mnzila aku wotowa luchenze, wolonga, “Mtogoleni Nguluwi, watambichizwe yula yokuya kwa itagwa lya Mkulu. Mtogoleni mndewa wa Isilaeli!”
12.14: Yesu nakapegwa idogowi, kakwina ku mung'ho, kota Maandiko Matakatifu vyogalonjile.
12.15: “Uleche kudumba biti Siyoni, ulole Mndewa wa hegwe kanguya, nakakwina mwana wa idogowi.”
12.16: Mhela wula walanguswa nahawavizelele. Hamba Yesu vyoyatogoligwe, baho nawakumbuchila kota ago nagandichigwa kwa mbuli ya heye, na wanhu nawamditila ago.
12.17: Lung'hongola lwa wanhu nawawele hamwe na Yesu hoyali yomchema Lasalo kulawa kuchilaga, na kumzilipula kulawa kwa wabagame nawalutilila kulavya ulolezi wa mbuli ila.
12.18: Ahyo wanhu wenji nawaluta kumbochela Yesu kwa vila nawahulika kota kalajila chinduzanduza chino.
12.19: Mafalisayo wangilonjela wata, “Mwangulola! Hotuweza kudita choneche! Mlole isi yeng'ha yangumuwinza heye!” Wagilichi wamwe wangugana wamone Yesu
12.20: Kwali na Wagilichi wamwe hali wanhu walutile Yelusalemu kutambichiza mhela wa mnvina ya Pasaka.
12.21: Nawamlutila Filipo, mwenyeng'haye wa Betisaida muli muji wa Galilaya, nawamlonjela, “Mkulu, twangugana tumone Yesu.”
12.22: Filipo nakaluta kumlonjela Andeleya, na hewo weli walutasa kumlonjela Yesu.
12.23: Yesu nakawedichila, “Mhela wa Mwana wa Munhu kubochela ukulu ufika!
12.24: Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, nyhule imwe ya uhemba wone haigwile hali misanga na kola yopona imwe. Ila wone yole, yolela nyhule nyinji za uhemba.
12.25: Munhu yoneche yougana ukomu wa heye kowajiliza, ila munhu yoneche youlema ukomu wa heye muisi ino kouwika kwa mbuli ya ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma.
12.26: Munhu yoneche yalingugana yawe chitumagwa wa heni kanguganigwa yambinze, Ieka honhu honeche hondiwa, ndo baho mkolamijito wa heni hoyowa. Na munhu yowa chitumagwa wa heni Mhaza wa heni komtogola.” Yesu kangulonga kubagama kwa heye
12.27: “Sambi Nhumbula ya heni yangugazika lukami, na ndonje choni? Ahi ndonje, ‘Mhaza, umbusile mhela uno’ Hebu. Nambuya muisi kwa mbuli ya kukolela kuli mhela uno wa kugazigwa.
12.28: Mhaza, litogole itagwa lyako!” Aho lizi ihulikwa kulawa kilanga, “Ndilitogola, na kahi ndolitogola.”
12.29: Wanhu wenji nawemile ahala honhu nawahulika lizi alyo, wamwe wata lyali linguluwi, na wanji walonga wata, “Mhilisi wa kilanga nayali yolonga na heye!”
12.30: Yesu nakawedichila, “Luzi alo haluhulikwe kwa mbuli ya heni, ila kwa mbuli ya hemwe.
12.31: Sambi ndo mhela wa utaguso wa isi ino, na Limazoga mndewa wa isi ino woza kumgamula.
12.32: Heni hondikwinuligwa kulawa hasi ha isi ino, ndomkwega chila munhu yoye kwa heni.”
12.34: Lung'hongola lwa wanhu wedichila wata, “Malajizo ga hetwe gatulonjela kota, Kilistu Mlohozi kochikala mazuwa gose. Lelo iwa ndaze kwangulonga Mwana wa Munhu kanguganigwa yenuligwe? Ndo yalikohi ayo Mwana wa Munhu?”
12.35: Yesu nakedichila, “Lumuli lung'hali na hemwe kwa mhela udo. Mjende muwelenalo lumuli kutitu hakunawafika munhu yojenda kutitu havizelele koyoluta.
12.36: Kwa vila mlinalo lumuli, mkunde alo lumuli muwe wanhu wali na lumuli.” Wanhu hambe wakunde Yesu vyoyasindile kulonga ago, nakaluta kutali na hewo.
12.37: Hanga Yesu nakalajila vinduzanduza vyeng'ha vila hali hewo, ila hewo nawalema kukunda.
12.38: Ahyo ulonzi yalonjile Mloli Isaya ukola, “Mkulu, kakohi yakundile gotuwalonjele? Na ludali lwa Mkulu lulajilwa kwa wali kohi?”
12.39: Ahyo nawalemwela kukunda, kota vila Mloli Isaya lowalonjile kahi,
12.40: “Nguluwi kawadinya meho gawo, kahi kahazanya nyhala za hewo, leka waleche kulola kwa meho gawo, na waleche kuvizela kwa nyhala za hewo. Leka waleche kunyhinduchila heni, na heni ndahawalohole.”
12.41: Isaya nakalonga aga vyoyauwene Ukulu wa Yesu, nakalonga mbuli za heye.
12.42: Ahyo, vilongozi wenji wa Wayahudi wali womkunda Yesu. Ila kwa kudumba Mafalisayo, nahawali yolonga mbuli ayo hazelu kwa kudumba kuwinjigwa mli ng'handa ya kusalila.
12.43: Nayali yogana kutogoligwa na wanhu kusinda kutoligwa na Nguluwi. Ulonzi wa Yesu wangutagusa wanhu
12.44: Hamba Yesu nakalonga kwa kuchemelela, “Munhu yokunda ga heni, halingukunda ga heni ndiliyeka, ila kangukunda na ga heye yanhumile.
12.45: Munhu yalingumbona heni, kangumona na heye yanhumile heni.
12.46: Heni ndo lumuli, nambuya kuli isi leka wanhu weng'ha wawelengung'hunda ga heni waleche kupona kuli kutitu.
12.47: Wone munhu yahuliche mbuli ya Nguluwi na kibata, heni simtagusa hebu. Suyile kutagusa wanhu wa isi, ila mbuya kuilohola.
12.48: Munhu yawele ngundema heni, yohakundile mbuli ya heni kanaye yumwe wa kumtagusa, mbuli ayo ndonjile ndo yomtagusa muli zuwa lya kuduma.
12.49: Kwa vila heni hambendonje kwa ludali lwa heni, ila Mhaza yanhumile kandajiza gala gawele kulapigwa kulonga.
12.50: Na heni nandivizela kota ilajizo lya heye lwangigala ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma. Ahyo ndangulonga gala hela Mhaza goyanhumile ndonje.”

13.1: Yali zuwa imwe habehi na mnvina ya Pasaka, Yesu nakavizela kota mhela wa heye wowa ufichile wa kuka muisi ino na kuluta kuli Mhaza wa heye. Nakawagana ng'hatu wanhu wa isi ino wawele wa heye, ligano lya heye lyalihela mwiso.
13.2: Yesu na walanguswa wa heye wali wolya chilyo cha nechilo. Limazoga lyali limwinjile mnhumbula ya Yudasi mwana Simoni Isikalioti yamhinduche Yesu.
13.3: Yesu nakavizela kota Mhaza kampa chila chinhu mmoko mwake. Na kavizela kota nakalawa kwa Nguluwi, na kanguhiluka kwa Nguluwi.
13.4: Baho nakenuka hala hoyekale, nakawika hafungo igolole lyake, nakahola chibende, kawoha mchuno mwake.
13.5: Hamba kawika malenga mchisaye, nakaluka kuwahovuga walanguswa magulu akuno yowabagusa na chila chibende choyawohile mchuno.
13.6: Vyoyafichile hali Simoni Petili, na heye Petili nakamlonjela, “Mkulu, kwangugana kunyhovuga magulu heni?”
13.7: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Huvizelele chondilingukola sambi, ila kovizela hamba.”
13.8: Petili nakamlonjela Yesu, “Hegwe hunyhovuga heni magulu gangu ng'oo!” Yesu nakamlonjela, “Wone hulingugana ndikuhovuge, huwa mlanguswa wa heni.”
13.9: Simoni Petili nakedichila, “Mkulu, uleche kuhovuga magulu yeka! Uhovuge na moko na mutwi weng'ha!”
13.10: Yesu nakalonga, “Munhu yojile haimnojeza kihovuga kahi, ila magulu hela, ila na lukuli lweng'ha. Hemwe mwangung'hala ila haiwele mweng'ha.”
13.11: Yesu nakamzela yalikohi yomhinduka, ndo mana yalonjile, “Hemwe weng'ha mwangung'hala ila yumwe hangalile hebu.”
13.12: Yesu vyoyasindile kuwahovuga migulu walanguswa, kavala igolole, kahiluka koyali yekalise kalonga, “Hambi mvizela vyondalindidita kwa hemwe?”
13.13: Mwangunyhema heni Mlangusa na Mkulu, iwa goya mwagudita hino, ahi ndo vyondili.
13.14: Heni ndili Mkulu na Mlangusa wa hemwe ndiwahovuga magulu genu, ahyo na hemwe namwe mwanguganigwa mihovuje magulu genu.
13.15: Heni ndiwalajilani nzila ya kudita, leka na hemwe namwe mdite kota vyondiwaditile.
13.16: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya ng'hatu, chitumagwa hawaga mkulu kusinda Mkulu wa heye, na mpogozi hawaga Mkulu kwa ayula yamtumile.
13.17: Lelo vyomgazelele ago, mobweda hala homgadita ago.
13.18: “Silingulonga kwa hemwe mweng'ha. Ndiwazela wondiwahagule. Ila yanguganigwa Maandiko Matakatifu gakomye, kota vyogalonjile, ‘Heye yadilize hamwe na heni, kongaluka.’
13.19: Ndiwalonjelani mbuli azo sambi zing'hali lawila, wone zilawile mkunde kota ‘Heni nda Heye.’
13.20: Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, munhu yalingumbochela yula yondilingumtuma, kangumbochela heni, na heye yalingumbochela heni, kangumbochele heye yanhumile.” Yesu kangulagula kota kohinduligwa (Matei 26:20-25; Malichi 14:17-21; Lukasi 22:21-23)
13.21: Vyoyalonjile ago, mli muhe wa Yesu nakaluka kuwa na masinzo kawalonjela ne kuvisa chinhu, “Ndanguwalonjela ndikomya ng'hatu, yumwe wa hemwe kongaluka.”
13.22: Walanguswa welola aku wochijesa na kiuza hewo kwa hewo, wata, “Iwa ndaze mbuli ayi? Yalikohi yodita ago?”
13.23: Mlanguswa yumwe yaganigwe ng'hatu nayali yekale habehi na Yesu.
13.24: Simoni Petili nakamlajila moko, kalonga, “Umuuze Mlangusa, kangulonga kwa mbulli ya yalikohi?”
13.25: Ayula mlanguswa kaluta habehi ng'hatu na Yesu, kauza, “Mkulu, yalikohi yodita ago?”
13.26: Yesu nakedichila, “Yula yondimpa ibumunda lyondilize mchizombe na ndompa, ayu ndo heye.” Baho kamogola ibumunda, kadilizila mchisaye nakampa Yudasi, mwana Simoni Isikalioti.
13.27: Baho Yudasi vyoyabochele ibumunda kulawa kwa Yesu, Limazoga limwinjila. Yesu nakamlonjela Yudasi, “Udite himahima goulingugana kudita.”
13.28: Ila kwali kuduhu munhu ne yumwe ahala yavizelele iwa ndaze yomlonjela hino.
13.29: Kwa vila Yudasi nayali muwika sendi, hewo nawejesa kota Yesu kangumlonjela yakagule vinhu vilinguganigwa kuli mnvina ya Pasaka hamba yakawape wazunwa.
13.30: Yudasi kabochela libumunda, na baho kalawa kunze. Yali nechilo. Ilajizo linyale
13.31: Yudasi vyoyochile, Yesu nakalonga, “Sambi ukulu wa Mwana wa Munhu wozangoneka, na Nguluwi kangupegwa ukulu mgati mwa heye.
13.32: Na wone ukulu wa Nguluwi ugubuligwa mgati mwa Mwana, lelo na heye Nguluwi koulajila ukulu wa Mwana mgati mwa heye, kodita ago baho.
13.33: Wanangu, nding'hali na hemwe kwa mhela udo hela. Momhala, ila sambi ndanguwalonjelani gala gondiwalonjele vilongozi wa Wayahudi, ‘Hamluta kondiluta heni!’
13.34: Na sambi ndanguwapa ilajizo linyale, migane, migane kota vyondiwaganile hemwe.
13.35: Wone migane, chila munhu kovizela kota mwa walanguswa wa heni.” Yesu kangwagula kota Petili kombela (Matei 26:31-35; Malichi 14:27-31; Lukasi 22:31-34)
13.36: Simoni Petili nakamuuza Yesu, “Kohi kouluta Mkulu?” Yesu nakedichila, “Hujeza kumbinza sambi kondiluta, ila kombinza hamba.”
13.37: Petili nakamuuza, “Mkulu, lekachoni ndeche kukuwinza sambi? Heni ndokwimilila mbaka kubagama kwa mbuli ya hegwe.”
13.38: Yesu nakedichila, “Hambi koweza kubagama kwa mbuli ya heni? Ndangukulonjela ndikomya ng'hatu, ne izogolo halineka, kombela kadatu kota hunzelele heni!”

14.1: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mleche kusumajila mnhumbula za hemwe. Mumkunde Nguluwi, mng'hunde na heni.
14.2: Kaye kwa Mhaza wa heni kuna honhu henji ha kikala, wone hayali ahyo, nandahawalonjeleni. Sambi ndanguluta kuwawichila honhu.
14.3: Wone ndute kuwawichilani goya honhu ha hemwe, ndohiluka kuwahola nene, na mochikala honhu hondikale heni.
14.4: Na muizela nzila ya kuluta ako kondiluta.”
14.5: Tomasi nakamuuza, “Mkulu, hatukuzelele kouluta, lelo toizela ndaze nzila ayo?”
14.6: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Heni ndo nzila na kukomya na ukomu. Kuduhu munhu yoluta kwa Mhaza wone hakolile kwa heni.
14.7: Wone mlingunzela heni, mwangumzela na Mhaza wa heni. Na kulawa sambi mumzela, kahi mina mmona.”
14.8: Filipo nakamlonjela, “Mkulu, utulajile ayo Mhaza, acho weng'ha ndochotulingugana.”
14.9: Yesu nakawedichila, “Nandikala na hemwe mhela weng'ha, nagwe Filipo hunanzela? Heye yambwene heni kamona Mhaza. Iwa ndaze ulonga, ‘Tulajile Mhaza?’
14.10: Ndaze, huwele kukunda kota heni nda mgati mwa Mhaza, na heye Mhaza ka mgati mwa heni? Mbuli zondiwalonjele hemwe hambe ndonje kwa ludali lwa heni. Mhaza nayali mgati mwa heni kangukola mijito.
14.11: Chiba Mkunde heni hondilonga, heni ndangikala mgati mwa Mhaza, na Mhaza kangikala mgati mwa heni. Wone hebu, ukunde kwa vila vinduzanduza vyondilingudita.
14.12: Ndangulonga ndikomya, yalingukunda kodita mbuli zondilingudita heni, kodita mbuli ng'hulu ng'hatu, kwavila ndanguluta kwa Mhaza.
14.13: Choneche chomlanda kwa itagwa lyangu ndodita, leka Mhaza yapegwe ukulu mgati mwa Mwana.
14.14: Wone mlande chinhu choneche kwa itagwa lyangu, ndowaditilani. Ndowegalilani Muhe Yelile
14.15: “Wone mlingungana heni, mochibatilila malajizo ga heni.
14.16: Na heni ndomlanda Mhaza, na heye kowegalila Mtanzi yunji, na heye kochikala na hemwe mazuwa gose.
14.17: Heye ndo Muhe Yelile wa Nguluwi wa kukomya. Wanhu wa isi hoimbochela heye kwa vila hoimona na kumzela heye. Ila hemwe mumzela kwa vila kochikala na heye kowa mgati mwa hemwe.
14.18: “Siwaleka mliwachiwa, ndokuya kahi kwa hemwe.
14.19: Ipona hachefu wanhu wa isi hawombona heni kahi, ila hemwe mombona. Na vyondili mkomu, namwe mowa wakomu.
14.20: Zuwa lila holikuya, movizela kota nda mgati mwa Mhaza, na hemwe mwa mgati mwa heni, na heni mgati mwa hemwe.
14.21: “Munhu yoneche yalingubochela malajizo ga heni na kibata, heye ndo yalingungana heni. Na heye yalingungana heni, Mhaza wa heni komgana, na heni ndomgana nakilajila kwa wanhu wose.”
14.22: Yudasi hawele yula Yudasi Isikalioti nakalonga, “Mkulu, yowa ndaze hegwe wilajile kwa heye na haiwele kwa wanhu wa isi?”
14.23: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Munhu yula yongana heni, kokunda gondanguse. Mhaza wa heni komgana heye, na heni na Mhaza tokuya kikala hamwe na heye.
14.24: Munhu yula yohambe yangane heni, halingukunda ulanguso wa heni. Ulonzi womuhuliche hauwele wa heni, ila wa Mhaza yanhumile heni.”
14.25: “Ndiwalonjelani vinhu avi vyonding'hali hamwe na hemwe.
14.26: Mtanzi ayo Muhe Yelile, Mhaza yomigala kwa itagwa lyangu ayo ndo kowalangusa hemwe chila chinhu na kowadita mkumbuchile gala gose gondiwalonjele.”
14.27: “Ndanguwalechelani kikala goya, ndanguwapa kikala goya kwa heni. Silingulapa kota vila isi vyoilingudita. Mleche kuwa na masinzo mnhumbula za hemwe, kahi mleche kudumba.
14.28: Muhulika ndiwalonjela hemwe, ‘Ndanguka, ila ndokuya kahi kwa hemwe.’ Wone mlingungana heni, mwahasangalale kwa vila ndanguluta kwa Mhaza, Mhaza ndo mkulu kwa heni.
14.29: Ndiwalonjelani vinhu avi sambi havinalawila, leka wone vilawile hemwe mkunde.
14.30: Silonga na hemwe mbuli nyinji, kwa vila Limazoga Mndewa wa isi ino kanguya. Na heye kahela ludali kwa heni.
14.31: Ila isi yanguganigwa ivizele kota ndangumgana Mhaza, ndovila ndangukola chila chinhu chowalajize Mhaza.” “Mwime, tucheni.”

15.1: “Heni ndo mzabibu wa kukomya, Mhaza wa heni ndo mlimi.
15.2: Chila nhagala yohambe ilele mafuza ndanguitema, na chila nhagala iwele ngulela ndanguidahulila ilele mafuza menji.
15.3: Hemwe muwa mwelile kwa mbuli ya ula ulonzi wondiwalonjele.
15.4: Mikale mgati mwa heni, na heni mgati mwenu. Nhagala hailela mafuza iliyeka, ila wone ibatilile kuli igodi yolela mafuza, na hiho hemwe hamlela mafuza wone hamikale mgati mwa heni.”
15.5: “Heni nda mzabibu, na hemwe mwa nhagala. Yalingikala mgati mwa heni, na heni mgati mwa heye, ayo kolela mafuza menji. Hamkola ne chinhu choneche mliyeka.
15.6: Munhu yoneche wone yekale mgati mwa heni kowa yatajigwe kunze kota nhagala ikalile. Wanhu woilokota nhagala ayo na kuitoza kuli chiluli ilakale.
15.7: Wone mikale mgati mwa heni na ulonzi wa heni wikale mgati mwa hemwe, mlande chinhu choneche chomlapa mopegwa.
15.8: Ukulu wa Mhaza wa heni wokoneka wone mlela mafuza menji na muwe walanguswa wa heni.
15.9: Heni ndiwagana hemwe kota vila Mhaza vyoyanganile heni. Mikale mvizela kota heni ndanguwagana.
15.10: Wone mibate malajizo ga heni mopona mli igano lyangu kwa hemwe, kota vila heni vyondibate malajizo ga Mhaza na kupona mli igano lyake.”
15.11: “Ndanguwalonjelani mbuli zino leka kusangalala kwa heni kikale mgati mwenu, na kusangalala kwa hemwe kuwe kwenele.
15.12: Ndanguwalajiza hino, migane. Migane kota vyondiwaganile heni.
15.13: Kuduhu igano ikulu ng'hatu kusinda igano lya munhu kuulavya ukomu wa heye kwa wanhu yawaganile.
15.14: Na hemwe mwa goloko wa heni wone mkola kota vyondilinguwalajiza.
15.15: Hemwe siwachema hemwe vitumagwa lekachoni, chitumagwa hawaga havizelele mkulu wa heye chowodita. Leka ndanguwachema hemwe goloko wa heni, kwavila ndiwalonjela geng'ha gonyhuliche kwa Mhaza wa heni.
15.16: Hamuwele hemwe mnyhagule heni, ila heni ndiwahagula hemwe nandiwalajiza mlute mkalele mafuza menji na mafuza gawelengikala lukami. Mhaza wa heni kowapa hemwe choneche chomlanda kwa itagwa lyangu.
15.17: Alyo ilajizo lya heni ndo ali, migane.” Wanhu wa isi yowazudila hemwe
15.18: “Wone wanhu wa isi wawazudile hemwe, mkumbuchile kota nawaluka kunzudila heni.
15.19: Wone namuwe wanhu wa isi ino, wanhu wa isi nawawaganile hemwe kota wanhu wa heye. Kota vila hemwe lohamuwele wanhu wa isi, ila heni ndiwahagulani hali wanhu wa isi, ndo mina isi yanguwazudila.
15.20: Mkumbuchile vyondiwalonjele, ‘Chitumagwa hawaga mkulu kusinda heye.’ Wone wanhu wangazile heni, wowagaza na hemwe kahi. Wone webate mbuli ya heni, wochibata mbuli ya hemwe.
15.21: Ila ago geng'ha wokuditilani hemwe kwa vila mwa wanhu wa heni, hawamzelele yula yanhumile.
15.22: Wone nandeche kuya kulonga na hewo, nahawali kuwa na gehile. Ila sambi hawoweza kulonga kota wahela gehile.
15.23: Munhu yawele kunzudilila heni, kangumzudila na Mhaza wa heni.
15.24: Wone nasiditile kwa hewo mbuli zohazinakoleka na munhu yunji, nahayali na gehile. Ila sambi wagona gonditile, wanzudila heni kahi wanzudila heni na Mhaza wa heni.
15.25: Aga nagalawila kota vyogandichigwe kuli Malajizo, ‘Wanzudila heni hela hihi.’ ”
15.26: “Loyokuya ayo mtanzi ndilingumlajiza kwa hemwe kulawa kwa Mhaza, ayo Muhe Yelile yalingulavya kukomya kwa Nguluwi, yalingulawa kwa Mhaza, heye kondavila ulolezi heni.
15.27: Na hemwe namwe mondavila ulolezi, kwa vila mwali na heni kulawa mwaluko.”

16.1: “Nandiwalonjela ago mleche kuleka kunghunda heni.
16.2: Wanhu yowawinga hemwe kuli Misinagogi ja hewo. Kahi mhela wanguya, heye yowakopola hemwe kochijesa kota kangumnojeza Nguluwi.
16.3: Wanhu wowaditilani ago kwa vila hawamzelele Mhaza, kahi hawanzelele heni.
16.4: Ila ndanguwalonjelani ago leka howokwaluka kudita ago, mkumbuchile kota nandiwalonjelani.” Mijito ja Muhe Yelile “Siwalonjeleni mbuli azo kulawa mwaluko kwa vila ndali hamwe na hemwe.
16.5: Ila sambi ndanguluta kwa heye yanhumile, na kuduhu ne yumwe yalingumbuza, ‘Kwanguluta kohi’
16.6: Kwa vila ndiwalonjeleni mbuli azi, nhumbula za hemwe zimema masinzo.
16.7: Ila ndanguwalonjela ndikomya, inoga kwa hemwe heni mbuche, kwa vila wone silutile, Mtanzi hokuya kwa hemwe. Leka wone ndute, ndomlajiza yoye kwa hemwe.
16.8: Heye hoyokuya, kowalavila ulolezi wanhu wa isi kota majesa ga hewo geha kwa mbuli ya gehile, na kwa mbuli ya linojile na lihile, na kwa mbuli ya utaguso wa Nguluwi kwa wanhu.
16.9: Hewo wawifwa kwa mbuli ya kudita lihile na linojile kwa vila walema kukunda ga heni.
16.10: Hewo wawifwa kwa mbuli ya linojile na lihile kwa vila ndanguluta kwa Mhaza, na hemwe hambona kahi.
16.11: Kahi wawifwa kuli mbuli ya utaguso kwa vila Limazoga mkulu wa isi ino katagusigwa lumwenga.
16.12: “Ndanazo mbuli nyinji za kuwalonjela, ila hamuweza kwimilila kwa sambi.
16.13: Aho, hoyokuya ayo Muhe yalingulajila kukomya kwa Nguluwi, na kuwadita hemwe mvizele kukomya kweng'ha, ayo holonga kwa ludali lwake, ila kolonga goyahuliche, na kuwalonjeleni vinhu vikuya.
16.14: Heni ndotogoligwa na heye kwa vila kowalajilani gowapeligwe na heni.
16.15: Vyeng'ha vyoyalinavyo Mhaza ndo vya heni, ndo vila ndiwalonjeleni kota ayo Muhe Yelile kowalonjela hemwe gala goyapeligwe na heni. Masinzo na kusangalala
16.16: “Mhela udo hela hammbona hebu, na mhela udo hamba mombona kahi.”
16.17: Walanguswa wamwe naweuza, “Iwa ndaze yotulonjela, ‘Unghali mhela udo hammbona, na kahi mhela udo mombona?’ Na kahi kangulonga, ‘Kwavila ndanguluta kwa Mhaza.’ ”
16.18: “Iwa ndaze vyoyolonga, ‘Ung'hali mhela udo?’ Hatuvizelele choyolonga!”
16.19: Yesu nakavizela kota wangugana kumuuza, aho kawalonjela, “Mwangiuza gala gondonjile, ‘Ung'hali mhela udo hammbona, na mhela udo mombona kahi?’
16.20: Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, hemwe molila na kulombocheza, ila wanhu wa isi wosechelela. Mowa na masinzo, ila masinzo ga hemwe gogaluka kusangalala.
16.21: Mdala hoyolela kawaga na masinzo kwa vila mhela wa usungu wa heye ufika. Ila wone yalele, kawaga yasemwile aula usungu woyauwene kwa vila kawaga yasangalale kwa chali chileleche muisi.
16.22: Na kwa hemwe vyoili, sambi mna masinzo, ila ndokuya kwa hemwe kahi. Hemwe mowa na usangalalo mnhumbula za hemwe, na kuduhu ne yumwe yokusa awo usangalalo wa hemwe.
16.23: “Zuwa alyo hamndanda ne chinhu. Ndanguwalonjelani ndikomya, choneche chomlanda kwa Mhaza kwa itagwa lyangu, kowapani.
16.24: Mbaka sambi hamnalanda chinhu kwa itagwa lyangu. Mlande na hemwe mopegwa leka usangalalo wa hemwe wenele. Yesu kana ludali kusinda isi
16.25: “Ndiwalonjeleni mbuli azo kwa nhelo. Ila mhela wanguya siwandilonga na hemwe kwa nhelo. Ndowa ndiwalonjela ne kuvisa gawele ga Mhaza.
16.26: Zuwa alyo momlanda Mhaza kwa itagwa lyangu, heni hambe ndiwalonjele kota ndomlanda Nguluwi kwa mbuli ya hemwe,
16.27: kwa heye Mhaza yuye kanguwagana hemwe. Kanguwagana hemwe kwa vila hemwe mwangungana heni, na kung'hunda kota ndawa kwa Nguluwi.
16.28: Heni nandawa kwa Mhaza mbuya muisi, na sambi ndanguileka isi, ndanguhiluka kwa Mhaza.”
16.29: Hamba walanguswa wa heye nawamuuza wata, “Sambi kwangulonjela hazelu ne kulonga kwa nhelo.
16.30: Sambi tuvizela kota kuvizela vinhu vyeng'ha. Twahela kahi chinhu choneche cha kukuuza, ahi yangutudita tukunde hegwe kwangulawa kwa Nguluwi.”
16.32: Mhela wanguya, kahi mina ufika, aho hemwe mweng'ha mosambaluka chila yumwe hakaye hake, na heni mondeka ndiliyeka. Ila siwa yeka hebu, Mhaza kahamwe na heni.
16.33: Ndanguwalonjelani mbuli azo leka muwe na kikala goya kwa kibanda na heni. Isi yowadita muwe mgaya ng'hatu. Ila msindamale. Heni ndiisinda isi yeng'ha!”

17.1: Yesu loyasindile kulonga ago, nakalola kuchanya kilanga, kalonga, “Mhaza, mhela ufika. Umpe ukulu Mwanago leka na heye yakupe ukulu.
17.2: Mina nakumpa Mwanago ludali kwa wanhu weng'ha leka yawape ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma awo woumpele.
17.3: Na ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma ndo awu, kukuzele hegwe, uwele uliyeng'ha Nguluwi wa kukomya ng'hatu, na wamzele Yesu Kilistu woumigale.
17.4: Heni ndiwalajila ukulu wa hegwe kuli isi, mijito joumhele kukola ngongomanya.
17.5: Sambi Mhaza, umhe ukulu houli hegwe, ukulu ula wondali nawo isi hainalumbigwa.
17.6: “Ndikudita hegwe uzeleche kwa hewo woumhele kulawa muisi. Wali wanhu wa hegwe, na hegwe kunipa wawe wa heni, na hewo webata ulonzi wa hegwe.
17.7: Sambi wavizela kota vinhu vyeng'ha vyoumhele vilawa kwa hegwe.
17.8: Ndiwalonjela ulonzi woundonjele, na hewo waubochela. Wavizela kota kukomya heni ndawa kwa hegwe, na wangukunda kota hegwe nakunhuma.
17.9: “Ndanguwalandila awo. Hambe ndiwalandile wanhu wa isi ayi, ila ndanguwalandila hewo woumhele, mina ndo wanhu wa hegwe.
17.10: Geng'ha gondilinago galawa kwa hegwe, na geng'ha goulinago ga heni! Na ukulu wa heni ulajilwa kukolela hewo woumhele.
17.11: Sambi ndanguya kwa hegwe, siwele kahi muisi, ila hewo wa amu muisi. Mhaza Welile, uwawiche goya kwa ludali lwa itagwa lyako, itagwa lyoumhele wawe chinhu chimwe kota hetwe vyotuli yumwe.
17.12: Vyondali na hewo, nandiwawika goya kwa itagwa lyako lyoumhele. Heni ndali ndiwamila hewo, na kuduhu ne yumwe yajilile, ila yula munhu yahaguligwe kwajilila leka gala Maandiko Matakatifu genele.
17.13: Na sambi ndanguya kwa hegwe, nandonjile mbuli zino kuli isi leka wameme usangalalo wa heni mnhumbula za hewo.
17.14: Heni ndiwapa usenga wa hegwe, na wanhu wa isi naiwehilwa hewo kwa vila hawawele wa isi ayi, kota heni vyosiwele yumwe wa isi ino.
17.15: Silingulanda uwose kuli isi ino, ila ndangulanda uwamile na lila Limazoga lihile.
17.16: Hewo hawawele wa isi, kota heni vyosiwele wa isi.
17.17: Uwawichile moko hegwe kwa kula kukomya, ulonzi wa hegwe ndo kukomya.
17.18: Kota vila vyounhumile kuli isi, nani ndanguwalajiza hewo kuli isi.
17.19: Na kwa mbuli ya hewo ndangiwichila moko kwa hegwe, leka kwa kukomya na hewo nawo wawe wawichilwe moko ng'hatu.
17.20: “Silinguwatambichiza hewo yeka, ila kwa weng'ha wawelengung'hunda heni kwa usenga wa hewo waudamle.
17.21: Ndanguwatambichiza leka hewo wawe yumwe. Mhaza, ndangulanda wawe mgati mwa hetwe, kota vyouwele mgati mwa heni, na heni mgati mwa hegwe. Ndangulanda wawe yumwe isi ikunde kota nanhumigwa na hegwe.
17.22: Ndiwapa ukulu kota woumhele heni, leka wawe yumwe, kota hetwe vyotuli yumwe.
17.23: Ahi ndo kulonga, heni ndangikala mgati mwa hewo na hewo wangikala mgati mwa heni. Ndangulanda wawe chinhu chimwe ng'hatu, leka wanhu wa isi wavizele kota heni nhumigwa na hegwe, na kwanguwagana kota vyoulingungana heni.
17.24: “Mhaza, kunipa awo, na heni ndangugana wawe hala hondili leka wawone ukulu woumhele. Awu ndoukulu woumhele kwa vila nakungana heni isi hainalumbigwa.
17.25: Mhaza unojile, wanhu wa isi hawakuzelele hegwe, ila heni ndikuzela na hewo wavizela kota hegwe ndo unhumile.
17.26: Ndiwalajila hewo kota vyouli, na ndolutilila kudita ahyo, leka igano lyouwele nalyo kwa heni likale mgati mwa hewo, na heni ndikale mgati mwa hewo.”

18.1: Yesu vyoyasindile kulonga ago, nakoka na walanguswa wa heye na kuloka nzanda nayali ichemigwa Kediloni. Baho kwali na kamgunda ka migodi, na heye nakenjila mumo na walanguswa wa heye.
18.2: Yudasi, yula mwana Isikalioti yamhinduche Yesu nakahazela honhu hala kwa vila mala nyinji Yesu na walanguswa nawali woting'hana baho.
18.3: Ahyo Yudasi na chilundo cha wamizi na vitumagwa walawile kwa watambika wakulu na Mafalisayo woya kuli kamgunda kala ka migodi. Nawawele waholile vimwemwesa, vyenje na vinhu vya kutowela.
18.4: Yesu nakavizela vyeng'ha vizangulawila, kahejela hamwando, nakawauza, “Mwangumpala munhu yachi?”
18.5: Hewo nawedichila, “Yesu wa Nasaleti!” Yesu nakawedichila, “Heni ndo nene!” Yudasi, yula yamhinduke Yesu nayali yemile hamwe na hewo.
18.6: Yesu vyoyawalonjele, “Heni ndo nene,” Wahiluka kumbele na kugwa hanyi.
18.7: Yesu nakahiluchila kuwauza kahi, “Yalikohi mlingumpala?” Nawamwidichila, “Yesu wa Nasaleti.”
18.8: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mina ndiwalonjela kota heni ndo nene. Wone mlingumhala heni, muwaleche awo wanji walute.”
18.9: Yesu nakalonga ago leka galawile gala goyalonjile, “Mhaza, simtajile ne yumwe kuli wala woumhele.”
18.10: Simoni Petili nakasomola ipanga lyoyalinalyo, nakamdumula ikutu lya kudilo lya chitumagwa yumwe wa mtambika mkulu na kulilagaza. Itagwa lya chitumagwa ayo ndo Malikusi.
18.11: Baho Yesu nakamlonjela Petili, “Uhiluse ipanga lyako muyala! Ndaze, ndeche kunwela chizombe cha kugazigwa choyamhele Mhaza?” Yesu kangigaligwa kwa Anasi
18.12: Chilundo cheng'ha cha wamizi na chilongozi wa vitumagwa wa Wayahudi wamibata Yesu na wamuwoha.
18.13: Wamhilika kwa Anasi, mkweye Kayafa. Kayafa nayali mtambika mkulu mhela awo.
18.14: Yali yuyu Kayafa nayawalonjele wakulu wa Wayahudi kota yowa goya wone munhu yumwe yabagame kwa wanhu weng'ha. Petili kangumbela Yesu (Matei 26:69-70; Malichi 14:66-68; Lukasi 22:55-57)
18.15: Simoni Petili na mlanguswa yunji wali wochibandabanda womuwinza Yesu. Ayula mlanguswa yunji nakazeleka na Mtambika Mkulu, ahyo nakenjila mchipepela cha ng'handa ya mkulu wa Watambika hamwe na Yesu.
18.16: Petili nayali yemile kunze, behi na chihindilo. Ayula mlanguswa yunji nayali yazeleche na mtambika mkulu nakamlonjela mdala nayali mlola chihindilo, na baho kamwinjiza Petili mng'handa.
18.17: Ayula mdala nakamuuza Petili, “Hegwe nagwe huli mlanguswa wa munhu yuno?” Petili nakedichila, “Hebu! Siwele heni.”
18.18: Vitumagwa na wamizi wa ng'handa nawali wabwinhile chiwambilo kwa vila nakwali na mbeho lukami, nawema wokota chiwambilo acho. Petili na heye nayali yemile bahala na hewo wokota chiwambilo. Mkulu wa Watambika kangumuuza Yesu (Matei 26:59-66; Malichi 14:55-64; Lukasi 22:66-71)
18.19: Hamba mtambika mkulu nakamuuza Yesu mbuli za walanguswa wa heye na ulanguso wa heye.
18.20: Yesu nakedichila, “Ndali ndilonga hazelu na chila munhu. Ulanguso weng'ha ndali ndidita kuli ng'handa ya kusalila na Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kuko Wayahudi weng'ha nawoya wali hamwe. Silonjile chinhu choneche chila kwa uviso.
18.21: Iwa ndaze kahi kwangumbuza heni? Uwauze wanhu wowahuliche londanguse. Hewo wavizela vyondonjile.”
18.22: Yesu loyali yolonga hino, mwamizi yumwe nayali yemile hala kamzabula yolonga, “Ahyo ndo vyoulingumwidichila Mtambika Mkulu?”
18.23: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Wone ndonjile vibi, ulajile wihe wa heni, ila wone silonjile vibi, lekachoni kwangunzabula?”
18.24: Hamba Anasi nakamhilika Yesu yawele yawopigwe kwa Mtambika Mkulu yachemigwe Kayafa. Petili kangumbela kahi Yesu (Matei 26:71-75; Malichi 14:69-72; Lukasi 22:58-62)
18.25: Simoni Petili nayang'ali yemile bahala yokota chiwambilo. Ahyo wanhu wanji nawamuuza, “Hegwe nagwe huwele yumwe wa walanguswa wa munhu yula?” Heye Petili kabela kalonga, “Hebu! Siwele heni!”
18.26: Chitumagwa yumwe wa mtambika mkulu, mng'holoze na munhu yatemigwe ikutu na Petili, nakamuuza Petili, “Hambi nasikuwene hegwe hamwe na heye akula kuli kamgunda ka migodi?”
18.27: Kahi Petili kabela kalonga, “Hebu!” Baho izogolo nalika. Yesu kanguhilikwa kwa Pilato (Matei 27:1-2,11-14; Malichi 15:1-5; Lukasi 23:1-5)
18.28: Vyoiwele lufuku, Yesu nakaholigwa kulawa mng'handa ya Kayafa, wamigala kuli chilongozi mkulu wa isi ya Yudeya. Wakulu wa Wayahudi nahawenjile mng'handa ya mkulu wa isi ya Yudeya, kwa vila hawaganile kubena mzilo leka waweze kulya goya ndiya ya Pasaka.
18.29: Ahyo Pilato nakalawa kunze, nakawauza, “Munhu ayu kadita choni chihile mbaka mmigale kwa heni?”
18.30: Nawamwidichila, “Nahatwalimigala kwa hegwe, wone nayawe haditile chinhu chihile.”
18.31: Pilato nakawalonjela, “Mumhole hemwe mkamtaguse kota malajizo ga hemwe.” Wayahudi nawedichila, “Hetwe hatukundigwe kutagusa munhu yoneche yakopoligwe!”
18.32: Aga nagalawila wenele ulonzi wa Yesu hoyalonjile yolajila vyoyobagama.
18.33: Pilato nakahiluka mng'handa ya mkulu wa isi ya Yudeya, kamchema Yesu, nakamuuza, “Hegwe ndo uli mndewa wa Wayahudi?”
18.34: Yesu nakedichila, “Awo ulonzi wa hegwe, ama wa munhu yunji kakulonjela mbuli ya heni?”
18.35: Pilato nakedichila, “Kwangijesa heni nda Myahudi? Wanhu wa hegwe, na wakulu wa Watambika wakigale kwa heni. Hambi kudita choni?”
18.36: Yesu nakalonga, “Undewa wa heni hauwele wa isi ino. Wone Undewa wa heni na uwe wa isi ino. Walanguswa wa heni newekangaze ndeche kibatigwa na wakulu wa Wayahudi, ila sambi undewa wa heni hauwele wa ahano!”
18.37: Baho Pilato nakamuuza, “Hambi hegwe kwa mndewa?” Yesu nakedichila, “Hegwe kulonga kota heni nda mndewa! Heni navumbuka nakuya kuli isi ino kwa mbuli imwe, kuwalonjela wanhu kukomya. Na chila munhu yalingukunda kukomya konyhulichiza heni.”
18.38: Pilato nakauza, “Kukomya ndo choni?” Yesu kangutagusigwa yabagame (Matei 27:15-31; Malichi 15:6-20; Lukasi 23:13-25) Pilato loyamalile kulonga mbuli azo, kalawa kunze kwa Wayahudi, kawalonjela, “Heni siuwene wihe weng'ha ula kwa munhu yuno.
18.39: Ila hemwe mna chihendo cha kumchumulila mnweng'hwa yumwe kuli Pasaka. Lelo mwangugana ndimchumulile Mndewa wa Wayahudi?”
18.40: Nawamwidichila heye woyoweleza, “Hebu! Hawele ayu! Tuchumulile Balaba!” Balaba nayali mbokaji.

19.1: Pilato nakawalonjela wamhole Yesu wamsubule na ng'hobwa.
19.2: Wamizi wahola miwa, watowa kota ng'hata ya miwa ifandile kota chipembelo, wamvalisa kumutwi wahola ikanzu lya chiundewa wamvalisa.
19.3: Woya kwa Yesu wata, “Ulamche, Mndewa wa Wayahudi!” Akuno womsubula.
19.4: Pilato kalawa kunze kahi, nakawalonjela, “Mlole, ndangumigala heye kunze kwa hemwe, leka mvizele kota heni sinachona chinhu choneche cha kumtagusa.”
19.5: Baho Yesu nakalawa kunze yavalile ng'hata ya miwa ifandile kota chipembelo na ikanzu lya chiundewa. Pilato nakawalonjela, “Mlole, heye munhu ndo ayu!”
19.6: Watambika wakulu na wamizi vyowamuwene Yesu, wayoweleza wata, “Muwambe mumsalaba! Muwambe mumsalaba!” Pilato nakawalonjela, “Mumhole hemwe mkamuwambe mumsalaba. Heni simuwene na chinhu choneche cha kumtagusa.”
19.7: Wayahudi nawalonga, “Hetwe twanalyo ilajizo, na kwa ilajizo alyo, imgana yabagame kwa vila kedita Mwana wa Nguluwi.”
19.9: Nakahiluka mng'handa ya mkulu wa isi ya Yudeya, nakamuuza Yesu, “Hegwe kulawila kohi?” Ila Yesu hamwidichile ne chinhu.
19.10: Pilato nakamlonjela Yesu, “Kwangulema kulonga na heni? Huvizelele kota ndina ludali lwa kukulechela ama kukuwamba mumsalaba?”
19.11: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Wahawele hela ludali kwa heni, wone hupeligwe na Nguluwi. Lelo munhu yandigale kwa hegwe ndo kana gehile ng'hatu.”
19.12: Pilato vyowahuliche hino, nakapala nzila ya kumlechela Yesu. Ila Wayahudi wayoweleza wata, “Wone umlechele ayo, huwele goloko wa mndewa wa Lumi. Kwa vila munhu yochidita kota Mndewa kangumbeza Mndewa wa Loma.”
19.13: Baho Pilato vyowahuliche ulonzi awo, nakamlavya Yesu kunze, kekalisa mchigoda cha mtagusa, honhu halihochemigwa, “Luga lwa mabwe”. Waebulaniya waliwochema Gabasa.
19.14: Yali zuwa lya kiwika goya na Pasaka, mhela wa saa sita nemisi. Pilato nakawalonjela Wayahudi, “Ayuno hano mndewa wa hemwe!”
19.15: Ila Wayahudi wayoweleza wata, “Muse! Muse! Muwambe muchitango!” Pilato nakawauza, “Mwangugana heni ndikamuwambe mumsalaba Mndewa wa hemwe?” Watambika wakulu nawamwidichila, “Mndewa tulinaye hetwe ndo Mndewa wa Loma hela!”
19.16: Pilato nakamlavya Yesu, kawapa hewo mmoko mwao wakamuwambe mumsalaba. Yesu kanguwambigwa mumsalaba (Matei 27:32-44; Malichi 15:21-32; Lukasi 23:26-43) Aho nawamhola Yesu.
19.17: Yesu nakalawa kunze yapichile msalaba wa kumuwambila mbaka honhu halihochemigwa izeje lya mutwi, kwa Chiebulaniya Goligota.
19.18: Wamuwamba Yesu mumsalaba hamwe na wanhu wanji weli, yumwe kumoso na yumwe kudilo, heye nayali hagati.
19.19: Pilato nakandika mchibao, kawika kuchanya mumsalaba hali Yesu, “Yesu Mnasaleti, Mndewa wa Wayahudi.”
19.20: Wayahudi wenji nawali wosoma ibango alyo kwa vila hala howamuwambile Yesu kwali habehi na muji walingikala wanhu. Na ibango alyo lyali lyandichigwe kwa Chiebulaniya na Chilumi na Chigiliki.
19.21: Mtambika Mkulu nakamlonjela Pilato, “Uleche kwandika ‘Mndewa wa Wayahudi,’ Ila ‘Munhu ayu nakalonga, Heni nda Mndewa wa Wayahudi.’ ”
19.23: Wamizi vyowamuwambile Yesu, wahola nguwo zoyavalile, wegawila vilundo vine, chila munhu chilundo chimwe. Wahola na nguwo ya heye yinji itawigwe kwa chibende chimwe chohachihonigwe.
19.24: Lelo welonjelela waliyeka wata, “Tuleche kuidega ayi, tulitowele simbi tulole yalikohi yohola.” Mbuli ayi naikoleka galawile Maandiko Matakatifu galingulonga, “Wegawila nguwo za heni, na zila zomvalile wazitowela simbi.” Ahyo ndo vyowaditile awala wamizi.
19.25: Habehi na ahala howamuwambile Yesu mumsalaba, wali wemile Maliya mayake Yesu na lumbu wa mayake na Maliya mdala wa Kileopa na Maliya Madelena.
19.26: Yesu vyoyamuwene mayake yemile na mlanguswa wa heye yamganile lukami ahala honhu nakamlonjela, “Mamo, sambi ayo ndo mwanago.”
19.27: Kahi baho nakamlonjela ayula mlanguswa, “Sambi ayo ndo mayako.” Kulawa hala, mlanguswa yula kamhola mayake kuza kikala na heye kaye. Yesu kangubagama (Matei 27:45-56; Malichi 15:33-41; Lukasi 23:44-49)
19.28: Yesu nakavizela kota geng'ha gamala, na leka Maandiko Matakatifu galawile kalonga, “Ndangona ng'halu.”
19.29: Kwali na chisaye ahala chiwele na divai izazame, wadilizila ibofyabofya, nawawopa mli nhagala ya isopolo, wamuwichila Yesu hamlomo yanwe.
19.30: Yesu vyoyanwele aila divai izazame, nakalonga, “Lelo imala!” Hamba kenamiza mutwi wa heye, muhe nauleka lukuli. Yesu kangutubuligwa na igoha mlubavu
19.31: Yali zuwa lya Kiwika goya na Pasaka, na mitondo yake nayali Zuwa lya Kwesela. Wayahudi nahawaviganile ng'huli zikale mmisalaba kuli Zuwa lya Kwesela kwavila zuwa alyo lyali likulu. Ahyo nawamlanda Pilato magulu ga wanhu hewo wawambigwe gabenigwe na ng'huli zawo zusigwe.
19.32: Baho wamizi waluta kubena magulu ga munhu wa mwaluko na wa keli wawambigwe hamwe na Yesu.
19.33: Ila vyowafichile kwa Yesu, wona yabagame katali hela, ahyo hawambenile magulu.
19.34: Yumwe mwa awala wamizi kamhoma igoha mlubavu lwa Yesu, baho du vilawa danda na malenga.
19.35: Na heye yagawene ago, kangundavila ulolezi leka hemwe namwe mkunde. Na ago gondilonga ng'homya, na heye kavizela kota nayali yolonga yokomya.
19.36: Mbuli ayo naikoleka galawile Maandiko Matakatifu, “Kuduhu chizeje ne chimwe chowobena.”
19.37: Kahi Maandiko Matakatifu gangulonga, “Womlola yula yowamtubule.” Yesu kanguwichigwa mchilaga (Matei 27:57-61; Malichi 15:42-47; Lukasi 23:50-56)
19.38: Hamba Yusufu, mwenyeng'hahye wa Alimataya nakamlanda Pilato yamkundile kuhola lukuli lwa Yesu. Yusufu nayali mlanguswa yumwe wa Yesu ila kwa uviso kwa vila nakawadumba wakulu wa Wayahudi. Pilato nakamkundila yahole. Ahyo Yusufu nakaluta kuhola lukuli lwa Yesu.
19.39: Nikodemo, ayula nayalutile kwa Yesu nechilo, nakaluta hamwe na Yusufu yaholile mhanzanyo wa manemane na udi kilo makumi gadatu.
19.40: Ahyo wauhola lukuli lwa Yesu na kaubumbiliza kwa sanda inojile ng'hatu hamwe na mafuta ga kunhunyhilila na udi, kota vyowazowele Wayahudi howomtila munhu.
19.41: Honhu aho howamuwambile Yesu kwali kamgunda, na muli kamgunda ako kwali na chilaga chinyale, hachinawichigwa ne lukuli mgati mwake.
19.42: Kwa vila zuwa lya Kiwika goya kwa Wayahudi nayali habehi, na chilaga chali habehi, wauwika mtufi wa Yesu mumo.

20.1: Hamitondo zuwa lya Jumapili kung'hali lufuku, Maliya Madelena nakaluta kuli chilaga, nakalyona iganga lyowadinyile hali lwizi lwa chilaga lihejezwe hafungo.
20.2: Baho nakaluta yobilima kwa Simoni Petili na kwa yula mlanguswa yunji yaganigwe na Yesu. Nakawalonjela, “Wamusa Mkulu mchilaga na hatuvizelele kohi kowamuwichile.”
20.3: Petili hamwe na yula mlanguswa yunji nawaluta kuli chilaga.
20.4: Weng'ha weli nawaluta wobilima, ila yula mlanguswa yunji nayali yobilima lukami kusinda Petili, nakalongola kufika kuli chilaga.
20.5: Loyenamize na kusunjilila mgati nakona sanda, ila henjile mgati.
20.6: Hamba Simoni Petili nakoya yomuwinza, nakenjila mgati. Na heye naye nakayona sanda iwele hafungo,
20.7: na chila chibende chonawambumbilize Yesu kumutwi. Chibende acho nahachali hamwe na sanda, ila chali chikungajizwe na kuwichigwa chiliyeka hafungo.
20.8: Hamba yula mlanguswa yunji yawahiche kuza kuchilaga kenjila mgati, kavyona na kukunda.
20.9: Nawang'hali kuvizela Maandiko Matakatifu vyogalonjile, kota naimgana kuzilipuka kwa wabagame.
20.10: Hamba wala walanguswa nawahiluka kaye. Yesu kagumlawila maliya Magidalena (Matei 28:9-10; Malichi 16:9-11)
20.11: Maliya nakapona yemile habehi na chilaga kunze kuno yolila. Vyoyang'hali yolila, kenamiza yalole mgati mchilaga.
20.12: Kawona wahilisi wa kilanga wa Nguluwi weli wavalile nguwo nzelu ng'hatu wekalise, yumwe kumutwi na yumwenga kuli magulu ahala na howauwichile lukuli lwa Yesu.
20.13: Wahilisi wala nawamuuza, “Mamo, kwangulila choni?” Nakawedichila, “Wamusa Mkulu wa heni, sivizelele kohi kowamuwichile!”
20.14: Maliya loyasindile kulonga, kagalamka kumbele, kamona Yesu yemile hafungo, ila nahavizelele kota ndo nayali Yesu.
20.15: Yesu nakamuuza, “Mamo, kwangulila choni? Yalikohi youlingumpala?” Maliya kejesa kota munhu yula nayali mwamizi wa mgunda, aho nakamlonjela, “Mhaza, wone umusile, undonjele kohi koumuwichile ndoluta kumhola.”
20.16: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Maliya!” Maliya kamgalamuchila na kulonga kwa Chiebulaniya, “Laboni!” Laboni ili na mina, Mlangusa.
20.17: Yesu nakamlonjela Maliya, “Uleche kimbata, kwa vila nding'hali hiluka kilanga kwa Mhaza. Ila ulute kwa wang'holozangu uwalonjele, heni ndanguhiluka kilanga kwa Mhaza kahi Mhaza wa hemwe, Nguluwi wa heni kahi Nguluwi wa hemwe.”
20.18: Maliya Madelena nakaluta kuwalonjela walanguswa ndimona Mkulu hamba nakawalonjela gala goyamlonjele. Yesu kanguwalawila walanguswa wa heye (Matei 28:16-20; Malichi 16:14-18; Lukasi 24:36-49)
20.19: Yali Jumapili matinazo, walanguswa wali wekale hamwe wehindile mng'handa kwa vila wali wowadumba wakulu wa Wayahudi. Hamba Yesu nakawalawila na kwima hagati howali, nakawalonjela, “Mikale goya!”
20.20: Vyoyasindile kulonga hino, kawalajila moko na lubavu lwake. Walanguswa nawasangalala heko vyowamuwene Mkulu.
20.21: Yesu nakahiluchila kahi kulonga, “Mikale goya. Kota Mhaza vyoyanhumile heni, na heni ndanguwalajiza hemwe.”
20.22: Loyasindile kulonga ago, nakawaputila na kuwalonjela, “Mbochele Muhe Yelile.
20.23: Wone muwosele wanhu gehile gowaditile, wokusilwa, ila wone mleme kuwosela gehile gowaditile, howokusilwa hebu!” Yesu na Tomasi
20.24: Tomasi yachemigwe mnyambili, yumwe wa wala walanguswa kumi na weli nayali haduhu hala hoyezile Yesu.
20.25: Baho walanguswa wamwenga nawamlonjela Tomasi, “Tumona Mkulu!” Tomasi nakawedichila, “Sikunda hebu mbaka ndizone ng'hovu za misumali na kwinjiza chidole cha heni kuli ng'hovu azo, na kwinjiza moko wa heni mlubavu lwa heye.”
20.26: Vyoifichile mazuwa nane, walanguswa wali hamwe kahi mla mng'handa. Tomasi na heye nayali hamwe na wayage. Vihindilo vyali vihindigwe, ila Yesu nakenjila na kwima hagati, nakalonga, “Mikale goya!”
20.27: Hamba Yesu nakamlonjela Tomasi, “Uwiche chidole cha hegwe ahano, na ulole moko gangu. Kahi uwiche moko gako kuli ng'hovu za heni. Uleche kuwa munhu ulihela makundo!”
20.28: Tomasi nakamwidichila, “Hegwe Mkulu wa heni! Hegwe Nguluwi wa heni!”
20.29: Yesu nakamlonjela, “Kwangukunda vyoumbwene? Wabweda wanhu hewo wakundile ne kumbona hebu!” Ulanguso wa chitabu chino
20.30: Yesu vyoyekale na walanguswa, nakalajila vinduzanduza vinji lukami, vinji nahavyandichigwe mchitabu chino.
20.31: Ila aga gandichigwa leka kuwadita hemwe mkunde kota Yesu ndo Kilistu Mlohozi, Mwana wa Nguluwi, na kukolela heye, mowa na ukomu kwa ludali lwa itagwa lyake.

21.1: Vyogamalile ago, Yesu nakawalawila kahi walanguswa saba kuli ilamba lya Tibeliya, nayali ahi,
21.2: Simoni Petili na Tomasi yachemigwe mnyambili na Natanaeli mwenyeng'haye wa Kana isi ya Galilaya na wana Sebedayo weli na walanguswa wa Yesu weli wali wekale hamwe.
21.3: Simoni Petili nakawalonjela wayage, “Ndanguluta kulowa somba.” Hewo nawamlonjela, “Toluta hamwe,” Ahyo waluta wali muitumbwi waluta, ila hawebate ne somba nechilo yeng'ha.
21.4: Zuwa vyolyali lilawila, nawamona Yesu yemile hafungo ha ilamba, ila walanguswa hawavizelele kota nayali heye.
21.5: Hamba Yesu nakawauza, “Wasongolo, hamlowile ne somba?” Nawedichila, “Hebu! Ne chinhu.”
21.6: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mtoze utandawala kudilo mwa itumbwi mochibata somba.” Hewo wadita kota vyoyawalonjele, watoza utandawala naumema somba, nawali wolemwela kukwega utandawala vyoumemile somba nyinji.
21.7: Baho mlanguswa yaganigwe na Yesu nakamlonjela Simoni Petili, “Ayu ndo Mkulu.” Petili vyoyahuliche kota nayali Yesu, kavala nguwo ya heye kwa vila nayali hanavala, na baho kenjila kuli malenga.
21.8: Ila wala walanguswa wanji nawoya mli itumbwi akuno wokwega utandawala umemile somba. Hawawele kutali na hafungo, kwali utali wa kota magulu miya.
21.9: Vyowafichile hafungo, wachona chiluli cha makala na mchanya hake hawichigwe somba na mibumunda.
21.10: Baho Yesu nakawalonjela hewo, “Migale somba nyhefu zo mibate sambi.”
21.11: Simoni Petili kakwina mli itumbwi, kakwega utandawala umemile somba kufungo, kwali na somba ng'hangala zifichile miya na makumi gahano na zidatu. Hanga na somba zeng'ha azo, utandawala haudejeche.
21.12: Yesu nakawalonjela, “Muye mulye.” Kuduhu ne mlanguswa yumwe yajezile kumuuza, “Kwa whaani?” Kwa vila nawavizela kota nayali Mkulu.
21.13: Yesu nakaluta, kalavya ibumunda, kawapa. Kahi kadita hiho kwa zila somba.
21.14: Ahi kahi nayali lwa kadatu Yesu kuwalawila walanguswa, kulawa vyo yazilipuche. Yesu kangulonga na Petili
21.15: Vyowasindile kulya, Yesu nakamlonjela Simoni Petili, “Simoni mwana Yohani, kwangungana ng'hatu kusinda awa?” Petili nakedichila, “Ena Mkulu, hegwe kuvizela kota ndangukugana.” Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ulolele wanaming'holo ja heni.”
21.16: Yesu nakamlonjela kahi, “Simoni mwana Yohani, kwangungana ng'hatu?” Petili nakedichila, “Ena Mkulu, hegwe kuvizela kota ndangukugana.” Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ulolele goya ming'holo ja heni.”
21.17: Lwa kadatu Yesu nakahiluchila kumuuza Petili, “Simoni mwana Yohani, kwangungana heni ng'hatu?” Petili nakesinza Yesu vyowamuzile lwa kadatu, “Kwangungana heni?” Heye nakedichila, “Mkulu, kuvizela vinhu vyeng'ha. Kuvizela kota ndangukugana.” Yesu nakamlonjela, “Ulolele ming'holo ja heni.
21.18: Ndangukulonjela ndikomya, vyouwele msongolo, nakuvala vyouganile na kuluta kouganile. Ila vyouwa ulalile, kogolola moko ga hegwe na munhu yunji kokibata na kukuhilika honhu hohuganile.”
21.19: Kwa kulonga ahyo, Yesu nayali yolajila nzila Petili vyoyobagame na kumtogola Nguluwi. Hamba nakamlonjela Petili, “Umbinze heni.” Yesu na ula mlanguswa yunji
21.20: Petili nakagalamka, kamona yula mlanguswa yaganigwe na Yesu yowawinza. Mlanguswa ayo ndo ayula nayekale wamwenga vyowali hamwe wolya, na ndo wamuuzile, “Mkulu, yalikohi yokuhinduka?”
21.21: Petili vyoyamuwene, nakamuuza Yesu, “Mkulu, yowa ndaze kwa munhu yuno?”
21.22: Yesu nakamwidichila, “Wone ndilingugana yekale mbaka hondikuya, hegwe yangukulapa choni? Hegwe umbinze heni!”
21.23: Na mbuli ayo nayenela kwa wala walanguswa kota mlanguswa ayu hobagama hebu. Ila Yesu nahalonjile kota hobagama hebu, ila nakalonga, “Wone ndilingugana yekale mbaka hondikuya, hegwe yangukulapa choni?”
21.24: Ayu ndo mlanguswa yalonjile mbuli zino na kuzandika. Na hetwe tuvizela kota goyalonjile kakomya ng'hatu. Kugongomanya
21.25: Yesu nakadita mbuli zinji nyinji. Wone vyeng'ha naviwe vyandichigwe mli vitabu, chimwe kwa chiyage, ndangulonga kota isi yeng'ha haiwa na honhu ha kuwika vitabu avyo.

1.1: Mkulu Teofili kuli chitabu cha heni cha mwaluko nanyandika mbuli zila Yesu zoyaditile na kulangusa kulawila mwaluko wa mijito ja heye,
1.2: mbaka zuwa lila loyaholigwe kilanga. Hala naloyang'hali kuholigwa kilanga nakawalajiza kwa ludali lwa Muhe Yelile wala watumigwa yawahagule.
1.3: Kwa mhela wa mazuwa makumi gane hala hoyabagame nayali yowalawila lawila na kilajila kota nayali mkomu. Nawamona, na heye nakalonga gala ga Undewa wa Nguluwi.
1.4: Mhela loyeting'hane hamwe na hewo nakawalonjela ahi, “Mleche kuka Yelusalemu, ila mbeteze ilagano lyoyawalonjele Mhaza, ila yomina namhuliche ndilonga.
1.5: Yohani nakabatiza kwa mazi, logokuya mazuwa mado, hemwe mobatizigwa kwa Muhe Yelile.” Yesu kanguholigwa kilanga (Malichi 16:19-20; Lukasi 24:50-53)
1.6: Ahyo watumigwa loweting'hane hamwe na Yesu, nawamuuza, “Lelo Mkulu mhela awu ndo houwahilusila Waisilaeli undewa wa hewo?”
1.7: Ila Yesu nakawalonjela, “Mhela na mbuli azo vya hasi ha ludali lwa Mhaza wa heni, kahi hambe iwalape hemwe kuvizela yowa nili.
1.8: Ila mhela Muhe Yelile loyowadulichilani, mobochela mong'ho na mowa walolezi wa heni kuli Yelusalemu na kuli mkowa wa Yudeya na Samaliya, mbaka kuduma kwa isi yeng'ha.”
1.9: Loyalonjile ago, weng'ha wawele womlola, kaholigwa kilanga, ng'hungugu imvisa hawamuwene kahi.
