1.10: Lowali wang'hali wolola kilanga, yawele yoluta, baho wanhu weli wawele wavalile nguwo nzelu pee, wema behi na hewo,
1.11: nawalonga, “Hemwe wanhu wa Galilaya, yandaze mwimile mlola kilanga? Yesu ayu yaholigwe kulawa kwa hemwe kuluta kilanga, kokuya kahi kota hiho vyomumuwene yoluta kilanga.” Matiya kanguhaguligwa yebate honhu ha Yudasi (Matei 27:3-10)
1.12: Hamba watumigwa wahiluka Yelusalemu kulawa kuli chila chidunda chilinguchemigwa chidunda cha Mizeituni, chiwele kilomita imwe kulawa mujini.
1.13: Lowafichile mujini nawenjila mli chihengo chiwele kuchanya mula mowali wochikala, na hewo wali Petili na Yohani na Yakubu na Andeleya na Filipo na Tomasi na Batolomeo na Matei na Yakubu mwana wa Alufayo na Simoni Zelote na Yudasi mwana wa Yakubu.
1.14: Awa weng'ha nawekungajiza hamwe kumlanda Nguluwi, hamwe na wadala wamwenga na Maliya mayake Yesu na wang'holoze.
1.15: Zuwa limwe, Petili nakema hali wala wanhu wawele womkunda wala wali wekungajize, hamwe wanhu weng'ha wali miya imwe na makumi meli,
1.16: nakalonga, “Wang'holozangu, nayali ilapa honhu ha Maandiko Matakatifu gakoleche, honhu hala Muhe Yelile, kwa ulonzi wa Daudi, nakolonga mbuli za Yudasi yula yawalongoze kuza kumibata Yesu.
1.17: Yudasi nayali yumwe wa chilundo cha hetwe, mina nakahaguligwa tuwe hamwe mli mijito ya hetwe.”
1.18: Heye nakagula mgunda kwa zila sendi zoyazipalile kwa madito ga heye gehile, nakagwa hasi nakutulika lida, utumbu wa heye ubohoka kunze.
1.19: Wanhu weng'ha walingikala Yelusalemu nawahulika mbuli ayo ikoleche, na ahyo kwa ulonzi wa hewo, wauchema ula mgunda Hakeli Dama, Izeleche, “Mgunda wa danda,”
1.20: “Lelo yandichigwa muli chitabu cha zabuli, “ ‘Mng'handa mwa heye mopona mahame, munhu yoneche yaleche kikala mgati amo.’ Kahi yandichigwa, “ ‘Munhu yunji yahole mijito ya heye.’
1.21: Lelo munhu yumwe mli wala welongoze na hetwe mhela weng'ha Mkulu Yesu loyali yokwinula majendo hamwe na hetwe, yahaguligwe kilumba na hetwe.
1.22: Ahyo kangulapigwa yawe yumwe wa wala welongoze na hetwe kulawila Yohani loyali yobatiza mbaka zuwa lila Yesu loyaholigwe kulawa kwa hetwe kuluta kilanga. Ayo kochilumba hamwe na hetwe kukola na kulavya ulolezi wa uzilipuko wa Yesu.”
1.23: Aho nawachema matagwa ga wanhu weli, wa mwaluko Yusufu yachemigwe Balisaba ama kahi Yusto na wakeli Matiya.
1.24: Hamba nawamlanda Nguluwi, “Mkulu hegwe kwanguzizela nhumbula za wanhu weng'ha. Ahyo, utulajilile hali awa weli yalikohi youmhagule,
1.25: leka yahole honhu hano ha mijito ja uchitumagwa woyalechile Yudasi nakaluta honhu hake yuye.”
1.26: Nawatowa simbi, simbi imgwila Matiya, na heye konjezwa mli wala watumigwa wanji kumi na yumwe.

2.1: Zuwa lya Pendekosti lolifichile, wanhu weng'ha wali wekungajize hamwe.
2.2: Bahala lizi lihulikwa kulawa kilanga, iputa ifandile kota mbeho ng'hali, uimemeza ng'handa ila yeng'ha yowali wekale.
2.3: Hamba navilawila vinhu vyoneche kota milapi ja chiluli, visambalula na kugwa kwa chila yumwe wa hewo.
2.4: Weng'ha wamemezwa Muhe Yelile, nawaluka kulonga ulonzi winji kota hila Muhe vyoyawadahize kulonga.
2.5: Na ako Yelusalemu wali kuko Wayahudi, wanhu walingumkunda Nguluwi, walawile chila nhanzi ya isi yeng'ha na kilanga.
2.6: Lowahuliche lizi alyo, chilundo chikulu cha wanhu nachikungajiza. Weng'ha watinuka lukami kwa vila chila yumwe wa hewo nakawahulika awo wanhu wa Nguluwi wolonga kwa ulonzi wohawavumbuche nawo.
2.7: Wabubuwala na kulunduwala walonga, “Lelo awa weng'ha tulinguwahulika wolonga ahi, hawawele wenyeng'haye wa Galilaya?
2.8: Iwa ndaze lelo, kuta chila munhu kanguwahulika wolonga kwa ulonzi wohawavumbuche nawo?
2.9: Wayetu wamwenga Wapalisi na Wamedi na Waelami na wamwenga ndo wenyeng'haye wa Mesopotamiya na Yudeya na Kapadokia na Ponto na mkowa wa Asiya
2.10: na Fulugiya na Pamfiliya na Misili na honhu ha Libiya behi na Kulene, wayetu wamwenga ndo wajenzi kulawa Loma,
2.11: na Wayahudi na wanhu wahinduchile na kwinjila kuli nzila ya kumfugamila Nguluwi ya Chiyahudi, wamwenga walawa Kilete na Alabiya. Hetwe tweng'ha twanguwahulika wolonga kwa ulonzi wotuvumbuche nawo mbuli ng'hulu za Nguluwi.”
2.12: Weng'ha nawabubuwala kuno wochiuza, “Ayi mina yangutulangusa choni?”
2.13: Ila wamwe wawabeza wolonga, “Wanhu awa wagala divai inyale ya lehano!” Usenga wa Petili
2.14: Ila Petili nakema hamwe na wala kumi na yumwe kaluka kuwadamlila wanhu kwa lizi likulu, “Wang'holozangu Wayahudi na hemwe mweng'ha mlingikala hano Yelusalemu, mhulichize goya ulonzi wondilonga.
2.15: Wanhu awa hawagalile kota vyomlinguvizela, sambi ya saa tatu hela mitondo?
2.16: Kukomya ndo kota mbuli ayi ndo ila yoyalonjile Yoeli nayawele mloli wa Nguluwi,
2.17: “ ‘Mli mazuwa gala ga kuduma, nakalonga Nguluwi, ndowajidila wanhu weng'ha Muhe wa heni. Wana wa hemwe wa chilume na wachidala wolavya uloli. Wasongolo wa hemwe wokona ulotezi, na wasekulu wa hemwe wolota.
2.18: Ena, na vitumagwa wa heni wachilume na wachidala, ndowajidila Muhe wa heni mazuwa gala, na hewo wolavya uloli.
2.19: Ndodita vinduzanduza mchanya kilanga, na ulajilo hasi muisi, kowa na danda na chiluli na miyosi jizidahe,
2.20: isanya lyoditilwa jiza, na isaye lyowa lidung'hu kota danda, hala hainalawila zuwa lila likulu na iwele na ukulu wa Mkulu.
2.21: Aho yoneche yomchema Mkulu kwa utanzi, koloholigwa.’
2.22: “Wanhu wa Isilaeli, mhulichize ulonzi awu! Yesu wa Nasaleti nayali munhu yula Nguluwi kamlajila kwa ludali lwa ulajilo na vinduzanduza na kububuwaza na vila Nguluwi vyoyaditile hali hemwe kukolela heye, kota vyomvizelele.
2.23: Kota navyoyaganile heye kulawa mwaluko, Nguluwi nakalamula kuta Yesu yawichigwe mmoko mwa hemwe, na hemwe mumkopola kwa kuwalechela wanhu wehile wamuwambe mumsalaba.
2.24: Ila Nguluwi nakamzilipula, kamlohola kuli usungu wa kubagama mina na haiganigwe ng'hatu kubagama kumuwohe.
2.25: Mina Daudi nakalonga mbuli za Mkulu kota ahi, “ ‘Nandimonaga Mkulu kumwando kwa heni mazuwa gose, kahamwe nzingo ya heni ya kudilo, nani hambe nhigasiche.
2.26: Ahyo, nhumbula ya heni yangusangalala, na lumyango lwangu nalutowa luchenze lwa kusangalala. Na lukuli lwa heni lochikala muli kitumbila,
2.27: kwa vila hegwe Nguluwi, huileka nhumbula ya heni kuli isi ya wabagame, ne humkundiza yelile wa hegwe yole mchilaga.
2.28: Kundajila nzila za ukomu, kumemeza usangalalo kwa kuwa baho hegwe!’
2.29: “Wang'holozangu, ndangugana kuwalonjela ndikangaze mbuli zimfichile Daudi, sekulu wa hetwe yatanganiche. Heye nakabagama na katiligwa, kahi chilaga cha heye cha bahano hakaye hetu mbaka lehano.
2.30: Ila kwa vila Daudi nayali mloli wa Nguluwi, nakavizela kuta Nguluwi kamlahila kuta komhaliza yumwe wa lulelo lwa heye yawe mndewa wa honhu hake.
2.31: Daudi nakona kung'hali mbuli zoyodita Nguluwi na ahyo nakalonga gala ga uzilipuko wa Kilistu mlohozi hala hoyalonjile, “ ‘Halechigwe kuli isi ya wabagame, lukuli lwa heye halolile mli chilaga.’
2.32: “Lelo Nguluwi nakamzilipula ayu Yesu na hetwe tweng'ha twa walolezi wa mbuli ayi.
2.33: Heye loyakwinizwe na kuwichigwa na Nguluwi nzingo ya heye ya kudilo, nakabochela kwa heye mhaza yula Muhe Yelile nayalagane na hetwe, nakatujidila ayo Muhe. Acho ndo mlinguchona sambi na kuhulika.
2.34: Mina heye Daudi, hakwinile mbaka kilanga, ila heye nakalonga. “ ‘Mkulu nakamlonjela Mkulu wa heni, kalise nzingo ya heni ya kudilo,
2.35: mbaka ndiwadite wang'honyo wa hegwe wawe chigoda cha kuwichila magulu ga hegwe.’
2.36: “Wanhu weng'ha wa Isilaeli wangulapigwa kuvizela kuta ayo Yesu yomumgazile, ndo yuye yula Nguluwi yamditile yawe Mkulu na Kilistu Mlohozi!”
2.37: Lelo wanhu lowahuliche ahyo, wahomwa nhumbula, nawamuuza Petili na watumigwa wayage, “Wang'holozetu tudite ndaze?”
2.38: Petili nakedichila, “Mumgalamchile Nguluwi na chila yumwe wa hemwe yabatizigwe kwa itagwa lya Yesu Kilistu, leka musilwe gehile ga hemwe na kubochela ndolendole ndo iwele Muhe Yelile.
2.39: Mina, ilagano lila lyomuwichilwe hemwe, na lyomuwichilwe na wana wa hemwe, na kwa wanhu weng'ha walingikala kutali na kwa chila munhu yula mkulu Nguluwi wa hetwe komchema kwa heye.”
2.40: Kwa ulonzi unji winji, Petili nakalajiliza na kuwahimiliza wanhu yolonga, “Milohole na lulelo alu lwihile.”
2.41: Wenji nawaukunda ulonzi wa heye, wabatizigwa. Wanhu wawele elufu zidatu wonjezeka kuli chila chilundo zuwa alyo.
2.42: Awa weng'ha walutilila kilangusa kwa watumigwa. Hamba nawalutilila kikala hamwe chilukolo na kumogola ibumunda na kumlanda Nguluwi. Vyonawekale chila zuwa wala wanhu wa Nguluwi
2.43: Vinduzanduza vinji na kububuwaza navilajilwa kwa kukolela watumigwa na chila munhu nakadumba.
2.44: Wanhu weng'ha wawelengumkunda Nguluwi wazanguwa chinhu chimwe na vinhu vya hewo wazangigawila.
2.45: Wali woguza lufufu lwawo na vinhu vya hewo hamba nawegawila sendi kota chila munhu vyoyalapile.
2.46: Nawalutilila kiting'hana hamwe chila zuwa kuli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi. Ila mhela wa kumogola mibumunda, naweting'hana mli ng'handa za hewo walya hamwe ndiya ayo kwa usangalalo na nhumbula igonzoche.
2.47: Nawamtogola Nguluwi, nakuganigwa na wanhu weng'ha. Chila zuwa Mkulu nakawonjezela wanhu kuli lng'hongola lwa lwawo lwa wala wanhu nawali woloholigwa.

3.1: Zuwa limwe, saa tisa nemisi, Petili na Yohani wali woluta Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, mhela wa kumlanda Nguluwi.
3.2: Mhela awo wanhu wali wompika munhu yumwe chete kulawila loyaleleche. Wanhu awo wali womuwika ayo munhu chila zuwa muli chihindilo cha Ng'handa ya Nguluwi ulinguchemigwa Chihindilo Chinojile, leka yalande choneche kwa wala wokwinjila Ng'handa ya Nguluwi.
3.3: Loyawawene Petili na Yohani wokwinjila Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, nakawalanda wampe choneche.
3.4: Petili na Yohani wamnogolela meho, heye Petili nakamlonjela, “Tulole!”
3.5: Heye nakawagalamchila, yochitumbila hanji kopegwa chinhu choneche kwa hewo.
3.6: Hamba Petili nakamlonjela, “Ndahela sendi ne zahabu, ila chila chondilinacho ndokupa. Kwa itagwa lya Yesu Kilistu wa Nasaleti, wime na ujende!”
3.7: Kahi, nakamibata moko wa kudilo, kamwinula. Baho magulu na mafugamilo ga heye nagali na ludali.
3.8: Kanyozoka, kema kaluka kujenda. Hamba kenjila na hewo Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, yojenda na kunyozoka nyozoka kuno yomtogola Nguluwi.
3.9: Wanhu weng'ha wawele aho nawamona yojenda na kumtogola Nguluwi.
3.10: Lowavizelele kuta ndo yula yaliyolanda behi na chila Chihindilo Chinojile cha Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, nawabubuwala lukami na kulemwela kuvizela gamlawile. Usenga wa Petili
3.11: Wanhu weng'ha, wang'hali wabubuwale ng'hatu, nawaluka kubilimila honhu hali nguchemigwa “Chipepela cha Solomoni,” Hala yula munhu nayali yang'hali yawebate Petili na Yohani.
3.12: Lelo Petili yawawene wanhu awo nakawalonjela, “Wanhu wa Isilaeli, lekachoni mwangububuwala kwa mbuli ayi? Lekachoni mwangutunogolela meho kota ndo kwa mong'ho wa hetwe ama kwela kwa hetwe twetwe ndo kumditile munhu ayu yajende?”
3.13: Nguluwi wa Abulahamu na Isaka na Yakubu, Nguluwi wa wasekulu wa hetwe yamtogole chitumagwa wa heye Yesu. Heye ndo yuyula mmuwichile mmoko ga wakulu na kumlema hali Pilato, hanga Pilato yaganile kumlechela.
3.14: Yali yelile na yanojile, ila hemwe namumlema, namumgana munhu yunji yawele mkopolaji yalechelwe.
3.15: Lelo mumkopola yula nayaditile mwaluko wa ukomu. Ila Nguluwi nakamzilipula, na hetwe twa walolezi wa mbuli ayo.
3.16: Itagwa lya Yesu na makundo mli itagwa alyo ndo vimpele ludali munhu ayu mlingumona nakumzela. Makundo kwa Yesu ndo gamusile ng'hatu munhu ayu kota vyommona mweng'ha.
3.17: “Lelo wang'holozangu, hemwe na wakulu wa hemwe namdita mbuli azo kwa kuleka kuvizela.
3.18: Lelo Nguluwi ndo vyoyaditile gala goyadamle aho katali kwa kukolela waloli weng'ha, mina naimlapa Kilistu Mlohozi wa heye yagaziche.
3.19: Lelo mumgalamchile Nguluwi, leka heye yawosele gehile ga hemwe.
3.20: Mdite ahyo leka Mkulu yawape mhela wa kwesela na kuwagalila yula Kilistu Mlohozi, yula ndo Yesu.
3.21: Ilapa yapone kuko kilanga mbaka houfika mhela wa kugongomanya vinhu vyeng'ha, kota Nguluwi vyoyalonjile kwa kukolela waloli wa heye welile kulawila katali.
3.22: Kwa vila Musa mina nakalonga, ‘Mkulu Nguluwi wa hemwe kokugalilani hali wang'holozenu mloli wa Nguluwi kota heni. Mumhulichize heye kwa mbuli zeng'ha zoyowalonjela.
3.23: Yoneche homuhulichiza Mloli ayo kobaguligwa kutali na wanhu wa Nguluwi na kudumigwa.’
3.24: Waloli weng'ha, kwaluchila Samweli na wala wamuwinzile, nawadamla mbuli azi zila zali zikoleka mazuwa gaga.
3.25: Malagano gala Nguluwi goyalavile kwa kukolela waloli ndo kahi kwa mbuli ya hemwe, na mwangilumba kuli ilagano Nguluwi lyoyaditile na wasekulu wa hemwe, kota voyamlonjele Abulahamu, ‘Kwa kukolela walelwa wa hegwe na ivyazi lyeng'ha lyako muisi lyotambichizwa.’
3.26: Lelo Nguluwi nakamzilipula chitumagwa wa heye kwa mbuli ya hemwe tandi, nakamlajiza yakugalileni utambichizo kwa kumdita chila munhu wa hemwe yalekane ng'hatu na gehile ga heye.”

4.1: Petili na Yohani lowang'hali wowadamlila wanhu, watambika na wakulu wa wamizi wa ng'handa ya Nguluwi hamwe na Masadukayo nawafika.
4.2: Nawazudila lukami, mina awo watumigwa wali wowadamlila wanhu kuta Yesu nakazilipuka, mbuli ilingulajila wabagame wozilipuka.
4.3: Hamba wawebata na kwa vila nechilo nayali ikwinjila, wazanguwamila mbaka hamitondo.
4.4: Ila wenji nawahuliche awo ulonzi nawakunda, na chilundo cha wanhu chizangonjezeka kwa kuwaza iwa ifichile walume elufu zihano.
4.5: Mitondo wakulu wa Wayahudi, wasekulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa naweting'hana hamwe ako Yelusalemu.
4.6: Neweting'hana hamwe na Anasi mtambika mkulu na Kayafa na Yohani na Alekizanda na wanji wali wa lukolo lwa mtambika mkulu.
4.7: Lowawemize Petili na Yohani kumwando kuli hewo, nawawauza, “Hemwe mwangudita mbuli azi kwa mong'ho wachi ama kwa itagwa lya munhu yachi?”
4.8: Aho Petili yawele yamemile Muhe Yelile, nakawalonjela, “Vilongozi na wakulu wa wanhu!
4.9: Wone mwangutuuza lelo hano chila chidito chinojile choyaditilwe yula munhu nayali chete na vyoyaditigwe yawe mkomu,
4.10: lelo, hemwe na wanhu weng'ha wa Isilaeli mwangulapigwa kuvizela kuta munhu ayu kema kumwando kwa hemwe lelo hano, mkomu ng'hatu, kwa itagwa lya Yesu Kilistu wa Nasaleti yula hemwe namumuwambile mumsalaba, ila Nguluwi nakamzilipula.
4.11: Ayu ndo yula Maandiko Matakatifu gangulonga, “ ‘Iganga lyowalilemile walinguzenga, lelo liwa iganga likulu lya msisi.’
4.12: Haduhu ulohozi hambe upegwe kwa munhu yunji yoneche, mina hasi mwa ulanga, kuduhu itagwa linji Nguluwi yatupele hetwe toweza kuloholigwa nalyo.”
4.13: Awo wakulu wa kutagusa, wawele wavizelele kuta Petili na Yohani wali wanhu hawasomile ne kuwa na uwanzi woneche ila na wabubuwala vyonawadahile kulonga ne kudumba. Wali wavizelele kuta wali welumbile na Yesu.
4.14: Ila lowamuwene yula munhu yosilwe utamwa yemile hamwe na hewo, hawalonjile chinhu.
4.15: Ahyo nawawalonjela walawe kunze kuli chitala, na hewo nawapona mng'handa waliyeng'ha wolongasa chinyele.
4.16: Wakulu wa utaguso wazangiuza, “Tudite choni na wanhu awa? Chila munhu yalingikala Yelusalemu kanguvizela kuta ulajilo wa chinduzanduza achi na kububuwaza aku kukoleka, na hetwe hatubela mbuli ayi.
4.17: Ila wone tugana mbuli ayi ileche kwenela ng'hatu kuli wanhu wesa, tuwadeuze waleche kulonga na munhu yoneche kwa itagwa lya Yesu.”
4.18: Ahyo wawachema kahi mung'handa, waleche kuwalonjela wanhu honhu honeche kahi waleche kulangusa kwa itagwa lya Yesu.
4.19: Ila Petili na Yohani nawawedichila, “Mwamule mwemwe wone inoga hali Nguluwi kuwahulichiza hemwe kuleka kumhulichiza Nguluwi.
4.20: Hetwe hatuleka ng'oo kulonga mbuli zila zotuziwene na kuhulika.”
4.21: Lelo awo wasekulu wa kutagusa wawadeuza kwa kuwang'hang'halila ng'hatu, hamba wawalechela. Hawawagazile kwa vila wanhu weng'ha nawali womtogola Nguluwi kwa mbuli ayo ilawile.
4.22: Ayo munhu yoselwe utamwa nayali na ukulu upulute miyaka makumi gane. Wanhu wangumlanda Nguluwi yawemize
4.23: Bahala lowalechelwe, Petili na Yohani wahiluka kwa wayao, wawalonjela gala gowalonjelwe na watambika wakulu na wasekulu.
4.24: Na hewo lowahuliche mbuli azo welumba hamwe na wayao kumlanda Nguluwi wakangaze wolonga, “Mkulu, hegwe ulumbile ulanga na isi, bahali na vyeng'ha vilimumo!
4.25: Ndo umditile chitumagwa wa hegwe, mhaza wa hetwe Daudi, yalonje kwa ludali lwa Muhe Yelile, “ ‘Lekachoni wanhu wa isi zeng'ha wazudila? Lekachoni wanhu wangijesa wihe?
4.26: Wandewa wa isi mina nawewika goya, na vilongozi wa isi naweting'hana hamwe, kumlema Mkulu na Kilistu Mlohozi.’
4.27: Mina, hino ndo vyoili Helodi na Pontio Pilato na wanhu wa Isilaeli na wanhu wa isi zinji, vyowating'hane baha mujini, kumlemela Yesu chitumagwa wa hegwe Yelile yula youmhagule yawe Kiliistu Mlohozi.
4.28: Ena, naweting'hana wogana wadite mbuli zila zouganile na kuwika goya kulawila mwaluko kwa ludali na igano lya hegwe.
4.29: Ila lelo, hegwe Mkulu, ulole kukabusa kwa hewo ututanze hetwe vitumagwa wa hegwe kudamla lizi lya hegwe ne kudumba.
4.30: Golose moko wa hegwe leka uwalohole wanhu. Dite ulajilo na vinduzanduza kwa itagwa lya Yesu chitumagwa wa hegwe Yelile.”
4.31: Lowasindile kumlanda Nguluwi, hala honhu howali weting'hane hatigaswa, na weng'ha wamema Muhe Yelile. Weng'ha walutilila kudamla lizi lya Nguluwi ne kudumba. Newekala kota ivyazi limwe
4.32: Nhanzi yeng'ha ya chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu wali na nhumbula na Muhe yumwe. Haduhu ne yumwe nayali na chinhu choneche yachiwiche chiwe cha heye yaliyeng'ha, ila nawewigawila vyeng'ha vyowalinavyo.
4.33: Watumigwe nawalavya ulolezi kwa ludali lwinji kuzilipuka kwa Mkulu Yesu, na Nguluwi kawapa kunoga kwa heye kwinji.
4.34: Haduhu ne munhu nayesilwe chinhu, mina wawele na migunda ama ng'handa waliwoziguza,
4.35: na kuwapa watumigwa azo sendi, na kigawila chila munhu vyoyalingulapa.
4.36: Kwali na Mlawi yumwe yaleleche Kupulo, itagwa lya heye Yusufu, yula watumigwa nawamchema Banaba, izeleche “Munhu yawelenguwakangaza nhumbula wanhu.”
4.37: Heye naye nayali na mgunda nakauguza nakahola zila sendi kawegalila watumigwa.

5.1: Munhu yumwe yalinguchemigwa Ananiya na mdala wa heye Safila nawaguza mgunda wa hewo vivila.
5.2: Ila mdala wa heye yawele yavizelele, Ananiya nakewichila chasi cha sendi zoyapatile na chasi chiyage kawapa watumigwa.
5.3: Hamba, Petili nakamuuza, “Ananiya, lekachoni Limazoga yenjile mnhumbula ya hegwe na kukudita umuhade Muhe Yelile kwa kiwichila sendi zoupatile kwa kuguza ula mgunda?
5.4: Hala hunaliguza lyali lyako, na louliguzile, azo sendi zali za hegwe ukolele chougana. Lelo lekachoni uganile kudita mbuli ili ahi mnhumbula ya hegwe? Humuhadile munhu, kumhada Nguluwi!”
5.5: Ananiya loyahuliche ahyo kagwa hasi nakabagama. Wanhu weng'ha wahuliche mbuli ayo ilawile nawadumba lukami.
5.6: Wasongolo weza, nawagubika mtufi wa heye waulavya kunze nawautila mchilaga.
5.7: Logamalile masaa gadatu hino, mchewake yawele hanavizela galawile, kenjila mla mng'handa.
5.8: Petili nakamlonjela, “Ndonjele! Azi sendi ndo zompatile kwa kuguza ula mgunda?” Heye nakamlonjela? “Ena zizo.”
5.9: Yolawa Petili nakamlonjela, “Lekachoni lomilanguse kumhada Muhe wa Mkulu? Hulichize! Wala wanhu walutile kumtila mchilaga mlume wa hegwe, sambi wa mchihilindilo na hegwe nagwe wokuhola kahi.”
5.10: Bahala Safila nakagwa mli magulu ga Petili nakabagama. Wala wasongolo lowenjile, wamfika mina yabagame, ahyo nawamlavya kunze, wamtila mchilaga behi na mlume wa heye.
5.11: Chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu na wanhu wanji wahuliche mbuli ayo nawadumba lukami. Vinduzanduza na kububuwaza
5.12: Watumigwe nawalajila vinduzanduza na kububuwaza kwinji hali wanhu. Wanhu wa wamkundile Yesu wali wochiting'hana hamwe mli chipepela cha Solomoni.
5.13: Munhu yunji hela nayali yodumba kilongoza na hewo. Ahyo wanhu wenji wala hawawele wa makundo ago, nawawatogola.
5.14: Wanhu wenji walume na wadala nawamkundile Mkulu, nawonjezeka mli chilundo cha hewo.
5.15: Na wanhu wali wowagala watamwa wa hewo mnzila na kuwawasiliza mchanya mli vinhanda na mmicheka Petili wone yakole, wogana chibehelo cha heye chiwadolize wanhu wamwenga.
5.16: Wanhu wenji nawoya wolawila honhu hafungofungo ha Yelusalemu, wowegala watamwa wa hewo na wala wali na chijeni chihile, na hewo weng'ha wosilwa utamwa. Watumigwe wangugazika
5.17: Hamba mtambika mkulu na wayage wali wa chilundo cha Masadukayo wa honhu aho, wawonela maya watumigwa.
5.18: Hamba, wawebata watumigwa wawahindila mchinweng'ho.
5.19: Ila hamihe mhilisi wa Mkulu na kachumula chihindilo cha chinweng'ho, kawalavya kunze, nakawalonjela,
5.20: “Mlute na mwime mng'handa hali Ng'handa ya Nguluwi mkawalonjele wanhu ulonzi weng'ha wa ukomu awu.”
5.21: Watumigwe nawakunda, nawenjila mli Ng'hada ya Nguluwi kung'hali lufuku, nawaluka kulangusa. Mtambika mkulu na wayage lowafichile nawachema nhing'hano ng'hulu na wakulu weng'ha wa utaguso na vilongozii wa Wayahudi, wawalajiza wanhu kuchinhweng'ho leka wakawegale wala watumigwa.
5.22: Ila wala vitumagwa lowafichile ako hawawafichile mla mowawahindile. Ahyo nawahiluka, wazalonga luzi mnhing'hano,
5.23: wolonga, “Natufika honhu howahindilwe hahindigwe chila nzingo na wamizi wololela mchihindilo. Ila lotuchumule mla mg'handa hatumuwene munhu yoneche.”
5.24: Mkulu wa wamizi wa ng'handa ya Nguluwi na watambika wakulu lowahuliche mbuli ayo wazangudumba, waleche kuvizela gawapatile.
5.25: Keza munhu yumwe, nakawalonjela, “Wala wanhu womuhindile mchinhweng'ho, ahi sambi wa Ng'handa ya Nguluwi, wangulangusa wanhu.”
5.26: Aho mkulu wa wamizi wa ng'handa ya Nguluwi hamwe na wanhu wa heye nawaluta ng'handa ya Nguluwi, kuwegala. Ila hawawebate kwa lupichi, mina nawadumba wanhu wowatowa na maganga.
5.27: Hamba wawegala, wawemiza kumwando hali chitala. Mtambika mkulu nakawalonjela,
5.28: “Natuwalemeza ng'hatu kulangusa kwa itagwa lya munhu ayu, lelo mvumiza malanguso ga munhu ayu kwesa Yelusalemu, lelo mwangugana kutuwichila nongwa ya kubagama kwa munhu ayu.”
5.29: Aho Petili, yawele hamwe na wala watumigwa wanji, nakedichila, “Igana kumuhulichiza Nguluwi kusinda wanhu.
5.30: Nguluwi wa hetwe nakamzilipula Yesu kulawila hala hemwe homumkopole na kumuwamba mumsalaba.
5.31: Ayu ndo yula yakwinizwe na Nguluwi mbaka nzingo ya heye ya kudilo. Kawa chilongozi na mlohozi, leka yawadahize wanhu wa Isilaeli wamgalamchile Nguluwi, na kusilwa gehile ga hewo.
5.32: Na hetwe twanguvumila mbuli ayo, na heye Muhe Yelile yula Nguluwi yawapele wala walingumuhulichiza, kangulavya ulolezi kwa mbuli ilawile.”
5.33: Wanhu weng'ha wawele hala mchitala lowahuliche ahyo wazudila, wazangugana kuwakopola watumigwa.
5.34: Ila Mfalisayo yumwe nayali nguchemigwa Gamalieli yula nayali mlangusa wa malajizo ga Musa nayatanganiche ng'hatu hali wanhu weng'ha, nakema mchitala, kagana wala watumigwa walavigwe kunze hado.
5.35: Hamba nakawalonjela wala wanhu wa kutagusa, “Wanhu wa Isilaeli, mijese hala hamnakola chila chomlingugana kuwakolela wanhu awa!
5.36: Katali hado, nakalawila munhu yumwe itagwa lya heye Seuda, kazangidita kota kamunhu yatanganiche na wanhu wafichile miya zine welongoza na heye. Ila nakakopoligwa, na chilundo cheng'ha cha heye chisambaluka na kwaga.
5.37: Kahi, heni hamba, mhela ula wa kuwazigwa wanhu, nakalawila Yudasi wa Galilaya. Na heye ayu nakawakwega wanhu wamuwinza, ila na heye nakakopoligwa na wala waliwomuwinza wasambaluka.
5.38: Na kahi heni sambi ndangukulonjelani, mleche kuwaditila wanhu awa chinhu choneche chila, mina wone mbuli ayi ya hewo yaluchizwe na wanhu, yokwaga iliyeng'ha.
5.39: Ila wone yaluchizwe na Nguluwi, haiwele hela kota molemwa kuwasumya, ila mochifika mumlema Nguluwi!” Hamba, wekundiza na heye.
5.40: Ahyo wawachema wala watumigwa, hamba nawawalonjela watowigwe ng'hobwa na kuwalemeza waleche kulangusa kwa itagwa lya Yesu, hamba nawawaleka walute.
5.41: Ahyo watumigwa nawalawa hala mchitala wawele wasangalale, mina nawalapigwa kubasigwa soni kwa itagwa lya Yesu.
5.42: Chila zuwa wazangulangusa na kudamla mli Ng'handa ya Nguluwi na ng'handa za wanhu Mbuli Inojile kota Yesu ndo Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe.

6.1: Hamba, lung'hongola lwa walanguswa vyolwali luvila ng'hatu, nakulawila kung'hung'huta hali wanhu walingukunda walingulonga Chigilichi na wala walingulonga Chiebulaniya. Wala walingulonga Chigilichi waliwong'hung'uta kota walekwa wa hewo wali wosemwigwa kuli kugawilwa vinhu vyowali wolapa chila zuwa.
6.2: Ahyo, watumigwa kumi na weli nawaichema nhanzi yeng'ha ya walanguswa, nawalonga, “Hainojile hetwe tuleche kudamla lizi lya Nguluwi hamba tuzengigayila kigawila vinhu vyotulingugana kwa malapo ya chila zuwa.
6.3: Ahyo wang'holozetu, mhagule hali hemwe wanhu saba watanganiche, wamemile Muhe na luhala lwa kumuhulichiza Nguluwi, na hetwe towapa hemwe ludali alo lwa kigawila vinhu.
6.4: Twetwe baha, tochinweg'ha kumlanda Nguluwi na mijito ya kudamla ulonzi wa Nguluwi.”
6.5: Mbuli ayo iwanojeza nhanzi ya wanhu weng'ha wa Nguluwi. Wamhagula Stefani, munhu nayali na makundo makulu na yamemile Muhe Yelile nawamhagula kahi Filipo na Pilokolo na Nikanoli na Timona na Pamena na Nikolao wa Antiokiya yula mhela umwe nayali yahinduchile na kwinjila kuli nzila ya Chiyahudi ya kumfugamila Nguluwi.
6.6: Nawawawika kumwando kwa watumigwa, na hewo nawawalandila na kuwawichila moko.
6.7: Lizi lya Nguluwi luza kwenela na wanhu wa Nguluwi ako Yelusalemu wonjezeka ng'hatu, na chilundo chikulu cha watambika nawabochela makundo ga Yesu. Stefani kangibatigwa
6.8: Stefani nakabochela kunoga kwinji kwa Nguluwi, ludali lwinji na kazangulajila vinduzanduza hali wanhu.
6.9: Ila wanhu wamwenga nawalawila wetwanjize na Stefani. Wanhu awo wamwenga wali wa ng'handa imwe ya kusalila ilinguchemigwa, ng'handa ya wanhu welejehe, na hewo nawalawa Kulene na Alekizandilia, wamwenga nawalawa Kilikiya na mkowa wa Asiya.
6.10: Ila nawalemwa kitwanza na heye kwa mbuli ya luhala lwake na yula Muhe Yelile yamlongoze mhela loyalonjile.
6.11: Ahyo nawawasonjeleza wanhu wamwe walonje, “Tumhulika Stefano yolonga mbuli za kumliga Musa na kumliga Nguluwi.”
6.12: Kwa chiwalo acho, nawawasonjeleza wanhu na wasekulu na walangusa wa malajizo ga Musa. Lelo wamuyila Stefani, wamibata wamigala hali chitala chikulu.
6.13: Wawegala mchitala walolezi wa udesi wala nawalonga, “Munhu ayu hambe yaleche kulonga ulonzi wa kuliga honhu helile na malajizo ga Musa.
6.14: Mina natumhulika yolonga ayo Yesu wa Nasaleti kowifya ng'hatu ng'handa ya Nguluwi na kuchigalamla chihendo chila chotubochele kwa Musa.”
6.15: Weng'ha wawele mli chitala wamnogolela meho Stefani, wona kumeho kwa heye kuwele kota mhilisi wa kilanga.

7.1: Lelo mtambika mkulu nakamuuza Stefani, “Ndaze! Mbuli azi kwangukomya ndo vyozili?”
7.2: Stefani nakedichila, “Wang'holozangu na wahaza wa heni, mnyhulichize! Nguluwi wa ukulu nakamlawila Mhaza wa hetwe Abulahamu loyali yochikala Mesopotamiya, naloyang'hali kikala Halani,
7.3: Nguluwi nakamlonjela, ‘Uche muisi ya hegwe, uwaleche wang'holozo, ulute kuli isi yondikulajila.’
7.4: Ahyo Abulahamu nakoka muisi ya Kalidayo na kuza kikala Halani. Nakoka ako mhaza wa heye lonayabagame, Nguluwi nakamusa mbaka isi ayi yomlingikala hemwe sambi.
7.5: Nguluwi nahampele ne honhu hamwe hadodo ha isi ayi iwe ya heye, leka ahyo, nakalagana na heye kota komha isi ayi iwe ya heye na ya walelwa wa heye, hanga mhela awu hawele na mwana.
7.6: Nguluwi nakamlonjela ahi, ‘Lulelo lwa hegwe loza kikala isi ilingulongozwa na wanhu wanji, ako woditigwa wapogozi na kuditigwa vibi kwa mhela wa miyaka miya na jine.
7.7: Ila heni ndoitagusa ayo isi iwadita hemwe wapogozi. Hamba ndowalavya kuli isi ayo woye wafugamile heni Nguluwi honhu aha.’
7.8: Hamba Nguluwi nakadita na heye ilagano liwele kwinjila ikumbi ndo liwa ulajilo wa ilagano lya heye. Ahyo, Abulahamu nakamwinjiza ikumbi mwanage Isaka zuwa lya nane hala hoyaleleche. Na Isaka, hihyo, nakamwinjiza Yakubu. Na heye Yakubu nakawenjiza wala wana kumi na weli wawele ndo wasekulu wa hemwe.”
7.9: “Wala wana wa Yakubu, nawamonela maya Yusufu, nawamuguza muupogozi Misili. Ila Nguluwi nayali hamwe na heye,
7.10: nakamlohola kuli magazo ga heye gesa. Nguluwi nakamganila isungu na luhala hali Falao, Mndewa wa Misili, na heye Falao nakamuwika yawe mng'hangala wa ila isi na ng'handa ya chiundewa.
7.11: Hamba nakulawila nzala ng'hulu kuli isi yeng'ha ya Misili na Kanani, nayambuza kugaya kukulu. Wasekulu wa hetwe hawawele nachoneche cha kulya.
7.12: Hamba Yakubu loyahuliche mbuli kuta ako Misili kwali na chilyo, nakawalajiza wanage, wawele ndo wasekulu wa hetwe, waluche kuluta ako Misili kuli majendo ga mwaluko.
7.13: Mli majendo ga hewo ga keli, Yusufu nakelajila kwa wang'holoze, na Falao Mndewa wa Misili, nakaizela nhanzi ya Yusufu.
7.14: Yusufu nakawalajiza wasenga wamcheme Yakubu na nhanzi yeng'ha, weng'ha wanhu makumi saba na wahano woye Misili.
7.15: Ahyo, Yakubu nakaluta Misili kula heye na wanage nawabagama.
7.16: Mitufi ja hewo najigaligwa mbaka Shekemu, jiwichigwa mli vilaga vila Abulahamu nayali yagulile kwa nhanzi ya Hamoli kwa chasi chimwe cha sendi.
7.17: “Mhela lowali habehi Nguluwi yagongomanye ilagano loyampele Abulahamu, wanhu kula Misili wali mina wonjezeche nakuwa wenji ng'hatu.
7.18: Hamba, yula mndewa yumwe nahamzelele Yusufu nakaluka kulongoza ako Misili.
7.19: Nakaiditila nhanzi ya hetwe wihe, kawaditila wasekulu wa hetwe na kuwakola lupichi wawawiche hanze wana wawele vyali leka wabagame.”
7.20: Musa nakaleligwa mhela awo. Yali mwana yanojile ng'hatu. Nakaleligwa mng'handa ya Nguluwi kwa myezi jidatu.
7.21: Na loyalavigwe kunze yabagame, mhiza wa Falao, Mndewa nakamhola, na heye kamlela kota mwanage.
7.22: Musa nakalanguswa luhala lweng'ha lwa Wamisili kawa na ludali lwa kulonga na kudita vinhu.
7.23: “Loyali na ukulu wa miyaka makumi gane nakalapa kuza kuwalola wang'holoze Waisilaeli.
7.24: Ako nakamona myao yumwe yoditilwa vibi na Mmisili, nakaluta kumgombola, na kuwalipiza hewo, kamkopola yula munhu.
7.25: Musa nakejesa kota Waisilaeli wayage nawavizela kota Nguluwi yahetumbile heye kuwalohola, ila nahawavizelele ahyo.
7.26: Mitondo yake, nakawona Waisilaeli weli wochitowa, kajeza kuwahanyisa yolonga, ‘Mwalukolo, lekachoni kilumiza mwemwe yeng'ha?’
7.27: Yula nayali yomtowa miyage nakamkundujiza Musa hafungo yolonga, ‘Whaani yakuwichile hegwe uwe chilongozi na mlewezi wa hetwe?’
7.28: ‘Kwangugana kung'hopola kota vyoumkopole yula Mmisili mitondo?’
7.29: Loyahuliche ago, Musa nakadwina, kazakikala kuli isi ya Midiani na ako kalela wana weli.
7.30: “Mihela makumi gane logafichile, mhilisi wa Mkulu nakamlawila Musa kuli chisosolo chilingwaka chiluli kula kugunuche behi na chidunda cha Sinai.
7.31: Musa nakabubuwala ng'hatu kona alyo lilawile mbaka kahejela behi yasunjilile, ila kahulika lizi lya Mkulu,
7.32: ‘Heni nda Nguluwi wa sekulu wa hegwe Nguluwi wa Abulahamu na Nguluwi wa Isaka na Nguluwi wa Yakubu.’ Musa kaza kukakama yodumba hajezile kahi kulola ng'hatu.
7.33: Mkulu nakamlonjela, ‘Vule makwamba ga hegwe, mina aha honhu houkwima ndo honhu Helile.
7.34: Ndigona ng'hatu, gehile gowalinguditilwa wanhu wa heni kula Misili. Nyhulika chililo cha hewo, na heni mbuya kuwagombola. Ahyo lelo, ndokulajiza Misili.’
7.35: “Ayu Musa ndo yula wanhu wa Isilaeli nawamlemile lowalonjile, ‘Whaani yakuwichile hegwe uwe chilongozi na mlewezi wa hetwe?’ Kukolela yula mhilisi wa kilanga yamlawila kuli chila chisosolo nachiwele ngwaka chiluli, Nguluwi nakamlajiza ayo Musa yawe chilongozi na mlohozi.
7.36: Ndo yula yawalongoze wala wanhu walawe Misili kwa kulajila vinduzanduza na kububuwaza mli isi ya Misili, mli bahali ya Shamu na kugunuche, kwa mhela wa miyaka makumi gane.
7.37: Musa ndo yula yawalonjele wanhu wa Isilaeli, ‘Nguluwi kokuhagulilani hemwe mloli, kota vyoyanhumile heni, na heye kolawa mli lukolo lwa mwemwe baho.’
7.38: Chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu lochikungajize hamwe kula kugunuche, Musa ndo nayali ako kota msenga hali awo wasekulu wa hetwe na ayo mhilisi wa kilanga yalonjile na heye kuli chidunda cha Sinai. Ndo heye yapeligwe ula ulonzi wa ukomu yatigalile hetwe.
7.39: “Ila heye ndo yula wasekulu wa hetwe nawalemile kumuhulichiza, wamkundujiza hafungo. Wazangugana kuhiluka Misili.
7.40: Nawamlonjela Aluni, ‘Tugongomanyile milungu jojitulongoza mnzila. Mina hatuvizelele gamfichile ayo Musa yatulongoze kulawila isi ya Misili.’
7.41: Aho ndo howegongomanyile jimalukolo ja isenga ilogota, wachitambichila na kiditila mvina chinhu chiditigwe na moko ga hewo wawo.
7.42: Ila Nguluwi nakoka hagati ha hewo, kawaleka wafugamile nhondwe za kilanga, kota voyandichigwe mli chitabu cha waloli wa Nguluwi, “ ‘Hemwe wanhu wa Isilaeli! Siwele heni, mndavile nhambiko na ndolendole kwa miyaka makumi gane kula kugunuche!
7.43: Hemwe na mchihola chibumuli cha mlungu Moloki, na limalukolo lya nhondwe ya mlungu wa hemwe Lefani. Jimalukolo jomditile ndo jomulingufugamila. Ahyo ndowahilika hemwe muwe wapogozi kutali kupuluta Babiloni!’
7.44: “Kula kugunuche wahaza wa hetwe wali na lila Ihema lya Nguluwi. Naligongomanywa kota Nguluwi navyoyamlonjele Musa yadite, hihila kota voyalajilwe chila chinhu.
7.45: Hamba wasekulu wa hetwe wazangibochela hewo kwa hewo lila Ihema lya Nguluwi, mbaka mhela wa Yoshuwa. Lowaiholile ila isi kwa zila isi Nguluwi nayaziwinjile hali meho ga hewo. Ahyo nalikala mbaka mhela wa Daudi.
7.46: Daudi nakaganigwa lukami na Nguluwi, nakamlanda Nguluwi yamkundize heye yamzenjele honhu helile heye yawele Nguluwi wa Yakubu.
7.47: Ila Solomoni ndo nayamzenjele Nguluwi ng'handa.
7.48: “Ahyo, Nguluwi Mkulu hambe yekale muli ng'handa zizenjigwe na wanhu, kota mloli wa Nguluwi vyoyalingulonga,
7.49: “ ‘Mkulu kangulonga, kilanga ndo chigoda cha heni cha undewa, na isi yeng'ha ndo chigoda cha heni cha kuwichila magulu.
7.50: Lelo ng'handa ilindaze yomuweza kunzenjela, na honhu hachi hondikwesela? Nene baha ndo ndividitile vinhu avi vyeng'ha?’ ”
7.51: Hamba Stefani nakalonga, “Hemwe mna ibamba ng'hatu! Nhumbula na makutu ga hemwe ndo kota wanhu wa isi wohambe wamzelele Nguluwi. Hemwe ndo kota wasekulu wa hemwe. Mazuwa geng'ha mwangumlema Muhe Yelile.
7.52: Lelo kakuko mloli wa Nguluwi yoneche yula wasekulu wa hetwe hawamgazile? Nawawakopola awo Nguluwi yawalajize wadamle kuya kwa heye yatanganiche. Na hemwe mumhinduka, mumkopola.
7.53: Hemwe na mbochela lilajizo lya Nguluwi, lila ligaligwe kuli hemwe na mhilisi wa kilanga, ila hamulikundile.” Stefani kangukopoligwa
7.54: Wala wasekulu wa chitala lowahuliche ago, wazudila ng'hatu, wamjejedela mizino kwa kuzudila.
7.55: Ila Stefani yawele yamemile Muhe Yelile, nakalola kuchanya kilanga, kawona ukulu wa Nguluwi na Yesu yemile ubanzi wa kudilo wa Nguluwi.
7.56: Nakalonga, “Mlole! Ndangona kilanga kugubuligwe na Mwana wa Munhu yemile ubanzi wa kudilo wa Nguluwi.”
7.57: Aho, wanhu weng'ha wawele hala mchitala, nawatowa iyowe na kudinya makutu ga hewo kwa moko gawo. Hamba wamdavila weng'ha hamwe,
7.58: wamlavya hanze ha muji ula, wamtowa maganga. Wala walolezi nawawika mikoti ja hewo hali wamizi wa msongolo yumwe itagwa lya heye Saulo.
7.59: Nawalutilila kumtowa Stefani na maganga, aku yomlanda Nguluwi, “Mkulu Yesu, ubochele Muhe wa heni!”
7.60: Kafugama, kalila kwa lizi likulu, “Mkulu uleche kuwakalalila kwa gehile aga.” Loyalonjile ahyo, nakabagama.

8.1: Saulo na heye nakachona acho chikoleche cha kukopola kota chinoga. Chilundo cha wanhu walimgumkunda Kilistu chingugazigwa Zuwa alyo wanhu wa Nguluwi ako Yelusalemu nawaluka kugazigwa lukami. Chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu cheng'ha, ila wala yeng'ha watumigwa, nawalapigwa kusambaluka wamwenga kuli honhu ha migunda ja Yudeya na Samaliya.
8.2: Wanhu walingumnojeza Nguluwi nawamtila Stefani na kumditila ulombolizi ukulu.
8.3: Mhela wuwo Saulo nayali yowagaza wanhu wa Nguluwi. Nakaluta chila ng'handa kachilavya kunze chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu, walume na wadala, kawajela mchinweng'ho. Chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu chingudamla Mbuli Inojile ako Samaliya
8.4: Wala wanhu wesambaluche, chila honhu howabilimile waluta wodamla ila Mbuli Inojile.
8.5: Filipo nakenjila mli muji wa Samaliya na kwaluka kumdamla kota Kilistu Mlohozi kwa wenyeng'haye wa aho.
8.6: Wanhu nawaluta kuhulichiza goya ula usenga wa Filipo na kulola ulajilo wa vila vinduzanduza vyoyaditile.
8.7: Mina vijeni vihile naviwakwinile wanhu wenji naviwalawa kuno vitowa iyowe, na kahi wanhu wanji wawele waziliche vitomo na vyete nawaloholigwa.
8.8: Kwali na usangalalo ukulu honhu aho hesa.
8.9: Lelo kwali na munhu yumwe yalinguchemigwa Simoni yula mina nayali yadidiche uhawi wa heye honhu aho na kuwabubuwaza wanhu wa Samaliya, na kiwona kota heye ka munhu mkulu ng'hatu.
8.10: Wanhu weng'ha, wadodo na wakulu, nawamhulichiza wolonga, “Simoni ndo ludali lwa Chinguluwi lulinguchemigwa, ‘Ludali Lukulu.’ ”
8.11: Nawamuwinza lukami kwa vila nayali yowabubuwaliza kwa uhawi wa heye kulawila katali.
8.12: Ila lowaukundile usenga wa Filipo gala ga Mbuli Inojile ya Undewa wa Nguluwi na itagwa lya Yesu Kilistu, nawabatizigwa, wadala na walume.
8.13: Na ayo Simoni nakakunda, naloyasindile kubatizigwa na nayali yochilongoza na Filipo, nakabubuwala kwa ulajilo wa vinduzanduza na kububuwaza kulingukoleka.
8.14: Wala watumigwa wa Nguluwi lowali kula Yelusalemu lowalonjelwe kota wenyeng'haye wa Samaliya na hewo wabochela lizi lya Nguluwi, nawawalajiza ako Petili na Yohani.
8.15: Lowafichile ako nawawalandila awo wanhu wamkundile Yesu wabochele Muhe Yelile.
8.16: Mina mhela awo Muhe Yelile nayang'hali kumdulichila munhu ne yumwe kwa hewo, nawali wabatizigwe hela kwa itagwa lya Mkulu Yesu.
8.17: Lelo Petili na Yohani wawawichila moko awo wanhu, na hewo wambochela Muhe Yelile.
8.18: Aho Simoni nakavizela kota kwa kuwichilwa moko ga watumigwa, nawapegwa Muhe Yelile. Ahyo nakagana kuwapa Petili na Yohani sendi yolonga,
8.19: “Mumhe na heni ludali alo, leka yoneche yondimuwichila moko, yabochele Muhe Yelile.”
8.20: Ila Petili nakedichila, “Mwajilile kutali hegwe na sendi za hegwe, kwa vila kwangijesa kogula ludali lwa Chinguluwi kwa sendi!
8.21: Kwahela honhu honeche kahi kwahela kudita galingumnojeza Nguluwi kuli mijito ajo kwa vila nhumbula ya hegwe haiwele goya hali meho ga Nguluwi.
8.22: Lelo umgalamchile Nguluwi na umlande Mkulu na heye koweza kukusila majesa kota awo.
8.23: Kwangoneka kwa heni kwangumbonela maya na kuwopigwa na wihe.”
8.24: Simoni nakamlonjela, “Mndandile kwa Mkulu lileche kunyhuila lyoneche kwa ago gomlonjile.”
8.25: Petili na Yohani lowalavile ulolezi wa hewo na kudamla usenga wa Mkulu, nawahiluka Yelusalemu. Lowali wohiluka nawadamla Mbuli Inojile mli vijiji vinji vya Samaliya. Filipo kangumbatiza mkulu yumwe wa Isiopia
8.26: Mhilisi wa Mkulu nakamlonjela Filipo, “Wiwiche goya ulute kusini kwa kukolela nzila ilingulawila Yelusalemu kuluta Gasa.” Nzila ayo yangukolela kugunuche.
8.27: Lelo Filipo nakewika goya, kaluka kwinula majendo. Mhela wuwo kwali na munhu yumwe nayawele mkulu kuli isi ya Isiopiya, yula nayali yoheluka kuza kaye. Ayo munhu nayali mlolela ng'hano ya Kandake, navyowali wochemigwa Wandewa wa chidala wa Isiopiya. Munhu ayo nayali yalutile ako Yelusalemu kumlanda Nguluwi na mhela awo nayali yohiluka yakwinile mtuka ya kukwejigwa na midogowi.
8.28: Loyali yoheluka yawele mumtuka, nayali yochisomela chitabu cha Isaya yawele mloli wa Nguluwi.
8.29: Ahyo, Muhe Yelile nakamlonjela Filipo, “Lute behi na mutuka ayo milongoze.”
8.30: Filipo na kaibilimila ila mutuka, nakamhulika ayo munhu yosoma chitabu cha mloli Isaya. Aho Filipo nakamuuza, “Ago goulingusoma kugazela?”
8.31: Ayo munhu nakedichila, “Ndovizela ndaze ne munhu kundongoza?” Aho nakamchema Filipo yakwine kuchanya, yekalise hamwe na heye.
8.32: Na, honhu ha Maandiko Matakatifu hoyali yosoma nayali ahi, “Yali kota ing'holo lyali lichigaligwa kuchinjigwa, tulu kota hila mwanaing'holo litupuligwa milaika, heye halavile lizi ne hado.
8.33: Nakabasigwa soni na kwimigwa hachi. Haduhu munhu yoweza kuvizela gala ga ulelo wa heye, mina ukomu wa heye wusigwa muisi.”
8.34: Ahyo Mwisiopia mkulu, nakamlanda Filipo, “Ndonjele, ayo mloli wa Nguluwi kangulonga chinhu chachi? Kangulonga mbuli azi kumlapa yuye ama ga munhu yunji?”
8.35: Lelo Filipo yokwaluchila na honhu ha ago Maandiko Matakatifu, nakamlonjela Mbuli Inojile imlapile Yesu.
8.36: Lowali wang'hali wolutilila na majendo, nawafika honhu hawele na mazi, na ayo mkulu nakalonga, “Honhu aha hana mazi, lelo hana chinhu choneche cha kundemeza kubatizigwa?”
8.37: Filipo nakamlonjela, “Wone ulingukunda kwa nhumbula ya hegwe yeng'ha kwanguweza kubatizigwa.” Na heye nakalonga, “Ena ndangukunda Yesu Kilistu ndo Mwana wa Nguluwi.”
8.38: Lelo ayo mkulu nakalajiza aila mutuka yime, weng'ha weli Filipo na yula mkulu chitumagwa wedulika hasi mmazi. Heye Filipo nakambatiza.
8.39: Lowalawile mmazi Muhe wa Mkulu nakamdita Filipo yajilile. Heye mkulu chitumagwa hamuwene kahi, ila heye nakalutilila na majendo ga heye yawele yasangalale.
8.40: Filipo kefika yawele Asotusi, kakola mli miji jeng'ha yodamla Mbuli Inojile mbaka hoyafichile Kaisaliya.

9.1: Mhela awo Saulo nayali yakangaze kuwakabusa na kuwakopola walanguswa wa Mkulu. Kaluta kwa mtambika mkulu,
9.2: kalanda yapegwe lyandiko lya uzeleso kwa ng'handa za kusalila kula Damasiko, leka wone yafiche ako walume ama wadala walinguwinza nzila ayo, yawebate na kuwegala Yelusalemu.
9.3: Ila loyali mnzila behi kufika Damasiko, bahala lumuli lulawile kilanga lumwesela nzingo zeng'ha.
9.4: Kagwa hasi na kuhulika lizi limlonjela, “Saulo, Saulo! Lekachoni ulingungaza?”
9.5: Na heye Saulo nakauza, “Kwa whaani hegwe, Mkulu?” Nakedichila, “Heni nda Yesu ulingumgaza.
9.6: Ila wime lelo, winjile mjini na ako kolonjelwa ulinguganigwa kudita.”
9.7: Wala wanhu wali woheluka na Saulo na wema bahala, ne kulonga chinhu, nawahulika lizi ila hawamuwene munhu.
9.8: Saulo nakenuka kulawa mmisanga, ila loyagubule meho ga heye kona halingona ne chinhu. Leka wanhu wamlongoza kwa kumbata moko mbaka Damasiko.
9.9: Saulo nakekala mazuwa gadatu ne kulola, na mhela awo hadile na hanhwele chinhu choneche.
9.10: Lelo ako Damasiko kwali na mlanguswa yumwe yalinguchemigwa Ananiya. Mkulu nakamlonjela mli uloli, “Ananiya!” Ananiya nakedichila, “Ndahano Mkulu.”
9.11: Heye Mkulu nakamlonjela, “Wiwiche goya ulute kuli nzila ilinguchemigwa, igoloche, na kuli ng'handa ya Yudasi umlande munhu yumwe yalawile Talso yalinguchemigwa Saulo. Sambi kangumlanda Nguluwi.
9.12: Mli uloli kona munhu yalinguchemigwa Ananiya yokwinjila mng'handa na kumuwichila moko leka yazengulola kahi.”
9.13: Ila Ananiya nakedichila, “Mkulu, nyhulika mbuli za munhu ayu kulawa kwa wanhu wenji na gala gehile goyalinguwaditila wanhu wa hegwe welile ako Yelusalemu.
9.14: Koya hano Damasiko, yawele na ludali kulawa kwa watambika wakulu kuwebata wanhu weng'ha walingitumbila na kukufugamila hegwe.”
9.15: Ila Mkulu nakamlonjela, “Hegwe lute, mina ndimhagula heye yawe chitumagwa wa heni, yalidamle itagwa lya heni kwa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi na wandewa wa hewo na kwa wanhu wa Isilaeli.
9.16: Heni ndomlajila geng'ha gomlapa kugazika kwa itagwa lya heni.”
9.17: Ananiya kaluta, nakenjila mli ayo ng'handa loyawele Saulo na kumuwichila moko kumutwi. Nakalonga, “Mng'holozangu Saulo, Mkulu Yesu yuye yakulawile louwele kunzila kuya kuno. Nakandajiza heni leka uwe ulola kahi na kumemezwa Muhe Yelile.”
9.18: Baho vinhu kota mibadu vigwa kulawa mumeho ga Saulo, kaza ngulola kahi, kema kabatizigwa.
9.19: Na loyadile ndiya. Ludali lwa heye lumuhiluchila. Saulo kangudamla ako Damasiko Saulo nakekala mazuwa mado hamwe na walanguswa ako Damasiko.
9.20: Baho nakaluka kudamla kuli ng'handa za kusalila yolonga Yesu ndo Mwana wa Nguluwi.
9.21: Wanhu weng'ha wamhuliche nawabubuwala, walonga, “Munhu ayu ndo yuyula yawakopole wala wali wolanda kwa itagwa lili kula Yelusalemu! Kahi nakoya hano kwa mbuli ya kuwebata wanhu awo kuwegala kwa watambika wakulu!”
9.22: Saulo nakonjezeka kuwa na ludali kuli kudamla, na kwa vila nakakunda kota Kilistu Mlohozi yahaguligwe na Nguluwi, Wayahudi wa ako Damasiko nawahangaluka ng'hatu.
9.23: Logapulute mazuwa menji, Wayahudi newekungajiza na kudita mnvinvi ya kumkopola Saulo,
9.24: ila Saulo nakahulika chilinguganigwa kukoleka. Hamihe na nemisi nawalolela vihindilo vya kwinjila mjini leka wamkopole.
9.25: Ila mhela wa hamihe walanguswa nawali hamwe na heye nawamhola, wamdulisa hasi yawele mizandu ikulu kwa kukolela kuli ugazi nauwele mulukanzi uzunguluche muji. Saulo kanguhiluka Yelusalemu
9.26: Saulo loyafichile Yelusalemu nakajeza kilumba na wala walanguswa. Ila weng'ha nawamdumba hawakundile kuta heye yuye kawa mlanguswa hamwe na hewo.
9.27: Aho, Banaba nakoya kamhola Saulo, kamigala kuli watumigwa na kuwalonjela Saulo vyoyamuwene Mkulu mnzila na hila Mkulu vyoyalonjile na heye. Nakawalonjela Saulo vyoyadamle ne kudumba kula Damasiko kwa itagwa lya Yesu.
9.28: Ahyo Saulo nakekala hamwe na hewo, nakaijendela Yelusalemu yeng'ha yodamla mbuli ya Mkulu ne kudumba.
9.29: Kahi nakadawala na kitwanza na Wayahudi wali wolonga Chigilichi, ila hewo nawajeza kumkopola.
9.30: Wala wayage lowalizelile lila, wamhola Saulo, wamigala kuli muji wa Kaisaliya, nawamleka yalute Talso.
9.31: Mhela awo chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu chali chochikala goya hose hala Yudeya na Galilaya na Samaliya. Wanhu wenji nawekangazwa nhumbula na Muhe Yelile na konjezeka na kikala kwa kumhulichiza Mkulu. Ainea kanguloholigwa
9.32: Petili loyali yoheluka chila honhu nakafika kahi kuli wanhu welile wawele wochikala Luda.
9.33: Ako nakamfika munhu yumwe yalinguchemigwa Ainea yula kwa miyaka nane nayali yawasile muchinhanda kwa vila nayali yaziliche.
9.34: Lelo Petili nakamlonjela, “Ainea, Yesu Kilistu kangukulohola. Winuche utandiche chinhanda cha hegwe.” Ainea baho du nakenuka.
9.35: Wanhu weng'ha wa Luda na Shaloni nawamona Ainea, na weng'ha wamgalamchila Mkulu. Dolikasi kanguloholigwa
9.36: Kwali na mlanguswa yumwe mdala mjini Yopa yalinguchemigwa Tabita kwa Chigilichi ndo Dolikasi, izeleche, “Chifuno.” Ayo mdala nayali yodita ganojile na kuwatanza wazunwa mazuwa gose.
9.37: Mhela awo nakogula, kabagama. Wanhu wauhovuga mtufi wa heye, wauwika mli chihengo cha kuchanya.
9.38: Yopa haiwele kutali ng'hatu na Luda, ahyo walanguswa lowahuliche kota Petili nayali Luda, wawalajiza wanhu weli kwa heye na usenga, “Uye kwa hetwe himahima vyouhega.”
9.39: Baho du, Petili nakaluta hamwe na hewo. Loyafichile kegaligwa kuli chila chihengo. Ako walekwa wanji na wamzunguluta Petili wolila na kumlajila mikoti na mivalo Dolikasi nayali yogongomanya mhela loyali mkomu.
9.40: Petili kawalavya kunze weng'ha kafugama kamlanda Nguluwi. Hamba kagalamchila ula mtufi. Nakalonga, “Tabita, winuche.” Baho nakagubula meho ga heye, na loyamuwene Petili, kekalisa.
9.41: Petili nakamtanza kwima, hamba nakawachema wala wanhu wa welile na wala walekwa, nakamigala kuli hewo yawele mkomu.
9.42: Mbuli ayo ikoleche nayenela chila honhu ako Yopa, na wanhu wenji nawamkunda Mkulu.
9.43: Petili nekekala mazuwa mado ako Yopa, yochikala kwa munhu yumwe yalingugongomanya ngozi yalinguchemigwa Simoni.

10.1: Kwali na munhu yumwe ako Kaisaliya yalinguchemigwa Kolineli, mkulu wa wamizi wa chilundo chimwe chilinguchemigwa, “Chilundo cha Italia.”
10.2: Yali munhu yanojile, heye hamwe na ivyazi lyake lyeng'ha, wali womfugamila Nguluwi, nayali yoditika vinhu vinji kwa kuwatanza wazunwa wa Chiyahudi na nayali yomlanda Nguluwi mazuwa gose.
10.3: Yali ifichile saa tisa nemisi, mli uloli nakona, mhilisi wa kilanga wa Nguluwi yokwinjila mng'handa na kumlonjela, “Kolineli!”
10.4: Kolineli nakamnogelela meho ayo mhilisi kuno yodumba, nakamlonjela, “Kuna choni mng'hangala?” Ayo mhilisi nakamlonjela, “Nguluwi nakabochela kulanda kwa hegwe na ndolendole za hegwe kwa wazunwa na hozisemwa hebu.
10.5: Lelo walajize wanhu Yopa wakamcheme munhu yumwe yalinguchemigwa Simoni, kwa itagwa linji Petili.
10.6: Heye kamng'handa ya Simoni mgongomanya ngozi yula ng'handa ya heye ya behi na Bahali.”
10.7: Ayo mhilisi wa kilanga yalonjile ago loyochile, Kolineli nakawachema vitumagwa weli wa ng'handa na yumwe wa wamizi nayali yomuwinza Nguluwi,
10.8: Nakawalonjela geng'ha galawile, kawalajiza Yopa.
10.9: Mitondo, awo wanhu wadatu wang'hali mli majendo, ila behi na Yopa, Petili nakakwina mchinduwiko cha ng'handa. Yali iwele hagati nemisi leka yamlande Nguluwi.
10.10: Nakona nzala lukami, kazangugana yalye chilyo. Chilyo lyochali chigogomanywa, kalota.
10.11: Nakona ulanga ugubuligwe na chinhu kota igolole likulu liduliswa hasi liwele libatigwe mhembo zake zine.
10.12: Mgati mwa alyo igolole mwali chila nhanzi ya migongolo, migongolo jilingutambala na videje vya kilanga.
10.13: Nakahulika lizi limlonjela, “Petili, winuche uchinje, ulye!”
10.14: Petili nakedichila, “Hebu, Mkulu, sinajeza hebu chinhu chila chiwele chikokomoche ama chiwele mzilo.”
10.15: Ila lizi naihulikwa kahi naimlonjela, “Uleche kuvichema vikokomoka vinhu vila Nguluwi vyoyavyelize!”
10.16: Mbuli ayi naikoleka mala zidatu, hamba lila igolole lihiluswa kilanga.
10.17: Petili loyali yang'hali yabubuwale kwa gala goyagawene, wala wanhu watumigwa na Kolineli, lowaiwene ng'handa ya Simoni, nawafika mchihindilo,
10.18: nawachema kwa lizi, “Hambi hano hana mjenzi amu yalinguchemigwa Simoni Petili?”
10.19: Petili nayali yang'hali yogana kugazela gala yalotile, na baho Muhe nakamlonjela, “Hulichize! Hana wanhu wadatu hano wangukupala.
10.20: Duliche himahima na uleche kudumba kuluta na hewo mina nene ndo ndiwalajize.”
10.21: Petili nakadulika hasi, kawalonjela awo wanhu, “Heni ndo yula mlingumpala. Lekachoni muyile?”
10.22: Hewo nawamlonjela, “Mkulu wa wamizi Kolineli yula yawele munhu yanojile, yalingumuwinza Nguluwi na munhu yatanganiche hali Wayahudi weng'ha, nakatulajiza. Nakalonjelwa na mhilisi wa kilanga yakucheme kaye kwa heye yahulichize choneche cho ulinacho cha kulonga.”
10.23: Petili nakawachema mng'handa kawapa honhu ha kuwasa mihe yila. Mitondo yake Petili nakenula majendo hamwe na hewo, na wamwe wa wang'holoze wa ako Yopa nawali hamwe nawo.
10.24: Zuwa lya keli nawafika Kaisaliya na ako Kolineli nayali yowabeta hamwe na ivyazi na wanhu walingikala habehi yawalaliche.
10.25: Petili loyali yokwinjila, Kolineli nakalawa kunze kumbochela, nakafugama hoyali na kinamiza hasi ng'hatu.
10.26: Ila Petili nakamwinula, nakamlonjela, “Winuche, mina heni nda munhu hela.”
10.27: Petili nakalutilila kulongasa na Kolineli, lowawele wokwinjila mng'handa mowawafichile wanhu wenji wamemile.
10.28: Petili nakawalonjela, “Hemwe mvizela kota Myahudi yoneche kalemezwa na malajizo ga nzila ya kumfugamila Nguluwi kitanza na wanhu wa isi zinji. Ila Nguluwi nakandajiza ndeche kumjesa munhu yoneche kuta mwavu ama kakokomoka.
10.29: Lelo kwa mbuli ayo, lomnyemile mbuya ne kusujila. Lelo ndangukuuzani, lekachoni mnyhemile?”
10.30: Kolineli nakalonga, “Mazuwa gadatu logapulute mhela kota awu, iwele nemisi, ndali ndimlanda Nguluwi mng'handa kuchihengo cha heni. Baho du! Munhu yawele yavalile ivalo lizelu pee! Nakema kumwando kwa heni,
10.31: nakalonga, ‘Kolineli! Kumlanda Nguluwi na ndolendole za hegwe kwa wazunwa, zikundigwa na Nguluwi.
10.32: Mlajize munhu yumwe Yopa yakamcheme munhu yalinguchemigwa Simoni, kwa itagwa linji Petili, kamng'handa ya Simoni mgongomanya ngozi behi na bahali.’
10.33: Ahyo nandikugalila usenga ne kukawila, na hegwe kunoza kuya. Lelo hetwe twa hamwando ha Nguluwi, kuhulichiza choneche chila Mkulu choyakuganile kulonga.” Kudamla kwa Petili
10.34: Aho Petili nakaluka kulonga, “Lelo ndivizela ndangukomya kota Nguluwi hambe yabagule.
10.35: Munhu wa isi yoneche yalingumuwinza Nguluwi na kudita ganojile kangubocheligwa na heye.
10.36: Awu ndo usenga wa Nguluwi yawagalile wanhu wa Isilaeli, yodamla Mbuli Inojile ilingigala kikala goya kukolela Yesu Kilistu ndo yawele Mkulu wa wanhu weng'ha.
10.37: Hemwe mvizela mbuli ilawile mli isi yeng'ha ya Wayahudi kwaluchila Galilaya kupuluta ula ubatizo woyadamle Yohani.
10.38: Mumzela Yesu wa Nasaleti na Nguluwi vyoyamhagule na kumjidila Muhe Yelile na mong'ho. Nguluwi nayali hamwe na heye, heye nakaluta ako na ako yodita ganojile kuwalohola weng'ha walingulongozwa na Limazoga.
10.39: Hetwe twa walolezi wa gala geng'ha goyagakolile mli isi ya Yudeya na Yelusalemu. Nawamkopola kwa kumuwamba na kumniniza mumsalaba,
10.40: ila Nguluwi nakamzilipula zuwa lya kadatu kulawila loyabagame, kamdita yoneche,
10.41: haiwele kwa wanhu weng'ha, leka kwa wala Nguluwi mina yawahagule wawe walolezi wa heye, tuta hetwe tudile na kunwa hamwe na heye hala hoyazilipuche.
10.42: Nakatulajiza kuidamla Mbuli Inojile kwa wanhu weng'ha na kulavya ulolezi kota heye ndo Yesu yahaguligwe na Nguluwi yawe mtagusa wa wawele wakomu na wabagame.
10.43: Waloli wa Nguluwi weng'ha, nawalonga mbuli za heye kota chila munhu yomkunda kokusigwa gehile ga heye geng'ha kwa itagwa lya heye.” Kolineli na ivyazi lyake wangumbochela Muhe Yelile
10.44: Mhela Petili loyali yang'hali yolonga ulonzi awo, Muhe Yelile nakawadulichila weng'ha wali wohulichiza usenga awo.
10.45: Wala Wayahudi wamkundile Kilistu woyile hamwe na Petili yalawile Yopa nawabubuwala kona Nguluwi kawajidila ndolendole ya Muhe Yelile wanhu hawawele Wayahudi.
10.46: Mina nawawahulika wolonga kwa ulonzi vinjivinji womtogola Nguluwi. Aho Petili nakalonga,
10.47: “Wanhu awa wambochela Muhe Yelile kota hetwe vyotumbochele. Lelo ka baho yoneche yowadinyila waleche kubatizigwa kwa mazi?”
10.48: Hamba, nakalajiza wabatizigwe kwa itagwa lya Yesu Kilistu. Baho nawamlanda Petili yekale na hewo mazuwa mado.

11.1: Watumigwe na wanhu wamkundile Kilistu kula Yudeya nawahulika kota wanhu hawawele Wayahudi wali wabochele lizi lya Nguluwi.
11.2: Lelo Petili loyahiluche Yelusalemu, wala Wayahudi wakundile nawaganile wanhu hawawele Wayahudi wenjile ikumbi, nawejesa wolonga,
11.3: “Hegwe kuluta kikala na wanhu hawenjile ikumbi na kulya na hewo!”
11.4: Aho Petili nakaluka kulonga na hewo ne kuvisa gala gaditigwe kulawila mwaluko.
11.5: “Zuwa limwe londali ndimlanda Nguluwi ako Yopa, nambona ulotezi, nambona chinhu kota igolole likulu lidulika hasi kulawa kilanga liwele libatigwe mhembo zeng'ha zine, liwichigwa hafungo ha heni.
11.6: Nasunjilila goya mgati mwa lila igolole nambona migongolo jiwele na magulu gane na migongolo ja kisolo na jiwele ngutambala na videje vya kilanga.
11.7: Hamba nyhulika lizi lindonjela, ‘Petili winuche, uchinje, ulye.’
11.8: Ila heni nandonga, ‘Hebu Mkulu, mina choneche chikokomoche kwa heni hachinajeza kwinjila kumlomo kwa heni.’
11.9: Lila lizi lihulikwa kahi kulawa kilanga, ‘Uleche kuvichema vikokomoche vinhu Nguluwi yavihovuje.’
11.10: Mbuli ayo naikoleka mala zidatu hamba vyeng'ha vihiluswa kilanga.
11.11: Baho du, wanhu wadatu wali watumigwa kwa heni kulawila Kaisaliya, nawafika hali ng'handa yondali ndikala.
11.12: Muhe nakandonjela ndute hamwe na hewo ndeche kujesa. Awa wanhu sita wa lukolo lumwe nawelongoza na heni kuza Kaisalia na ako natwinjila mng'handa ya Kolineli.
11.13: Heye nakatulonjela vyoyamuwene mhilisi wa kilanga yemile mng'handa ya heye na kumlonjela, ‘Mlajize munhu Yopa yakamcheme munhu yumwe yalinguchemigwa Simoni, kwa itagwa linji Petili.
11.14: Heye kokulonjela gala hegwe na lukolo lwa hegwe vyomloholigwa.’
11.15: Honyaluche hela kulonga, Muhe Yelile nakawadulichila kota hila vyoyatudulichile hetwe hala mwaluko.
11.16: Aho ng'humbuchila ula ulonzi Mkulu woyalonjile, ‘Yohani nakabatiza kwa mazi, ila hemwe mobatizwa kwa Muhe Yelile.’
11.17: Lelo wone Nguluwi yawapele wanhu hawawele Wayahudi ndolendole yiyila yotupegwe twetwe lotumkundile Mkulu Yesu Kilistu, lelo heni nda whaani mbaka ndimbeze Nguluwi?”
11.18: Lowahuliche ahyo, nawaleka kitwanza, nawamtogola Nguluwi wolonga, “Nguluwi kawapa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi mhumhu ya kumgalamchila Nguluwi leka wapegwe ukomu!” Chilundo cha walingukunda ako Antiokiya
11.19: Kwa kugazigwa konakulawile mhela Stefani loyakopoligwe, wanhu walingumkunda Kulistu nawesambalula. Wamwe nawaluta mbaka Foinike, Kupulo na Antiokiya wodamla ula usenga kwa Wayahudi yeka.
11.20: Ila wayao wamwenga walawile Kupulo na Kulene, nawaluta Antiokiya waudamla awo usenga kwa Wagilichi wowadamlila Mbuli Inojile ya Mkulu Yesu.
11.21: Mkulu nakawatanza na wanhu wenji nawakunda na kumgalamchila Mkulu.
11.22: Mbuli ayo naihulikwa na chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu ako Yelusalemu. Ahyo nawamlajiza Banaba yalute Antiokiya.
11.23: Loyafichile ako nakona isungu lya Nguluwi kwa wala wanhu, nakasangalala na kuwahimiliza weng'ha wekale kwa kitumbila Mkulu.
11.24: Banaba nayali munhu yawele yanojile na yamemile Muhe Yelile na makundo. Chilundo chikulu cha wanhu nachikwejigwa kwa Mkulu.
11.25: Hamba, Banaba nakaluta Talso kumpala Saulo.
11.26: Loyamuwene kamigala Antiokiya. Na hewo weng'ha weli nawekala na chila chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu kwa mhela umwe wolangusa chilundo chikulu cha wanhu. Ako Antiokiya, ndo kwa mwaluko walanguswa nawachemigwa Wakilistu.
11.27: Mhela wuwo waloli wa Nguluwi wenji nawoya Antiokiya kulawila Yelusalemu.
11.28: Lelo myao yumwe yalinguchemigwa Agabo nakema, na kwa ludali lwa Muhe Yelile kalagula kowa na nzala ng'hulu kuli isi yeng'ha. Nzala ayo nailawila mhela wa ulongozi wa Klaudiyo.
11.29: Wala walanguswa nawamula chila munhu kwa chila choyalinacho yegale chiwatanze wala wanhu wa lukolo lumwe walingikala Yudeya.
11.30: Nawadita ahyo na kumha Banaba na Saulo azo sendi zikungajizwe na kuhilikwa wazigale wawo kwa wasekulu vilongozi wa wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu.

12.1: Habehi na mhela wuwo, mndewa Helodi nakaluka kuchigaza chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu wamwenga.
12.2: Nakamkopola kwa ipanga Yakubu, mng'holoze Yohani.
12.3: Loyawene madito aga ganguwanojeza Wayahudi, nakalutilila, kamibata Petili. Ayo naikoleka mhela wa mvina za mibumunda jilihela usaso.
12.4: Loyabatigwe, Petili nakawohigwa mchinweng'ho, nakawichigwa mmoko mwa vilundo vine vya wamizi wane. Helodi nakalapa kumlavya hazelu loimala mvina ya Pasaka.
12.5: Lelo Petili loyali mchinweng'ho, chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu chali chomlandila kwa Nguluwi vihejile ng'hatu. Mhilisi kangumlavya Petili mchinweng'ho
12.6: Nechilo, Petili loyalikuza lavigwa na Helodi hazelu, Petili nayali yawasile hagati ha wamizi weli. Yali yawohigwe na minyololo mili, na wamizi wali wokwamila mchihindilo chikulu cha chinweng'ho.
12.7: Baho du, mhilisi wa Mkulu nakema habehi na heye na lumuli nalumulichila chila chihengo cha chinweng'ho. Mhilisi nakamdoliza Petili mulubavu kamlilimla yolonga, “Uche himahima!” Bahala du jila minyololo najoyawohigwe mmoko najidumka na kulagala hanyi.
12.8: Mhilisi wa kilanga nakamlonjela, “Wiwohe isali lyako, uvale makwamba gako.” Heye kadita hihyo. Hamba mhilisi ayo nakamlonjela, “Uvale ikoti lyako, umbinze.”
12.9: Petili nakamuwinza kunze ila nahavizelele kota ago gaditigwe na ayo mhilisi wa kilanga gali ga kukomya, nakejesa kota nayali yolota.
12.10: Nawapuluta chihindilo cha mwaluko cha wamizi na cha keli, hamba nawafika mchihindilo cha chuma cha kulawila kunze kuluta kuli muji. Acho chihindilo nachichumuka chiliyeka, na hewo walawa kunze. Nawali wojenda mnzila imwe na baho du yula mhilisi wa kilanga nakamleka Petili nayali yeka.
12.11: Aho ndo Petili hoyavizelele galawile, nakalonga, “Lelo ndo ndivizela kakomya ng'hatu kota Mkulu nakamlajiza mhilisi wa kilanga wa heye kandohola kulawa mmoko ga Helodi na kulawa kuli mbuli zila zose wanhu wa Isilaeli waliwozibeteza.”
12.12: Loyavizelele ayo nakaluta lumwe mbaka haluga ha Maliya mayake Yohani yochemigwa Malichi. Amo mng'handa wanhu wali wekungajize womlanda Nguluwi.
12.13: Petili nakahodiza mchihindilo cha kunze na chitumagwa yumwe mhinza yochemigwa Loda nakaluta mchihindilo kumwidichila.
12.14: Ayo mhinza nakalizela lizi lya Petili nakasangalala ng'hatu, lelo honhu ha kuchumula, kabilimila mng'handa na kuwalonjela kota Petili kema kunze hali chihindilo.
12.15: Nawamlonjela yula mhinza, “Kuna lukwale!” Ila heye nakemilila kota nayali yokomya. Na hewo nawamlonjela, “Ayo ka mhilisi wa kilanga wa heye.”
12.16: Mhela awo Petili nakalutilila kuhodisa. Hamba nawachumula chihindilo wamwona Petili, wekala wabubuwale.
12.17: Petili nakawagololela moko wenyamalile mye, kawasimila Mkulu vyoyamlavile mchinweng'ho. Hamba nakawalonjela wakalonje kwa Yakubu na wala wang'holoze, hamba nakoka kaluta honhu hanji.
12.18: Lokuchele, nakulawila lunhwinhwi ng'hatu kwa wala wamizi kwa gala gamfichile Petili.
12.19: Helodi nakalajiza wampale ila nahawamuwene ng'oo. Lelo nakalajiza wala wamizi wauzigwe, kalavya ilajizo wakopoligwe. Hamba nakalawa ako Yudeya kaluta Kaisaliya ako nakoyekale. Kubagama kwa Helodi
12.20: Helodi nakezudizwa ng'hatu na wanhu wa Tilo na Sidoni. Ila hewo nawamhilichila wasenga. Nawampala Blasto tandi yawe banzi ya hewo. Blasto nayali chilongozi wa wamizi wa mijito mng'handa ya mndewa. Hamba nawaluta kwa Helodi wamlande kuwe na kikala goya, kwa vila isi yaliitumbila isi ya undewa kwa chilyo.
12.21: Zuwa limwe ihaguligwe lolifichile, Helodi yavalile ivalo lya chiundewa yekalise mchigoda cha undewa nakawadamlila wanhu.
12.22: Wala wanhu nawatowa iyowe kwa kusangalala wolonga, “Ali lizi lya milungu, haliwele lya munhu.”
12.23: Baho du mhilisi wa Mkulu kamgwisa Helodi hanyi kwa vila nahamtogole Nguluwi. Kadakulwa na ichango, nakabagama.
12.24: Lizi lya Nguluwi nalonjezeka kwenela na kukula.
12.25: Banaba na Saulo lowasindile mijito ya hewo, nawoka kahi Yelusalemu, nawamuhola Yohani yalinguchemigwa Malichi.

13.1: Kuli chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu ako Antiokiya kwali na wanhu wamwe nawali waloli wa Nguluwi na walangusa. Wamwenga wa hewo wali Banaba na Simoni yachemigwe Mtitu na Lukio wa Kilene na Manaeni yonayakulase hamwe na mndewa Helodi hamwe na Saulo.
13.2: Lowali wodita nhambiko zawo kwa Mkulu na kwesela kulya, Muhe Yelile nakalonga, “Mmbagulile Banaba na Saulo kwa mijito yondiwachemele.”
13.3: Lelo lowalandile kwa Nguluwi na kwesela kulya ng'hatu, nawawawichila moko, wawaleka walute. Watumigwe wangudamla ako Kuplo
13.4: Lelo Banaba na Saulo lowatumigwe na Muhe Yelile, nawadulika mbaka Seleukia, na kulawila ako, nawakwina mli itumbwi mbaka chihilwa cha Kupulo.
13.5: Lowafichile Salami nawadamla lizi lya Nguluwi mng'handa za kusalila za Wayahudi. Wali hamwe na Yohani yowatanza.
13.6: Nawajenda nzingo zeng'ha za chihilwa mbaka Pafo. Ako nawamfika mhawi yumwe Myahudi yochemigwa Baali Yesu yochidita kota mloli.
13.7: Ayo munhu yalihamwe na Seligio Paoli, mkulu wa chila chihilwa, yawele na luhala ng'hatu. Seligio Paoli nakawachema Banaba na Saulo leka yahulichize lizi lya Nguluwi.
13.8: Ila yula mhawi Elima kota vyoyali yochemigwa kwa Chigiliki, nakajeza kuwalemela leka yamlemeze ayo mkulu wa chihilwa yaleche kugalamchila makundo ga Kikilistu.
13.9: Lelo Saulo yochemigwa Paoli yawele yamemile Muhe Yelile, nakamnogolela meho ayo mhawi,
13.10: nakalonga, “Kwa mdesi na kwa mhadi ng'hatu hegwe! Hegwe kwa mwana wa Limazoga hegwe! Hegwe kwa mwihe wa choneche chinojile, hambe uleche ne hado kuzihada nzila za Mkulu zigoloche.
13.11: Lelo moko wa Mkulu wokudita vibi, meho hagolola na kolemwela kulona lumuli lwa isanya kwa mhela udo. Baho du chila chinhu chiwa kota ng'hungugu na jiza kwa heye, nakaluka kuluta kuno na aku yopala munhu wa kumibata moko yamlongoze.”
13.12: Yula mkulu wa chihilwa loyawene ago, nakawa munhu yalingumkunda Kilistu Nguluwi nakabubuwala ng'hatu malanguso goyahuliche gamlapile Mkulu. Banaba na Sauli kuli muji wa Antiokiya Pisidia
13.13: Kulawila Pafo, Paoli na wayage nawakwina itumbwi waluta mbaka Pega ako Pamfiliya, ila Yohani nakawaleka, kahiluka Yelusalemu.
13.14: Ila hewo nawalutilila na majendo kulawa Pega mbaka Antiokiya muisi ya Pisidia. Zuwa lya Kwesela nawenjila mli ng'handa ya kusalila, wekalisa.
13.15: Lowasindile kusoma mchitabu cha malajizo ga Musa na gandichigwe ga waloli wa Nguluwi, wala vilongozi wa ng'handa ya kusalila nawawahilichila luzi wolonga, “Wang'holozangu, wone muwele na mbuli ya kuwalonjela wanhu chinhu cha kuwahimiliza, namuwalonjele.”
13.16: Paoli nakema kalavya ulajilo kwa moko, nakaluka kulonga. “Wanhu wa Isilaeli na wanhu wanji weng'ha mlingumngumfugamila Nguluwi, mhulichize!
13.17: Nguluwi wa wanhu awa wa Isilaeli nakawahagula wasekulu wa hetwe, nakawadita awa wawe nhanzi ya wanhu lowali wajenzi kula Misili. Nguluwi nakawalavya ako kwa ludali lwa heye lukulu.
13.18: Nakemilila kwa miyaka makumi gane kula kugunuche.
13.19: Nakazidumya nhanzi zeng'ha za isi ya Kanani nakawapa awo wanhu wa heye ila isi iwe ya hewo.
13.20: Miyaka miya nane na makumi gahano najipuluta. “Hamba kawapa watagusa wawalongoze mbaka mhela wa Samweli loyali mloli wa Nguluwi.
13.21: Aho nawagana wawe na mndewa, na Nguluwi kawapa Saulo, mwana wa Kishi wa nhanzi ya Benjamini, yawe mndewa wa hewo kwa mhela wa miyaka makumi gane.
13.22: Loyamusile Sauli, Nguluwi nakamhagula Daudi, yawe mndewa wa hewo. Nguluwi nalalonga ahi kwa mbuli ya Daudi, yolonga, ‘Ndimona Daudi mwana Jese, ndo munhu yawele na nhumbula ya kumbinza, munhu yula yodita geng'ha gondilingugana kugadita.’
13.23: Kulawila muli lukolo lwa Daudi, Nguluwi, kota vyoyalagane, kawagalila wanhu wa Isilaeli Mlohozi, ayu ndo Yesu.
13.24: Yesu lonayang'hali kwaluka kudita mijito, Yohani nakamlongola yowadamlila wanhu weng'ha wa Isilaeli kota yanguwalapa wamgalamchile Nguluwi nakubatizigwa.
13.25: Yohani loyali yosinda kulonga lizi lya heye nakawalonjela wanhu, Mwanguvizela heni nda whaani, mlohozi? Heni Siwele yula muli ngumbeteza. Ayo yalinguya kunyhalila heni, kamng'hangala kusinda heni, sijeza ne kudohola ng'weso za makwamba ga heye.”
13.26: “Wang'holozangu, lukolo lwa Abulahamu, na wanhu wanji weng'ha muli ngumfugamila Nguluwi! Usenga awu wa ulohozi migalilwa hemwe.
13.27: Mina wenyeng'haye wa Yelusalemu na wakulu wa hewo nahawamzelele Yesu kota mlohozi, kahi hawavizelele lizi lya waloli wa Nguluwi gali ngusomigwa chila Zuwa lya Kwesela. Ahyo, nawadita ulonzi wa waloli wa Nguluwi wenele kwa kumtagusa heye yabagame.
13.28: Hanga, hawawene chinhu chilingumwambuza yabagame, nawamlanda Pilato yamtaguse yabagame.
13.29: Hala howakwete geng'ha gali gandichigwe kumlapa heye, wamdulisa kulawila mumsalaba, wamtila mchilaga.
13.31: Heye kwa mazuwa menji, nakawalawila wala welongoze hamwe kulawila Galilaya mbaka Yelusalemu. Awo ndo wawele sambi walolezi wa heye kuli wanhu wa Isilaeli.
13.32: Na hetwe tuya hano kuwagalila Mbuli Inojile, mbuli yiyila yoyalagane na wasekulu wa hetwe kowegalila,
13.33: Gakoleka lelo kwa chiwalo cha kutulapa hetwe wazukulu wa hewo kwa kumzilipula Yesu. Kota vyoyandichigwe muli Zabuli ya keli. “ ‘Hegwe kwa mwanangu, heni lehano ndangulonga, weng'ha wavizele kota heni nda Nguluwi mhaza wa hegwe.’
13.34: Na gala ga kumzilipula. Yaleche kuhiluka ako nakola, Nguluwi nakalonga ahi, “ ‘Ndokupa utambichizo welile na mbuli za kukomya, zila zotulagane na Daudi.’
13.35: Ena na muli honhu hanji ha lwimbo lwa Zabuli kangulonga, “ ‘Nguluwi homleka Yelile wa heye yole.’
13.36: Ila nahawele Daudi, nayakolile gala goyalingugana Nguluwi mhela wa heye, hamba kabagama na kuza tiligwa behi na wahaza wa heye, na mtufi wa heye lola.
13.37: Ila yula Yesu Nguluwi nayamzilipule naholile hebu.
13.38: Ahyo mvizele wang'holozangu, kukolela munhu ayo, usenga ulingulapa kusilwa gehile, wangudamligwa kwa hemwe.
13.39: Na chila munhu yalingumkunda Yesu kangusilwa gehile geng'ha. Chinhu nachali hambe chikundizwe kuli malajizo ga Musa.
13.40: Milolele lelo, mleche kiting'hana na gala galonjigwe na waloli wa Nguluwi,
13.41: “ ‘Mhulichize hemwe mlingubeza, mpubuse mwajilile! Mina chinhu chondilingudita sambi, mhela wa hemwe, ndo chinhu cho hamkunda hala munhu yakulonjeleni!’ ”
13.42: Paoli na Banaba lowali wolawa muli ila ng'handa ya kusalila, wala wanhu nawawalanda woye kahi Zuwa lya Kwesela ilingwiza, walongase goya mbuli azo.
13.43: Nhing'hano ayo loimalile, Wayahudi wenji na wanhu hawawele Wayahudi wali wenjile nzila ya Chiyahudi yakumuwinza Nguluwi, nawawawinza Paoli na Banaba. Aho awo watumigwa nawadawala na hewo, wawakangaza nhumbula walutilile wetumbila isungu lya Nguluwi.
13.44: Zuwa lya Kwesela loyuyile, behi chila munhu honhu hala nakoya kuhulichiza lizi lya Mkulu.
13.45: Ila Wayahudi lowaliwene alyo ilundo lya wanhu nawona maya, nawalema choyali yolonga Paoli na kumliga.
13.46: Ahyo, Paoli na Banaba nawalonga kwa ludadali ng'hatu, walonga, “Lyali liganigwa lizi lya Nguluwi liwafichile hemwe tandi, ila kwa vila namlema na kiwona hambe mganigwe kupegwa ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, lelo twangukulekani twanguwalutila wanhu hawawele Wayahudi.
13.47: Mina Mkulu Nguluwi nakatulajiza ahi, “ ‘Ndikuwika hegwe uwe lumuli lwa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi, leka uwegalile wanhu ulohozi kwa wanhu wa isi.’ ”
13.48: Wanhu hawawele Wayahudi lowahuliche mbuli azo nawasangalala, watogola wolonga usenga wa Mkulu Nguluwi unoga ng'hatu, na wala wawele wahaguligwe kubochela ukomu wa mazuwa gose ne kuduma, wawa wamkundile Nguluwi.
13.49: Ulonzi wa Mkulu Nguluwi wenela chila honhu kuli honhu hala.
13.50: Vilongozi wa Wayahudi nawawasonjeleza wadala wa nhanzi ya mchanya mwa isi zohawawele Wayahudi wala wali womkunda Nguluwi, na walume wanji watanganiche wa mji ula. Nawaluka kuwagaza Paoli na Banaba, wawawinga walawe honhu hao.
13.51: Lelo watumigwa wakung'huna nhimbwisi ing'hang'hanile mmagulu gao kota upanjilo, hamba nawaluta Ikonio.
13.52: Ila awo walanguswa nawali wamemile usangalalo na Muhe Yelile.

14.1: Kula Ikonio, mbuli zali kota vyozali kula Antiokiya, Paoli na Banaba nawaluta kuli ng'handa ya kusalila ya Wayahudi nakudamla goya na wala wawele Wayahudi wenji na Wagilichi wawa wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu.
14.2: Ila Wayahudi wanji walemile kuwa wanhu wa Nguluwi nawawatumajiza na kiviluchila muli nhumbula ya wanhu hawawele Wayahudi leka wawalemele awo wanhu wa lukolo lumwe.
14.3: Paoli na Banaba nawekala ako mhela uhejile. Nawaweza kulonga ga Mkulu, na Mkulu katawiza ng'hatu luzi loyaulavile kwa mbuli ya kunoga kwa heye, na kudita vinduzanduza na kububuwaza.
14.4: Wanhu wa isi ayo nawesambaluka, wanji nawawalumba moko Wayahudi, na wamwe wali ubanzi wa watumigwa.
14.5: Hamba, wanhu hawawele Wayahudi na Wayahudi, wochitanza na wakulu wa hewo, nawagana kuwaditila vibi awo watumigwa na kuwatowa na maganga.
14.6: Watumigwa lowavizelele mbuli ayo, nawabilimila Lustila na Delibe, Miji ja Lukaonia, na honhu hanji ha habehi.
14.7: Wazangudamla Mbuli Inojile ako. Paoli na Banaba ako Lustila na Delibe
14.8: Kwali na munhu yumwe ako Lustila nayali chete kulawila loyavumbuche nayali hanajenda nehado.
14.9: Munhu ayo nayali yomhulichiza Paoli loyali yodamla. Paoli kazangumlola goya, na loyawene yawele na makundo ga kusilwa utamwa,
14.10: nakayowa, “Winuche wime kwa magulu gako!” Ayo munhu nayali chete wa magulu, baho nakenuka, nakaluka kujenda.
14.11: Wanhu wenji lowawene choyaditile Paoli, nawaluka kuyoweleza kwa ulonzi wa Chilukonia, “Milungu jituyila kwa meho ga wanhu!”
14.12: Banaba nakachemigwa Seusi, na Paoli nakachemigwa Helime, kwa vila heye ndo nayali yolonga.
14.13: Na heye mtambika wa ng'handa ya milungu ja Seusi nayali hanze ha muji kegala isenga ibuguma na nganda za uluwa hali chihindilo chikulu cha muji, heye na wala wanhu weng'ha wazangugana kuwatambichila watumigwa.
14.14: Banaba na Paoli lowahuliche ago, nawavula na kudeganga mivalo ja hewo na kubilimila kuli wala wanhu, wolonga kwa lizi likulu,
14.15: “Wang'holozangu, lekachoni muli ngudita mbuli azi? Na hetwe twayenu twa wanhu kota mwemwe. Twahano kuwadamlila Mbuli Inojile, mjileche aji jimalukolo, mumgalamchile Nguluwi yawele mkomu, Nguluwi yalumbile ulanga na isi, bahali na vinhu vyeng'ha vili mumo.
14.16: Katali Nguluwi nakawaleka wanhu wadite kota vila vyowaganile.
14.17: Ahyo Nguluwi halechile kilajila kwa mbuli zinojile zoyalinguwaditila, kanguwatowela nhonya kulawa kilanga, kanguwagalila mbena mhela wa mbena, kanguwagalila chilyo na kuzimemeza nhumbula za hemwe usangalalo.”
14.18: Hanga nawalonga ahyo na haiwele ubewe kuwalemeza wanhu waleche kuwatambichila.
14.19: Ila Wayahudi wamwe nawoya kulawila Ikonio na Antiokiya mu isi ya Pisidiya, wawadita wanhu welongoze na heye, wamtowa maganga Paoli na kumbulunha mbaka hanze ha muji wochijesa mina nakabagama.
14.20: Ila walanguswa lowekungajize na kumzunguluta, nakenuka na kuhiluka kuli muji. Mitondo yake, heye hamwe na Banaba nawaluta Delibe. Paoli na Banaba wanguhiluka mjini Antiokiya ako Siliya
14.21: Paoli na Banaba lowadamle Mbuli Inojile ako Delibe na wanhu wenji kuwawinza, nawenula majendo kuza Antiokiya kwa kukolela Lustila na Ikonio.
14.22: Nawawakangaza wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu na kuwahimiliza wapone muli makundo. Nawawalonjela, “Itugana hetwe tweng'ha kukolela mli magazo menji leka twinjile mli Undewa wa Nguluwi.”
14.23: Nawawahagula wasekulu mli chila chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu kwa mbuli ya wanhu wa Nguluwi, hamba kwa kumlanda Nguluwi na kwesela kulya, nawawawika hali wamizi wa Mkulu yula wawele womkunda.
14.24: Lowakolile mli isi ya Pisidiya, nawafika Pamfiliya.
14.25: Lowadamle ula usenga ako Pega, nawaluta Ataliya.
14.26: Kulawa ako nawaheluka kwa itumbwi nawahiluka Antiokiya kula aho hamwaluko wali wawichilwe mli wamizi wa Isungu lya Nguluwi kwa mijito ila sambi mina ikoleka.
14.27: Lowafichile ako Antiokiya nawadita nhing'hano na chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu cha hala, nawawalonjela geng'ha Nguluwi nagoyaditile hamwe na hewo, na vyoyawachumulile wanhu hawawele Wayahudi kwinjila mli makundo.
14.28: Nawekala na wala walanguswa kwa mhela uhejile.

15.1: Wanhu wanji nawafika Antiokiya wolawila Yudeya nawaluka kuwalangusa wala wanhu wa lukolo lumwe wolonga, “Wone hamwinjile ikumbi kota mabochelo vyoyalajize Musa, hamloholigwa.”
15.2: Mbuli ayi nayambuza kitwanza ng'hatu, Paoli na Banaba lowalongase na hewo, yamulilwa Paoli na Banaba hamwe na vilongozi wa ng'handa ya Nguluwi ya Antiokiya walute Yelusalemu kuwona wala watumigwa na wasekulu kulapa mbuli ayo.
15.3: Wala wanhu nawawalaga, na hewo lowali wokolela Foinike na Samaliya nawawalonjela wanhu hawawele Wayahudi vyowamgalamchile Nguluwi. Mbuli azo ziwasangalaza ng'hatu chila chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu cheng'ha.
15.4: Lowafichile Yelusalemu nawabocheligwa na chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu, watumigwa na wasekulu, na hewo nawawalonjela gala geng'ha Nguluwi vyoyaditile hamwe na hewo.
15.5: Ila wanhu wamwe walingumkunda Kilistu wali wa chilundo cha Mafalisayo nawema, walonga, “Iwagana wanhu hawawele Wayahudi wenjile ikumbi na kulanguswa kota malajizo ga Musa vyogalingulonga.”
15.6: Lelo watumigwa na wasekulu wadita nhing'hano ya kulola mbuli ayo.
15.7: Lowataguse lukami, Petili nakema, kalonga, “Wang'holozangu, hemwe mvizela kota aho ha mwaluko Nguluwi nakanyhagula heni hali hemwe ndamle Mbuli Inojile kwa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi, wahuliche na kukunda.
15.8: Na heye Nguluwi yazizelele nhumbula za wanhu, nakatawiza kota kawakunda kwa kuwapa na hewo Muhe Yelile kota vyoyatupele hetwe.
15.9: Haditile ubagulo woneche mli hetwe na hewo, nakadita nhumbula za hewo ziwe zelile kwa vila nawamkunda Yesu.
15.10: Lelo lekachoni kumjeza Nguluwi kwa kuwadwika awo walanguswa mhomholo ne wasekulu ne hetwe natulemwela kupapa?
15.11: Ileche kuwa ahyo, leka hetwe twangukunda kota, hetwe kota hila hewo, toloholigwa kukolela igano lya Mkulu Yesu.”
15.12: Chilundo cheng'ha nachikala tulu, nachiwahulichiza Banaba na Paoli wolonga ulajilo wa vinduzanduza na kububuwaza Nguluwi vyoyaditile hali wanhu hawawele Wayahudi.
15.13: Lowasindile kulonga, Yakubu nakaluka kulonga, “Wang'holozangu mhulichize!
15.14: Simoni nakalonga hila Nguluwi aho mwaluko vyoyali yowahangawila wanhu hawawele Wayahudi, nakahagula wanhu wamwe wawe wanhu wa heye.
15.15: Mbuli ayi iwhana ng'hatu na ulonzi wa waloli wa Nguluwi, kota Maandiko Matakatifu vyogalingulonga,
15.16: “ ‘Mkulu nakalonga, lozimala mbuli azi ndohiluka, na kuzenga kahi chibumuli cha Daudi chigwile, ndogongomanya kahi mahame ga heye na kuzenga kahi.
15.17: Aho wanhu wanji weng'ha, wanhu wa isi yeng'ha ndiwachemile wawe wa heni, wompala Mkulu.
15.18: Ahyo ndo vyoyalingulonga Mkulu, yaditile chinhu achi chizeleche kulawila katali.’ ”
15.19: Yakubu nakalutilila kulonga, “Ahyo, kwamula kwa heni ndo aku, tuleche kuwagaza wanhu wali ngumgalamchila Nguluwi,
15.20: ila tuwahilichile lyandiko kuwalonjela waleche kulya vilyo vikokomoche kwa kutambichilwa vimalukolo vya milungu, miyuse na ung'hondwa, waleche kulya miwunde joneche jipobosolwe na waleche kunwa danda.
15.21: Mina kwa Mhela uhejile, ulonzi wa Musa lwali ludamligwa kuli chila honhu na kusomigwa muli ng'handa za kusalila zeng'ha za Wayahudi chila Zuwa lya Kwesela.” Lyandiko kwa wanhu hawawele Wayahudi
15.22: Watumigwa na wasekulu, hamwe na weng'ha wa chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu, nachigana kuwahagula wanhu wamwenga mli hewo na kuwalajiza Antiokiya hamwe na Paoli na Banaba. Wamhagula Yudasi yalinguchemigwa Balisaba na Sila, wala nawazeleche ng'hatu hali hewo.
15.23: Wawapa lyandiko ali, “Hetwe watumigwa na wasekulu, wang'holozenu, twanguwalamsani hemwe muwele wanhu hawawele Wayahudi muwele ako Antiokiya na Siliya na Kilikiya.
15.24: Natuhulika kota wanhu wanji walawile aku kwa hetwe wakuwifyani kwa ulonzi wa hewo, nawazidita nhumbula za hemwe ziwe na lunhwinhwi. Ila nawadita ahyo ne kukundizwa na munhu yoneche kulawila kwa hetwe.
15.25: Ahyo tweng'ha hamwe tugana kuwahagula wanhu wamwe na kuwalajiza kwa hemwe, hamwe na wala tuwaganile hetwe Banaba na Paoli,
15.26: wala wambuze ukomu wa hewo kwa itagwa lya Mkulu wa hetwe Yesu Kilistu.
15.27: Ahyo twanguwalajiza Yudasi na Sila kwa hemwe, hewo wokulonjelani wawo aga gotwandiche.
15.28: Muhe Yelile na hetwe tukunda tuleche kuwadwika mhomolo zinji ila azi zitanganiche,
15.29: mleche kulya vilyo vitambichilwe na jimalukolo, mleche kunwa danda, mleche kulya miwunde ja migongolo jipobosolwe, na miyuse na ung'hondwa. Mowa mditile goya wone mleche kudita mbuli azo. Malumbo!”
15.30: Lowawalajile, awo wasenga nawaluta Antiokiya kula nawachema nhing'hano ya wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu, nawawapa alila lyandiko.
15.31: Lowasomile ago gandichigwe, ulonzi wandikwe nauwapa nhumbula ikangale, nawasangalala ng'hatu.
15.32: Yudasi na Sila, wala na hewo wali waloli wa Nguluwi, nawalongasa na awo wanhu kwa mhela uhejile wowasindamiza nhumbula na kuwemiza.
15.33: Lowekale ako hado hela, wanhu wa Antiokiya nawawalaga wowaganila kikala goya, hamba nawahiluka kwa wawatumile.
15.35: Paoli na Banaba nawapona ako Antiokiya mhela uhejile, wolangusa na kudamla mbuli ulonzi wa Mkulu, hamwe na wanhu wanji wenji. Paoli na Banaba wangibagula
15.36: Mazuwa mado logapulute, Paoli nakamlonjela Banaba, “Tuhiluche tukawajendele wala wanhu chila muji hala hotudamle ulonzi wa Mkulu, tikalolele twetwe vyowalingulutilila.”
15.37: Banaba nakagana wamhole na Yohani yalinguchemigwa Malichi.
15.38: Ila Paoli nahaganile wamhole Yohani Malichi, ayula ako hamwaluko nakawaleka kula Pamfiliya na kulema kitanza mli mijito ja hewo.
15.39: Lelo nakulawila kitwanza wawo yeng'ha, nawalekana. Banaba nakamhola Yohani Malichi, nawakwina meli kuza Kupulo.
15.40: Ila Paoli nakamhagula Sila, hala wanhu wa honhu aho howamuwichile hasi hali udimo wa kunoga kwa heye Mkulu, koka.
15.41: Paoli na miyage Sila nawaluta ako Siliya na Kilikiya, wokangaza nhumbula za chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu.

16.1: Paoli nakafika Delibe na Lustila, kula nayekale mlanguswa yumwe yalinguchemigwa Timoteyi. Mayake na heye nayali mhinza, nayali Myahudi, ila mhaza wa heye nayali Mgilichi.
16.2: Timoteyi nayali na lutogo lukulu hali wala wanhu wa Lustila na Ikonio.
16.3: Paoli nakagana Timoteyi yelongoze na heye mli majendo, ahyo nakamwinjiza ikumbi. Nakadita ahyo kwa vila Wayahudi weng'ha wali wochikala honhu aho nawavizela kuta mhaza wa Timoteyi nayali Mgilichi.
16.4: Loyali yokola chila honhu nakawalonjela wanhu malajizo gala galonjigwe na watumigwa na wasekulu kula Yelusalemu, nakawalonjela wagebate.
16.5: Ahyo chilundo cha wanhu walingumkunda Kilistu waza ngikala mli makundo na wanhu wa Nguluwi wazangonjezeka chila zuwa. Uloli wa Paoli kwa munhu kula Makedonia
16.6: Nawakolela honhu ha Fulugiya na Galatiya leka Muhe Yelile hawakundize kudamla alo luzi mkowa wa Asiya.
16.7: Lowafichile mli mbaka ya Musia, nawajeza kwinjila mkowa wa Bisuniya, ila Muhe wa Yesu hawakundize.
16.8: Wakolela Musia, waluta ne kwima mbaka Tiloa.
16.9: Hamihe yiyo, Paoli nakona ulotezi nakamona munhu yumwe wa Makedoniya yemile hala na kumlanda, “Uloche, uye Makedoniya ututanze!”
16.10: Baho Paoli loyonile ulotezi awo tiwika goya kuza Makedoniya, ne kukawila, tuwele tuvizelele kota Nguluwi katuchema tuwadamlile Mbuli Inojile ya Mkulu. Kulohoka kwa Luda
